For a small set of separate novel games, these simulations predict responses from a new sample of human subjects better even than the most plausibly relevant published human data.
papers.zh_title: 通用社会智能体
papers.zh_abstract: 有用的社会科学理论能够跨情境预测行为。然而，应用一个理论在新情境中进行预测是具有挑战性的：几乎总是需要针对情境特定因素进行临时修改才能做到。我们认为，置于这些新情境模拟中的人工智能智能体提供了一种应用理论的替代方案，只需最少或无需修改。我们提出了一种构建此类“通用”智能体的方法，该方法使用基于理论的自然语言指令、现有的经验数据以及底层人工智能在训练期间获取的知识。为了在不存在该数据生成过程数据的情境中（这在应用预测问题中经常出现）演示该方法，我们设计了一个包含883,320个新颖游戏的异质性群体。人工智能智能体是利用来自一小部分概念相关但结构不同的“种子”游戏的人类数据构建的。在预注册的实验中，平均而言，这些智能体对来自该群体中随机抽取的1,500个游戏的初始人类行为的预测，优于（i）认知层级模型、（ii）博弈论均衡以及（iii）开箱即用的智能体。对于一小部分独立的新颖游戏，这些模拟对来自新一批人类受试者的反应的预测，甚至优于最可能相关的已发表人类数据。

papers.title: Who Gets What in Education: Can School Matching Improve Student Achievement?
papers.authors: Atila Abdulkadiroglu, Parag A. Pathak, Christopher R. Walters
papers.abstract: We examine two approaches to improving urban school systems: changing who gets to go to existing schools (reallocation) and restructuring school portfolios through closures and reconstitution (resource augmentation). Using data from New York City high schools, we estimate models of school effects allowing for both vertical school quality differences and horizontal student-specific match effects. While sophisticated reallocation policies that optimize student-school matches can generate modest educational gains, they are constrained by limited seats at highly effective schools. Simple resource-augmentation policies targeting replacement of low-performing schools achieve comparable improvements with less systemic disruption. Analysis of NYC's school closures reveals that basic graduation rate metrics effectively identify struggling schools, suggesting complex value-added models may be unnecessary for targeting closure decisions. Our findings indicate that capacity constraints, rather than poor school matching, primarily drive educational inequality.
papers.zh_title: 教育中的谁得到什么：学校匹配能否提高学生成绩？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了改善城市学校系统的两种方法：改变谁可以去现有的学校（重新分配），以及通过关闭和重组来调整学校组合（资源扩充）。利用纽约市高中的数据，我们估计了允许存在纵向学校质量差异和横向学生特定匹配效应的学校效应模型。虽然优化学生-学校匹配的复杂重新分配政策可以产生适度的教育收益，但它们受到高效学校名额有限的制约。针对替换表现不佳学校的简单资源扩充政策，在系统性干扰较小的情况下实现了类似的改进。对纽约市学校关闭的分析表明，基本的毕业率指标能有效识别陷入困境的学校，这表明复杂的增值模型可能并非针对关闭决策所必需。我们的研究结果表明，教育不平等的主要驱动因素是容量限制，而非糟糕的学校匹配。

papers.title: Tariffs, Automation, and Business Dynamism
papers.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Aurélien Eyquem
papers.abstract: Can protectionism slow automation and revive business dynamism? We study this question in a dynamic open-economy model with heterogeneous firms, endogenous entry, exporter selection, and task-based production in which routine tasks can be performed by workers or robots. Import tariffs reallocate expenditure toward domestic producers, reshape entry and export incentives, and generate revenues rebated to households. In the baseline, a permanent tariff temporarily raises entry and expands domestic varieties, but reduces output per firm, trade volumes, and intermediate production at factor prices. It also lowers CPI-based marginal costs, making automation less attractive and persistently shifting production toward routine labor. Routine workers benefit from transfers, reduced training, and lower automation, while non-routine workers face wage compression and owners gain from domestic demand and aggregate profits. Aggregate welfare effects depend on automation, training, entry, and rebate incidence. Evidence from the 2018–2019 U.S. tariff episode supports the model’s task-reallocation and entry-timing mechanisms.
papers.zh_title: 关税、自动化与商业活力
papers.zh_abstract: 保护主义能否重振国内生产、减缓自动化并帮助从事常规工作的工人？我们在一个包含异质性企业、内生进入和基于任务的生产的动态开放经济模型中探讨这个问题，其中常规任务可以由工人或机器人完成。进口关税将需求重新分配给国内商品，重塑了加成率和进入激励，并产生了返还给家庭部门的财政收入。因此，关税提高了按市场价格衡量的GDP和消费，并暂时减缓了自动化，尽管按要素价格计算的中间产出和贸易量下降了。收益分配不均：常规工人通过转移支付和减少培训而强劲受益，非常规工人面临相反的工资和返还效应，而企业主总体上获益，因为更高的国内需求和进入扩大了总利润，尽管每家企业价值下降。总体福利收益关键取决于关键假设（自动化、培训、内生进入）以及关税收入如何返还。在统一转移支付的基准情况下，福利最大化的关税低于经典的垄断公式，而替代性的返还方案可能使其大幅变动。总体而言，研究结果警示不应将关税视为再工业化的简单工具，并强调了技术采用和财政归宿在评估保护主义政策中的作用。

papers.title: From Complaint to Action: Technology-Enabled Quality Improvement from Consumer Reviews
papers.authors: Guangyu Cao, Shenghao He, Ginger Zhe Jin
papers.abstract: This paper examines how adopting an automated review monitoring system (ARMS) allows restaurants to translate consumer feedback into operational quality improvements. ARMS provides automated alerts for negative reviews and facilitates back-end work ticket management, reducing the costs of identifying, prioritizing, and addressing issues revealed by customer feedback. Using restaurant-level data on ARMS adoption and consumer reviews, we find that adoption increases average star ratings, lowers the share of negative reviews, and raises the positivity of review text. These improvements are not driven by strategic manipulation; they are greater for restaurants with lower initial ratings and in dimensions previously flagged as poor by consumers, consistent with the ARMS enhancing restaurant response to negative reviews. We also show that ARMS adoption partially crowds out front-end managerial responses, indicating a substitution between operational remediation and public replies, with the effect strongest when staff take a reflective approach to negative reviews. Finally, adoption is associated with greater consumer engagement, reflected in longer and more detailed reviews. Overall, our results suggest that online review systems, when paired with operational technology, can drive substantive quality improvements beyond mere reputation management.
papers.zh_title: 从投诉到行动：基于消费者评论的技术赋能质量改进
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了采用自动化评论监控系统（ARMS）如何使餐厅将消费者反馈转化为运营质量改进。ARMS为负面评论提供自动提醒，并促进后台工作单管理，降低了识别、优先处理和解决客户反馈所揭示问题的成本。利用关于ARMS采用和消费者评论的餐厅层面数据，我们发现采用ARMS提高了平均星级评分，降低了负面评论的比例，并提高了评论文本的积极性。这些改进并非由策略性操纵驱动；对于初始评分较低的餐厅以及消费者先前指出存在问题的维度，改进幅度更大，这与ARMS增强了餐厅对负面评论的回应能力相一致。我们还表明，采用ARMS部分挤出了前端的经理回应，表明运营补救与公开回复之间存在替代关系，当员工对负面评论采取反思性方法时，这种效应最强。最后，采用ARMS与更高的消费者参与度相关，这体现在更长、更详细的评论中。总体而言，我们的结果表明，在线评论系统与运营技术相结合时，可以推动超越单纯声誉管理的实质性质量改进。

papers.title: Alternatives to 911
papers.authors: Bocar A. Ba
papers.abstract: Almost a quarter-billion calls are placed to 911 each year in the United States. A large share of them involve social problems, not crimes or emergencies---yet police are dispatched in response. This review traces how the 911 emergency system's institutional design shapes demand for police, who is excluded from or ill served by this system, and what alternatives exist, including nonemergency lines (with police response), government hotlines (211, 311, 988), civilian crisis teams, and community-based resources. Among the universe of municipal police departments with at least 100 sworn officers in 2020, covering 107 million US residents, police have absorbed broad social service functions, with the availability of formal alternatives restricted to the largest cities. The evidence suggests that the primacy of police reflects institutional reproduction more than public need. I propose priorities for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE, POL；JEL：H0, I0, K0, P0
papers.zh_title: 911的替代方案
papers.zh_abstract: 美国每年有近2.5亿个电话拨打给911。其中很大一部分涉及社会问题，而非犯罪或紧急情况——然而警察却被派遣响应。这篇综述追溯了911应急系统的制度设计如何塑造了对警察的需求，谁被排除在这个系统之外或服务不足，以及存在哪些替代方案，包括非紧急热线（由警察响应）、政府热线（211、311、988）、民事危机应对团队和社区资源。在2020年至少拥有100名宣誓警官的市政警察部门（覆盖1.07亿美国居民）中，警察已经吸收了广泛的社会服务职能，而正式替代方案的可用性仅限于最大的城市。证据表明，警察的首要地位更多地反映了制度再生产，而非公共需求。我提出了未来研究的优先事项。

papers.title: Personnel is Policy: Delegation and Political Misalignment in the Rulemaking Process
papers.authors: Luca Bellodi, Massimo Morelli, Jörg L. Spenkuch, Edoardo Teso, Matia Vannoni, Guo Xu
papers.abstract: We combine comprehensive data on the rulemaking activities of the U.S. federal government with individual-level personnel and voter registration records to study delegation and principal-agent frictions in the development of new regulations. We present three main results. First, even important pieces of new regulation are frequently delegated to career bureaucrats who are politically misaligned with the president. Second, rules that are overseen by misaligned regulators take systematically longer to complete, are more verbose, generate more negative feedback from the public, and are more likely to be challenged in court. Third, in assigning regulators to rules, agency leaders often face a sharp trade-off between political alignment and expertise. Agency frictions notwithstanding, they tend to resolve this trade-off in favor of expertise.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：D73, H1, K2, L5, M5, P0
papers.zh_title: 人事即政策：规则制定过程中的授权与政治错位
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将美国联邦政府规则制定活动的综合数据与个人层面的人事和选民登记记录相结合，研究新法规制定过程中的授权和委托-代理摩擦。我们提出三个主要结果。首先，即使是重要的新法规，也经常被授权给与总统政治立场不一致的职业官僚。其次，由错位的监管者监督的规则，其完成时间系统性更长，措辞更冗长，产生的公众负面反馈更多，并且更有可能在法庭上受到挑战。第三，在将监管者分配到规则时，机构领导经常面临政治立场与专业知识之间的尖锐权衡。尽管存在机构摩擦，他们倾向于以有利于专业知识的方式解决这一权衡。

papers.title: Imitation, Reciprocity, and Community Structure in Norm Transmission: Evidence from Teachers and Students
papers.authors: Victor Lavy, Moses Shayo
papers.abstract: We study how teachers' rule violations in grading affect students' ethical behavior. Using administrative data from high-stakes exams, combining teacher-assigned internal scores with externally graded national exam scores, we track teacher grading violations and subsequent student cheating. We explore three potential mechanisms: imitation (learning that rules can be broken), positive reciprocity (responding favorably to favorable treatment), and negative reciprocity (retaliating against unfavorable treatment). Exploiting within-student variation in exposure to different teachers, we find students are significantly more likely to cheat when teachers break the rules to their detriment (systematically undergrading), consistent with both imitation and negative reciprocity. However, when teachers systematically overgrade, responses vary by community structure. In heterogeneous communities, overgrading increases student cheating, suggesting imitation dominates. In homogeneous communities, students respond by cheating less, consistent with positive reciprocity dominating. This pattern holds across multiple homogeneity measures, including surname concentration and residential clustering. Survey measures of mutual respect and support between students and teachers confirm this pattern.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, POL；JEL：I20, J00
papers.zh_title: 当教师违反规则时：道德行为传播中的模仿、互惠与社区结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究教师在评分中的违规行为如何影响学生的道德行为。利用高风险考试的管理数据，结合教师评定的内部分数与外部评分的国家考试分数，我们追踪教师的评分违规行为以及随后的学生作弊行为。我们探讨了三种潜在机制：模仿（了解到规则可以被打破）、正向互惠（对有利待遇做出积极回应）和负向互惠（对不利待遇进行报复）。利用学生接触不同教师的内部差异，我们发现当教师以对学生不利的方式违反规则（系统性低分）时，学生作弊的可能性显著增加，这与模仿和负向互惠均一致。然而，当教师系统性给高分时，学生的反应因社区结构而异。在异质性社区中，给高分增加了学生作弊，表明模仿占主导地位。在同质性社区中，学生通过减少作弊来回应，这与正向互惠占主导地位一致。这一模式在多种同质性衡量指标（包括姓氏集中度和居住聚类）中均成立。关于学生与教师之间相互尊重和支持的调查测量证实了这一模式。

papers.title: When Do Financial Frictions Matter for Misallocation?
papers.authors: Yan Bai, Dan Lu, Xu Tian, Yajie Wang
papers.abstract: This paper reassesses the role of financial frictions in capital misallocation through a model disciplined by both firm-level borrowing costs and the average revenue product of capital (ARPK). Using Chinese manufacturing data, we document substantial dispersion in ARPK, alongside a strong positive relationship between ARPK and the borrowing costs firms face---patterns absent in U.S. data. We develop a heterogeneous-firm model with endogenous firm-specific borrowing costs and additional capital distortions modeled as exogenous wedges. In this model, eliminating financial frictions raises total factor productivity (TFP) by 25 percentage points. In contrast, without other capital distortions, removing financial frictions increases TFP by less than 2 percentage points. The stark difference arises from the interaction between financial frictions and permanent firm-level distortions, which generate endogenous financial heterogeneity and selection, making productive firms the most constrained. Our findings suggest that financial frictions can be highly distortionary when other sources of misallocation are present.
papers.zh_title: 金融摩擦何时对资源错配重要？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过一个由企业层面借贷成本和资本平均收入产品（ARPK）共同约束的模型，重新评估了金融摩擦在资本错配中的作用。利用中国制造业数据，我们记录了ARPK的巨大离散性，以及ARPK与企业面临的借贷成本之间的强正相关关系——这些模式在美国数据中不存在。我们开发了一个异质性企业模型，其中包含内生的企业特定借贷成本以及建模为外生楔子的额外资本扭曲。在该模型中，消除金融摩擦使全要素生产率（TFP）提高了25个百分点。相比之下，在没有其他资本扭曲的情况下，消除金融摩擦使TFP提高了不到2个百分点。这种显著差异源于金融摩擦与永久性企业层面扭曲之间的相互作用，后者产生了内生的金融异质性和选择效应，使得高生产率企业受到最大的约束。我们的研究结果表明，当存在其他错配来源时，金融摩擦可能具有高度的扭曲性。

papers.title: Restoring Nature, Creating Wealth: Evidence from Rural Households in Africa
papers.authors: Geoffrey Heal, Claudio Rizzi, Simon Xu
papers.abstract: Human-driven degradation of ecosystems threatens both global biodiversity and the livelihoods of communities that depend on natural systems for production and income. Yet empirical evidence on the economic returns to restoring nature remains scarce. We examine whether nature-enhancing interventions can generate measurable improvements in household wealth, in addition to environmental benefits. We study a large-scale agroecological intervention implemented by Trees for the Future (TREES) across farms in sub-Saharan Africa, combining detailed household surveys with high-resolution satellite imagery. We show that quasi-exogenous increases in natural capital lead to substantial gains in household wealth, proxied by livestock ownership, of about 75% by the third year of treatment. Each dollar invested in the intervention returns about $2.28 in direct wealth benefits for participating farmers, before accounting for positive health impacts and carbon sequestration. We further document dramatic increases in tree cover and crop diversity, significant improvements in food security and dietary diversity, and detectable enhancements in vegetation indices measured from space. Together, these results demonstrate that restoring natural capital generates both ecological and economic returns, offering a scalable pathway for nature-positive development in rural economies where biodiversity remains a critical productive asset.
papers.zh_title: 恢复自然，创造财富：来自非洲农村家庭的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 人类驱动的生态系统退化威胁着全球生物多样性以及依赖自然系统进行生产和创收的社区生计。然而，关于恢复自然的经济回报的实证证据仍然稀缺。我们研究了增强自然的干预措施是否能在环境效益之外，为家庭财富带来可衡量的改善。我们研究了由“树木未来”（TREES）组织在撒哈拉以南非洲的农场实施的大规模农业生态干预措施，结合了详细的家庭调查和高分辨率卫星图像。我们表明，自然资本的准外生增长导致家庭财富（以牲畜拥有量为代理指标）大幅增加，到干预的第三年增长约75%。在考虑积极的健康影响和碳封存之前，每投入一美元干预措施，参与农户可获得约2.28美元的直接财富收益。我们进一步记录了树木覆盖率和作物多样性的显著增加，粮食安全和膳食多样性的显著改善，以及从太空测量的植被指数的可检测提升。这些结果共同表明，恢复自然资本既能产生生态回报，也能产生经济回报，为生物多样性仍是关键生产性资产的农村经济提供了一条可扩展的自然积极发展路径。

papers.title: Competition in Health Insurance Markets
papers.authors: Martin Gaynor, Amanda Starc
papers.abstract: The United States relies primarily on private health insurance markets, yet these markets are highly concentrated and becoming more so over time. We document concentration across commercial, Medicare Advantage, and Medicaid markets. We then examine how asymmetric information—particularly adverse selection—interacts with market power to shape premiums, plan design, and consumer welfare. Empirical evidence confirms that insurer consolidation raises premiums. We discuss how antitrust enforcement, risk adjustment, regulation, and informational interventions shape competition and consumer welfare in these markets.
papers.zh_title: 健康保险市场的竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 美国主要依赖私人健康保险市场，然而这些市场高度集中，并且随着时间的推移集中度越来越高。我们记录了商业、医疗保险优势计划和医疗补助市场的集中度。然后，我们研究了信息不对称——特别是逆向选择——如何与市场势力相互作用，从而影响保费、计划设计和消费者福利。实证证据证实，保险公司的整合会提高保费。我们讨论了反垄断执法、风险调整、监管和信息干预如何在这些市场中塑造竞争和消费者福利。

papers.title: The Effects of a Sudden Stop in Low-Skilled Immigration: Evidence from Korea’s Guest Worker Program
papers.authors: Jongkwan Lee, Giovanni Peri, Hee-Seung Yang
papers.abstract: As workforces in high-income countries age and shrink, immigrants increasingly fill entry-level, low-skilled jobs. We examine what happens when this labor supply is abruptly reduced, exploiting South Korea’s sudden suspension of its low-skilled guest worker program following the 2020 COVID-19 border closure. Using policy-driven variation in firms’ pre-pandemic reliance on immigrant labor, we show that the collapse in inflows led to a significant increase in firm exit. Among surviving firms, greater pre-pandemic dependence on immigrant workers resulted in production disruptions and operational delays. Firms did not respond by expanding domestic hiring to replace missing guest workers. Instead, they adjusted by reallocating incumbent Korean employees toward lower-skilled tasks, contributing to occupational downgrading and significant wage declines. These findings suggest that low-skilled immigrant workers were not easily substitutable in the short run and that tighter immigration constraints can impose substantial adjustment costs on both firms and native workers.
papers.zh_title: 低技能移民突然停止的影响：来自韩国客工计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 随着高收入国家的劳动力队伍老龄化和萎缩，移民越来越多地填补入门级、低技能的工作岗位。我们研究了当这种劳动力供给突然减少时会发生什么，利用了韩国在2020年新冠疫情边境关闭后突然暂停其低技能客工计划的情况。利用企业在疫情前对移民劳动力依赖程度的政策驱动差异，我们表明，流入量的骤降导致企业退出显著增加。在幸存企业中，疫情前对移民工人依赖程度更高导致了生产中断和运营延误。企业并未通过扩大国内招聘来填补缺失的客工。相反，它们通过将现有的韩国员工重新分配到技能要求更低的任务来进行调整，这导致了职业降级和显著的工资下降。这些发现表明，低技能移民工人在短期内不易被替代，并且更严格的移民限制可能会给企业和本土工人带来巨大的调整成本。

papers.title: Repression
papers.authors: Gerard Padró I Miquel, Nancy Qian
papers.abstract: Removed at the request of the authors. An updated version will be posted shortly.
papers.zh_title: 压制
papers.zh_abstract: 应作者要求移除。更新版本将很快发布。

papers.title: The Micro-Geography of Persuasion: Randomized Peer Exposure and Legislative Outcomes
papers.authors: Lauren Cohen, Bo Li
papers.abstract: We find that randomly assigned peers play a sizable and unique role in shaping political economy. Closely seated, and exogenously assigned, US Senate peers have a significant impact on Congressional voting, shifting votes by 11.9 percentage points (t=7.34). Physical distance is the largest and most consistent of any characteristic outside of party or state in impacting voting behavior. The distance effect is concentrated in the closest peers, existing for up to 19.6 feet on the Senate floor, then dissipating. Close peers additionally increase the probability of aisle-crossing (voting with the opposite party), with the aisle-crossing impact being roughly eight times larger on the final votes on bills. We then utilize a state-of-the-art AI-enhanced computer vision model based on real-time interactions using CSPAN video data at every 10-second interval amongst Congressional members. Using these observed interactions, we find that face-to-face interactions are associated with significant impacts on immediately pending votes. The interactions are largely driven by distance, with aisle-seated Senators from both parties being amongst the most likely to engage in face-to-face interactions across party lines. By conducting counterfactuals through randomized Senate seating, 59 consequential bills would have switched outcomes over our 30-year sample period.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：C53, C82, D72, D78, D82, H10, P0
papers.zh_title: 说服的微观地理学：随机同伴暴露与立法结果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发现，随机分配的同伴在塑造政治经济学方面发挥着巨大且独特的作用。座位相邻且外生分配的美国参议院同伴对国会投票产生了显著影响，使投票偏移了11.9个百分点（t=7.34）。在影响投票行为的任何特征中，除了党派或州之外，物理距离是影响最大且最一致的因素。距离效应集中在最近的同伴身上，在参议院会场内最远可达19.6英尺，之后便消散。近距离同伴还增加了跨党派投票（与对立党派一起投票）的可能性，在法案的最终投票中，跨党派投票的影响大约是其八倍。然后，我们利用了一个基于CSPAN视频数据、每10秒间隔捕捉国会成员间实时互动的、最先进的人工智能增强计算机视觉模型。通过这些观察到的互动，我们发现面对面互动对即将表决的投票产生了显著影响。这些互动很大程度上是由距离驱动的，来自两党的靠过道就座的参议员是最有可能进行跨党派面对面互动的群体之一。通过随机安排参议院座次进行反事实模拟，在我们的30年样本期内，有59项重要法案的结果会发生改变。

papers.title: Measuring Payroll Employment: A Note on the Current Employment Statistics
papers.authors: Ryan A. Decker
papers.abstract: The Bureau of Labor Statistics Current Employment Statistics (CES) is a high-quality, closely watched indicator of labor market health and the business cycle. Recent revisions to CES data have garnered significant attention. I provide a primer on CES methodology and analyze recent survey response and data revision patterns. CES revisions actually tend to be small, but they have increased in recent years. I discuss potential ideas for improving the CES including expanding the data sample with internal or external data, adjusting the estimates with benchmark data more often, and enhancing estimation of establishment birth and death.
papers.zh_title: 衡量薪资就业：关于当前就业统计的说明
papers.zh_abstract: 劳工统计局当前就业统计（CES）是一个高质量、备受关注的劳动力市场健康状况和商业周期指标。近期对CES数据的修订引起了广泛关注。我提供了CES方法的入门介绍，并分析了近期的调查响应和数据修订模式。实际上，CES的修订往往很小，但近年来有所增加。我讨论了改进CES的潜在想法，包括利用内部或外部数据扩大数据样本、更频繁地使用基准数据调整估计值，以及改进对机构成立和倒闭的估算。

papers.title: Why People Disagree About What Drives Stock Prices
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Fabrizio Perri, Jonathan Heathcote
papers.abstract: We show that, to a first-order approximation, estimates of fluctuations in Shiller’s fundamental price relative to observed price depend primarily on forecasts of long-horizon expected returns. Researchers using different measures of cash flow and valuation may reach different conclusions about the extent to which values fluctuate excessively relative to fundamentals, but that is only because return forecasts based on different cash-flow-to-value measures will be different. Using U.S. equity data, we demonstrate that the amount of persistence in expected returns, rather than the amount of short-run return predictability, is the key determinant of implied excess volatility. Disagreements about stock market valuation therefore reduce to disagreements about long-run expected returns.
papers.zh_title: 为什么人们对股票价格的驱动因素存在分歧
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，在一阶近似下，对席勒基础价格相对于观察价格波动的估计，主要取决于对长期预期收益的预测。使用不同现金流和估值指标的研究人员可能会得出关于价值相对于基本面过度波动程度的不同结论，但这仅仅是因为基于不同现金流-价值比率的收益预测会有所不同。利用美国股票数据，我们证明了预期收益的持续性程度，而非短期收益可预测性的程度，是隐含过度波动性的关键决定因素。因此，关于股票市场估值的分歧归结为对长期预期收益的分歧。

papers.title: The Labor Market Consequences of Rapid Sectoral Shifts
papers.authors: John R. Grigsby, Nathan Zorzi
papers.abstract: Sectoral shifts require costly labor reallocation for workers, fueling concerns about how quickly they occur. We study how the pace of such sectoral shifts affects workers at risk of displacement. We develop a life-cycle model with skill heterogeneity and job ladders where labor demand gradually rises in one sector and declines in another. The model reveals three novel insights. First, workers’ lifetime earnings are strongly non-linear and even nonmonotonic in the horizon over which the transition unfolds. Second, more and more workers benefit on the extensive margin as the transition accelerates, but the tail of losses becomes thicker on the intensive margin. Third, labor market frictions are important to quantify these non-linearities. We apply our model to the climate transition and find substantial earnings losses from a transition ending in 2060. Completing the transition ten years earlier reduces average losses, but raises losses in the tail by a fifth.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：E0, E20, E24, E60, E64, J20, J23, J24, J3, J62, Q52, Q58
papers.zh_title: 快速部门转移的劳动力市场后果
papers.zh_abstract: 部门转移要求工人进行代价高昂的劳动力重新配置，这加剧了人们对转移发生速度的担忧。我们研究了这种部门转移的速度如何影响面临失业风险的工人。我们开发了一个具有技能异质性和工作阶梯的生命周期模型，其中劳动力需求在一个部门逐渐上升，在另一个部门逐渐下降。该模型揭示了三个新颖的见解。首先，工人的终生收入在转型展开的时间跨度上呈现出强烈的非线性，甚至是非单调性。其次，随着转型加速，越来越多的工人在广延边际上受益，但在集约边际上损失的尾部变得更厚。第三，劳动力市场摩擦对于量化这些非线性至关重要。我们将模型应用于气候转型，发现到2060年结束的转型会导致可观的收入损失。提前十年完成转型会降低平均损失，但会使尾部损失增加五分之一。

papers.title: The Market Value of Reproductive Rights: Evidence from U.S. Housing Markets
papers.authors: Daniel L. Dench, Kelly Lifchez, Jason M. Lindo, Jancy Ling Liu
papers.abstract: We estimate the market value of reproductive rights as capitalized into U.S. housing markets. We do so using a synthetic difference-in-differences design to evaluate the effects of total abortion bans following the 2022 Dobbs decision, and drawing on housing market indices from Zillow and vacancy rate data from the U.S. Census Bureau's Housing Vacancy Survey. The results indicate that total abortion bans reduced rents by an average of 2.2% from July 2022 through June 2025, with the effect reaching 4.0% in the most recent year. Over the same horizon, bans increased rental vacancy rates by an average of 1.1 percentage points, with the effect reaching 1.8 percentage points in the most recent year. Estimates for home values and homeowner vacancy rates are similar in magnitude but less precise.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J13, K23, R21, R23, R31
papers.zh_title: 生育权的市场价值：来自美国住房市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了生育权资本化到美国住房市场中的市场价值。我们采用合成双重差分设计来评估2022年多布斯案判决后全面堕胎禁令的影响，并利用了Zillow的住房市场指数和美国人口普查局住房空置调查的空置率数据。结果表明，从2022年7月到2025年6月，全面堕胎禁令使租金平均降低了2.2%，在最近一年内影响达到4.0%。在同一时期，禁令使租赁空置率平均增加了1.1个百分点，在最近一年内影响达到1.8个百分点。对房屋价值和业主空置率的估计在幅度上相似，但精确度较低。

papers.title: Mergers and Non-contractible Benefits: The Employees' Perspective
papers.authors: Wei Cai, Andrea Prat, Jiehang Yu
papers.abstract: Incomplete contract theory, supported by anecdotal evidence, suggests that when a firm is acquired, workers may be adversely affected in non-contractible aspects of their work experience. This paper empirically investigates this prediction by combining M\\&A events from the Refinitiv database and web-scraped Glassdoor review data. We find that: (a) Controlling for pre-trends, mergers lead to lower satisfaction, especially on non-contractible dimensions of the employee experience (about 6% of a standard deviation); (b) The effect is stronger in the target firm than in the acquiring firm; (c) Text analysis of employee comments indicates that the decline in satisfaction is primarily associated with perceived breaches of implicit contracts. Our findings indicate that mergers may reduce workers' job utility through non-monetary channels.
papers.zh_title: 并购与非契约性利益：员工视角
papers.zh_abstract: 不完全契约理论（并有轶事证据支持）表明，当一家公司被收购时，员工在工作体验的非契约性方面可能会受到不利影响。本文通过结合 Refinitiv 数据库中的并购事件和网络爬取的 Glassdoor 评论数据，对这一预测进行了实证研究。我们发现：(a) 在控制事前趋势的情况下，并购导致员工满意度下降，尤其是在员工体验的非契约性维度上（约 0.06 个标准差）；(b) 这种效应在目标公司中比在收购公司中更强；(c) 对员工评论的文本分析表明，满意度的下降主要与感知到的隐性契约被违背有关。我们的研究结果表明，并购可能通过非货币渠道降低员工的工作效用。

papers.title: How does AI Distribute the pie? Large Language Models and the Ultimatum Game.
papers.authors: Douglas K.G. Araujo, Harald Uhlig
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly tasked with autonomous decision making, understanding their behavior in strategic settings is crucial. We investigate the choices of various LLMs in the Ultimatum Game, a setting where human behavior notably deviates from theoretical rationality. We conduct experiments varying the stake size and the nature of the opponent (Human vs. AI) across both Proposer and Responder roles. Three key results emerge. First, LLM behavior is heterogeneous but predictable when conditioning on stake size and player types. Second, while some models approximate the rational benchmark and others mimic human social preferences, a distinct “altruistic” mode emerges where LLMs propose hyper-fair distributions (greater than 50%). Third, LLM Proposers forgo a large share of total payoff, and an even larger share when the Responder is human. These findings highlight the need for careful testing before deploying AI agents in economic settings.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能如何分配蛋糕？大语言模型与最后通牒博弈
papers.zh_abstract: 随着大语言模型越来越多地承担自主决策任务，理解它们在战略环境中的行为至关重要。我们研究了各种大语言模型在最后通牒博弈中的选择，这是一个人类行为显著偏离理论理性的场景。我们通过实验改变了赌注大小和对手的性质（人类 vs. 人工智能），并涵盖了提议者和回应者两种角色。出现了三个关键结果。首先，大语言模型的行为是异质性的，但在以赌注大小和玩家类型为条件时是可预测的。其次，虽然一些模型接近理性基准，另一些模型模仿人类的社会偏好，但出现了一种独特的“利他”模式，即大语言模型提出超公平分配方案（大于 50%）。第三，作为提议者的大语言模型放弃了总收益的很大一部分，当回应者是人类时，放弃的份额甚至更大。这些发现强调了在将人工智能代理部署到经济环境中之前进行仔细测试的必要性。

papers.title: Pay Now, Buy Never: The Economics of Consumer Prepayment Schemes
papers.authors: Yixuan Liu, Hua Zhang, Eric Zou
papers.abstract: Prepaid consumption is a common feature of modern consumer markets and is often presented as a mutually beneficial arrangement: consumers receive upfront discounts, and firms secure future sales. We analyze a large-scale Pay Now, Buy Later (PNBL) program in which consumers prepay for restaurant credit with bonuses, and spend the balance later. Using detailed transaction data from over 4 million consumers, we document widespread balance breakage: approximately 40% of prepaid value is never used. Because many consumers underutilize their balances, merchants recover significantly more than the bonus cost. The median firm earns roughly $5.5 in breakage profit for every $1 of bonus credit issued. While PNBL participation does lead to modest increases in consumer spending over time, firms gain substantially more from breakage than from any loyalty-driven revenue. These findings challenge the prevailing win–win narrative: PNBL schemes often result in a significant transfer from consumers to firms. We develop a stylized contract model to illustrate the misaligned incentives firms face, and show through counterfactual analysis that a simple escrow policy with an appropriately chosen deposit requirement can realign firm incentives and generate more consumer-serving outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D12, D90, G23, G41, K20, L14, L81, M31
papers.zh_title: 现在付款，永不消费：消费者预付计划的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 预付消费是现代消费市场的一个常见特征，通常被描述为一种互利的安排：消费者获得预付折扣，企业确保未来销售。我们分析了一个大规模的“现在付款，以后消费”计划，在该计划中，消费者预付资金以获取餐厅消费积分和奖励，并在之后使用余额。利用超过 400 万消费者的详细交易数据，我们记录了广泛的余额破损现象：大约 40% 的预付价值从未被使用。由于许多消费者未充分利用其余额，商家收回的资金远超奖励成本。中位数企业每发放 1 美元的奖励积分，就能获得大约 5.5 美元的破损利润。虽然参与“现在付款，以后消费”计划确实会导致消费者支出随时间适度增加，但企业从破损中获得的收益远大于任何由忠诚度驱动的收入。这些发现挑战了普遍的双赢叙事：“现在付款，以后消费”计划通常导致从消费者到企业的显著财富转移。我们开发了一个简约的契约模型来说明企业面临的激励错位，并通过反事实分析表明，一项简单的、包含适当存款要求的托管政策可以重新调整企业激励，并产生更有利于消费者的结果。

papers.title: When Incentives Aren't Enough: Evidence on Inattention and Imperfect Memory from HIV Medication Adherence
papers.authors: Hang Yu, Jared Stolove, Dean Yang, James Riddell IV, Arlete Mahumane
papers.abstract: Financial incentives are widely used to encourage beneficial behaviors, but their effectiveness may be limited by inattention and imperfect memory. We study this in a randomized trial of HIV medication adherence in Mozambique. Financial incentives alone increase adherence by 10.6 percentage points, while pairing incentives with reminders increases adherence by 24.3 percentage points. We develop a model in which inattention to daily adherence and imperfect memory of payment eligibility reduce incentive effectiveness and show that reminders mitigate both frictions. Detailed medication refill data support the model’s predictions. The results suggest combining incentives with reminders can substantially increase program effectiveness.
papers.zh_title: 当激励不足时：来自HIV药物依从性的关于注意力不集中和记忆不完美的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 经济激励被广泛用于鼓励有益行为，但其有效性可能受到注意力不集中和记忆不完美的限制。我们在莫桑比克进行的一项关于HIV药物依从性的随机试验中研究了这一点。仅提供经济激励使依从性提高了 10.6 个百分点，而将激励与提醒相结合则使依从性提高了 24.3 个百分点。我们开发了一个模型，其中对每日服药依从性的注意力不集中和对付款资格的记忆不完美降低了激励的有效性，并表明提醒可以缓解这两种摩擦。详细的药物补充数据支持了该模型的预测。结果表明，将激励与提醒相结合可以显著提高项目的有效性。

papers.title: The max EPS Paradigm for Corporate Finance
papers.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Alex Chinco
papers.abstract: There are three classic problems in corporate finance: capital structure, real investment, and payout policy. In three companion papers, we characterize the max EPS solution to each one. The max EPS approach delivers an optimal leverage ratio even in the absence of frictions, an investment rule based on comparing yields rather than using a risk-adjusted discount rate, and a payout policy where accretive buybacks are preferred to neutral dividends. Our max EPS model draws a bright line between growth and value. Growth stocks have earnings yields below the riskfree rate; value stocks have earnings yields above it. This single comparison leads the two kinds of firms to pursue different constellations of EPS-maximizing policies. The model also produces easy-to-follow calculations that closely mirror what practitioners actually do. This review article ties together these results to form a new max EPS paradigm for corporate-finance research.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G12, G31, G32, G35, M41
papers.zh_title: 公司金融的最大每股收益范式
papers.zh_abstract: 公司金融中有三个经典问题：资本结构、实际投资和股利政策。在三篇配套论文中，我们分别描述了每个问题的最大EPS解决方案。最大EPS方法即使在无摩擦的情况下也能提供最优杠杆率，一个基于比较收益率而非使用风险调整贴现率的投资规则，以及一个偏好增值性股票回购而非中性股息的股利政策。我们的最大EPS模型在成长股和价值股之间划出了一条清晰的界限。成长股的盈利收益率低于无风险利率；价值股的盈利收益率高于无风险利率。这一单一比较导致这两类公司追求不同的EPS最大化政策组合。该模型还产生了易于遵循的计算方法，与从业者的实际做法非常接近。这篇综述文章将这些结果联系起来，为公司金融研究形成了一个新的最大EPS范式。

papers.title: Loaded Chambers: Organized Interests, Public Opinion, and Policy Responsiveness in the American States
papers.authors: Takuma Iwasaki, Eric A. Baldwin, John J. Donohue, Tai Markman
papers.abstract: Organized interests are thought to influence policy, but whether and when interest group money overrides public opinion remains poorly understood. We investigate how gun interest group money and public opinion shape state gun laws. To test which force drives policy, we link 25 years of campaign finance records to a novel Gun Law Index paired with original estimates of constituent sentiment, 2000--2024. We show that pro-gun contributions produce deregulatory changes under Republican trifectas, while gun safety contributions generate regulatory tightening under Democratic trifectas. Using an instrumental variable design, we find that constituent sentiment does not causally predict policy change under Republican or Democratic trifectas. We document one of the most striking failures of democratic responsiveness in the history of the American Republic: while the twelve states in which universal background checks command at least 90% support have adopted them, only 8 other states have done so among the 36 states that have support between 80-90%, while assault weapons bans and concealed carry restrictions also enjoy durable majority support across 36 states, yet there has been far greater deregulation than regulation for both measures. These patterns provide unequivocal evidence that organized interests, rather than constituent preferences, drive gun policy in the United States.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, POL；JEL：C21, C23, C36, D72, D78, H70, I18, K14, K16, P10
papers.zh_title: 上膛的议院：美国各州中的组织利益、公众意见与政策回应性
papers.zh_abstract: 人们认为组织利益会影响政策，但利益集团资金何时以及是否会凌驾于公众意见之上，这一点仍知之甚少。我们研究了枪支利益集团资金和公众意见如何塑造各州的枪支法律。为了检验哪种力量驱动政策，我们将25年的竞选财务记录与一个新的枪支法律指数以及2000-2024年选民情绪的原始估计值联系起来。我们表明，在共和党一党控制州政府的情况下，支持枪支的捐款会产生放松管制的变革，而枪支安全捐款在民主党一党控制州政府的情况下会产生加强管制的变革。使用工具变量设计，我们发现，在共和党或民主党一党控制州政府的情况下，选民情绪并不能因果性地预测政策变化。我们记录了美利坚共和国历史上民主回应性最显著的失败之一：虽然普遍背景调查获得至少90%支持的12个州已经采纳了该政策，但在支持率在80-90%之间的36个州中，只有8个其他州也这样做了，同时，攻击性武器禁令和隐蔽携带限制在36个州也享有持久的多数支持，然而这两项措施出现的放松管制远远多于加强管制。这些模式提供了明确的证据，表明在美国，是组织利益而非选民偏好驱动了枪支政策。

papers.title: Household Preferences for Women’s Employment: A Field Experiment in Bangladesh
papers.authors: Yueh-ya Hsu, Reshmaan N. Hussam, Erin M. Kelley, Gregory Lane
papers.abstract: This paper investigates household preferences over who should work and whether these preferences are malleable. We document that men and women prefer that husbands work over wives. To understand why, we randomly assign a six-week job to either the husband or wife and document asymmetry: women’s work improves their own wellbeing but not their husbands’, while men’s work improves both partners’ wellbeing. One year later, we surprise households with a work opportunity. Both women and men in households where women were previously employed are more likely to prefer the woman take the job and express fewer concerns about women’s employment in general.
papers.zh_title: 家庭对女性就业的偏好：孟加拉国的一项实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了家庭对谁应该工作的偏好，以及这些偏好是否具有可塑性。我们记录了男性和女性都更偏好丈夫工作而非妻子工作。为了理解原因，我们随机将一份为期六周的工作分配给丈夫或妻子，并记录了不对称性：女性的工作改善了她们自身的福祉，但没有改善其丈夫的福祉；而男性的工作则改善了伴侣双方的福祉。一年后，我们给这些家庭一个意外的工作机会。在女性之前有工作的家庭中，女性和男性都更倾向于让女性接受这份工作，并且对女性就业总体上表达了更少的担忧。

papers.title: The Global Incumbency Advantage
papers.authors: Raphaël Descamps, Benjamin Marx, Vincent Pons, Vincent Rollet
papers.abstract: This paper explores the global incumbency advantage. We first show that existing subnational estimates of the incumbency advantage correlate positively with GDP per capita and democratic quality, and negatively with corruption across countries. Building on this meta-analysis, we then consider all presidential and parliamentary elections held since 1945 to estimate how a national electoral victory affects the probability that winning parties and candidates retain power beyond the term for which they were elected. On average, national election winners benefit from an incumbency advantage, but this effect is short-lived and differs markedly across contexts: it is large in Africa, North America, and Western Europe, but muted or even reversed in other regions. We explore how standard incumbency effects and electoral manipulation contribute to these results. In established democracies, the national incumbency advantage reflects gains in the subsequent electoral performance of election winners. In less democratic regimes, it mainly stems from manipulation of the fairness and the timing of elections. Overall, this advantage is largest in both the most and the least democratic countries, due to radically different types of equilibria.
papers.zh_title: 全球在位者优势
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了全球范围内的在位者优势。我们首先表明，现有的次国家级在位者优势估计值与各国的人均GDP和民主质量呈正相关，与腐败呈负相关。基于这项元分析，我们随后考察了自1945年以来举行的所有总统和议会选举，以估计全国性选举胜利如何影响获胜政党和候选人在其当选任期之后继续掌权的概率。平均而言，全国选举的获胜者受益于在位者优势，但这种效应是短暂的，并且在不同情境下存在显著差异：在非洲、北美和西欧，这种效应很大，但在其他地区则较弱甚至逆转。我们探讨了标准的在位者效应和选举操纵如何促成这些结果。在成熟的民主国家，全国性的在位者优势反映了选举获胜者在后续选举表现中的收益。在民主程度较低的政体中，这种优势主要源于对选举公平性和选举时机的操纵。总体而言，由于截然不同的均衡类型，这种优势在民主程度最高和最低的国家中都是最大的。

papers.title: Mutual Party Extremism
papers.authors: Ivo Welch
papers.abstract: With four political candidates competing first in two primaries and then in a general election, even a modestly polarized electorate can sustain (in equilibrium) much more extremist candidates. However, a party can sustain extremism only if the other side is extreme, too. A small moderation of one side’s voting electorate can trigger a discontinuous collapse of candidate extremism on both sides — a “moderation export” effect. The converse is also true: minute increases in voter polarization on the more moderate side can trigger radical candidate extremism on both sides. Principled candidates can destroy party electability. Distance-related voter abstention favors extremism.
papers.zh_title: 相互的政党极端主义
papers.zh_abstract: 当四位政治候选人首先在两场初选、随后在大选中竞争时，即使是适度两极分化的选民群体也能（在均衡中）维持更为极端的候选人。然而，一个政党只有在另一方也极端的情况下才能维持极端主义。一方选民群体的轻微温和化，可能引发双方候选人极端主义的非连续性崩溃——即一种“温和输出”效应。反之亦然：较温和一方选民两极分化的微小增加，可能引发双方候选人激进的极端主义。有原则的候选人可能摧毁政党的可选性。与距离相关的选民弃权有利于极端主义。

papers.title: Life Cycle Portfolio Choice with Human Capital and Social Security
papers.authors: Jason Scott, John B. Shoven, Sita Slavov, John G. Watson
papers.abstract: Target date funds – which initially invest a large share of retirement savings in stocks and shift gradually towards bonds over the life cycle – are designed to provide a “one stop shop” for retirement investing. The rationale for this pattern is that human capital, which is highest at the start of a worker’s career, is “bond-like.” Thus, utility is maximized when financial wealth is initially invested primarily in stocks, with the investment mix shifting towards bonds as the present value of future labor income declines. We revisit this logic in a dynamic model in which shocks to labor income are correlated with the stock market, and in which Social Security replaces a higher share of income for lower-income individuals. In line with empirical evidence, lower-income individuals in the model experience a higher degree of correlation between labor earnings growth and stock returns. We find that utility-maximizing retirement portfolios can vary greatly across individuals, deviating substantially from the pattern of a target date fund for lower-income individuals.
papers.zh_title: 考虑人力资本与社会保障的生命周期投资组合选择
papers.zh_abstract: 目标日期基金——最初将退休储蓄的很大一部分投资于股票，并在生命周期中逐渐转向债券——旨在为退休投资提供“一站式服务”。这种模式的原理在于，在工作者职业生涯初期最高的人力资本是“类债券”的。因此，当金融财富最初主要投资于股票，并且随着未来劳动收入现值的下降而转向债券时，效用达到最大化。我们在一个动态模型中重新审视这一逻辑，在该模型中，劳动收入的冲击与股票市场相关，并且社会保障为低收入个体替代了更高比例的收入。与经验证据一致，模型中的低收入个体经历了劳动收入增长与股票回报之间更高程度的相关性。我们发现，效用最大化的退休投资组合在不同个体之间可能存在巨大差异，对于低收入个体而言，会大幅偏离目标日期基金的模式。

papers.title: Out of the Black Box: Uncertainty Quantification for LLMs via Conditional Probabilities
papers.authors: Hui Chen, Antoine Didisheim, Luciano A. Somoza
papers.abstract: Autoregressive LLMs generate text by sampling from estimated probability distributions over the next token, conditional on prior context. We use these probabilities to construct an entropy-based measure of prediction uncertainty, termed inner confidence. In news classification, LLM predictions with higher inner confidence are systematically more accurate. To evaluate the measure's economic relevance, we form long-short portfolios based on LLM predictions. The portfolio based on high-confidence predictions achieves a Sharpe ratio about 20\\% higher than the unconditional benchmark, while the one based on low-confidence predictions yields no excess returns. In contrast, self-declared confidence exhibits significant decoding biases and provides no comparable performance gains.
papers.zh_title: 走出黑箱：基于条件概率的大语言模型不确定性量化
papers.zh_abstract: 自回归大语言模型通过从基于先前上下文条件估计的下一个词元概率分布中进行采样来生成文本。我们利用这些概率构建了一个基于熵的预测不确定性度量，称为内部置信度。在新闻分类中，具有更高内部置信度的大语言模型预测在系统上更为准确。为了评估该度量的经济相关性，我们基于大语言模型预测构建了多空投资组合。基于高置信度预测的投资组合实现了比无条件基准高出约20%的夏普比率，而基于低置信度预测的投资组合则未产生超额收益。相比之下，自我声明的置信度表现出显著的解码偏差，并且没有提供可比的绩效提升。

papers.title: Attention (And Money) Is All You Need: Why Universities Are Struggling to Keep AI Talent
papers.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Craig A. Chikis, Emin Dinlersoz, Nathan Goldschlag
papers.abstract: We construct a novel dataset linking academic publication records to U.S. Census employer–employee data to track 42,000 AI researchers over two decades. We document systematic changes in the allocation of AI talent. Industry increasingly attracts younger and foreign-born researchers, while gender representation improves more in academia. The top 1% of publishing industry scientists now earn $1.5 million more annually than comparable academics, a fivefold increase since 2001. Rising wage premia coincide with greater sorting into large incumbent firms. Researchers who move to industry publish less but patent more, consistent with a shift from open science toward proprietary innovation.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：I23, J45, L33, O31
papers.zh_title: 注意力（和金钱）就是一切：为什么大学难以留住人工智能人才
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个新颖的数据集，将学术发表记录与美国人口普查局的雇主-雇员数据相链接，以追踪42,000名人工智能研究人员长达二十年的动态。我们记录了人工智能人才配置的系统性变化。产业界日益吸引更年轻和外国出生的研究人员，而学术界在性别代表性方面改善更多。顶尖1%的产业界发表科学家的年收入现在比同类学术人员高出150万美元，自2001年以来增长了五倍。不断上升的工资溢价与向大型在位企业更大程度的分类效应同时发生。转向产业界的研究人员发表论文减少但专利增加，这与从开放科学向专有创新的转变相一致。

papers.title: Work from Home and Fertility
papers.authors: Steven J. Davis, Cevat Giray Aksoy, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Katelyn Cranney, Mathias Dolls, Pablo Zarate
papers.abstract: We investigate how fertility relates to work from home (WFH) in the post-pandemic era, drawing on original data from our Global Survey of Working Arrangements and U.S. Survey of Working Arrangements and Attitudes. Realized fertility from 2023 to 2025 and future planned fertility are higher among adults who WFH at least one day a week and, for couples, higher yet when both partners do so. Estimated lifetime fertility is greater by 0.32 children per woman when both partners WFH one or more days per week as compared to the case where neither does. The implications for national fertility rates differ across countries due mainly to large differences in WFH rates. In a complementary analysis using other U.S. data before and after the pandemic, one-year fertility rates rise with WFH opportunities in one's own occupation and, for couples, in the partner's occupation.
papers.zh_title: 居家办公与生育率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自我们的全球工作安排调查和美国工作安排与态度调查的原始数据，研究了在后疫情时代生育率与居家办公之间的关系。在每周至少居家办公一天的成年人中，以及对于伴侣双方都如此做的夫妇而言，2023年至2025年的已实现生育率和未来的计划生育率都更高。与双方都不居家办公的情况相比，当伴侣双方每周居家办公一天或以上时，估计的终身生育率每名女性高出0.32个孩子。对各国国家生育率的影响有所不同，这主要是由于居家办公率的巨大差异。在一项使用疫情前后其他美国数据的补充分析中，一年的生育率随着个人自身职业中的居家办公机会以及（对于夫妇而言）伴侣职业中的居家办公机会而上升。

papers.title: The Universal Pursuit of Safety and the Demand for (Lethal, Non-Lethal or No) Guns
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Joshua Schwartzstein, Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: Lethal firearm ownership is deeply polarizing in the United States. We show that beneath this polarization, owners and non-owners share a common objective — safety — but disagree sharply about whether lethal firearms achieve it. Using an original survey of more than 5,400 respondents combined with randomized experiments, we document that owners feel safe and confident with firearms, while non-owners on balance feel less safe around them and perceive large private costs and social harms. Demand for lethal firearms is nonetheless potentially large and growing: one-third of non-owners express interest in acquiring one — these individuals report the lowest day-to-day safety — while very few owners would consider reducing their holdings. Persuading owners to relinquish firearms without any replacement appears unrealistic; the more tractable margins may be safe storage and non-lethal substitution for additional purchases. We organize these patterns through a framework centered on a perceived safety possibilities frontier (SPF) — the safety outcomes a household believes achievable with different combinations of lethal and non-lethal tools. Households may differ in firearm demand because they face different risk environments, weigh protective benefits against harms differently, or hold different beliefs about the frontier. Our descriptive evidence points to heterogeneous beliefs as important drivers, suggesting that levers such as information could shift the perceived frontier. These patterns motivate three experimental treatments: one on the private legal/medical costs of lethal firearm ownership, and two on a non-lethal firearm (NLFA), with and without a conservative pundit’s endorsement. The private-cost treatment increases concern about harms among all respondents and support for safe storage policies, and modestly raises stated willingness to keep lethal firearms locked. NLFA treatments raise willingness to pay for an NLFA, to keep lethal firearms locked, and support for incapacitating over lethal firearms and for policies encouraging NLFAs. These effects are largely persistent. Importantly, NLFA information does not increase willingness to reduce lethal firearm ownership but does increase willingness to store lethal firearms safely. Our results suggest that many owners perceive the SPF differently from nonowners, neglecting harms or less-lethal alternatives, yet remain open to such tools. Overall, individuals share a common goal — safety — yet disagree about the means. Although these disagreements appear entrenched, people remain receptive to alternatives that might command broader agreement.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, PE, POL；JEL：H0, H80, I1, K0
papers.zh_title: 对安全的普遍追求与对（致命、非致命或没有）枪支的需求
papers.zh_abstract: 致命枪支拥有权在美国是深度两极分化的。我们表明，在这种两极分化之下，拥有者和非拥有者共享一个共同目标——安全——但在致命枪支能否实现这一目标上存在严重分歧。利用一项包含5,400多名受访者的原始调查并结合随机实验，我们记录了拥有者使用枪支感到安全自信，而非拥有者总体上感觉不太安全，并感知到巨大的私人成本和社会危害。然而，对致命枪支的需求可能很大且在增长：三分之一的非拥有者表示有兴趣获得一支——这些人报告了最低的日常安全感——而很少有拥有者会考虑减少其持有量。说服拥有者放弃枪支而不提供任何替代品似乎不现实；更易处理的边际可能是安全储存和为额外购买提供非致命替代品。我们通过一个以感知安全可能性边界（SPF）为中心的框架来组织这些模式——该边界描述了一个家庭认为通过不同致命和非致命工具组合可以实现的安全结果。家庭可能因面临不同的风险环境、对保护性收益与危害的权衡不同，或对该边界持有不同信念，而在枪支需求上存在差异。我们的描述性证据指出，异质性信念是重要的驱动因素，表明信息等杠杆可能改变感知的边界。这些模式激发了三个实验处理：一个关于致命枪支拥有的私人法律/医疗成本，两个关于非致命枪支（NLFA），分别有和没有一位保守派权威人士的背书。私人成本处理增加了所有受访者对危害的担忧和对安全储存政策的支持，并适度提高了将致命枪支锁起来的陈述意愿。非致命枪支处理提高了对非致命枪支的支付意愿、将致命枪支锁起来的意愿、对非致命性而非致命性枪支的支持，以及对鼓励非致命枪支政策的支持。这些效应在很大程度上是持久的。重要的是，非致命枪支信息并未增加减少致命枪支拥有的意愿，但确实增加了安全储存致命枪支的意愿。我们的结果表明，许多拥有者与非拥有者对安全可能性边界的感知不同，忽视了危害或非致命替代方案，但仍然对这些工具持开放态度。总体而言，个体共享一个共同目标——安全——但对实现手段存在分歧。尽管这些分歧看似根深蒂固，但人们仍然愿意接受可能获得更广泛共识的替代方案。

papers.title: Cutting Costs or Cutting Corners: Asset Reallocation in Oil and Gas Production
papers.authors: Sarah C. Armitage, Judson Boomhower, Catherine Hausman
papers.abstract: Reallocation of assets across firms can lead to efficiency gains, but it can also lead to distortions via rent-seeking. We examine the link between asset reallocation and rent-seeking enabled by differences in the expected cost of environmental liabilities. Focusing on the US oil and gas industry, we develop a conceptual framework that incorporates both firm specialization in well types and the judgment-proof problem, by which undercapitalized firms can avoid environmental liabilities. We then build a novel dataset with hundreds of thousands of well transfers over 1992 to 2023, showing that oil and gas wells are transferred frequently, particularly as they age and their revenues decline. Moreover, low-value wells are especially likely to be transferred to low-value firms. Transferred wells produce similar amounts in later years, but are less likely to be plugged – thus posing greater environmental risk. We conclude with policy implications related to well plugging, bonding requirements, and decarbonization.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, LE；JEL：G33, G34, L25, L71, Q35, Q58
papers.zh_title: 削减成本还是偷工减料：油气生产中的资产重新配置
papers.zh_abstract: 资产在企业间的重新配置可以带来效率提升，但也可能通过寻租导致扭曲。我们研究了资产重新配置与由环境负债预期成本差异所促成的寻租之间的联系。聚焦于美国石油和天然气行业，我们构建了一个概念框架，该框架同时包含了企业在油井类型上的专业化以及“判决难题”——即资本不足的企业可以逃避环境责任。随后，我们构建了一个包含1992年至2023年间数十万次油井转让的新颖数据集，表明油气井被频繁转让，尤其是在它们老化且收入下降时。此外，低价值油井尤其可能被转让给低价值企业。被转让的油井在后续年份产量相似，但被堵塞的可能性更低——因此构成了更大的环境风险。最后，我们得出了与油井堵塞、保证金要求和脱碳相关的政策启示。

papers.title: max EPS Payout Policy
papers.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Alex Chinco
papers.abstract: Holding cash has a cost. For an EPS-maximizing CEO, that cost equals her firm’s earnings yield. EPS maximizers retain cash when they can get an even higher yield by investing the money. Otherwise, they return cash to shareholders. This is the EPS-maximizing payout policy. Growth stocks (EY < rf) never return cash because they can clear their low earnings-yield hurdle by investing in risk-free bonds. Value stocks (EY > rf) face a higher hurdle, which makes cash their cheapest source of capital but also raises the opportunity cost of retention. Value stocks return cash when they cannot invest in enough high-yield projects to make up for the higher cost. Paradoxically, the firms that are most likely to distribute cash—deep value stocks (EY ≫ rf)—are also the ones for whom internal cash is cheapest relative to external financing. Dividends and buybacks both deliver the same value to shareholders, but only buybacks can be accretive. Hence, EPS-maximizing CEOs prefer to distribute via buybacks. Some firms pay dividends for reasons outside our model. Such departures should concentrate among marginal value stocks (EY ≈ rf + ε) where the accretive pull of buybacks is weakest. Empirically, this logic explains which firms return cash, how they distribute the money, and time-series trends.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G12, G31, G32, G35, M41
papers.zh_title: 最大化每股收益的股利政策
papers.zh_abstract: 持有现金是有成本的。对于一个追求每股收益最大化的CEO而言，该成本等于其公司的盈利收益率。追求每股收益最大化的CEO会在通过投资能获得更高收益率时保留现金。否则，他们会将现金返还给股东。这就是最大化每股收益的股利政策。成长型股票（盈利收益率 < 无风险利率）从不返还现金，因为它们可以通过投资于无风险债券来跨越其较低的盈利收益率门槛。价值型股票（盈利收益率 > 无风险利率）面临更高的门槛，这使得现金成为其最廉价的资本来源，但也提高了留存现金的机会成本。当价值型股票无法投资于足够多的高收益项目以弥补更高成本时，它们会返还现金。矛盾的是，最有可能分配现金的公司——深度价值型股票（盈利收益率 >> 无风险利率）——恰恰也是那些内部现金相对于外部融资最便宜的公司。股息和股票回购都为股东带来相同的价值，但只有股票回购能提升每股收益。因此，追求每股收益最大化的CEO更倾向于通过回购进行分配。一些公司出于我们模型之外的原因支付股息。这种偏离应集中在边际价值型股票（盈利收益率 ≈ 无风险利率 + ε）中，因为在这些股票中，回购对每股收益的提升作用最弱。从实证角度看，这一逻辑解释了哪些公司返还现金、它们如何分配资金以及时间序列趋势。

papers.title: Blockchain Technology for Traditional Finance
papers.authors: Eric Budish, Adi Sunderam
papers.abstract: Blockchain technology as embodied in cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum is comprised of both (a) a novel data structure and (b) a novel trust model. This paper analyzes the potential gains for traditional finance from an idealized version of the novel data structure on its own, with trust instead anchored in traditional sources such as rule of law, reputations, relationships, and collateral. Our framework has two parts. First, we analyze potential improvements for financial transactions that are already taking place. We identify three categories of improvement: (i) reducing real resource costs, (ii) improving balance sheet efficiency, and (iii) reducing intermediation rents. While the value of such improvements is hard to quantify precisely, we estimate that potential gains could be significant, especially the reduction in rents. Second, we analyze the potential for the technology to facilitate new transactions. We identify three channels: (i) making it more technologically difficult to cheat, (ii) making it easier to punish a cheating counterparty in a static sense, and (iii) making it easier to punish a cheating counterparty in a dynamic sense. Our key insight is that the potential gains are large if and only if there is a long tail of relatively low surplus, relatively infrequent transactions for which traditional forms of trust are insufficient. Last, we apply our framework to stablecoins. We conclude that if there are large gains from stablecoins for legal actors they are most likely to come from stablecoins putting pressure on intermediation rents or inefficient regulation, or from the programmability of stablecoins facilitating a large number of small transactions that otherwise would not have been trustworthy.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, ME；JEL：D47, E42, E5, G1, G2
papers.zh_title: 面向传统金融的区块链技术
papers.zh_abstract: 以比特币和以太坊等加密货币为代表的区块链技术，同时包含（a）一种新颖的数据结构和（b）一种新颖的信任模型。本文分析了在信任仍锚定于法治、声誉、关系和抵押品等传统来源的情况下，仅采用理想化的新颖数据结构本身能为传统金融带来的潜在收益。我们的框架包含两个部分。首先，我们分析了对于已经发生的金融交易可能带来的改进。我们识别出三类改进：（i）降低实际资源成本，（ii）改善资产负债表效率，以及（iii）减少中介租金。虽然这些改进的价值难以精确量化，但我们估计潜在收益可能相当可观，尤其是租金的减少。其次，我们分析了该技术促进新交易的潜力。我们识别出三个渠道：（i）在技术上使欺诈更加困难，（ii）在静态意义上更容易惩罚欺诈的交易对手方，以及（iii）在动态意义上更容易惩罚欺诈的交易对手方。我们的关键见解是，当且仅当存在一个长尾的、相对低盈余、相对不频繁的、传统信任形式不足以支撑的交易时，潜在收益才是巨大的。最后，我们将我们的框架应用于稳定币。我们得出结论，如果稳定币能为合法参与者带来巨大收益，那么这些收益最有可能来自稳定币对中介租金或低效监管施加的压力，或者来自稳定币的可编程性促进了大量原本因缺乏信任而无法进行的小额交易。

papers.title: The Emergence of Regional Cultures in the United States
papers.authors: Taylor Jaworski, Erik O. Kimbrough
papers.abstract: This paper recovers the cultural geography of the United States from first-name patterns in census data spanning 1850 to 1930. Using unsupervised clustering of county-level name distributions, we identify spatially coherent cultural regions that align with historically recognized settlement patterns and remain stable across eight decades of economic and institutional change. The deepest division separates North from South, but finer groupings (New England, the Mid-Atlantic, Appalachia, the Deep South) emerge as nested subregions. Formal tests confirm that the recovered clusters are spatially contiguous, temporally persistent, and robust to resampling. The findings bear on whether liberal institutions require cultural homogeneity, whether cultural pluralism is a source of resilience or fragility, and how the imprint of early settlement shapes the practice of self-governance.
papers.zh_title: 美国区域文化的出现
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用1850年至1930年人口普查数据中的名字模式，复原了美国的文化地理。通过对县级名字分布进行无监督聚类，我们识别出空间上连贯的文化区域，这些区域与历史上公认的定居模式相符，并且在跨越八十年经济与制度变迁的时期内保持稳定。最深的划分将北方与南方分开，但更精细的分组（新英格兰、中大西洋地区、阿巴拉契亚地区、深南部）作为嵌套的子区域出现。正式检验证实，所恢复的聚类在空间上是连续的，在时间上是持久的，并且对重抽样具有稳健性。这些发现关系到：自由制度是否需要文化同质性；文化多元主义是韧性的来源还是脆弱的根源；以及早期定居的印记如何塑造自治实践。

papers.title: School Choice and Segregation: Evidence from the Oakland Unified School District
papers.authors: Jesse Rothstein, Ini Umosen, Christopher R. Walters
papers.abstract: We study the prospects for changes in school priorities to reduce income segregation in a context of centralized school assignment, accounting for behavioral responses to school offers. Promoting integration is a central objective for large urban school districts in the US, and reforms to school assignment priorities are a prominent means of pursuing this goal. Such efforts may be constrained by students' decisions to exit the public school system in response to less-preferred school offers. Using data on kindergarten applicants to the Oakland Unified School District (OUSD), we show that offers of spots at first-choice schools boost the likelihood that applicants remain in OUSD. Nevertheless, simulations show that policy reforms giving priority for low-income students at high-income schools can substantially reduce segregation with minimal impacts on retention in the district.
papers.zh_title: 学校选择与隔离：来自奥克兰联合学区的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在集中式学校分配的背景下，改变学校优先权以减少收入隔离的前景，并考虑了学生对学校录取通知的行为反应。促进融合是美国大型城市学区的一个核心目标，而改革学校分配优先权是实现这一目标的重要手段。然而，此类努力可能会受到学生因收到不太喜欢的学校录取通知而选择退出公立学校系统的限制。利用奥克兰联合学区（OUSD）幼儿园申请者的数据，我们表明，获得第一志愿学校的录取通知会增加申请者留在OUSD的可能性。尽管如此，模拟显示，给予低收入学生在高收入学校优先权的政策改革，可以在对学区保留率影响最小的情况下，大幅减少隔离。

papers.title: International Comparison of Physician Incomes
papers.authors: Aidan Buehler, Joshua D. Gottlieb, Jeffrey Hicks, Lisa Laun, Mårten Palme, Maria Polyakova, Victoria Udalova, Maria Ventura
papers.abstract: We compare physician incomes using tax data from the United States, Canada, Sweden, and the Netherlands. Physicians are concentrated in the top percentiles of the income distribution in all four countries, especially in the United States and certain specialties. Physician incomes are highest in the United States, and a decomposition shows that this mainly reflects differences in overall income distributions, rather than physicians’ locations in those distributions. This suggests that broader labor market differences, and thus physicians’ outside options, drive absolute incomes. Shifting US physicians’ incomes to match relative positions in other countries’ distributions would only marginally reduce healthcare spending.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：I13, I18, J24, J31
papers.zh_title: 医生收入的国际比较
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用来自美国、加拿大、瑞典和荷兰的税收数据比较医生收入。在所有四个国家，医生都集中在收入分布的顶端百分位数，尤其是在美国和某些专业领域。美国的医生收入最高，一项分解表明，这主要反映了整体收入分布的差异，而非医生在这些分布中所处位置的差异。这表明，更广泛的劳动力市场差异，以及由此产生的医生的外部选择，决定了绝对收入水平。将美国医生的收入调整为与其他国家分布中相对位置相匹配的水平，只会略微减少医疗支出。

papers.title: Physician Competition: Entry and Substitution
papers.authors: Joshua D. Gottlieb, Sean Nicholson
papers.abstract: We describe competition in the physician market, focusing on how entry barriers and substitution possibilities have changed in recent decades. Regulatory caps on medical school seats and residency slots—especially for high-paying specialties—continue to ration entry, generate high returns for those who gain these slots, and direct the most academically accomplished trainees toward lucrative fields. But trained physicians increasingly compete with nurse practitioners, physician assistants, and other mid-level practitioners in the market for patients. Training of these substitutes has expanded far more rapidly than physician supply. We present key facts about the physician pipeline, a conceptual framework linking specialty earnings to entry barriers, and describe the rise of mid-level providers. These facts mean that effective competition policy in physician markets must look beyond conventional concentration measures and focus on the institutions and laws that govern who can provide medical care.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：I11, J44, L13, L50
papers.zh_title: 医生竞争：进入与替代
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描述了医生市场的竞争，重点关注近几十年来进入壁垒和替代可能性的变化。对医学院名额和住院医师职位（尤其是高薪专业）的监管上限，持续限制着进入，为获得这些职位的人带来高回报，并将学业成就最高的受训者引向利润丰厚的领域。但是，受过培训的医生在患者市场上越来越多地与执业护士、医师助理和其他中级从业人员竞争。这些替代者的培训增长速度远快于医生的供给。我们介绍了关于医生培养管道的关键事实，一个将专业收入与进入壁垒联系起来的框架，并描述了中级医疗服务提供者的崛起。这些事实意味着，有效的医生市场竞争政策必须超越传统的集中度衡量指标，并聚焦于决定谁可以提供医疗服务的机构和法律。

papers.title: Stimulating Auto Markets
papers.authors: David W. Berger, Geoffrey Gee, Nick Turner, Eric Zwick
papers.abstract: How does fiscal stimulus affect durable goods sales and to what extent does stimulus drive inflation? We study this question in the context of how the unprecedented pandemic fiscal stimulus affected household car purchases and auto prices. Using administrative data on vehicle registrations, we exploit the timing of nearly $900 billion in stimulus payments and geographic differences in program exposure to identify causal effects on sales. We find the stimulus increased purchases by 5.5 million vehicles (3.2%) during 2020–2022, implying a medium-run (3-year) marginal propensity to spend (MPX) on autos of 0.19 and a total marginal propensity to consume (MPC) of 0.47. Despite this substantial demand response, fiscal transfers account for less than 20% of the surge in auto prices. In a general equilibrium model with new and used markets, we show how secondary-market interactions dampen inflation. When transfers push households onto the new-car margin, trade-ins expand used supply and limit price increases. This channel weakens when supply is tight or when policy targets borrowing constraints, in which case stimulus manifests more as inflation than output. Non-fiscal factors, including supply constraints, relaxed credit conditions, and preference shifts, explain the majority of the observed inflation.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ME, PE；JEL：D12, E21, E31, E32, E62, H12, H24, H31, H53, L62
papers.zh_title: 刺激汽车市场
papers.zh_abstract: 财政刺激如何影响耐用品销售？刺激在多大程度上推动通胀？我们在大流行期间前所未有的财政刺激如何影响家庭购车和汽车价格的背景下研究这一问题。利用车辆登记的行政数据，我们利用近9000亿美元刺激款项的发放时机以及项目暴露程度的地理差异来识别对销售的因果效应。我们发现，刺激措施在2020-2022年间增加了550万辆（3.2%）的购买量，这意味着汽车的中期（3年）边际支出倾向（MPX）为0.19，总边际消费倾向（MPC）为0.47。尽管需求反应如此显著，但财政转移支付仅占汽车价格飙升的不到20%。在一个包含新车和二手车市场的一般均衡模型中，我们展示了二手车市场的互动如何抑制通胀。当转移支付将家庭推向新车购买决策时，以旧换新增加了二手车的供给，从而限制了价格上涨。当供应紧张或政策针对借贷约束时，这一渠道会减弱，此时刺激措施更多地表现为通胀而非产出增长。非财政因素，包括供应限制、信贷条件放宽和偏好转变，解释了所观察到的大部分通胀。

papers.title: AI in Science
papers.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, John McHale, Alexander Oettl
papers.abstract: We explore the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the knowledge production function. We characterize AI as a tool, not for full automation but rather for augmentation through enhanced search over combinatorial spaces. This leads to increased scientific productivity. We decompose knowledge production into a multi-stage process to shed light on the "jagged frontier" of AI in science, revealing differential returns to different tools across domains (e.g., data-rich biology vs. anomaly-sparse physics) and workflow stages (e.g., strong design aids like AlphaFold vs. subtler question generation tools). We treat human judgment as indispensable for tasks involving abductive inference, contextual nuance, and trade-offs, particularly in data-sparse environments. Drawing on a task-based model that distinguishes "ordinary" from AI-expert scientists, we describe how exogenous improvements in AI yield nonlinear productivity gains amplified by the share of scientists that are AI-experts to underscore the role of AI complements like skills training and organizational design.
papers.zh_title: 科学中的人工智能
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了人工智能（AI）对知识生产函数的影响。我们将AI描述为一种工具，不是用于完全自动化，而是通过增强对组合空间的搜索来进行增强。这导致了科学生产力的提高。我们将知识生产分解为一个多阶段过程，以揭示AI在科学中的“锯齿状前沿”，揭示了不同工具在不同领域（例如，数据丰富的生物学与异常稀疏的物理学）和工作流程阶段（例如，像AlphaFold这样的强大设计辅助工具与更微妙的提问生成工具）的差异化回报。我们认为，在涉及溯因推理、情境细微差别和权衡取舍的任务中，尤其是在数据稀疏的环境中，人类判断是不可或缺的。基于一个区分“普通”科学家和AI专家科学家的任务模型，我们描述了外生的AI改进如何产生非线性的生产力增长，这种增长被AI专家科学家所占的比例放大，从而强调了AI互补品（如技能培训和组织设计）的作用。

papers.title: Easy A’s, Less Pay: The Long-Term Effects of Grade Inflation
papers.authors: Jeffrey T. Denning, Rachel L. Nesbit, Nolan G. Pope, Merrill Warnick
papers.abstract: Average grades continue to rise in the United States, raising the question of how grade inflation impacts students. We provide comprehensive evidence on how teacher grading practices affect students' long-run success. Using administrative high school data from Los Angeles and from Maryland that is linked to postsecondary and earnings records, we develop and validate two teacher-level measures of grade inflation: one measuring average grade inflation and another measuring a teacher's propensity to give a passing grade. These measures of grade inflation are distinct from teacher value-added, with grade inflating teachers having moderately lower cognitive value-added and slightly higher noncognitive value-added. These two measures also differentially impact students' long-term outcomes. Being assigned a higher average grade inflating teacher reduces a student's future test scores, the likelihood of graduating from high school, college enrollment, and ultimately earnings. In contrast, passing grade inflation reduces the likelihood of being held back and increases high school graduation, with limited long-run effects. The cumulative impact is economically significant: a teacher with one standard deviation higher average grade inflation reduces the present discounted value of lifetime earnings of their students by $213,872 per year.
papers.zh_title: 轻松得A，收入更低：成绩膨胀的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的平均成绩持续上升，这引发了成绩膨胀如何影响学生的问题。我们提供了关于教师评分实践如何影响学生长期成功的全面证据。利用来自洛杉矶和马里兰州的高中行政数据，这些数据与高等教育和收入记录相关联，我们开发并验证了两个教师层面的成绩膨胀衡量指标：一个衡量平均成绩膨胀，另一个衡量教师给予及格成绩的倾向。这些成绩膨胀指标与教师增值效应不同，成绩膨胀型教师的认知增值效应中等偏低，而非认知增值效应略高。这两个指标对学生长期结果的影响也不同。被分配给平均成绩膨胀程度更高的教师，会降低学生未来的考试成绩、高中毕业的可能性、大学入学率以及最终的收入。相比之下，及格成绩膨胀降低了留级的可能性，提高了高中毕业率，但长期影响有限。累积影响在经济上意义重大：平均成绩膨胀程度高出一个标准差的教师，会使其学生终身收入的现值每年减少213,872美元。

papers.title: Targeting, Personalization, and Engagement in an Agricultural Advisory Service
papers.authors: Susan Athey, Shawn Cole, Shanjukta Nath, Jessica Zhu
papers.abstract: We conduct a series of iterative experiments to evaluate approaches for optimally targeting calls for an agricultural advisory service serving over one million farmers in rural India. We estimate the value of alternative targeted policies using “off-policy” evaluation on data from randomized call assignments. When we evaluate off-policy using held-out data from the same time periods used to design the targeted policies, we find that targeted policies increase engagement by up to 8%. However, when we design a policy using current data and then implement the policy for randomly selected users in subsequent weeks, our “on-policy” evaluation estimates show realized gains that are substantially smaller. We develop tools to diagnose the causes of this underperformance and adopt a transfer-learning approach to policy learning and off-policy evaluation that accounts for temporal changes in farmer behavior, substantially improving off-policy estimates of performance in subsequent weeks. We further develop novel approaches to targeted policy design that respond to organizational objectives and resource constraints, including distributional goals (e.g., reaching women farmers) and prioritizing farmers likely to benefit most from the information on downstream outcomes (e.g., yields). We propose a method for organizations to quantify trade-offs between objectives, and we demonstrate the value of targeting for alleviating these trade-offs.
papers.zh_title: 农业咨询服务中的目标定位、个性化与参与度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一系列迭代实验，以评估为一项服务于印度农村超过一百万农民的农业咨询服务优化电话呼叫目标定位的方法。我们利用随机呼叫分配的数据，通过“离策略”评估来估计替代性目标定位策略的价值。当我们使用与设计目标定位策略相同时间段内的保留数据进行离策略评估时，我们发现目标定位策略最多可将参与度提高8%。然而，当我们使用当前数据设计一项策略，然后在随后几周内对随机选择的用户实施该策略时，我们的“在策略”评估估计显示，实际收益要小得多。我们开发了诊断这种表现不佳原因的工具，并采用了一种迁移学习方法进行策略学习和离策略评估，该方法考虑了农民行为的时序变化，从而显著改进了对后续几周表现的离策略估计。我们进一步开发了新颖的目标定位策略设计方法，以响应组织目标和资源约束，包括分配目标（例如，覆盖女性农民）以及优先考虑那些最有可能从下游结果（例如，产量）信息中受益的农民。我们提出了一种方法，供组织量化不同目标之间的权衡，并展示了目标定位在缓解这些权衡方面的价值。

papers.title: The Economics of Algorithmic Personalization: Evidence from an Educational Technology Platform
papers.authors: Keshav Agrawal, Susan Athey, Ayush Kanodia, Shanjukta Nath, Emil Palikot
papers.abstract: Can personalized recommendations improve engagement in educational technology? We design, test, and scale a collaborative filtering system for Freadom, an English-learning app for Indian children. A randomized controlled trial (RCT) with 7,750 students shows that personalization, deployed in a single content section, increases engagement by 60% in that section and by 14% app-wide. We then exploit an eligibility threshold in a regression discontinuity design (RDD) to track effects over five months of deployment. For user cohorts receiving personalization during deployment, RDD estimates exceed RCT benchmark by a factor of 2.5, opposite of the “voltage drop" typically observed in policy scale-ups. This provides evidence that, for algorithmic interventions, RCT estimates may be lower bounds on scaled impact rather than upper bounds. However, personalization benefits are front-loaded. Gains concentrate in users’ first weeks, with diminishing returns thereafter. This pattern, combined with the sharp decline in predicted match quality as users exhaust their best content matches, suggests that content availability rather than algorithmic sophistication becomes the binding constraint.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, IO；JEL：C21, C93, I21, L81, M30
papers.zh_title: 算法个性化推荐的经济学：来自教育科技平台的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 个性化推荐能否提高教育科技的参与度？我们为Freadom（一款面向印度儿童的英语学习应用）设计、测试并扩展了一个协同过滤系统。一项包含7,750名学生的随机对照试验表明，在单个内容板块部署个性化推荐，使该板块的参与度提高了60%，整个应用的参与度提高了14%。然后，我们利用断点回归设计中的一个资格阈值，来追踪部署期间超过五个月的效果。对于在部署期间接受个性化推荐的用户群组，断点回归设计的估计值比随机对照试验基准高出2.5倍，这与政策推广中通常观察到的“电压降”现象相反。这提供了证据表明，对于算法干预而言，随机对照试验的估计值可能是规模化影响的低界而非高界。然而，个性化推荐的好处是前期集中的。收益集中在用户使用的头几周，之后边际收益递减。这种模式，加上随着用户耗尽最佳内容匹配而导致的预测匹配质量急剧下降，表明内容可用性而非算法复杂性成为了约束条件。

papers.title: Medicaid Coverage for Obesity Medications: Utilization and Net-of-Rebate Spending
papers.authors: Coady Wing, Wei-Lun Lo, Maddie Potter, Tarik Yuce, Alberto Ortega, John Cawley, Thuy D. Nguyen, Kosali I. Simon
papers.abstract: We document state variation in Medicaid coverage for obesity-indicated GLP-1 medications over time, and use a stacked difference-in-differences design to estimate the effects of coverage on utilization and net-of-rebate spending. Nine quarters out, coverage increases prescriptions for obesity-indicated GLP-1 medications by 0.82 per 100 enrollee-months (SE = 0.10). Coverage had no effect on GLP-1 prescribing for diabetes or cardiovascular indications, suggesting that off-label prescribing of diabetes formulations for obesity is not very common in the Medicaid program. The expansions do not appear to affect consumer spending at major online GLP-1 compounding firms, which suggests that the utilization response in our main analysis reflects new utilization rather than crowd-out. We find that coverage increases net-of-rebate Medicaid spending by $751.6 per 100 enrollee-months (SE = $92.0), compared to $986.9 in gross reimbursements—manufacturer rebates reduce the state’s net spending by approximately 24 percent. Across the 17 states that ever covered obesity-indicated GLP-1 medications by mid 2025, coverage increased Medicaid net spending by around $2.68 billion per year. Extending Medicaid coverage in the remaining states would generate a further $3.63 billion in annual net spending.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, PE；JEL：I11, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 肥胖药物的医疗补助覆盖：使用与净回扣支出
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了各州医疗补助计划对用于肥胖适应症的GLP-1药物覆盖范围随时间的变化，并使用堆叠双重差分设计来估计覆盖范围对使用量和净回扣支出的影响。九个季度后，覆盖范围使每100个参保人-月中用于肥胖适应症的GLP-1药物处方增加了0.82份（标准误=0.10）。覆盖范围对用于糖尿病或心血管适应症的GLP-1处方没有影响，这表明在医疗补助计划中，将糖尿病制剂超说明书用于肥胖的情况并不常见。这些扩展似乎没有影响主要在线GLP-1复方制药公司的消费者支出，这表明我们主要分析中的使用量反应反映了新的使用量而非挤出效应。我们发现，覆盖范围使每100个参保人-月的净回扣医疗补助支出增加了751.6美元（标准误=92.0美元），而总报销额为986.9美元——制造商回扣使州的净支出减少了约24%。在截至2025年中期曾覆盖用于肥胖适应症的GLP-1药物的17个州中，覆盖范围使医疗补助净支出每年增加约26.8亿美元。在其余州扩大医疗补助覆盖范围将每年再产生36.3亿美元的净支出。

papers.title: We've Got You Covered: Firms' Political Stances on Abortion and Labor Market Sorting
papers.authors: Pawel Adrjan, Svenja Gudell, Emily E. Nix, Allison Shrivastava, Jason Sockin, Evan P. Starr
papers.abstract: Amidst rising political polarization, firms engage more frequently with political issues through public statements and policies. This paper examines how firms' stances on polarizing issues impact worker sorting, leveraging announcements from hundreds of employers following the Supreme Court's ruling in Dobbs v. Jackson, overturning federal abortion rights. We introduce a methodology to uncover labor market competitors for each announcing firm based on job seekers' revealed preferences. While announcing firms received more applications from job seekers, particularly in Democratic-leaning states and female-dominated jobs where abortion was outlawed, current employees began searching for jobs elsewhere as employee satisfaction declined, particularly among male-dominated jobs. Smaller companies with less-established reputations experienced the largest effects. When deciding whether to take a sociopolitical stance, firms face a complicated trade-off: attracting culturally-aligned workers at the expense of alienating current ones.
papers.zh_title: 我们为你兜底：企业在堕胎问题上的政治立场与劳动力市场分类
papers.zh_abstract: 在政治两极分化日益加剧的背景下，企业通过公开声明和政策更频繁地介入政治议题。本文研究了企业在两极分化问题上的立场如何影响工人分类，利用了数百家雇主在最高法院对多布斯诉杰克逊妇女健康组织案作出裁决（推翻联邦堕胎权）后发布的公告。我们引入了一种方法，基于求职者的显示性偏好来揭示每个公告企业的劳动力市场竞争者。虽然公告企业收到了更多求职者的申请，尤其是在堕胎被定为非法的民主党倾向州和女性主导的工作岗位，但现有员工开始在其他地方寻找工作，因为员工满意度下降，尤其是在男性主导的工作岗位。声誉较不稳固的小公司受到的影响最大。在决定是否采取社会政治立场时，企业面临着一个复杂的权衡：吸引文化上一致的工人，代价是疏远现有员工。

papers.title: Deep Learning Projects Jurisdiction of New and Proposed Clean Water Act Regulation
papers.authors: Simon Greenhill, Brant J. Walker, Joseph S. Shapiro
papers.abstract: Projecting the effects of proposed policy reforms is challenging because no outcome data exist for regulations that governments have not yet implemented. We propose an ex ante deep learning framework that can project effects of proposed reforms by mapping outcomes observed under past regulations onto the legal criteria of proposed future policies (i.e., by “relabeling”). We apply this framework to study changes in jurisdiction of the US Clean Water Act (CWA). We compare our ex ante deep learning projection of jurisdiction under the Supreme Court’s Sackett decision against widely used projections from domain experts. Ex ante machine learning generates exceptional performance improvements over the leading domain expert model that the US Environmental Protection Agency currently uses, with 65 times more accurate identification of jurisdictional sites. We also develop an ex post deep learning model trained with data after policy implementation. Ex post deep learning performs best. Sackett deregulates one-third of all previously regulated US waters, particularly floodplains and pristine fish habitats, totaling 700,000 deregulated stream miles and 17 million deregulated wetland acres. Deep learning can effectively project consequences of far-reaching regulatory reforms before they are implemented, when projections are both most uncertain and most useful.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PE, POL；JEL：C45, D61, H11, H23, K32, Q25, Q53, Q58, R11
papers.zh_title: 深度学习预测新拟议《清洁水法》法规的管辖范围
papers.zh_abstract: 预测拟议政策改革的效果具有挑战性，因为对于政府尚未实施的法规，不存在结果数据。我们提出了一个事前深度学习框架，该框架可以通过将过去法规下观察到的结果映射到拟议未来政策的法律标准上（即通过“重新标记”），来预测拟议改革的效果。我们将此框架应用于研究美国《清洁水法》管辖范围的变化。我们将我们的事前深度学习预测（针对最高法院Sackett案判决后的管辖范围）与领域专家广泛使用的预测进行了比较。事前机器学习比美国环境保护署目前使用的领先领域专家模型产生了显著的性能提升，对管辖地点的识别准确率提高了65倍。我们还开发了一个事后深度学习模型，该模型使用政策实施后的数据进行训练。事后深度学习表现最佳。Sackett案判决解除了对所有先前受监管的美国水域中三分之一水域的监管，特别是洪泛区和原始鱼类栖息地，总计70,000英里的溪流和1,700万英亩的湿地被解除监管。深度学习可以在影响深远且最不确定但又最有用的监管改革实施之前，有效地预测其后果。

papers.title: Private Credit, Balance Sheets and Financial Stability
papers.authors: Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
papers.abstract: We document new evidence on the capitalization, funding structure, and performance of private credit funds using comprehensive fund- and asset-level data covering most of the industry. Private credit funds are highly capitalized, with equity typically accounting for 65–80% of total assets—more than six times the capitalization of U.S. banks, where equity represents about 10%. Debt usage is moderate and largely reflects bank credit lines used for liquidity management. Fund lives average 10–12 years, while underlying loan maturities are generally shorter, implying little or no maturity mismatch—unlike banks, which fund long-term assets with short-term callable deposits. Private credit portfolios are diversified across industries, geographies, and credit strategies, reducing exposure to correlated shocks. Performance data show positive average net annualized returns with limited downside risk to creditors, as losses are largely borne by equity investors. Overall, private credit funds appear conservatively structured and unlikely to pose systemic risks comparable to traditional banks under their current balance-sheet configurations. We conclude by discussing potential vulnerabilities that could emerge as the sector grows, including governance and disclosure frictions, stress-period dynamics, bank–nonbank linkages, and the transmission of losses through limited partner balance sheets and retail investment vehicles.
papers.zh_title: 私人信贷、资产负债表与金融稳定
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用覆盖该行业大部分领域的综合性基金和资产层面数据，记录了关于私人信贷基金资本化、融资结构和业绩的新证据。私人信贷基金资本化程度很高，股权通常占总资产的65-80%——是美国银行资本化水平的六倍多，后者的股权约占10%。债务使用适度，且主要反映用于流动性管理的银行信贷额度。基金存续期平均为10-12年，而基础贷款期限通常更短，这意味着几乎没有或根本没有期限错配——这与银行不同，银行用短期可随时提取的存款为长期资产融资。私人信贷组合在行业、地域和信贷策略上实现了多元化，减少了对相关冲击的风险敞口。业绩数据显示，平均年化净回报率为正，且债权人的下行风险有限，因为损失主要由股权投资者承担。总体而言，私人信贷基金的结构似乎较为保守，在其当前的资产负债表配置下，不太可能产生与传统银行相当的系统性风险。最后，我们讨论了随着该行业增长可能出现的潜在脆弱性，包括治理和披露摩擦、压力时期动态、银行与非银行关联，以及通过有限合伙人资产负债表和零售投资工具传导的损失。

papers.title: The Effects of California's $20 Fast Food Minimum Wage on Prices
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Olivia Edwards, Jonathan Meer, Joshua D. Nguyen
papers.abstract: We analyze the effect of California's $20 fast food minimum wage (Assembly Bill 1228), enacted in September 2023 and implemented in April 2024, on consumer prices using the Bureau of Labor Statistics' Consumer Price Indices for food away from home across 21 metropolitan statistical areas. Food away from home prices in California's four in-sample MSAs increased by 3.3 to 3.6 percent relative to 17 control MSAs through December 2024. Our estimates are stable across a number of specifications. Placebo tests on price indices for goods and services that were not affected by the policy, including food at home, show no differential increases in California's MSAs. The price increases we estimate likely arise in part from spillovers to the full-service sector, as well as changes in the production functions and product quality choices of limited service restaurants.
papers.zh_title: 加州20美元快餐最低工资对价格的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国劳工统计局21个大都市统计区的在外就餐消费者价格指数，分析了加州20美元快餐最低工资（第1228号议会法案，于2023年9月颁布，2024年4月实施）对消费价格的影响。截至2024年12月，加州四个样本内MSA的在外就餐价格相对于17个控制组MSA上涨了3.3%至3.6%。我们的估计值在多种设定下保持稳定。对未受该政策影响的商品和服务（包括在家食品）价格指数进行的安慰剂检验显示，加州的MSA没有出现差异性的上涨。我们估计的价格上涨可能部分源于对全服务餐饮业的溢出效应，以及有限服务餐厅生产函数和产品质量选择的改变。

papers.title: The Precarious Financial Lives of College Students in Sub-Saharan Africa
papers.authors: Natalie Bau, Corinne Low, Simona Simona, Bryce Steinberg
papers.abstract: Investment in tertiary education in Africa, unlike richer settings, is often portrayed as inequitable and inefficient. Yet, though Africa will produce much of the world’s future workforce, there is little information on college students’ financial constraints. Novel data from a Zambian flagship university show that students are highly financially vulnerable and food insecure, on par with the "ultra-poor.'' Because universities are typically urban, cash poor rural students struggle with high urban costs of living. Being allocated on-campus housing leads to less financial vulnerability and better academic outcomes. Financially supporting African university students could promote both equity and efficiency.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, PE；JEL：I22, I24, I25, I30, O1, O12
papers.zh_title: 撒哈拉以南非洲大学生岌岌可危的财务状况
papers.zh_abstract: 与较富裕地区不同，非洲的高等教育投资常被认为既不公平又低效。然而，尽管非洲将贡献世界未来的大部分劳动力，但关于大学生财务约束的信息却很少。来自赞比亚一所旗舰大学的新数据显示，学生的财务脆弱性和粮食不安全程度非常高，与“极端贫困”人群相当。由于大学通常位于城市，现金匮乏的农村学生难以应对高昂的城市生活成本。被分配校内宿舍能降低财务脆弱性并带来更好的学业成果。为非洲大学生提供财务支持可能同时促进公平和效率。

papers.title: Lender of Last Resort and Local Economic Outcomes
papers.authors: Pawel Janas
papers.abstract: This paper studies the long-run labor market consequences of lender-of-last-resort (LLR) intervention during the Great Depression. I exploit a natural experiment created by the Federal Reserve district border separating counties under the jurisdiction of the Atlanta and St. Louis Federal Reserve Banks. During the banking panic of 1930, the Atlanta Fed aggressively extended liquidity to distressed banks, while the St. Louis Fed largely refrained from intervention.
