Using 2,226 Meta ad experiments, PIE achieves an out-of-sample R2 = 0.88 for incremental conversions per dollar, compared to R2 = 0.19 for industry-standard 7-day last-click attribution. In a decision-making framework, PIE disagrees with RCT-based decisions in only 8–12% of campaigns, compared to 12–20% for last-click attribution. We conclude that PIE can help scale causal measurement from a limited number of RCTs to a large set of non-experimental campaigns.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：L81, L82, L86, M3, M30, M31, M37
papers.zh_title: 基于实验的预测增量（PIE）用于广告测量
papers.zh_abstract: 随机对照试验（RCT）提供了最可信的广告增量估计，但难以规模化。我们提出了基于实验的预测增量（PIE），它将广告测量重新定义为一场战役层面的预测问题。PIE利用一个RCT样本，学习从战役特征到因果效应的映射，然后将其应用于未进行RCT的战役。由于RCT识别了因果效应，PIE可以纳入事后确定的特征——即战役结束后计算的战役层面汇总指标，如测试组结果、曝光率和最后一次点击转化率。这些指标反映了产生处理效应的消费者行为，因此它们携带关于增量的预测信息，尽管它们在因果模型中会是无效的控制变量。利用2226个Meta广告实验，PIE在每美元增量转化上实现了样本外R²=0.88，而行业标准的7天最后一次点击归因的R²=0.19。在一个决策框架中，PIE与基于RCT的决策不一致的战役仅占8-12%，而最后一次点击归因的这一比例为12-20%。我们得出结论，PIE有助于将因果测量从有限数量的RCT扩展到大量非实验性战役。

papers.title: Profit Regulation and Strategic Transfer Pricing by Vertically Integrated Firms: Evidence from Health Care
papers.authors: Pragya Kakani, Eric Yde, Genevieve P. Kanter, Richard G. Frank, Amelia M. Bond
papers.abstract: We provide evidence of strategic transfer pricing by vertically integrated health care firms in response to insurer profit regulations. Insurers increased prices at vertically integrated pharmacies by 9.5% following the introduction of caps on insurer profits in Medicare Part D. We detect larger price increases by insurers that were at greatest risk of exceeding the allowable profit level. More than one-fifth of these higher prices were borne by the federal government. Our analysis illustrates that vertically integrated firms can evade profit regulation by “tunneling” profits to unregulated subsidiaries, undermining regulatory intent and increasing health care spending.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：I11, I13, I18, L14, L22, L41, L51
papers.zh_title: 利润监管与纵向一体化企业的战略性转移定价：来自医疗保健的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了纵向一体化医疗保健企业为应对保险公司利润监管而采取战略性转移定价的证据。在Medicare D部分引入保险公司利润上限后，保险公司将其纵向一体化药房的价格提高了9.5%。我们检测到，那些最有可能超过允许利润水平的保险公司提价幅度更大。这些更高价格中超过五分之一由联邦政府承担。我们的分析表明，纵向一体化企业可以通过将利润“隧道转移”至未受监管的子公司来规避利润监管，从而破坏监管意图并增加医疗保健支出。

papers.title: Cross-Border Product Diffusion: Migrant Networks, Consumer Imports, and Retailer Learning
papers.authors: David Argente, Esteban Méndez, Diana Van Patten
papers.abstract: This paper studies how new varieties enter markets and become locally available. We provide causal evidence of demand externalities that operate in two steps. First, information about new varieties diffuses directly through real-world social ties among consumers. Second, early purchases generate an indirect spillover to firms: local retailers learn from "pioneer'' consumers which new varieties are most likely to succeed and adjust their product offerings accordingly. We study this process in the context of direct-to-consumer imports. Using customs records on individuals' purchases matched to population-wide social networks, international migrant links, and retailer catchment areas, we document economically meaningful demand externalities. Product-specific demand shocks abroad transmit through migrant networks and shift which varieties consumers purchase. Leveraging these shocks as a plausibly exogenous source of local demand variation, we show strong peer effects: prior purchases by close neighbors, coworkers, or friends increase an individual’s likelihood of purchasing the same variety, especially for premium and visible goods. We leverage this result to identify an indirect spillover from consumers to firms: retailers are more likely to add a variety when it becomes popular among consumers in their catchment area. Combining the instrument with linked consumer--retailer data and a self-conducted retailer survey, we show that this response reflects learning about latent demand for varieties not yet stocked locally. Together, social diffusion and retailer learning generate demand multipliers that reshape local product availability and expand access to global variety.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：D22, D8, E02, F1, F14, F15, F6, L2, O1, O12, O3, O30, O47
papers.zh_title: 跨境产品采纳：个人进口、移民网络与国内零售商
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究新产品种类如何进入市场并成为本地可获得的商品。我们提供了需求外部性的因果证据，该外部性分两步运作。首先，关于新产品种类的信息通过消费者之间的现实社会联系直接传播。其次，早期购买对企业产生间接溢出效应：本地零售商从“先驱”消费者那里了解到哪些新产品种类最有可能成功，并相应调整其产品供应。我们在直接面向消费者的进口背景下研究这一过程。利用匹配到全人口社交网络、国际移民联系和零售商辐射范围的个人购买海关记录，我们记录了具有经济意义的需求外部性。来自国外的产品特定需求冲击通过移民网络传播，并改变了消费者购买的产品种类。利用这些冲击作为看似外生的本地需求变化来源，我们展示了强大的同伴效应：邻居、同事或朋友之前的购买增加了个人购买相同种类的可能性，尤其是对于高端和可见商品。我们利用这一结果来识别从消费者到企业的间接溢出效应：当一种产品种类在其辐射范围内的消费者中变得流行时，零售商更有可能增加该种类。结合工具变量、关联的消费者-零售商数据以及自行开展的零售商调查，我们表明这种反应反映了对尚未本地库存的产品种类潜在需求的学习。社会扩散和零售商学习共同产生了需求乘数，重塑了本地产品供应并扩大了对全球产品种类的获取。

papers.title: Nudging Parents out the Door: The Impacts of Parental Encouragement on School Choice and Test Scores
papers.authors: Guthrie Gray-Lobe, Michael Kremer, Joost de Laat, Oluchi Mbonu, Cole Scanlon
papers.abstract: This study evaluates a large-scale SMS outreach program to engage caregivers of students in private primary schools in Kenya. Using a two-stage randomization design, we tested two types of weekly SMS messages: growth-mindset encouragement and personalized performance information. We find two main effects: First, outreach improved test scores by 0.07 standard deviations, with particularly strong gains among initially lower-performing students. This improvement generates 12 learning-adjusted years of schooling per US$100 spent—making it highly cost-effective relative to other education interventions. Second, outreach increased student exit rates by 4.7-5.0 percentage points, with effects concentrated among higher-achieving students (5.7 to 6.6 percent-age points). We develop a theoretical model of vertically differentiated schools where parental engagement affects both learning production and school choice. The model shows that when parents update their understanding of education production through engagement programs, they become more sensitive to perceived school quality differences. This increased sensitivity can lead lower-quality schools to forgo implementing engagement programs—even when costless—as enhanced parental discernment accelerates student exits. Our findings suggest a role for third-party provision of parent engagement programs in competitive education markets.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, IO, LS；JEL：D83, D91, I21, L15, O15
papers.zh_title: 推动家长走出门外：家长鼓励对学校选择和考试成绩的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究评估了一项针对肯尼亚私立小学学生看护人的大规模短信外联项目。使用两阶段随机化设计，我们测试了两种类型的每周短信：成长型思维鼓励和个性化表现信息。我们发现两个主要效应：首先，外联使考试成绩提高了0.07个标准差，在初始成绩较低的学生中效果尤为显著。这一改善使得每花费100美元可获得12个经学习调整的学年——相对于其他教育干预措施而言，这极具成本效益。其次，外联使学生离校率提高了4.7-5.0个百分点，其影响集中在成绩较高的学生中（5.7至6.6个百分点）。我们构建了一个垂直差异化学校的理论模型，其中家长参与既影响学习产出也影响学校选择。该模型表明，当家长通过参与项目更新对教育生产的理解时，他们对感知到的学校质量差异变得更加敏感。这种增强的敏感性可能导致质量较低的学校放弃实施参与项目——即使项目是免费的——因为家长辨别力的提高加速了学生离校。我们的研究结果表明，在竞争性教育市场中，由第三方提供家长参与项目具有一定作用。

papers.title: The Macroeconomic Effects of Tariffs: Insights from 180 Years of U.S. Trade Policy
papers.authors: Tamar den Besten, Regis Barnichon, Diego R. Känzig, Aayush Singh
papers.abstract: We study the macroeconomic effects of tariff policy using U.S. historical data from 1840–2024. We construct a narrative series of plausibly exogenous tariff changes – based on major legislative actions, multilateral negotiations, and temporary surcharges – and use it as an instrument to identify a structural tariff shock. Tariff increases are contractionary: imports fall sharply, exports decline with a lag, and output and manufacturing activity drop persistently. The shock transmits through both supply and demand channels. Prices rise in the full sample but fall post-World War II, a pattern consistent with changes in the monetary policy response and with stronger international retaliation and reciprocity in the modern trade regime.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, ME；JEL：E30, F13, F14, F41, H20
papers.zh_title: 关税的宏观经济效应：来自美国180年贸易政策的见解
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用1840-2024年的美国历史数据研究关税政策的宏观经济效应。我们构建了一个看似外生的关税变化叙事序列——基于重大立法行动、多边谈判和临时附加费——并将其用作工具变量来识别结构性关税冲击。关税上调是收缩性的：进口急剧下降，出口滞后下降，产出和制造业活动持续下降。冲击通过供给和需求两个渠道传导。在全样本中价格上涨，但在二战后价格下跌，这一模式与货币政策反应的变化以及现代贸易体制中更强的国际报复和互惠性相一致。

papers.title: The Political Economy of Financial Crises
papers.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Matthew S. Jaremski
papers.abstract: Financial crises remain a recurrent feature of modern economies despite evidence that many are predictable and preventable. This chapter discusses how financial instability often reflects a political equilibrium rather than purely technocratic shortcomings. Contrasting economic and political perspectives on regulation, the chapter emphasizes how policymakers shape financial rules in ways that favor politically-influential groups but result in financial vulnerability. Key mechanisms include restricted bank chartering, safety nets, credit subsidies, and sovereign borrowing. Political forces also shape crisis management. Delayed interventions, selective support, and constrained policy responses can deepen and prolong crises. Together, these dynamics help explain the persistent and foreseeable nature of financial instability across time, legal origins, political structures, and institutional contexts. Instead of seeing financial crises as arising from an unavoidable vulnerability to external shocks they are better seen as a mirror of the societies in which they occur, reflecting their political structures, vying constituencies, cultural preferences, and blind spots.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：E44, F34, G01, H12, N1, N2, P16
papers.zh_title: 金融危机的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管有证据表明许多金融危机是可预测和可预防的，但它们仍然是现代经济中反复出现的特征。本章讨论了金融不稳定如何常常反映一种政治均衡，而非纯粹的技术性缺陷。通过对比经济学和政治学对监管的看法，本章强调了政策制定者如何以有利于政治上有影响力的群体但导致金融脆弱性的方式制定金融规则。关键机制包括限制银行特许经营、安全网、信贷补贴和主权借贷。政治力量也塑造了危机管理。延迟干预、选择性支持和受限的政策反应可能加深和延长危机。这些动态共同有助于解释金融不稳定在不同时期、法律渊源、政治结构和制度背景下的持续性和可预见性。与其将金融危机视为源于对外部冲击不可避免的脆弱性，不如将其视为其所发生社会的一面镜子，反映其政治结构、竞争的利益群体、文化偏好和盲点。

papers.title: Measuring the Impact of Data Centers in the United States Economy: Monetary Damage from Air Pollution and Greenhouse Gas Emissions
papers.authors: Nicholas Z. Muller
papers.abstract: This paper quantifies the environmental externalities associated with electricity consumption by data centers in the United States, focusing on damages from local air pollution and greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. Using facility-level data for approximately 2,800 operational data centers in 2025, combined with electricity grid characteristics and emissions data, the analysis estimates pollution impacts through the AP4 integrated assessment model and applies the social cost of carbon for GHG valuation. Results indicate that data centers consume roughly 250 TWh of electricity—about 5–6% of U.S. generation—and generate approximately $25 billion in gross external damages (GED), with a range of $10–$33 billion. These damages are highly geographically concentrated, with Texas and Virginia accounting for 30% of the national total. While GED comprises about 5% of industry GDP, this ratio varies widely across states, exceeding GDP in some regions. Planned data center expansion could increase electricity demand and associated damages by up to 85% in the near term. Despite these environmental costs, preliminary comparisons suggest that the damages attributable to AI-related energy use are small relative to potential productivity gains.
papers.zh_title: 衡量数据中心对美国经济的影响：空气污染和温室气体排放的货币损害
papers.zh_abstract: 本文量化了美国数据中心电力消费相关的环境外部性，重点关注本地空气污染和温室气体排放造成的损害。利用2025年约2,800个运营数据中心的设施级数据，结合电网特征和排放数据，该分析通过AP4综合评估模型估算污染影响，并应用碳的社会成本进行温室气体估值。结果表明，数据中心消耗约250太瓦时的电力——约占美国发电量的5-6%——并产生约250亿美元的总外部损害，范围在100亿至330亿美元之间。这些损害在地理上高度集中，德克萨斯州和弗吉尼亚州占全国总量的30%。虽然总外部损害约占行业GDP的5%，但这一比例在各州之间差异很大，在某些地区甚至超过GDP。计划中的数据中心扩张可能在短期内使电力需求和相关损害增加高达85%。尽管存在这些环境成本，初步比较表明，与人工智能相关的能源使用所造成的损害相对于潜在的生产率提升而言较小。

papers.title: Organizational Targets in General Equilibrium
papers.authors: Joel P. Flynn, George Nikolakoudis, Karthik A. Sastry
papers.abstract: We build a general equilibrium model in which firms endogenously choose whether to target prices or quantities. We characterize how these choices of organizational targets depend on firms' uncertainty about microeconomic and macroeconomic factors. In equilibrium, the transmission of both nominal and real shocks hinges on firms' organizational targets. For example, under otherwise identical microfoundations, money is neutral under quantity targets and non-neutral under price targets. We further characterize how targets shape firms' strategic interactions and prove that the macroeconomic uncertainty that arises from each choice of targets reinforces incentives to choose that target. That is, choices of organizational targets are strategic complements. For this reason, monetary policy aimed at stabilization can backfire by inducing a regime shift that renders it ineffective. A simple quantification suggests that incentives over organizational targets can vary markedly at business-cycle frequencies and help explain the state-dependent pass-through of monetary shocks to prices and output.
papers.zh_title: 一般均衡中的组织目标
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个一般均衡模型，其中企业内生地选择是以价格还是数量为目标。我们描述了这些组织目标的选择如何取决于企业对微观经济和宏观经济因素的不确定性。在均衡中，名义冲击和实际冲击的传导都取决于企业的组织目标。例如，在其他微观基础相同的情况下，货币在数量目标下是中性的，而在价格目标下是非中性的。我们进一步描述了目标如何塑造企业的战略互动，并证明每种目标选择所产生的宏观经济不确定性会强化选择该目标的激励。也就是说，组织目标的选择是战略互补的。因此，旨在稳定经济的货币政策可能适得其反，引发使其失效的体制转变。一个简单的量化表明，组织目标的激励可能在商业周期频率上发生显著变化，并有助于解释货币冲击对价格和产出的状态依赖传导。

papers.title: Treasury Supply Shocks: Propagation Through Debt Expansion and Maturity Adjustment
papers.authors: Huixin Bi, Maxime Phillot, Sarah Zubairy
papers.abstract: Historically high debt-to-GDP levels in the U.S. have raised concerns about future financial market stability and fiscal sustainability. We use high-frequency data and consider Treasury futures price changes within narrow windows around auction announcements in order to identify two distinct Treasury supply shocks: debt volume shocks that capture changes in the level of public debt, and maturity adjustment shocks that reflect changes in the maturity structure. We find that debt expansion shocks raise yields across the curve by increasing term premia, leading to tighter financial conditions. These shocks crowd out private sector activity by reducing investment and production, particularly during periods of rapid debt growth. In contrast, maturity extension shocks steepen the yield curve while lowering credit risk premia and fiscal uncertainty. By reducing risk premia, these shocks stimulate near-term investment and production, even as higher long-term borrowing costs weigh on longer-horizon investment. We also show that the Treasury debt management policy can meaningfully interact with the Federal Reserve's asset purchase programs.
papers.zh_title: 国债供给冲击：通过债务扩张和期限调整的传导
papers.zh_abstract: 美国历史高位的债务与GDP之比引发了对未来金融市场稳定性和财政可持续性的担忧。我们使用高频数据，并考虑拍卖公告发布前后狭窄窗口内的国债期货价格变化，以识别两种不同的国债供给冲击：捕捉公共债务水平变化的债务数量冲击，以及反映期限结构变化的期限调整冲击。我们发现，债务扩张冲击通过提高期限溢价来推高整个收益率曲线上的收益率，导致金融状况收紧。这些冲击通过减少投资和生产来挤出私营部门活动，尤其是在债务快速增长时期。相比之下，期限延长冲击使收益率曲线变陡，同时降低了信用风险溢价和财政不确定性。通过降低风险溢价，这些冲击刺激了短期投资和生产，即使较高的长期借贷成本对长期投资构成压力。我们还表明，国债债务管理政策可以与美联储的资产购买计划产生有意义的互动。

papers.title: Health Inequalities among Retirees in the Netherlands
papers.authors: Adriaan Kalwij, Arie Kapteyn
papers.abstract: In the Netherlands, life expectancy has continued to rise over the last two decades and the distribution of the age of death has narrowed, which suggests a decrease in health inequality. For the same period, however, the income-mortality gradient has increased, which suggests that the health gains have been unequally distributed across the income distribution. We examine the latter suggestion using data for the Netherlands of the longitudinal Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe. Our empirical findings show no significant changes in income-based physical and mental health inequalities during the last two decades. Arguably, larger samples, such as administrative data which is often used to analyze the income-mortality gradient, are needed to investigate in more detail the evolution of physical and mental health inequalities before drawing firm conclusions.
papers.zh_title: 荷兰退休人员的健康不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 在荷兰，过去二十年预期寿命持续上升，死亡年龄的分布范围缩小，这表明健康不平等有所减少。然而，在同一时期，收入-死亡率梯度却增加了，这表明健康收益在收入分配中的分布并不均衡。我们使用欧洲健康、老龄化和退休纵向调查的荷兰数据来检验后一种观点。我们的实证研究结果显示，在过去二十年中，基于收入的身体和心理健康不平等没有显著变化。可以说，在得出确切结论之前，需要更大的样本（例如常用于分析收入-死亡率梯度的行政数据）来更详细地研究身体和心理健康不平等的演变。

papers.title: Declining Occupations and Career Outcomes in Norway
papers.authors: Erling Barth, Maria Forthun Hoen, Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr
papers.abstract: Occupational change is a central feature of modern labor markets. This paper examines the career consequences in Norway of being initially employed in an occupation that subsequently declines during 2007–2024. Workers initially employed in occupations that later decline by at least 25% demonstrate 0.4 lower future years of work, although this employment difference is mostly explained by other individual traits. These workers, conditional on controls, experience a 4.7% reduction in future cumulative earnings relative to starting earnings, akin to losing one year’s worth of earnings over 2007–2024.
papers.zh_title: 挪威的衰落职业与职业结果
papers.zh_abstract: 职业变化是现代劳动力市场的一个核心特征。本文研究了在挪威，最初受雇于一个随后在2007-2024年间衰落的职业所带来的职业后果。最初受雇于后来至少衰落25%的职业的工人，其未来的工作年限减少了0.4年，尽管这种就业差异主要可由其他个人特征解释。在控制其他因素后，这些工人相对于起始收入的未来累计收入减少了4.7%，相当于在2007-2024年间损失了一年的收入。

papers.title: Homemade Foreign Trading
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Yuehan Wang, Xiaoquan Zhu
papers.abstract: Using cross-border holding data from all custodians in China’s Stock Connect, we provide evidence that Chinese mainland insiders evade see-through surveillance by round-tripping via the program. Following the 2018 Northbound Investor Identification reform, the return predictability of northbound flows decays, as does their correlation with insider trading. This reduction is especially pronounced among less prestigious foreign custodians and cross-operating mainland custodians, where insiders are more likely to hide. Furthermore, the reform erodes price informativeness, particularly in stocks with high exposure to homemade foreign investors. Our analysis highlights the role of regulatory cooperation in capital market integration.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F3, G14, G15, G28
papers.zh_title: 自制的外资交易
papers.zh_abstract: 利用中国沪深港通所有托管机构的跨境持股数据，我们提供了证据表明中国内地内部人士通过该计划进行往返交易以规避穿透式监管。在2018年北向投资者识别码制度改革之后，北向资金流动的回报可预测性下降，其与内幕交易的相关性也随之减弱。这种减少在那些不太知名的外资托管机构和跨境经营的内地托管机构中尤为明显，内部人士更有可能在这些机构中隐藏交易。此外，该改革削弱了价格信息含量，尤其是在那些对自制外资投资者敞口较高的股票中。我们的分析强调了资本市场一体化中监管合作的作用。

papers.title: Changes in Health Inequalities among Older Individuals in Japan
papers.authors: Takashi Oshio, Satoshi Shimizutani
papers.abstract: This study examined how health inequalities with respect to income have changed among older adults in Japan from 2001 to 2022. The past two decades have witnessed a series of public pension reforms and increased labor force participation among older individuals. The pro-rich concentration of good health has become less clear for self-rated health and activities of daily living among older men. However, income-related inequality in stress/anxiety increased over time in men, and no clear trend was observed for health deficiencies or conditions. Compared to men, women showed more mixed results, with widening inequalities in health deficiencies and conditions.
papers.zh_title: 日本老年人健康不平等的变化
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了2001年至2022年间日本老年人中与收入相关的健康不平等如何变化。过去二十年见证了一系列公共养老金改革以及老年人劳动参与率的提高。在老年男性中，良好健康向富人集中的现象在自评健康和日常生活活动能力方面变得不那么明显。然而，男性中与收入相关的压力/焦虑不平等随时间增加，而在健康缺陷或健康状况方面没有观察到明显趋势。与男性相比，女性的结果更为复杂，在健康缺陷和健康状况方面的不平等有所扩大。

papers.title: The Inefficient Pricing of News
papers.authors: Antoine Didisheim, Bryan T. Kelly, Mohammad Pourmohammadi, Hanqing Tian
papers.abstract: The stock market fails to efficiently process information in news text (Chen et al., 2026). But news itself is highly predictable by prevailing stock characteristics, which complicates inferences about market efficiency. After purging news of its predictable content, the remaining “pure news” more than doubles the monthly return predictive power of raw news, and it continues to significantly predict returns up to 18 months ahead. The magnitude and longevity of the pure news anomaly is greater than those of every anomaly in the Jensen et al. (2022) universe. It derives from negative-tone and quantitative topics to which investors underreact and from high-attention and ambiguous topics to which investors overreact.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C45, C58, G02, G1, G11, G12, G14, G17, G40, G41
papers.zh_title: 新闻的低效定价
papers.zh_abstract: 股票市场未能有效处理新闻文本中的信息（Chen et al., 2026）。但新闻本身在很大程度上可由当前的股票特征预测，这使关于市场有效性的推断变得复杂。在剔除新闻中可预测的内容后，剩余的“纯新闻”使原始新闻的月度回报预测能力提高了一倍以上，并且它能在长达18个月的时间内持续显著预测回报。纯新闻异象的幅度和持久性超过了Jensen等人（2022）研究范围内所有异象。它源于投资者反应不足的负面情绪和量化主题，以及投资者反应过度的高关注度和模糊主题。

papers.title: The Medical Expansion, Life Expectancy, and Endogenous Directed Technical Change
papers.authors: Leon Huetsch, Dirk Krueger, Alexander Ludwig
papers.abstract: We build a unified quantitative theory of increasing adult life expectancy and income growth in the last two centuries, and the emergence of a modern health sector in the 20th century. We interpret the data as three phases of a dynamic equilibrium in which households are initially poor, the price of health goods is prohibitively high, and life expectancy is stagnant. As technological progress fuels income growth, households commence consuming basic health goods and life expectancy rises in the first half of the 19th century. 100 years later, further directed technological progress leads to the emergence of a modern health sector. \nThrough the lens of the model, the quality-adjusted relative price of modern health goods declined by about 2.5% per year between 1940 and 2020 while the model-implied relative price that lacks quality adjustment increases in line with the BEA health price index. Counterfactual analyses suggest that almost one fourth of adult life expectancy gains between 1940 and 2020 are attributed to the emergence and expansion of modern health and that public spending on health R&D during World War II played an important role in the kickoff of the modern health sector.
papers.zh_title: 医疗扩张、预期寿命与内生定向技术变革
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个统一的量化理论，用以解释过去两个世纪中成人预期寿命和收入增长的同时增加，以及20世纪现代健康部门的出现。我们将数据解释为动态均衡的三个阶段：最初家庭贫困，健康商品价格高得令人望而却步，预期寿命停滞不前。随着技术进步推动收入增长，家庭在19世纪上半叶开始消费基本健康商品，预期寿命上升。100年后，进一步的定向技术进步导致了现代健康部门的出现。根据该模型的视角，1940年至2020年间，经质量调整的现代健康商品相对价格每年下降约2.5%，而模型隐含的未经质量调整的相对价格则与BEA健康价格指数同步上升。反事实分析表明，1940年至2020年间成人预期寿命的增长中，近四分之一归因于现代健康的出现和扩张，而二战期间公共健康研发支出在现代健康部门的启动中发挥了重要作用。

papers.title: Belief Dispersion and Entrepreneurial Entry
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: When should a founder act on a strong belief about an opportunity, knowing that rivals assessing the same opportunity may hold very different views? This paper studies entry decisions when entrepreneurs hold heterogeneous beliefs about an opportunity's value and each founder knows only the range of views rivals might hold. In equilibrium, a founder enters only when their conviction exceeds a threshold set by anticipated rival optimism. The relationship between belief dispersion and entry is surprisingly rich: depending on the founder's conviction and the cost of entry, there may be no level of dispersion that supports entry, all levels may support it, or only a middle range may, so that an outside observer may see the most entry at intermediate levels of belief dispersion. When founders can delay, high dispersion that deters immediate entry need not prevent it altogether: the absence of rival action gradually reveals that competitors are less bullish than feared. Finally, not all conviction-building is equal. Validation that only the founder sees strengthens entry incentives fully, whereas validation visible to the whole market partly backfires by encouraging rivals. The paper formalises the intuition that entrepreneurial value comes not from optimism alone but from optimism that the founder anticipates rivals will not share, and derives predictions linking belief dispersion to entry patterns.
papers.zh_title: 信念分散与创业进入
papers.zh_abstract: 创始人何时应该基于对某个机会的强烈信念采取行动，同时知道评估同一机会的竞争对手可能持有截然不同的观点？本文研究了当企业家对某个机会的价值持有异质性信念，且每位创始人只知道竞争对手可能持有的观点范围时的进入决策。在均衡状态下，只有当创始人的信念强度超过由预期竞争对手乐观程度设定的阈值时，他们才会进入。信念分散与进入之间的关系出人意料地丰富：取决于创始人的信念强度和进入成本，可能不存在任何支持进入的分散水平，所有水平都可能支持进入，或者只有中间范围支持进入，以至于外部观察者可能会看到在中等信念分散水平下进入最多。当创始人可以延迟进入时，阻止立即进入的高分散性并不一定会完全阻止进入：竞争对手缺乏行动逐渐揭示出竞争者并不像担心的那样乐观。最后，并非所有信念建立都是平等的。只有创始人看到的验证会完全增强进入激励，而整个市场可见的验证则会通过鼓励竞争对手而部分适得其反。本文形式化了这样一种直觉：创业价值并非仅仅来自乐观情绪，而是来自创始人预期竞争对手不会分享的乐观情绪，并推导出将信念分散与进入模式联系起来的预测。

papers.title: Information Treatments, Hypotheticals, and Event Studies: Comparative Estimates
papers.authors: Carola Binder, Dimitris Georgarakos, Pei Kuang, Li Tang
papers.abstract: We study how consumer expectations respond to monetary policy announcements using a two-wave survey experiment around the September 2025 FOMC meeting. We compare three commonly used approaches to identifying causal effects on expectations: hypothetical ("vignette’’) scenarios, randomized control trials, and event studies. All three identification strategies yield qualitatively similar results: a rate cut reduces short- and long-run inflation expectations, raises expectations of economic activity, and lowers unemployment expectations. The estimated magnitudes are similar across the randomized controlled trial and event-study approaches, but relatively larger for vignette-based measures. Within-respondent comparisons further show that individuals who revise their expectations more in response to vignette scenarios also exhibit larger revisions following actual policy announcements and experimental information treatments.
papers.zh_title: 信息处理、假设情境与事件研究：比较估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用围绕2025年9月联邦公开市场委员会(FOMC)会议开展的两轮调查实验，研究消费者预期如何对货币政策公告做出反应。我们比较了三种常用于识别对预期因果效应的方法：假设情境（“小插曲”）场景、随机对照试验和事件研究。所有三种识别策略都产生了定性相似的结果：降息降低了短期和长期通胀预期，提高了经济活动预期，并降低了失业预期。估计的幅度在随机对照试验和事件研究方法之间相似，但基于小插曲的衡量标准相对更大。受访者内部的比较进一步表明，那些对小插曲场景预期修正幅度更大的个体，在对实际政策公告和实验性信息处理做出反应时，也表现出更大的修正幅度。

papers.title: Aging at the Very Top
papers.authors: Valentin Kecht, Alessandro Lizzeri, Farzad Saidi
papers.abstract: This paper documents that the age at which CEOs are appointed has risen sharply over the past several decades. Using newly assembled data covering a wide set of firms, we show that this increase is concentrated outside the largest listed firms and driven primarily by longer and more diverse external career paths prior to CEO appointment. These patterns are difficult to reconcile with explanations based on demographics, schooling, or tenure, and are instead consistent with a matching framework in which rising demand for generalist human capital leads firms to trade off peak ability for accumulated experience. We investigate the forces behind this shift. Using variation in consulting networks, we establish that firms place greater weight on diversified managerial experience as operating environments have become increasingly uncertain and complex. We also provide evidence for a supply-side response in which prospective CEOs broaden their skill portfolio as demand for generalist skills rises.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CF, LS；JEL：J10, J21, J24, M12, M51
papers.zh_title: 最高层的老龄化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了在过去几十年中，首席执行官被任命时的年龄急剧上升。利用新收集的涵盖广泛企业的数据，我们表明这种增长集中在最大的上市公司之外，并且主要是由首席执行官任命前更长、更多样化的外部职业路径所驱动。这些模式难以用基于人口统计、教育或任期的解释来调和，反而与一个匹配框架相一致，在该框架中，对通才型人力资本日益增长的需求导致企业在巅峰能力与积累的经验之间进行权衡。我们调查了这种转变背后的力量。利用咨询网络的差异，我们确定，随着运营环境变得越来越不确定和复杂，企业更加重视多元化的管理经验。我们还提供了供给侧反应的证据，即随着对通才技能需求的上升，潜在的首席执行官会拓宽他们的技能组合。

papers.title: The Declining Local Bias of Entrepreneurship in the United States
papers.authors: Innessa Colaiacovo, Margaret G. Dalton, Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr
papers.abstract: Multiple studies document a local bias of entrepreneurship (LBE) in recent decades, where self-employed entrepreneurs are systematically more likely than wage workers to operate in their region of birth. This paper documents an important new fact: the LBE has been declining in the United States since 1970. The LBE is still present for white men engaged in self-employment, but it no longer exists for the overall U.S.-born workforce. We connect that decline to the transformation of self-employment away from high startup-capital sectors and the reduced opportunity for local self-employed entrepreneurs to achieve high incomes compared to wage work.
papers.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：D24, G51, J11, J24, J62, L26, M13, R11, R13
papers.zh_title: 美国创业精神本地偏好的下降
papers.zh_abstract: 多项研究记录了近几十年来创业精神的本地偏好(LBE)，即自雇企业家在其出生地经营的比例系统性地高于工薪劳动者。本文记录了一个重要的新事实：自1970年以来，美国的LBE一直在下降。对于从事自雇的白人男性来说，LBE仍然存在，但对于整个美国出生的劳动力来说，它已不复存在。我们将这种下降与自雇从高启动资本行业的转型，以及本地自雇企业家相比工薪工作获得高收入的机会减少联系起来。

papers.title: The Unseen Costs of Blue Skies: Pollutant Substitution and Biodiversity Loss
papers.authors: Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Siyuan Li, Huanhuan Wang, Zhiqiang Zhang
papers.abstract: Incomplete performance metrics distort incentives. Exploiting the staggered roll-out of China’s national air monitoring network, we document a pollutant substitution effect: PM₂.₅ fell significantly, yet O₃ surged. We trace this to strategic behavior: facing binding PM₂.₅ targets, local governments prioritized abatement of particulate precursors while neglecting ozone precursors. Critically, this was not a benign trade-off. Although the policy reduced PM₂.₅-attributed deaths, the policy-induced O₃ surge increased O₃-attributed mortality and reduced biodiversity (measured by bird abundance). Conservative estimates suggest these costs reduced the policy’s net benefits by approximately 23.8%. Our findings highlight the hidden social costs of narrow performance targeting.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH；JEL：D73, H77, Q53, Q57, Q58
papers.zh_title: 蓝天的隐性成本：污染物替代与生物多样性丧失
papers.zh_abstract: 不完整的绩效指标会扭曲激励。利用中国国家空气监测网络的分阶段推广，我们记录了一种污染物替代效应：PM₂.₅显著下降，但O₃却激增。我们将此归因于策略性行为：面对具有约束力的PM₂.₅目标，地方政府优先减少颗粒物前体物，而忽视了臭氧前体物。关键的是，这并非良性的权衡。尽管该政策减少了PM₂.₅导致的死亡，但政策引发的O₃激增增加了O₃导致的死亡率，并减少了生物多样性（以鸟类丰度衡量）。保守估计表明，这些成本使该政策的净收益减少了约23.8%。我们的研究结果凸显了狭隘绩效目标设定的隐性社会成本。

papers.title: If You Build It, They May Not Come: Willingness to Participate in Managed EV Charging
papers.authors: Fiona Burlig, James B. Bushnell, David S. Rapson
papers.abstract: Despite the importance of program participation for policy, treatment effects are often measured on self-selected samples. We study electric vehicle (EV) managed charging, intended to reduce electric grid strain by optimally allocating charging across EVs. Prior work finds large impacts of managed charging among households who volunteer for an RCT. In contrast, we test managed charging with an experiment including all EVs within a California utility. Enrollment is low even with high incentives, and we can reject even modest intent-to-treat effects on electricity consumption. Managed charging is less effective than previously thought, underscoring the value of population-wide experiments.
papers.zh_title: 如果你建好了，他们可能不会来：参与电动汽车管理充电的意愿
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管项目参与对政策至关重要，但处理效应通常是在自选样本上衡量的。我们研究电动汽车(EV)管理充电，旨在通过优化分配所有电动汽车的充电来减轻电网压力。先前的研究发现，在自愿参加随机对照试验的家庭中，管理充电产生了巨大影响。相比之下，我们通过一项包含加州一家公用事业公司内所有电动汽车的实验来测试管理充电。即使提供高额激励，注册率也很低，并且我们可以拒绝管理充电对电力消费存在哪怕适度的意向性治疗效应。管理充电的效果不如先前认为的那样有效，这凸显了全人群实验的价值。

papers.title: Le Bureau des Légendes: A Dynamic Theory of Double Agents
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Franco Mettola La Giglia
papers.abstract: This paper models double agents—individuals coerced into simultaneously serving two rival intelligence agencies—as a finite-horizon trilateral game between Agency A, Organization B, and the Mole M. The double agent persists within a corridor of survival: a set of bilateral beliefs under which both principals continue the relationship. Under a linear-quadratic-Gaussian benchmark, we obtain a closed-form characterization of the corridor geometry, analytical upper bounds on expected duration, and three main results: (i) existence of a double-agent equilibrium, (ii) structural transitoriness— belief updating, terminal unraveling, and compounding survival risk ensure inevitable collapse, and (iii) comparative statics linking monitoring technology, punishment severity, and protection costs to expected duration. The key mechanism is self-destructive experimentation: B learns about the mole’s type through both the type-dependence of effort and the traceability channel γ, which amplifies this learning. Extensions establish existence under general specifications and show that duration decays exponentially in the number of rival agencies. Predictions are consistent with historical patterns from Kim Philby to the Cold War mole hunts. The setting—bilateral coercion, existential participation constraints, and Bayesian learning in a finite-horizon trilateral structure— defines what we term antagonistic common agency.
papers.zh_title: 传奇办公室：双重间谍的动态理论
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将双重间谍——即被胁迫同时为两个敌对情报机构服务的个人——建模为A机构、B组织和鼹鼠M之间的有限期三方博弈。双重间谍在一个生存走廊内持续存在：这是一组双边信念，在此信念下，两个委托人都继续维持关系。在线性-二次型-高斯基准下，我们获得了走廊几何形状的闭式表征、预期持续时间的解析上界以及三个主要结果：(i) 双重间谍均衡的存在性，(ii) 结构性暂时性——信念更新、终端瓦解和累积生存风险确保了不可避免的崩溃，以及 (iii) 将监控技术、惩罚严厉程度和保护成本与预期持续时间联系起来的比较静态分析。关键机制是自我毁灭性的实验：B通过努力的类型依赖性以及放大这种学习的可追溯性渠道γ来了解鼹鼠的类型。扩展分析确立了在一般设定下的存在性，并表明持续时间随着敌对机构数量的增加而呈指数衰减。预测与从金·菲尔比到冷战鼹鼠搜捕的历史模式一致。这种设定——双边胁迫、存在性参与约束以及有限期三方结构中的贝叶斯学习——定义了我们所谓的对抗性共同代理。

papers.title: Gender Mix and Team Performance: Evidence from Obstetrics
papers.authors: Ambar La Forgia, Manasvini Singh
papers.abstract: We investigate how the gender mix of expert teams affects performance in a high-stakes setting: childbirth. Using data on 2.5 million births, we exploit the quasi-exogenous assignment of patients to two-member obstetrician teams (Lead–Assisting), and find that: (i) female-only teams achieve the best maternal outcomes, whereas male-only teams have the worst; and (ii) female-led mixed-gender teams perform worse than male-led ones. Specifically, severe maternal complications are 15.8% higher in male-only teams and 7.1-10.8% higher in mixed-gender teams compared to female-only teams. These patterns cannot be explained by patient risk, endogenous team formation, or physician preferences for discretionary practices like C-sections. Instead, gender mix directly affects team decisions and performance, likely through gender norms — a mechanism supported by two findings. First, gender mix affects how closely team decisions reflect member preferences, with female-only teams being especially skilled at this process, possibly due to more collaborative decision-making. Second, gender mix affects team resilience, with female-led mixed gender teams performing especially poorly under challenging conditions (e.g., limited team familiarity), possibly because female leaders invert traditional gender norms. We also document other notable patterns: female-only teams not only achieve the lowest complication rates for Black women, but are also the only team type to have no racial disparity in maternal outcomes. Overall, this study provides new insights into gender dynamics in expert teams, informing managerial efforts to support effective collaboration in increasingly diverse workplaces.
papers.zh_title: 性别构成与团队绩效：来自产科的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在高风险环境——分娩中，专家团队的性别构成如何影响绩效。利用250万次分娩的数据，我们利用患者被准外生地分配给两人产科医生团队（主刀-协助）这一情况，发现：(i) 全女性团队实现了最佳的母亲结局，而全男性团队则最差；(ii) 女性领导的混合性别团队表现不如男性领导的混合性别团队。具体来说，与全女性团队相比，全男性团队的严重母亲并发症高出15.8%，混合性别团队则高出7.1-10.8%。这些模式无法用患者风险、内生团队形成或医生对剖腹产等自由裁量做法的偏好来解释。相反，性别构成直接影响团队决策和绩效，很可能是通过性别规范——这一机制得到了两个发现的支持。首先，性别构成影响团队决策反映成员偏好的紧密程度，全女性团队在此过程中尤其擅长，这可能是由于更具协作性的决策制定。其次，性别构成影响团队韧性，女性领导的混合性别团队在具有挑战性的条件下（例如，有限的团队熟悉度）表现尤其糟糕，这可能是因为女性领导者颠覆了传统的性别规范。我们还记录了其他值得注意的模式：全女性团队不仅为黑人女性实现了最低的并发症率，而且是唯一在母亲结局上没有种族差异的团队类型。总体而言，这项研究为专家团队中的性别动态提供了新的见解，为管理人员在日益多元化的职场中支持有效协作提供了信息。

papers.title: The Effect of Annuities on Longevity
papers.authors: Borja Larrain, Alessandro Previtero, Felipe Severino
papers.abstract: We examine how annuities affect longevity using administrative payout data on approximately 600,000 Chilean retirees from 2004 to 2022. To address selection into annuitization, we exploit the fact that annuity sales vary with recent market returns, a pattern consistent with extrapolative beliefs. We find that the decision to annuitize—instrumented by recent market returns—substantially reduces mortality at five- and ten-year horizons. Further analyses indicate that annuities reduce mortality by shielding retirees from income volatility and investment-related stress. Complementary survey evidence suggests that annuitants invest more in health and report lower disability rates.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH；JEL：D14, G22, G41, G51, G52, J26
papers.zh_title: 年金对长寿的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2004年至2022年约60万名智利退休人员的行政支付数据，研究年金如何影响长寿。为了解决年金化中的选择性问题，我们利用了年金销售随近期市场回报率变化这一事实，这种模式与外推信念一致。我们发现，年金化的决定——以近期市场回报率为工具变量——在五年和十年的时间跨度上显著降低了死亡率。进一步的分析表明，年金通过保护退休人员免受收入波动和投资相关压力的影响来降低死亡率。补充性的调查证据表明，年金领取者在健康方面投入更多，并且报告的残疾率更低。

papers.title: Impact Trickles Down: A General Equilibrium Theory of Stakeholder Exit and Engagement
papers.authors: Briana Chang, Harrison Hong
papers.abstract: How do purpose-driven stakeholders induce reform? Using a multi-sided matching equilibrium, we show that whether they exit or engage depends on whether social harm scales with productivity. When harm is uncorrelated—an implicit assumption in most literature—purpose-driven stakeholders engage and compensating differentials adjust. But when harm scales with production, high-productivity firms outbid others for profit-driven stakeholders to avoid mitigation. Purpose-driven stakeholders exit—a seemingly ineffective action at the firm level but whose impact trickles down the productivity ladder and across stakeholder types. This necessitates a multi-sided framework, rationalizes puzzling findings, and explains why studies underestimate the aggregate impact of exit.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, PE；JEL：G0, G19, G20, G3, G35, G39, H4, H40
papers.zh_title: 影响层层传递：利益相关者退出与参与的一般均衡理论
papers.zh_abstract: 目标驱动的利益相关者如何引发改革？通过使用多边匹配均衡，我们证明了他们是退出还是参与取决于社会危害是否随生产率变化。当危害不相关时——这是大多数文献中的隐含假设——目标驱动的利益相关者会参与，补偿性差异会进行调整。但当危害随生产规模扩大时，高生产率企业会出价高于其他企业，以吸引利润驱动的利益相关者，从而避免缓解措施。目标驱动的利益相关者选择退出——这在企业层面看似无效，但其影响会沿着生产率阶梯并跨越利益相关者类型层层传递。这需要一个多边框架，解释了令人困惑的发现，并说明了为何研究低估了退出的总体影响。

papers.title: Hospital Billing Regulations and Financial Well-Being: Evidence from California’s Fair Pricing Law
papers.authors: Yaa Akosa Antwi, Marion Aouad, Nathan Blascak
papers.abstract: We examine the financial consequences of the 2007 California Fair Pricing Law, which places a price ceiling on hospital bills for financially vulnerable individuals. Using cross-sectional variation in exposure to the law, proxied by county-level uninsured rates, we estimate its impact on individual financial outcomes. We find that the law reduces the likelihood of incurring non-medical debt in collections and the number of non-medical accounts in collections. In addition, we find evidence that credit scores increased and suggestive evidence that the number of delinquent accounts decreased for individuals in more exposed counties. Our results suggest hospital billing regulations can improve targeted individuals’ financial outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 医院收费法规与财务福祉：来自加州公平定价法的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2007年加州公平定价法的财务后果，该法对经济脆弱个体的医院账单设置了价格上限。利用法律覆盖程度的横截面差异（以县级未参保率作为代理变量），我们估计了该法对个人财务结果的影响。我们发现，该法降低了产生非医疗催收债务的可能性以及非医疗催收账户的数量。此外，我们发现有证据表明，在受法律影响更大的县，个人信用评分有所提高，并且有提示性证据表明拖欠账户数量有所减少。我们的结果表明，医院收费法规可以改善目标个体的财务结果。

papers.title: How Have Universities Survived for Nearly a Millenium
papers.authors: David M. Cutler, Edward L. Glaeser
papers.abstract: How have universities managed to survive and evolve over almost 1,000 years to become wildly heterogeneous, unusually fractious, multi-product, non-profit entities? Universities began as teachers’ guilds, and they still give faculty a remarkable degree of autonomy. That structure attracts and empowers intellectuals, who are selected in part on their taste for knowledge, and those entrepreneurs and philanthropists have enabled universities to morph in ways that firms rarely do. Intellectual autonomy can also explain why universities are so often at odds with legal authorities and why faculty fight so often with each other and with their bosses. This essay presents a model of university organization and sketches the evolution of the university’s products and conflicts over the last 900 years. We also discuss the social value of university education.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I20, L22, N30
papers.zh_title: 大学如何存续近千年
papers.zh_abstract: 大学是如何在近1000年的时间里得以存续并演变，成为高度异质、异常好争论、多产品的非营利实体的？大学最初是教师行会，如今它们仍然赋予教师非凡的自主权。这种结构吸引并赋权知识分子——这些人被选中的部分原因在于他们对知识的偏好——而这些企业家和慈善家使得大学能够以企业很少能做到的方式演变。知识自主权也可以解释为什么大学经常与法律当局发生冲突，以及为什么教师之间、教师与上司之间频繁争斗。本文提出了一个大学组织模型，并概述了过去900年里大学产品及其冲突的演变。我们还讨论了大学教育的社会价值。

papers.title: The “Peace Dividend” of International Trade: A New Empirical Approach
papers.authors: Ling Feng, Qiuyue Huang, Zhiyuan Li, Christopher M. Meissner
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the causal impact of international trade on interstate military conflicts using global bilateral data from 1962 to 2014. To address endogeneity concerns, we exploit exogenous spatial-temporal variation in international trade stemming from technological advances in air relative to maritime transport. Empirical results demonstrate a strong “peace dividend” of international trade: that is, increased trade significantly reduces the probability and intensity of conflicts between nations. This effect remains robust across specifications and withstands a wide range of potential confounders. Such findings highlight how economic interdependence shapes international conflict, a relationship that is especially relevant amid escalating geopolitical tensions and the global shift toward “decoupling”, “de-risking”, and greater trade protectionism.
papers.zh_title: 国际贸易的“和平红利”：一种新的实证方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用1962年至2014年的全球双边数据，研究了国际贸易对国家间军事冲突的因果影响。为了解决内生性问题，我们利用了源于航空运输相对于海运技术进步所带来的国际贸易外生时空变化。实证结果表明，国际贸易存在强大的“和平红利”：即贸易增长显著降低了国家间冲突的概率和强度。这一效应在各种设定下均保持稳健，并能经受住一系列潜在混杂因素的检验。这些发现凸显了经济相互依存如何塑造国际冲突，这一关系在地缘政治紧张局势升级以及全球转向“脱钩”、“去风险”和更多贸易保护主义的背景下尤其具有现实意义。

papers.title: Bilateral Conflict Risk and Trade: Military Wars, Trade Wars, and Diplomatic Noise
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Rodolphe Desbordes, Jamel Saadaoui
papers.abstract: How damaging is a “trade war” compared to a “military war” or a “war of words”? Aggregate conflict indicators cannot say, because they treat missile strikes, sanctions, and diplomatic protests as equivalent. We build a monthly bilateral indicator from GDELT event data, calibrated against human-curated ground truth, that decomposes hostility into four layers: kinetic fighting (“military war”), military posture, sanctions-context tensions (“trade war”), and routine diplomacy. The decomposed panel reveals a secular shift: over the past decade, governments have steadily substituted economic coercion for military confrontation, nearly doubling the trade-weighted share of hostility channelled through sanctions contexts. In a gravity trade model, the aggregate indicator is negative, large, and statistically significant, but the decomposition reveals that only two layers drive the result. Kinetic conflict and trade-context hostility are both economically large and precisely estimated; routine diplomacy, despite dominating measured hostility, has no trade effect at all. The directed structure uncovers a retaliation channel that compounds trade losses over several months. Our measure remains a significant determinant of bilateral trade in a horse race against the closest existing alternative. Relative to a pre-escalation baseline, the geopolitical deterioration of the past decade has put roughly $334 billion of bilateral trade at risk, with the US–China pair accounting for half.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, POL；JEL：F15, F43, F5, F50, F51
papers.zh_title: 双边冲突风险与贸易：军事战争、贸易战与外交噪音
papers.zh_abstract: 与“军事战争”或“口水战”相比，“贸易战”的破坏性有多大？总体冲突指标无法回答这个问题，因为它们将导弹袭击、制裁和外交抗议等同对待。我们利用GDELT事件数据构建了一个月度双边指标，并针对人工整理的真实情况进行校准，该指标将敌对行动分解为四个层级：动能战斗（“军事战争”）、军事姿态、制裁背景下的紧张局势（“贸易战”）以及常规外交。分解后的面板数据揭示了一个长期趋势：在过去十年中，各国政府稳步地用经济胁迫替代军事对抗，通过制裁渠道传导的敌对行动在贸易加权中的份额几乎翻了一番。在一个引力贸易模型中，总体指标为负、数值大且统计显著，但分解结果显示只有两个层级驱动了这一结果。动能冲突和贸易背景下的敌对行动在经济上规模巨大且估计精确；而常规外交尽管在测量的敌对行动中占主导地位，却完全没有贸易效应。定向结构揭示了一个报复渠道，该渠道会在数月内加剧贸易损失。在与最接近的现有替代指标的对比中，我们的指标仍然是双边贸易的重要决定因素。相对于升级前的基线，过去十年的地缘政治恶化已使大约3340亿美元的双边贸易面临风险，其中美中贸易对占了一半。

papers.title: Tariffs and the Term Structure of Inflation Expectations
papers.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Anthony M. Diercks, Aurélien Eyquem, Joon Kim
papers.abstract: Inflation expectations derived from financial markets exhibited unprecedented dynamics in 2025: the correlation between one-year inflation swaps and one-year-ahead one-year forward rates turned significantly negative for the first time on record. We show that this decoupling occurred primarily on days when tariff news dominated market pricing, using a two-stage event classification validated by Bloomberg news trends. Standard small open-economy New Keynesian models in which tariffs generate a one-time price-level increase imply positive comovement across horizons and cannot explain this pattern. \nWe explain these occurrences through the lens of an amended small open-economy New Keynesian model. Three ingredients prove critical for reproducing the observed negative conditional correlation between spot and forward inflation after tariff shocks: targeting year-on-year inflation, substantial interest-rate inertia, and persistent tariffs. Under empirically plausible calibrations, the model generates a negative correlation conditional on tariff shocks while preserving a positive unconditional correlation, suggesting that the 2025 twist in the term structure reflects expectations of a persistent policy response to trade shocks.
papers.zh_title: 关税与通胀预期的期限结构
papers.zh_abstract: 从金融市场得出的通胀预期在2025年表现出前所未有的动态：一年期通胀互换与一年后的一年期远期利率之间的相关性首次出现显著负值。我们利用经彭博新闻趋势验证的两阶段事件分类法，表明这种脱钩主要发生在关税新闻主导市场定价的日子里。标准的、关税导致一次性价格水平上升的小型开放经济体新凯恩斯主义模型意味着各期限之间存在正联动，无法解释这一模式。我们通过一个修正的小型开放经济体新凯恩斯主义模型的视角来解释这些现象。对于在关税冲击后重现观察到的即期与远期通胀之间的负条件相关性，三个要素至关重要：以同比通胀率为目标、显著的利率惯性以及持续的关税。在经验上合理的校准下，该模型在关税冲击条件下产生负相关性，同时保持正的无条件相关性，这表明2025年期限结构的扭曲反映了市场预期政策将对贸易冲击做出持续性反应。

papers.title: The Impact of Maternal Education on Early Childhood Development
papers.authors: Moriam Khanam, Mohammad Hajizadeh, Casey Warman
papers.abstract: This study leverages exogenous variation from a secondary school stipend program for female students in rural Bangladesh to estimate the causal effect of maternal education on early childhood development. Using data from the 2019 Bangladesh Multiple Indicator Cluster Survey, we find that the five years of stipend eligibility increase mothers' schooling by about one year. Instrumental variable estimates show that an additional year of maternal education improves early childhood development scores by 0.5 points on a scale of 0-10, with gains in overall developmental readiness (7.5 percentage points) and in the literacy–numeracy (7.7 percentage points) and physical (1.9 percentage points) domains. The results are robust across specifications. We also estimate the effects of maternal education on potential mechanisms, including children's nutrition, home learning environment, parenting practices, and use of early childhood education and care. The findings show that improvements in maternal education increase weight-for-age Z-scores, reduce stunting, improve the probability of having toys from shops, and increase the likelihood of an adult household member playing with the child. The positive effects of maternal education on children's developmental outcomes imply the importance of investment in improving educational attainment, particularly for females in low- and middle-income countries.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH；JEL：H52, I10, I25, J24, O15
papers.zh_title: 母亲教育对儿童早期发展的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究利用孟加拉国农村地区一项针对女中学生的助学金项目所产生的外生变异，来估计母亲教育对儿童早期发展的因果效应。利用2019年孟加拉国多指标类集调查的数据，我们发现五年的助学金资格使母亲的受教育年限增加了大约一年。工具变量估计表明，母亲每多接受一年教育，儿童早期发展得分（0-10分制）提高0.5分，并在整体发展准备度（提高7.5个百分点）、读写-计算能力（提高7.7个百分点）和身体（提高1.9个百分点）领域取得进步。结果在各种设定下均保持稳健。我们还估计了母亲教育对潜在机制的影响，包括儿童营养、家庭学习环境、养育实践以及早期儿童教育和保育的使用。研究结果表明，母亲教育水平的提高增加了年龄别体重Z分数，减少了发育迟缓，提高了拥有商店购买玩具的概率，并增加了成年家庭成员与孩子玩耍的可能性。母亲教育对儿童发展结果的积极影响意味着，投资于提高教育程度（尤其是中低收入国家的女性）具有重要意义。

papers.title: Understanding Firms' AI Efforts and Their Economic Impact
papers.authors: Tania Babina
papers.abstract: This paper reviews firm-level data on artificial intelligence and the emerging evidence on AI's economic effects. It argues that measurement is central: different AI datasets capture different objects (including invention versus use, internal capability building versus outsourcing, and realized activity versus investor perceptions) and can therefore lead to different conclusions. The paper develops a framework for choosing among these measures and surveys available data sources on firm AI efforts. It synthesizes evidence on AI's effects on firm growth, valuation, productivity, risk, labor, competition, financial markets and applications. The paper concludes by suggesting some ideas for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：G0, J0, M0
papers.zh_title: 理解企业的人工智能努力及其经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于人工智能的企业层面数据以及人工智能经济影响的新兴证据。文章认为，度量是关键：不同的人工智能数据集捕捉不同的对象（包括发明与使用、内部能力建设与外包、已实现的活动与投资者的认知），因此可能导致不同的结论。本文构建了一个在这些度量方法中进行选择的框架，并调查了关于企业人工智能努力的现有数据来源。文章综合了关于人工智能对企业增长、估值、生产率、风险、劳动力、竞争、金融市场和应用影响的证据。本文最后为未来研究提出了一些建议。

papers.title: Risky Insurance: Life-Cycle Insurance Portfolio Choice with Incomplete Markets
papers.authors: Joseph S. Briggs, Ciaran Rogers, Christopher Tonetti
papers.abstract: We study consumer demand for savings, life insurance, annuities, and long-term care insurance using novel survey data and a structural life-cycle model. We document that individuals perceive substantial insurance nonpayment risk, and these beliefs predict ownership. Embedding elicited beliefs into an incomplete-markets model alongside additional real-world insurance features, we match empirical patterns of low participation. Relative to a no-insurance benchmark, access to existing imperfect insurance reduces median wealth by 16% and generates a modest 0.6% welfare gain. Eliminating nonpayment risk would substantially increase insurance ownership, yield a further 11% decline in median savings, and generate an additional 1.7% welfare gain.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, EFG, PE；JEL：D14, E21, G22
papers.zh_title: 风险保险：不完全市场下的生命周期保险组合选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用新颖的调查数据和结构性生命周期模型，研究消费者对储蓄、人寿保险、年金和长期护理保险的需求。我们记录到，个体感知到显著的保险不支付风险，并且这些信念能预测保险持有情况。将引出的信念嵌入一个不完全市场模型，并加入额外的现实世界保险特征后，我们匹配了低参与率的经验模式。与无保险基准相比，获得现有不完美保险使中位数财富减少16%，并产生0.6%的适度福利收益。消除不支付风险将大幅增加保险持有量，使中位数储蓄进一步下降11%，并额外产生1.7%的福利收益。

papers.title: Comparative Advantage and Colonial Monopoly: The Political Economy of Exclusive Trading Companies
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Ivan Lopez Cruz, Alessandra A. Palazzo, Gustavo Torrens
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes a central colonial institution: the monopolization of foreign trade through exclusive trading companies. We interpret this arrangement as an economic institution that creates a wedge between domestic and international prices—effectively an export tax—allowing metropolitan intermediaries to extract rents from colonial trade. Our primary theoretical contribution demonstrates that the economic and political consequences of this institutional form depend systematically on the structure of comparative advantage between the metropolis and the colony. While colonial export taxation unambiguously worsens the colony’s effective terms of trade, its effect on the metropolis is conditional. When the colony and metropolis are competitors—sharing a comparative advantage in the same sector—a colonial export tax can improve the metropolis’s terms of trade. Conversely, when they are complementary—specializing in different sectors—the same policy can deteriorate the metropolis’s terms of trade by raising the cost of imported inputs. Because these terms-of-trade movements generate distinct distributive effects, the colonial monopoly reshapes political coalitions within the metropolis, influencing whether exclusive trading companies persist or are dismantled. We formalize this mechanism in a parsimonious general equilibrium model and illustrate it through the historical experience of Great Britain, India, and the East India Company (EIC), presenting the EIC as a salient instance of a broader institutional logic.
papers.zh_title: 比较优势与殖民垄断：独家贸易公司的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了一个核心的殖民制度：通过独家贸易公司垄断对外贸易。我们将这种安排解释为一种经济制度，它在国内价格与国际价格之间制造了一个楔子——实际上是一种出口税——使得宗主国的中间商能够从殖民贸易中榨取租金。我们的主要理论贡献在于证明，这种制度形式的经济和政治后果系统地取决于宗主国与殖民地之间的比较优势结构。虽然殖民地的出口税无疑会恶化殖民地的有效贸易条件，但其对宗主国的影响是有条件的。当殖民地和宗主国是竞争者——在相同部门拥有比较优势时——殖民地的出口税可以改善宗主国的贸易条件。相反，当它们是互补者——专门从事不同部门时——同样的政策可能因提高进口投入品的成本而恶化宗主国的贸易条件。由于这些贸易条件变动产生不同的分配效应，殖民垄断重塑了宗主国内部的政治联盟，影响着独家贸易公司是持续存在还是被废除。我们在一个简约的一般均衡模型中形式化了这一机制，并通过英国、印度和东印度公司的历史经验加以说明，将东印度公司呈现为更广泛制度逻辑的一个显著实例。

papers.title: Hysteresis and Selection in the Rise of Fascism: The ‘Ordinary Men’ of the Nazi Party
papers.authors: Luis Bosshart, Max Deter, Leander Heldring, Cathrin C. Mohr, Matthias Weigand
papers.abstract: We digitize and analyze the near-universe of National Socialist German Workers’ Party (NSDAP) membership records and link them to population and industrial censuses. Four findings emerge. First, as the party expanded, its membership came to resemble the broader population more closely in occupational, demographic, and religious terms. Second, SS members’ characteristics remained different: younger, more educated, and more fanatical, as measured by the display of Nazi insignia in membership portraits. Third, within communities, coworkers, and families, early membership generated hysteresis, with subsequent entrants drawn from the same groups. Finally, local increases in party membership are associated with subsequent deportations of Germany’s Jews.
papers.zh_title: 法西斯主义兴起中的滞后效应与选择：纳粹党的“普通人”
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将国家社会主义德国工人党（NSDAP）的近乎全部成员记录数字化，并将其与人口和工业普查数据关联起来。出现了四个发现。首先，随着党的扩张，其成员在职业、人口统计和宗教特征上越来越接近更广泛的人口。其次，党卫军成员的特征仍然不同：更年轻、受教育程度更高、更狂热——以成员肖像中展示纳粹标志来衡量。第三，在社区、同事和家庭内部，早期成员身份产生了滞后效应，后续加入者来自相同的群体。最后，地方党内成员的增加与随后对德国犹太人的驱逐相关联。

papers.title: How Reform Happens
papers.authors: Simeon Djankov, Edward L. Glaeser, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: What determines whether and how regulations are reformed? We use a newly constructed data set of 3,590 successful and failed regulatory reforms in 189 countries, between 2005 and 2022, to address this question. We document that regulations have become more business friendly in some regulatory domains but not others. We also show that regulations are more business friendly in richer than in poorer countries, and that holding initial regulatory levels constant, richer countries also reform more. We present a model in which the successful passage of reforms is shaped by the number of veto points in the approval process, the social returns to reform, and the cost of compensating losers from reform, and then test it using our new data set. We find that richer countries have both higher reform attempt and success rates, but less impact of individual reforms on regulation than poorer countries. These findings are consistent with the model if richer countries are better at reform, perhaps because they can compensate losers more efficiently. Across the world, reform attempt rates are strongly correlated with reform success rates but not with reform impact levels. Within countries, a higher share of technological reform attempts is successful, compared to administrative or legal reforms, consistent with the importance of veto points.
papers.zh_title: 改革如何发生
papers.zh_abstract: 什么决定了监管改革是否以及如何进行？我们使用一个新建的数据集，涵盖2005年至2022年间189个国家的3,590次成功和失败的监管改革，来探讨这个问题。我们记录到，在某些监管领域，法规变得对商业更友好，但在其他领域则不然。我们还表明，富裕国家的法规比贫穷国家更有利于商业，并且，在初始监管水平不变的情况下，富裕国家也进行更多改革。我们提出了一个模型，其中改革的成功通过受到审批过程中的否决点数量、改革的社会回报以及补偿改革受损者的成本的影响，然后使用我们的新数据集对其进行检验。我们发现，富裕国家既有更高的改革尝试率也有更高的成功率，但每次改革对监管的影响小于贫穷国家。如果富裕国家更擅长改革，或许是因为它们能更有效地补偿受损者，那么这些发现与模型是一致的。在全球范围内，改革尝试率与改革成功率强相关，但与改革影响水平不相关。在国家内部，与技术性改革尝试相比，行政或法律改革的成功率较低，这与否决点的重要性一致。

papers.title: Gender-Specific Economic Shocks and Household Bargaining Power
papers.authors: Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Dor Morag
papers.abstract: Using machine learning and product-level data on single men’s and single women’s consumption patterns, we develop an index that quantifies the “gendered” nature of consumer goods. We use the index to investigate how gender-specific labor market shocks influence spending patterns within heterosexual households. Our findings reveal that industrial robot adoption, which worsened men’s relative economic position, shifted household consumption toward products predominantly purchased by single women. In contrast, the expansion of fracking, which boosted demand for young and less skilled men, yields suggestive but less robust evidence of increased spending on goods favored by single men. Although neither shock significantly altered total spending on children’s products, robot exposure led to a reallocation of spending toward goods more commonly purchased for daughters than for sons.
papers.zh_title: 性别特定的经济冲击与家庭议价能力
papers.zh_abstract: 利用机器学习以及关于单身男性和单身女性消费模式的产品层面数据，我们构建了一个量化消费品“性别化”程度的指数。我们使用该指数来研究性别特定的劳动力市场冲击如何影响异性恋家庭内部的消费模式。我们的发现表明，工业机器人的采用——这恶化了男性的相对经济地位——使家庭消费转向了主要由单身女性购买的产品。相比之下，水力压裂法的扩张——这增加了对年轻和低技能男性的需求——提供了提示性但不太稳健的证据，表明在单身男性偏好的商品上的支出有所增加。尽管这两种冲击都没有显著改变儿童产品的总支出，但接触机器人导致支出重新分配，转向更常为女儿而非儿子购买的商品。

papers.title: Does Employment Slow Cognitive Decline? Evidence from Labor Market Shocks
papers.authors: Noah Arman Kouchekinia, David Neumark, Tim A. Bruckner
papers.abstract: With large gains in life expectancy, the population share of disability due to cognitive decline and dementia has substantially increased. Many older adults in the United States leave the workforce well before age 65. Correlational evidence suggests that leaving the workforce before retirement age could accelerate the pace of cognitive decline. We offer causal evidence, using HRS data for the United States, exploiting plausibly exogenous shifts in labor demand in local labor markets as a Bartik instrument for employment variation across these markets. We find substantial declines over time in cognitive scores stemming from negative labor demand shocks. These findings are concentrated among men aged 51 to 64, whose employment decisions and outcomes may be more sensitive to local labor market conditions than are these decisions or outcomes for women or for older men. Our evidence extends past work focusing narrowly on the retirement age window and provides further support to the notion that working to older ages may delay age-related cognitive decline.
papers.zh_title: 就业能否减缓认知衰退？来自劳动力市场冲击的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 随着预期寿命的大幅增加，因认知衰退和痴呆导致的残疾人口比例显著上升。美国的许多老年人在65岁之前就离开了劳动力队伍。相关性证据表明，在退休年龄前离开劳动力队伍可能会加速认知衰退的速度。我们利用美国健康与退休研究（HRS）数据，将当地劳动力市场中看似外生的劳动力需求变化作为巴蒂克工具变量，来衡量这些市场中就业变化的因果效应。我们发现，负面的劳动力需求冲击导致认知得分随时间显著下降。这些发现集中在51至64岁的男性中，他们的就业决策和结果可能比女性或更年长男性对当地劳动力市场状况更敏感。我们的证据扩展了以往仅关注退休年龄窗口的研究，并进一步支持了“工作到更老年龄可能延缓与年龄相关的认知衰退”这一观点。

papers.title: Hedging Ambiguity with Pro-Social Preferences: an Illustration from Green Finance
papers.authors: Geoffrey Heal, Marcella Lucchetta
papers.abstract: We explore how pro-social preferences interact with asymmetric ambiguity to influence investment decisions. We develop a model where financial returns are ambiguous (e.g., due to policy uncertainties), while social impact returns are risky or less ambiguous. Employing Gilboa-Schmeidler maxmin and Klibanoff-Marinacci-Mukerji smooth ambiguity frameworks, we demonstrate that pro-social motives act as a hedge, mitigating ambiguity aversion and reducing effective hurdle rates for ambiguous assets. This mechanism explains the resilience of impact investing in bridging environmental funding shortfalls and offers policy insights into how blended finance and standardization can convert ambiguity to risk. Distinct from prior work on blended finance structures, this study emphasizes the behavioral hedging role of social preferences in sustainable finance, with implications for accelerating just transitions amid polycrises.
papers.zh_title: 用亲社会偏好对冲模糊性：来自绿色金融的例证
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了亲社会偏好如何与不对称模糊性相互作用，从而影响投资决策。我们构建了一个模型，其中财务回报是模糊的（例如，由于政策不确定性），而社会影响回报是有风险的或模糊性较低。运用Gilboa-Schmeidler最大最小和Klibanoff-Marinacci-Mukerji平滑模糊性框架，我们证明亲社会动机起到对冲作用，减轻了模糊厌恶，并降低了模糊资产的有效门槛收益率。这一机制解释了影响力投资在弥补环境资金缺口方面的韧性，并为混合融资和标准化如何将模糊性转化为风险提供了政策启示。与先前关于混合融资结构的研究不同，本研究强调了社会偏好在可持续金融中的行为对冲作用，对在多危机中加速公正转型具有启示意义。

papers.title: On the Resilience of Payment Methods
papers.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David Argente, Diana Van Patten
papers.abstract: We study the resilience of payment systems to large disruptions in digital infrastructure caused by natural disasters and outages. While advanced economies have rapidly shifted toward electronic payments, these systems depend critically on electricity and information technology, raising concerns about their reliability during crises. We combine high-frequency county-level electricity outage data with detailed weather records, transaction-level expenditure data, household scanner data, and new representative surveys from the United States, Spain, and Sweden. Event-study evidence shows that natural disasters---especially hurricanes---generate persistent outages that sharply reduce expenditures. Natural disasters by themselves do not alter households' choice of payment method; instead, shifts toward cash arise through three channels: electronic payment methods become unavailable, households increase cash holdings for precautionary reasons, and cash is subsequently spent once available ("cash burn"). Consistent with these mechanisms, payment composition shifts markedly: spending rises before disasters due to stockpiling, largely financed with credit, while after disasters digital payments decline and cash usage rises, particularly in areas experiencing outages. Survey evidence confirms that nearly half of consumers are unable to use their preferred electronic payment during outages and that cash serves as a key fallback. Exploiting variation in cash holdings across households and locations, we find that greater access to cash increases the likelihood of completing transactions during outages and mitigates expenditure declines. Complementary survey evidence and the immediate response to our information treatment show that outages and official guidance increase desired cash holdings. Finally, we embed an RCT in the NielsenIQ panel: roughly half of panel households receive authoritative preparedness guidance, and we follow their realized purchases through the subsequent hurricane season. This design provides a clean framework for causal identification of whether greater cash preparedness smooths consumption during weather shocks. Together, the observational, survey, and experimental components of the paper show that cash plays a critical role in sustaining economic activity during payment-system disruptions and point to the value of offline-capable payment instruments, including CBDCs, in increasingly digital economies.
papers.zh_title: 论支付方式的韧性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了支付系统在由自然灾害和停电造成的数字基础设施大规模中断中的韧性。虽然发达经济体已迅速转向电子支付，但这些系统严重依赖电力和信息技术，引发了对其在危机期间可靠性的担忧。我们结合了高频县级停电数据与详细的天气记录、交易级支出数据、家庭扫描仪数据以及来自美国、西班牙和瑞典的新代表性调查。事件研究证据表明，自然灾害——尤其是飓风——会产生持续性的停电，从而急剧减少支出。自然灾害本身并不会改变家庭对支付方式的选择；相反，向现金的转变通过三个渠道发生：电子支付方式变得不可用，家庭出于预防性原因增加现金持有，以及现金在可用后被花掉（“现金消耗”）。与这些机制一致，支付构成发生了显著变化：由于囤积，支出在灾害前上升，这主要通过信用卡融资，而在灾害后，数字支付下降，现金使用增加，尤其是在经历停电的地区。调查证据证实，近一半的消费者在停电期间无法使用他们偏好的电子支付，而现金则作为关键的备用手段。利用不同家庭和地点之间现金持有量的差异，我们发现，更多的现金获取渠道增加了在停电期间完成交易的可能性，并缓解了支出下降。补充性的调查证据以及对我们信息处理的即时反应表明，停电和官方指导增加了期望的现金持有量。最后，我们在NielsenIQ面板中嵌入了一项随机对照试验：大约一半的面板家庭收到了权威的备灾指导，我们跟踪他们在随后飓风季节的实际购买情况。这一设计为因果识别更大的现金储备是否能在天气冲击期间平滑消费提供了一个清晰的框架。总之，本文的观察性、调查性和实验性部分表明，现金在支付系统中断期间维持经济活动方面发挥着关键作用，并指出了在日益数字化的经济中，包括央行数字货币在内的离线支付工具的价值。

papers.title: Intermediate Input Prices and the Labor Share
papers.authors: Juanma Castro-Vincenzi, Benny Kleinman
papers.abstract: We argue that the relative price of materials is an important determinant of the labor share of income. When materials and primary inputs are complements and the profit share is positive, a higher price of materials lowers the labor share and raises the profit share of value added, without requiring markups or returns to scale to change. We show that materials-price fluctuations align with U.S. labor-share trends, provide causal evidence on this mechanism across industries and commuting zones, and quantify its importance in a dynamic quantitative model. Finally, we use our mechanism to rationalize differential labor-share trends across countries.
papers.zh_title: 中间投入品价格与劳动份额
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，材料的相对价格是劳动收入份额的一个重要决定因素。当材料与初级投入品是互补品且利润份额为正时，材料价格上升会降低劳动份额并提高增加值中的利润份额，这并不需要加成率或规模报酬发生变化。我们展示了材料价格波动与美国劳动份额趋势相一致，提供了关于这一机制在行业和通勤区层面的因果证据，并在一个动态定量模型中量化了其重要性。最后，我们利用我们的机制来解释各国之间不同的劳动份额趋势。

papers.title: A Blended Data Approach to Measuring Monthly Housing Starts: Satellite Imagery, Survey Data and More!
papers.authors: Nicole Czaplicki, Colin J. Shevlin, Hector R. Ferronato, Aidan D. Smith, Dwarakh V. Nayam, Lei Peng, Scott W. Springer, Doren Walker
papers.abstract: As part of the comprehensive Construction Re-engineering Initiative at the U.S. Census Bureau, alternative data sources are being considered to supplement or replace current data collection methods. For the Survey of Construction (SOC), which measures new residential construction, this includes observing housing starts from satellite imagery in place of the current interviews for housing starts conducted by field representatives. Satellite images are obtained monthly for a subset of places in the SOC sample. Convolutional neural network models are then applied to images to predict likely new residential construction projects, with the current focus being single-family housing starts. Several post prediction processing steps are applied including exclusions based on intersections with known buildings or roads, treatments for missing data due to cloud cover, and adjustments for the length of time between consecutive images, to ultimately produce place level estimates of housing starts. These place level estimates are then combined with the existing building permit level survey data to produce estimates of West South Central division level housing starts, an experimental data product from the Census Bureau.
papers.zh_title: 衡量月度住房开工量的混合数据方法：卫星图像、调查数据等！
papers.zh_abstract: 作为美国人口普查局全面建筑改造计划的一部分，正在考虑使用替代数据源来补充或取代当前的数据收集方法。对于衡量新建住宅建设的建筑调查（SOC），这包括通过卫星图像观察住房开工量，以取代目前由实地代表进行的住房开工量访谈。每月为SOC样本中的一部分地点获取卫星图像。然后，将卷积神经网络模型应用于图像，以预测可能的新建住宅建设项目，当前重点是单户住宅开工量。应用了几个预测后处理步骤，包括基于与已知建筑物或道路交叉点的排除、针对云层覆盖导致的数据缺失的处理，以及针对连续图像之间时间跨度的调整，最终生成地点层面的住房开工量估计值。然后，将这些地点层面的估计值与现有的建筑许可证层面调查数据相结合，以生成西中部分区层面的住房开工量估计值，这是人口普查局的一个实验性数据产品。

papers.title: The Effect of Choice Screens on Mobile Browser Usage: Evidence from the EU Digital Markets Act
papers.authors: Jesper Akesson, Kush Amlani, Raul Cepeda Suarez, Emily Chissell, Stefan Hunt, Michael Luca, Gemma Petrie
papers.abstract: Can active choice mitigate the effects of preset defaults? We study this question using a difference-in-differences design around the rollout of the EU’s Digital Markets Act, which required iOS and Android to display browser choice screens under certain conditions. We find large effects, with notable differences across platforms: from 15 months after the mandate onward, Firefox usage was 113 percent higher on iOS and 12 percent higher on Android relative to a no-mandate counterfactual. This gap is consistent with rollout differences, as Android showed choice screens primarily on new devices, whereas iOS also showed them on existing devices.
papers.zh_title: 选择屏幕对移动浏览器使用的影响：来自欧盟《数字市场法案》的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 主动选择能否减轻预设默认值的影响？我们围绕欧盟《数字市场法案》的推出，采用双重差分设计来研究这个问题。该法案要求iOS和Android在某些条件下显示浏览器选择屏幕。我们发现了显著的影响，且不同平台之间存在显著差异：从强制令实施15个月后起，与无强制令的反事实情况相比，iOS上的Firefox使用量高出113%，Android上则高出12%。这一差距与推广差异一致，因为Android主要在新设备上显示选择屏幕，而iOS也在现有设备上显示。

papers.title: The Welfare Effects of Protecting Older Workers
papers.authors: Todd Morris, Stefan Staubli, Benoit Dostie
papers.abstract: We evaluate the welfare effects of five provincial mandatory retirement bans in Canada from 2005 to 2009 using linked employer-employee tax data. The bans sharply reduce retirements at age 65, with sizable announcement effects and heterogeneity across industries. Post-65 employment and earnings rise at least 14%, with gains comparable to a two-year increase in pension-eligibility ages. Older workers save more and spouses postpone retirement, benefiting public finances, with no observable effects on mortality or younger workers. Highly exposed firms reduce payroll costs via hiring adjustments while maintaining worker productivity and profitability. Our results suggest that protecting older workers was welfare-improving.
papers.zh_title: 保护老年工人的福利效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用关联的雇主-雇员税收数据，评估了加拿大2005年至2009年五项省级强制退休禁令的福利效应。这些禁令显著减少了65岁时的退休情况，存在显著的公告效应和行业异质性。65岁后的就业和收入至少增长了14%，其收益相当于养老金领取年龄提高两岁。老年工人储蓄更多，配偶推迟退休，这有利于公共财政，而对死亡率或年轻工人没有可观察到的影响。受影响较大的公司通过调整招聘来降低工资成本，同时保持工人的生产率和盈利能力。我们的结果表明，保护老年工人改善了福利。

papers.title: Early Childcare Attendance and Cognitive skills in Adolescence
papers.authors: Ingvild Almås, Nina Drange, Costas Meghir, Henrik D. Zachrisson
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of early childcare on academic achievement for children in grade 5 and grade 9, based on a 2003 policy expansion that created quasi-random variation in slot availability for children aged 1–2. Starting childcare one year earlier increases math scores by 9.7% of a standard deviation (SD) in grade 9. Children whose mothers do not hold a high school diploma benefit by a significant 28% of a SD at grade 9, reducing the math achievement gap from children of higher-educated mothers by about one third. We also present evidence of strong improvements for children of immigrants.
papers.zh_title: 早期托幼出勤与青少年时期的认知能力
papers.zh_abstract: 本文基于2003年的一项政策扩张，该政策为1-2岁儿童创造了准随机的托位可用性，考察了早期托幼对五年级和九年级学生学业成绩的影响。提前一年开始接受托幼服务，可使九年级的数学成绩提高9.7%的标准差。母亲没有高中文凭的儿童在九年级时受益显著，成绩提高了28%的标准差，这将他们与母亲受教育程度较高的儿童之间的数学成绩差距缩小了约三分之一。我们还提供了移民子女成绩显著提高的证据。

papers.title: Effects of Expanding Contraceptive Choice: New Evidence from Virginia's Contraceptive Access Initiative
papers.authors: Jessica H. Kiser, Analisa Packham, Janelle Anthony, Evelyn Escobar, Emily Yeatts
papers.abstract: In 2018, the Virginia Department of Health implemented the Contraceptive Access Initiative (CAI) to increase access to long-acting reversible contraceptives (LARCs). We use encounter-level data on contraceptive choice in participating CAI clinics and county-level natality data from 2014--2021 to estimate relative changes in LARC take-up and childbearing rates before and after the CAI. Difference-in-differences estimates indicate that the CAI reduced birth rates in participating counties by approximately 3 percent, or less than half of the effect size of other similar, state-level programs. We show that this smaller effect is likely due to existing high LARC take-up and contraceptive substitution.
papers.zh_title: 扩大避孕选择的影响：来自弗吉尼亚州避孕可及性倡议的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 2018年，弗吉尼亚州卫生部实施了避孕可及性倡议（CAI），以增加长效可逆避孕药具（LARCs）的可及性。我们使用参与CAI诊所的避孕选择就诊层面数据以及2014-2021年的县级出生数据，来估计CAI实施前后LARC使用率和生育率的相对变化。双重差分估计表明，CAI使参与县的出生率降低了约3%，不到其他类似州级项目效果规模的一半。我们表明，这种较小的效果很可能是由于已有的高LARC使用率和避孕替代效应。

papers.title: The Domestic Political Economy of War: Evidence from Russia
papers.authors: Alena Gorbuntsova, Gaurav Khanna, Sultan Mehmood
papers.abstract: Wars are often framed as responses to external threats or shifts in the regional balance of power. Yet they can also serve domestic political ends. This paper studies how Russia’s escalations against Ukraine reshaped support for the regime and redistributed the burdens of war across the population. Combining ethnic Russian shares with election and independent polling data, we exploit two sharp geopolitical shocks, the 2014 annexation of Crimea and the 2022 full-scale invasion, in a difference-in-differences event-study design. We find that provinces with larger ethnic Russian populations exhibit sharp increases in support for President Putin following both episodes. At the same time, battlefield casualties fall disproportionately on regions with lower ethnic Russian shares, and attitudes toward the US and EU deteriorate sharply. On the Ukrainian side, Russian attacks are concentrated in areas with higher ethnic Russian shares rather than in resource-rich provinces. Explanations based on material extraction, Soviet symbolism, or differential exposure to external threats do not account for these patterns. Instead, the evidence is more consistent with ethnic identity playing a central role in the domestic political economy of the war. Our conclusions remain similar in fraud-adjusted electoral outcomes, with alternative ethnicity measures, under bounded departures from parallel trends, and after accounting for several baseline regional differences.
papers.zh_title: 战争的国内政治经济学：来自俄罗斯的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 战争通常被描述为对外部威胁或地区力量平衡变化的回应。然而，它们也可以服务于国内政治目的。本文研究了俄罗斯对乌克兰的升级行动如何重塑了对政权的支持，并在人口中重新分配了战争负担。结合俄罗斯族裔比例与选举和独立民调数据，我们利用两次尖锐的地缘政治冲击——2014年吞并克里米亚和2022年全面入侵——采用双重差分事件研究设计。我们发现，在这两次事件之后，俄罗斯族裔人口比例较大的省份对普京总统的支持率急剧上升。与此同时，战场伤亡不成比例地落在俄罗斯族裔比例较低的地区，而对美国和欧盟的态度急剧恶化。在乌克兰方面，俄罗斯的攻击集中在俄罗斯族裔比例较高的地区，而不是资源丰富的省份。基于物质开采、苏联象征或对外部威胁的不同暴露程度的解释并不能解释这些模式。相反，证据更符合族裔认同在战争的国内政治经济学中发挥核心作用的观点。在经欺诈调整的选举结果、使用替代族裔衡量指标、在平行趋势假设有界偏离的情况下，以及在考虑了若干基线区域差异之后，我们的结论仍然相似。

papers.title: China's Global Ownership
papers.authors: Jennie Bai, Luc Laeven, Yaojun Ke, Hong Ru
papers.abstract: We study the global footprint and real effects of Chinese overseas corporate ownership. By assembling a comprehensive micro-level dataset of 161,773 firms across 159 countries (2012–2021), we independently reconstruct multi-layered ownership chains to trace capital through offshore tax havens to its ultimate origin. This approach reveals a global footprint substantially broader than official FDI statistics. Chinese-controlled foreign assets expanded at 20% annually, reaching $2.1 trillion or roughly 3% of global corporate assets by 2021. Chinese investors—particularly state-owned enterprises (SOEs)—strategically target R&D-intensive and supply-chain-linked firms. Following acquisition, target firms increase capital stock and R&D expenditures, yet these inputs fail to generate higher patent output and are accompanied by a significant decline in profitability. We document a novel 'innovation spillback' mechanism: while target innovation remains stagnant, Chinese parent firms experience a sharp acceleration in granted patents following their first developed-economy acquisition. Furthermore, a greater Chinese presence crowds out R&D at non-target peer firms, though aggregate industry-level innovation remains unchanged. China thus represents a distinctively state-driven model of global ownership that accepts weaker near-term performance to internalize technological capacity at home.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F3, G32, G34, O3
papers.zh_title: 中国的全球所有权
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国海外企业所有权的全球足迹及其实际影响。通过汇编涵盖159个国家161,773家企业的综合微观数据集（2012-2021年），我们独立重建了多层所有权链条，以追踪资本通过离岸避税天堂直至其最终来源。这一方法揭示的全球足迹远大于官方外国直接投资统计数据。中国控制的海外资产以每年20%的速度增长，到2021年达到2.1万亿美元，约占全球企业资产的3%。中国投资者——特别是国有企业——战略性地瞄准研发密集型和供应链关联企业。在收购后，目标企业增加了资本存量和研发支出，但这些投入未能产生更高的专利产出，并伴随着盈利能力的显著下降。我们记录了一种新颖的“创新回流”机制：虽然目标企业的创新保持停滞，但中国母公司在首次收购发达经济体企业后，其授权专利数量急剧加速增长。此外，中国企业的更大存在挤出了非目标同行企业的研发，尽管行业层面的总体创新保持不变。因此，中国代表了一种独特的国家驱动的全球所有权模式，该模式接受较弱的短期业绩，以在国内内化技术能力。

papers.title: Trends in Health Inequalities among Spanish Retirees
papers.authors: Cristina Bellés-Obrero, Manuel Flores Mallo, Pilar García-Gómez, Sergi Jimenez-Martin, Judit Vall Castelló
papers.abstract: Spain, with one of the highest life expectancies globally and a rapidly ageing population, faces growing challenges in sustaining its pension, healthcare, and long-term care systems. This study examines trends in health inequalities among retired Spaniards from 2004 to 2022, using eight waves of the Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE). We analyse five health outcomes—limitations in daily and instrumental activities, number of chronic conditions, a composite health deficiency index, mental health (EURO-D scale), and cognitive performance—and use linear regression to assess income-related gradients, adjusted for age and sex. We also compute a catch-up time measure—the number of years a poorer individual would need to reach the same level of health as a richer individual—and concentration indices of bad health. We then examine how these inequalities change over time, allowing us to explore the potential influence of pension reforms within the context of Spain’s Beveridge-style healthcare system and tax-funded long-term care provision. Our results show no clear evidence that health inequality has increased from 2004 to 2022. These findings contribute to understanding how income disparities interact with social protection systems in ageing societies and inform the design of equitable health, long-term care, and pension policies.
papers.zh_title: 西班牙退休人员健康不平等趋势
papers.zh_abstract: 西班牙拥有全球最高的预期寿命之一且人口迅速老龄化，在维持其养老金、医疗保健和长期护理体系方面面临日益严峻的挑战。本研究利用欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查的八轮数据，考察了2004年至2022年间西班牙退休人员健康不平等的趋势。我们分析了五项健康结果——日常活动限制和工具性活动限制、慢性病数量、综合健康缺陷指数、心理健康（EURO-D量表）和认知表现——并使用线性回归评估经年龄和性别调整后的收入相关梯度。我们还计算了一个追赶时间指标——一个较贫困个体需要多少年才能达到与较富裕个体相同的健康水平——以及不良健康的集中指数。然后，我们考察了这些不平等如何随时间变化，从而得以探索在西班牙贝弗里奇式医疗体系和税收资助的长期护理提供背景下养老金改革的潜在影响。我们的结果显示，没有明确证据表明健康不平等在2004年至2022年间有所加剧。这些发现有助于理解在老龄化社会中收入差距如何与社会保护体系相互作用，并为设计公平的健康、长期护理和养老金政策提供信息。

papers.title: Market Power in Mortgage Pricing: the Role of Referral Lending
papers.authors: Dayin Zhang, Panle Jia Barwick, Lu Han, Jonathan Kroah
papers.abstract: Despite intense competition among mortgage lenders, borrowers face elevated rate spreads and price dispersion. We identify realtor–loan-officer referral networks as a source of lender market power: by steering homebuyers toward a few loan officers, they restrict borrower choice. Linking 78,706 realtors to 101,316 loan officers across 41 states, we find these networks pervasive and concentrated. Instrumenting for referral exposure with realtor-level loan-officer concentration in excess of counterfactual loan-officer choice, referred borrowers pay 18.4 basis points more ($2,585 upfront), with larger premia for Hispanic, Black, and financially constrained households. Referrals reduce search and increase loan officer pricing power both across and within lenders.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE；JEL：D40, G21, L14, L85, R31
papers.zh_title: 抵押贷款定价中的市场势力：推荐贷款的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管抵押贷款机构之间存在激烈竞争，但借款人面临显著的价格离散。我们认为，房地产经纪人-贷款官员推荐网络是贷款机构市场势力的一个关键来源：通过将购房者引导至一小部分贷款官员，这些网络即使在竞争激烈的市场中也限制了借款人的有效选择。利用一个将41个州的81,306名房地产经纪人与102,860名贷款官员联系起来的新数据集，我们记录了此类网络普遍存在且高度集中——85%的房地产经纪人将超过40%的客户引导至少于四名贷款官员——并且这种集中度在拥有更多贷款机构的市场中持续存在甚至增加。IV估计表明，使用推荐贷款官员的借款人支付的抵押贷款利率高出18.6个基点，相当于平均30.6万美元贷款中2,609美元的前期成本。推荐贷款使利率利差提高了36.5%，并解释了利差横截面残差变异的一半。对于西班牙裔借款人，这一溢价几乎是白人借款人的三倍，并且对于黑人借款人和财务受限家庭系统性更高。我们识别出两个渠道：推荐减少了借款人在不同贷款机构间的搜索强度，并且被推荐的贷款官员相对于同一机构内的同事行使定价权。更快处理和降低拒绝风险带来的效率提升并不能抵消额外成本。

papers.title: How Poverty Fell
papers.authors: Vincent J. Armentano, Paul Niehaus, Tom Vogl
papers.abstract: The share of the global population living in extreme poverty fell dramatically from an estimated 36% in 1990 to 9% in 2015. We describe how this decline happened: the extent to which changes within as opposed to between cohorts contributed to poverty declines, and the key changes in the lives of households as they transitioned out of (and into) poverty. We do so using cross-sectional and panel sources that are representative or near-representative of five countries that collectively accounted for 75% of global poverty decline between 1990 and 2015.
