The data show that overlapping birth cohorts experienced the decline of poverty together over time, such that poverty decline can be viewed as a primarily within-cohort phenomenon. Within cohorts, the data reveal substantial churn, casting the challenge of escaping poverty as a “slippery slope” more than a long-term trap. The data also illustrate a diversity of pathways out of poverty: sectoral transitions, migration, and changing occupational choices and female labor force participation can all account for some part of poverty reduction, but in all but a handful of cases, a majority of households exiting poverty did so without experiencing these changes.
papers.zh_title: 贫困如何下降
papers.zh_abstract: 全球极端贫困人口比例从1990年估计的36%大幅下降至2015年的9%。我们描述了这一下降是如何发生的：队列内部变化与队列间变化对贫困下降的贡献程度，以及家庭在摆脱（和陷入）贫困过程中生活的关键变化。我们使用了具有代表性或接近代表性的横截面和面板数据来源，这些数据覆盖了五个国家，这些国家共同占据了1990年至2015年间全球贫困下降的75%。数据显示，重叠的出生队列随着时间的推移共同经历了贫困的下降，因此贫困下降可以被视为一种主要发生在队列内部的现象。在队列内部，数据揭示了大量的流动，这使得摆脱贫困的挑战更像是一个“滑坡”，而非长期陷阱。数据还说明了摆脱贫困的多种途径：部门转型、迁移、职业选择的变化以及女性劳动参与率的提高都可以解释部分贫困减少，但在除少数情况外的所有案例中，大多数摆脱贫困的家庭并未经历这些变化。

papers.title: Tipping Points and Australia’s Social Media Ban
papers.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Angela L. Duckworth, Rafael Jiménez-Durán, Aaron Leonard, Filip Milojević, Christopher Roth, Cass R. Sunstein
papers.abstract: In December 2025, Australia became the first country to ban under-16s from major social media platforms, a policy under consideration in more than a dozen countries. Because individually complying with the ban when others do not comply is socially costly, an easily circumvented ban may work only if compliance crosses a tipping point. Surveying Australian teenagers four months after implementation, we found that fewer than one in three 14–15-year-olds were in compliance with the ban. However, teenagers reported requiring two out of three peers to comply before complying themselves and, in addition, perceived compliers as less popular. These forces predict erosion, and indeed, two months later, compliance had fallen to about one in twenty. Reducing social media use in adolescents likely requires supplementing bans with individual incentives and social norms interventions.
papers.zh_title: 禁令为何失败：临界点与澳大利亚的社交媒体禁令
papers.zh_abstract: 2025年12月，澳大利亚成为第一个禁止16岁以下青少年在主要社交媒体平台持有账户的国家，这一政策目前正在十几个国家和众多州被考虑。由于社交媒体使用本质上是社会性的，一项易于规避的禁令的有效性可能取决于合规是否达到一个临界点：即合规同伴的比例足够高，以至于个人自身合规成为最优选择。我们在禁令生效四个月后调查了835名澳大利亚青少年，发现只有大约四分之一的14-15岁青少年遵守规定。围绕使用的社会环境几乎没有改变：大多数被禁青少年认为他们的同伴仍在使用的被禁平台，并引用社会原因作为继续使用的理由。维持高合规率需要两个要素：合规者的比例必须足够高，并且合规者必须发现继续合规是可取的。当前的禁令两者都未实现。青少年报告称，他们需要大约三分之二的同伴停止使用社交媒体才能让自己停止，这远高于目前合规的比例。他们还认为合规者不如不合规者受欢迎，因此更有影响力的青少年不成比例地留在平台上。综合来看，这些模式表明合规率更可能下降而非上升。要维持更高的合规率，很可能需要将禁令与直接作用于社会规范和个人激励的工具相结合。

papers.title: Shaping Society's Character: The Role of Schools in Developing Social and Emotional Skills
papers.authors: Sule Alan
papers.abstract: This chapter examines how schools cultivate socio-emotional skills that influence both individual success and broader social cohesion. Moving beyond the traditional focus on cognitive ability, I argue that education plays a crucial role in fostering traits that promote cooperation, trust, and long-term societal well-being. Drawing on insights from neuroscience, psychology, and economics, I explore how schools shape not only academic and labor market outcomes but also intergenerational beliefs, attitudes, and the formation of social capital. Using evidence from experimental studies, I highlight how school-based interventions can instill perseverance, enhance social learning, and create environments that curb anti-social tendencies, promote prosocial behavior—ultimately influencing the cultural fabric of society. This perspective reframes education as a mechanism for building more equitable and cohesive communities.
papers.zh_title: 塑造社会品格：学校在发展社交与情感技能中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本章考察了学校如何培养影响个人成功和更广泛社会凝聚力的社交情感技能。超越传统上对认知能力的关注，我认为教育在培养促进合作、信任和长期社会福祉的特质方面发挥着关键作用。借鉴神经科学、心理学和经济学的见解，我探讨了学校如何不仅塑造学术和劳动力市场成果，还塑造代际信念、态度以及社会资本的形成。利用实验研究的证据，我强调了基于学校的干预措施如何能够灌输毅力、增强社会学习，并创造遏制反社会倾向、促进亲社会行为的环境——最终影响社会的文化结构。这一视角将教育重新定义为建设更公平、更具凝聚力的社区的一种机制。

papers.title: Adolescent Behavior, Learning, and Knowledge Diffusion: Evidence from a Randomized Experiment
papers.authors: Sule Alan, Kumar Biswas, Christina S. Hauser, Shwetlena Sabarwal
papers.abstract: Improving classroom behavior is a persistent challenge in low-resource education systems, where disruptive environments often derail instruction and limit learning. Yet little rigorous evidence exists on whether behavior management can serve as a lever for academic improvement. We evaluate a program that shifts responsibility for establishing behavioral norms and reducing classroom disruptions from teachers to students. Covering over 7,500 adolescents across 127 middle schools in Bangladesh, the program significantly improves the classroom social climate, fostering stronger cooperation, better behavioral norms, and more supportive peer networks. High-performing students benefit most, showing significant gains in math and verbal tests after the program. A follow-up 1.5 years later reveals that while social climate improvements fade, academic gains persist and extend to a broader set of students, though they remain concentrated among higher-ability peers. A key mechanism is enhanced academic support networks among high-ability students, facilitating peer learning and knowledge diffusion within this group.
papers.zh_title: 青少年行为、学习与知识扩散：来自一项随机实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 改善课堂行为是资源匮乏教育系统中一个持续的挑战，在这些系统中，混乱的环境常常扰乱教学并限制学习。然而，关于行为管理是否能成为提高学业成绩的杠杆，目前缺乏严谨的证据。我们评估了一个将建立行为规范和减少课堂干扰的责任从教师转移到学生的项目。该项目覆盖了孟加拉国127所中学的7500多名青少年，显著改善了课堂社会氛围，促进了更强的合作、更好的行为规范和更具支持性的同伴网络。表现优异的学生受益最多，在项目后的数学和语文测试中显示出显著进步。一年半后的跟踪调查显示，虽然社会氛围的改善逐渐消退，但学业成绩的提升持续存在，并扩展到更广泛的学生群体，尽管这些提升仍然集中在能力较强的同伴中。一个关键机制是增强了高能力学生之间的学术支持网络，促进了该群体内的同伴学习和知识扩散。

papers.title: Data Neutrality, Data Supply, and Market Competition
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Soo Jin Kim
papers.abstract: We analyze the effects of data neutrality regulations on downstream market competition, the incentive of the platform to produce data, and consumer welfare. In our framework, data neutrality requires that firms seeking access to the platform’s data be treated equally, irrespective of whether they are affiliated with the platform. We consider two forms of regulation. Under weak data neutrality, the platform must provide the same amount of data to affiliated and unaffiliated sellers; under strong data neutrality, it must also charge the same price. We show that weak data neutrality can be largely ineffective, as the platform may restore exclusion through discriminatory pricing. Strong data neutrality is more consequential, but it does not necessarily raise welfare. Although it broadens access and intensifies downstream competition, it also reduces the incentive of the platform to refine and produce data. Consequently, data neutrality can reduce the equilibrium amount of data available in the market, and this data-reduction effect can dominate its benefits, which enhance competition. These findings suggest that regulating access to platform data requires balancing fair competition against the incentive to generate valuable data inputs.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PE, PR；JEL：D4, L1, L4, L5
papers.zh_title: 数据中立、数据供给与市场竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了数据中立法规对下游市场竞争、平台生产数据的激励以及消费者福利的影响。在我们的框架中，数据中立要求寻求访问平台数据的公司无论是否与平台有关联都应受到平等对待。我们考虑了两种形式的监管。在弱数据中立下，平台必须向关联卖家和非关联卖家提供相同数量的数据；在强数据中立下，平台还必须收取相同的价格。我们表明，弱数据中立可能在很大程度上无效，因为平台可能通过歧视性定价来恢复排他性。强数据中立的影响更大，但它不一定能提高福利。尽管它扩大了访问权限并加剧了下游竞争，但它也降低了平台精炼和生产数据的激励。因此，数据中立可以减少市场上可用的数据均衡量，而这种数据减少效应可能主导其增强竞争的益处。这些发现表明，监管对平台数据的访问需要在公平竞争与激励生成有价值的数据投入之间取得平衡。

papers.title: Mosaics of Predictability
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Guanhao Feng, Jingyu He, Yuanzhi Wang
papers.abstract: We argue that return predictability is a latent, asset-specific, and state-dependent characteristic. We develop an interpretable Panel Tree that endogenously partitions the U.S. equity panel into out-of-sample and persistent “mosaic” patterns, and estimate cluster-specific forecasting models. Predictability concentrates in stocks with large earnings surprises, high earnings–price ratios, and low trading volume. It is countercyclical, stronger when market dividend yields are high and liquidity is low. Accounting for predictability heterogeneity, which conventional models ignore, improves forecasts and yields portfolios with out-of-sample Sharpe ratios around 2. Across 50 years of data, the mosaic map shows where signals arise and where noise dominates.
papers.zh_title: 可预测性的马赛克
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，回报可预测性是一种潜在的、资产特定的且依赖于状态的特征。我们开发了一个可解释的面板树，该树将美国股票面板内生地划分为样本外且持久的“马赛克”模式，并估计了特定聚类的预测模型。可预测性集中在具有较大盈利意外、高盈利价格比和低交易量的股票中。它是逆周期的，当市场股息收益率高且流动性低时更强。考虑可预测性异质性（传统模型忽略了这一点）可以改进预测，并产生样本外夏普比率约为2的投资组合。在50年的数据中，马赛克图显示了信号出现在哪里以及噪声在哪里占主导地位。

papers.title: Automation, Learning, and Career Dynamics
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Andres Blanco, Andrés Drenik, Erik Hurst
papers.abstract: We study how an automating technology affects career dynamics, human capital, and welfare in an economy where workers acquire skill through the tasks they perform. In a continuous-time general equilibrium model, learning-by-doing is determined jointly with the share of tasks automated, the frontier of tasks managers maintain, and the worker-to-manager career transition. Economies with high learning capacity admit pairs of stationary equilibria strictly ranked by the aggregate learning rate. Cheaper technology has opposite effects across the two: in the high-learning equilibrium, it raises welfare through the learning channel itself; in the low-learning equilibrium, it tips the economy into a human-capital trap. The planner's first-best combines a tax on automation profits with a subsidy on frontier-maintenance expenditures at a common rate.
papers.zh_title: 自动化、学习与职业动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项自动化技术如何影响一个经济体中通过执行任务获得技能的工人的职业动态、人力资本和福利。在一个连续时间的一般均衡模型中，边做边学与自动化任务份额、管理者维持的任务前沿以及工人到管理者的职业转型共同决定。具有高学习能力的经济体存在一对严格按总学习率排序的稳态均衡。更便宜的技术在这两种均衡中具有相反的影响：在高学习均衡中，它通过学习渠道本身提高福利；在低学习均衡中，它使经济陷入人力资本陷阱。计划者的最优方案是将对自动化利润征税与以共同税率补贴前沿维持支出相结合。

papers.title: Trade and the End of Antiquity
papers.authors: Johannes Boehm, Thomas Chaney
papers.abstract: What was the role of trade, and how did economic activity evolve at the End of Antiquity, when political power shifts away from the Mediterranean towards northern Europe and the Middle East? To answer those questions, we assemble a database of hundreds of thousands of ancient coins from the fourth to the tenth century, estimate a dynamic model of trade and money where coins gradually diffuse along trade routes, and recover granular regional trade and real consumption time series. Our estimates suggest that: Mediterranean trade was disrupted by the newly formed border between Islam and Christianity; economic activity shifts away from the Mediterranean starting in the fifth century; real consumption peaks in the Middle East in the eighth century; and by the end of the ninth century, Atlantic regions from Islamic Spain to Frankish northwestern Europe have become the wealthiest regions of the ancient western world.
papers.zh_title: 贸易与古典时代晚期
papers.zh_abstract: 在古典时代晚期，当政治权力从地中海地区向北欧和中东转移时，贸易扮演了什么角色，经济活动又是如何演变的？为了回答这些问题，我们建立了一个包含从四世纪到十世纪数十万枚古代硬币的数据库，估计了一个贸易和货币的动态模型，其中硬币沿着贸易路线逐渐扩散，并恢复了细粒度的区域贸易和实际消费时间序列。我们的估计表明：地中海贸易因伊斯兰教与基督教之间新形成的边界而中断；经济活动从五世纪开始离开地中海地区；实际消费在八世纪的中东达到顶峰；到九世纪末，从伊斯兰西班牙到法兰克西北欧的大西洋地区已成为古代西方世界最富裕的地区。

papers.title: When Does Automating AI Research Produce Explosive Growth? Feedback Loops in Innovation Networks
papers.authors: Tom Davidson, Basil Halperin, Thomas Houlden, Anton Korinek
papers.abstract: AI labs are increasingly using AI itself to accelerate AI research, creating a feedback loop that could lead to an intelligence explosion. We develop a general semi-endogenous growth model with an innovation network, where research and automation in one sector increase the productivity of research in other sectors, and derive a clean analytical condition under which growth becomes superexponential (``explosive''). We find that automating research can offset diminishing returns to ideas by activating two reinforcing channels: a technological feedback loop across research sectors, and an economic feedback loop in which higher output finances further research. Growth becomes explosive if the combined strength of technological and economic feedback loops overcomes diminishing returns. In a simple simulation calibrated to trends in AI progress, fully automating software research and modest (5%) automation in other sectors generates a singularity within six years. Bottlenecks do not overturn the result if task automation advances sufficiently fast.
papers.zh_title: 何时自动化人工智能研究会产生爆炸性增长？创新网络中的反馈循环
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能实验室正越来越多地使用人工智能本身来加速人工智能研究，这创造了一个可能导致智能爆炸的反馈循环。我们构建了一个带有创新网络的一般半内生增长模型，在该模型中，一个部门的研究和自动化会提高其他部门的研究生产率，并推导出一个简洁的分析条件，在该条件下增长变为超指数增长（“爆炸性”）。我们发现，自动化研究可以通过激活两个强化渠道来抵消思想的收益递减：跨研究部门的技术反馈循环，以及更高产出为进一步研究提供资金的经济反馈循环。如果技术和经济反馈循环的综合强度克服了收益递减，增长就会变得爆炸性。在一个根据人工智能进展趋势校准的简单模拟中，完全自动化软件研究以及在其他部门实现适度（5%）的自动化，会在六年内产生一个奇点。如果任务自动化进展足够快，瓶颈不会推翻这一结果。

papers.title: Replacement and Reputation
papers.authors: Navin Kartik, Elliot Lipnowski, Harry Pei
papers.abstract: Does electoral replacement ensure that officeholders eventually act in voters’ interests? We study a reputational model of accountability. Voters observe incumbents’ performance and decide whether to replace them. Politicians may be “good” types who always exert effort or opportunists who may shirk. We find that good long-run outcomes are always attainable, though the mechanism and its robustness depend on economic conditions. In environments conducive to incentive provision, some equilibria feature sustained effort, yet others exhibit some long-run shirking. In the complementary case, opportunists are never fully disciplined, but selection dominates: every equilibrium eventually settles on a good politician, yielding permanent effort.
papers.zh_title: 更替与声誉
papers.zh_abstract: 选举更替是否能确保官员最终按照选民的利益行事？我们研究了一个声誉模型下的问责制。选民观察现任者的表现，并决定是否替换他们。政治家可能是始终付出努力的“好”类型，也可能是可能偷懒的机会主义者。我们发现，良好的长期结果总是可以实现的，尽管其机制和稳健性取决于经济条件。在有利于激励提供的环境中，一些均衡表现出持续的努力，而另一些均衡则表现出一些长期的偷懒。在互补的情况下，机会主义者永远不会被完全约束，但选择效应占主导地位：每个均衡最终都会稳定在一个好的政治家身上，从而产生持续的努力。

papers.title: AI Managed Household Portfolios: A Preliminary Report
papers.authors: Bruce I. Carlin, Ryan D. Israelsen, Christopher F. Wazzan
papers.abstract: How does AI manage household stock portfolios? We collect a prospective, daily time-series of stock recommendations using several LLM's and study AI's investment style. AI recommends undiversified portfolios that positively load on momentum, large companies, and low book-to-market firms. AI primarily recommends stocks based on how much media attention firms receive. Using multiple versions of queries and requests, we find that buy-and-hold and actively managed AI portfolios do not appear to earn statistically-significant abnormal returns based on the methodology of Daniel et al (1997).
papers.zh_title: 人工智能管理的家庭投资组合：初步报告
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能如何管理家庭股票投资组合？我们使用几种大型语言模型收集了一个前瞻性的、每日的股票推荐时间序列，并研究了人工智能的投资风格。人工智能推荐的投资组合多元化程度低，正向载荷于动量、大公司和低账面市值比公司。人工智能主要根据公司获得媒体关注的程度来推荐股票。通过使用多种版本的查询和请求，我们发现，基于Daniel等人（1997）的方法，买入持有和主动管理的人工智能投资组合似乎并未获得统计上显著的异常回报。

papers.title: Mothers, Schools, and the Making of American Human Capital Mobility
papers.authors: Lukas Althoff, Harriet M. Brookes Gray, Hugo Reichardt
papers.abstract: How did the US become a land of opportunity? Previous historical research on intergenerational mobility has focused on father-son income correlations, masking the role of mothers. We introduce a new mobility measure that incorporates both parents' human capital, develop a latent variable method leveraging literacy as a proxy, and construct a representative linked panel that includes women. We find that intergenerational mobility—in both human capital and income—rose sharply from the 19th to the 20th century. Initially, maternal human capital was most predictive of children's outcomes. However, as schooling expanded, this reliance declined and intergenerational mobility rose. America's investment in mass education has therefore been central to its rise as a mobile society.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C1, H10, H4, I20, J62, N0
papers.zh_title: 母亲、学校与美国人力资本流动性的形成
papers.zh_abstract: 美国是如何成为一个充满机遇的国度的？以往关于代际流动性的历史研究主要集中在父子收入相关性上，掩盖了母亲的作用。我们引入了一个新的流动性衡量指标，该指标纳入了父母双方的人力资本，开发了一种利用识字率作为代理变量的潜变量方法，并构建了一个包含女性的代表性关联面板。我们发现，从19世纪到20世纪，人力资本和收入方面的代际流动性都急剧上升。最初，母亲的人力资本最能预测子女的成果。然而，随着学校教育的扩展，这种依赖性下降，代际流动性上升。因此，美国对大众教育的投资是其崛起为一个流动性社会的核心。

papers.title: Retrospective Versus Prospective Meritocracy
papers.authors: Steven N. Durlauf
papers.abstract: This article proposes a way of understanding meritocracy from retrospective versus prospective points of view. Retrospective meritocracy is static or backwards-looking: Merit is based on an individual’s characteristics or past achievements as representative of excellence or as desert for a position already obtained. Prospective meritocracy is forward-looking: Merit is functionally defined as the comparative contribution that an individual makes to a specified set of social objectives. I use formal models to show that these alternative conceptions have very different implications for meritocratic assignments of students to schools or workers to jobs and that they involve differing information needs for a policymaker. These different approaches to merit demonstrate how alternate versions of meritocracy may or may not be socially efficient. I discuss implications for the use of meritocracy as a desideratum for various public policy contexts.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS；JEL：D63, D78, I24, I28, J24
papers.zh_title: 回顾性与前瞻性精英统治
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种从回顾性与前瞻性角度理解精英统治的方法。回顾性精英统治是静态的或向后看的：精英地位基于个人的特征或过去的成就，作为卓越的代表或对已获得职位的应得。前瞻性精英统治是向前看的：精英地位被功能性地定义为个人对一组特定社会目标所做的比较性贡献。我使用形式化模型表明，这些不同的概念对学生分配到学校或工人分配到工作岗位的精英统治安排有着非常不同的含义，并且它们涉及政策制定者不同的信息需求。这些不同的精英统治方法展示了精英统治的不同版本可能或不可能具有社会效率。我讨论了将精英统治作为各种公共政策背景下的一个期望目标的含义。

papers.title: Beliefs, Attention, and Investments in Early Childhood
papers.authors: Flavio Cunha, Snejana Nihtianova, Jessica Rood, Anja-Lize van der Merwe
papers.abstract: We develop a model of parental investment in early childhood in which bandwidth-constrained parents hold distorted beliefs about the returns to responsive interaction. When capacity falls short of aspiration, motivated reasoning provides relief: the parent distorts her working belief downward, rationalizing low engagement. Distorted beliefs suppress responsive parenting, which generates no calibration evidence, which, in turn, confirms the distortion. The model identifies four channels through which interventions escape this self-sealing trap. A randomized controlled trial confirms the model's predictions on parental beliefs, measures of responsive parenting, behavioral engagement, and absence of impact on materials or placebo outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 信念、注意力与早期儿童投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个早期儿童父母投资模型，在该模型中，带宽受限的父母对回应性互动的回报持有扭曲的信念。当能力达不到期望时，动机性推理提供了缓解：父母向下扭曲其工作信念，为低参与度提供合理化理由。扭曲的信念抑制了回应性养育，这不会产生校准证据，进而又确认了这种扭曲。该模型识别了干预措施摆脱这种自我封闭陷阱的四个渠道。一项随机对照试验证实了该模型对父母信念、回应性养育测量、行为参与度以及在对物质或安慰剂结果无影响方面的预测。

papers.title: Firm Pay, Amenities, and Inequality
papers.authors: Sydnee Caldwell, Ingrid Haegele, Jörg Heining
papers.abstract: We estimate firm-specific amenity valuations using discrete choice experiments embedded in a large-scale survey of German workers linked to administrative records. Workers rank hypothetical offers from real firms they would consider joining, with randomized wages identifying money-metric valuations. Valuations vary substantially across firms and demographic groups, yet a single index performs surprisingly well. Valuations are approximately orthogonal to firm wage premia; they therefore do not offset between-firm wage inequality. However, male-female differences in amenity valuations explain part of the gender wage gap.
papers.zh_title: 企业薪酬、福利与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用嵌入在一项与行政记录相关联的德国工人大规模调查中的离散选择实验，估计了企业特定的福利估值。工人对来自他们可能考虑加入的真实企业的假设性工作机会进行排序，随机化的工资识别出货币度量估值。估值在不同企业和人口群体之间差异很大，但一个单一指数表现得惊人地好。估值与企业工资溢价大致正交；因此，它们并未抵消企业间的工资不平等。然而，男女在福利估值上的差异解释了部分性别工资差距。

papers.title: The Labor Market as an Equilibrium Newsvendor Problem
papers.authors: Alexandre Mas
papers.abstract: I study hiring under uncertainty when firms can either hold permanent labor as a buffer or hire from a spot market after demand is realized. I build a model where the spot market is endogenously determined such that when one firm relies more on spot labor, it thickens the market that other firms use as well. Individual firms do not internalize that contribution, so the competitive equilibrium involves too much buffering. I evaluate the model in the market for registered nurses using the universe of daily time sheet records from skilled nursing facilities. The data support the model’s general equilibrium predictions. Markets with thicker agency markets have less rationing conditional on total nursing hours, and compressed upper tails of permanent staffing with higher overall hours in the lower part of the distribution. Estimating a facility-level newsvendor model with heterogeneous spot market frictions and rationing costs I find that the nursing labor market was more efficient post-COVID, there are substantial welfare gains from bringing frictions down to those of the most efficient markets, and that the marginal external benefit for a firm that participates in the spot market instead of hiring an employee as buffer averages 12 percent of wages. This labor market underprovides flexibility because the value of availability is not fully priced.
papers.zh_title: 作为均衡报童问题的劳动力市场
papers.zh_abstract: 我研究了需求不确定下的雇佣行为，此时企业既可以持有永久性劳动力作为缓冲，也可以在需求实现后从现货市场雇佣。我构建了一个模型，其中现货市场是内生的，以至于当一家企业更多地依赖现货劳动力时，它也会加厚其他企业所使用的市场。单个企业并未内化这一贡献，因此竞争均衡涉及过多的缓冲。我利用来自专业护理机构的每日考勤记录全样本数据，在注册护士市场中评估该模型。数据支持该模型的总体均衡预测。在总护理工时给定的条件下，代理市场更厚的市场配给更少，并且更厚的代理市场压缩了永久性人员配置的上尾，同时提高了分布下部的总工时。通过估计一个具有异质性现货市场摩擦和配给成本的设施层面报童模型，我发现新冠疫情后护理劳动力市场效率更高，降低现货市场摩擦能带来显著的福利收益，并且一家参与现货市场而非雇佣员工作为缓冲的企业的边际外部收益平均为工资的7%。这个劳动力市场提供的灵活性不足，因为可用性的价值没有被完全定价。

papers.title: Learning by Mail: The Impact of Correspondence Schools in Early 20th Century America
papers.authors: Daniela Vidart
papers.abstract: This paper examines correspondence education as an alternative educational pathway in early 20th-century America. Using newly digitized records from the International Correspondence Schools—the largest such institution, with over 4 million students by 1940—linked to census data, I show that enrollment increased the likelihood of skilled employment by 6-10pp within 3-10 years, particularly among younger students who used it as a substitute for high school. I develop a general equilibrium Roy-style model where individuals sort into educational options by ability. Consistent with the model, correspondence education facilitated skill acquisition for lower-ability individuals and improved selection into high school, amplifying its returns.
papers.zh_title: 函授学习：20世纪初美国函授学校的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了函授教育作为20世纪初美国替代性教育途径的作用。利用新近数字化的国际函授学校（截至1940年拥有超过400万学生，是当时规模最大的此类机构）记录，并与人口普查数据相关联，我发现，在3至10年内，注册函授课程使获得技能型工作的可能性提高了6至10个百分点，这一效应在将其用作高中替代教育的年轻学生中尤为显著。我构建了一个一般均衡的Roy式模型，在该模型中，个体根据能力选择不同的教育路径。与模型一致，函授教育促进了能力较低个体的技能获取，并改善了对高中教育的筛选，从而放大了其回报。

papers.title: Understanding Medicaid Managed Care: The Procured Competition Model
papers.authors: Mark Shepard, Jacob Wallace
papers.abstract: Medicaid is one of the largest public programs in the United States — providing health insurance to over 75 million low-income Americans — and over three quarters of its enrollees receive care via private “managed care” insurers. In this summary article, we make three central points about the economics of contracting out Medicaid to private insurers. First, the empirical evidence on Medicaid privatization is mixed: contracting out has not meaningfully reduced public costs or improved quality of care. Second, we propose a framework, which we call “procured competition,” to describe the unique structure of Medicaid managed care as a hybrid of public procurement and regulated competition. Third, we discuss the key policy levers across procurement, competition, and consumer choice in this model. Throughout, we highlight open research questions, arguing that the enormous variation in how states design these programs — combined with limited evidence on what works — represents a promising area for high-impact scholarship.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, PE；JEL：H0, I11, I13, L0
papers.zh_title: 理解医疗补助管理式医疗：采购竞争模型
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗补助是美国最大的公共项目之一——为超过7500万低收入美国人提供健康保险——其超过四分之三的参保者通过私营的“管理式医疗”保险公司获得医疗服务。在这篇综述文章中，我们就将医疗补助外包给私营保险公司的经济学问题提出三个核心观点。首先，关于医疗补助私有化的实证证据是混合的：外包并未显著降低公共成本或改善护理质量。其次，我们提出了一个框架，称之为“采购竞争”，用以描述医疗补助管理式医疗作为公共采购与受监管竞争的混合体的独特结构。第三，我们讨论了该模型中涉及采购、竞争和消费者选择的关键政策杠杆。在整个过程中，我们强调了尚待解决的研究问题，认为各州在设计这些项目时存在的巨大差异——加上关于何种措施有效的有限证据——代表了一个有望产生高影响力学术成果的研究领域。

papers.title: The Annuity Puzzle Revisited: Barriers, Behavior, and Policy Paths to Lifetime Income
papers.authors: Hal E. Hershfield, Suzanne Shu, Jeffrey R. Brown, Abigail Hurwitz, Moshe Arye Milevsky, Olivia S. Mitchell, Tamiko Toland
papers.abstract: Wealth decumulation decisions, or how to optimize consumption over an uncertain remaining lifespan, are among the most difficult people face. They involve intertemporal tradeoffs, uncertainty, complexity, and emotion, yet many consumers receive little formal guidance. A central challenge is securing lifetime income and avoiding outliving resources, particularly through life annuities that guarantee income for life. Standard economic models predict high demand for annuities, but in practice few individuals purchase them, a gap known as the annuity puzzle. This paper introduces annuities, examines limited adoption among consumers and plan sponsors, reviews leading explanations, and outlines approaches to increase uptake and improve decision quality.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D14, G11, G23, H55, J26
papers.zh_title: 再论年金谜题：终身收入的障碍、行为与政策路径
papers.zh_abstract: 财富变现决策，即如何在不确定的剩余寿命内优化消费，是人们面临的最困难决策之一。这些决策涉及跨期权衡、不确定性、复杂性和情感因素，然而许多消费者很少得到正式指导。一个核心挑战是确保终身收入并避免资源耗尽，特别是通过保证终身收入的生命年金。标准经济模型预测对年金有很高的需求，但在实践中，很少有人购买它们，这一差距被称为年金谜题。本文介绍了年金，考察了消费者和计划发起人对其采用有限的情况，回顾了主要的解释，并概述了提高采用率和改善决策质量的方法。

papers.title: Characteristics of a Sufficient Statistic to Measure City Housing Prices
papers.authors: Daniel Broxterman, William Larson, Anthony Yezer
papers.abstract: Characterizing the level and change of housing prices in cities is central to many empirical questions, whether prices are measured using rents or asset values. The task is complicated by the heterogeneity of the housing stock, the joint consumption of housing and neighborhood, and differences in accessibility. This paper focuses on intra-city location which, based on economic theory, is systematically related to housing prices. The final conclusion is that a sufficient statistic to describe both the level of and change in the average housing price requires that prices be aggregated from relatively homogeneous market areas and weighted by housing quantities such as dwelling units or interior space. Common repeat-sales and hedonic indexes are generally not weighted in this fashion but could be modified to do so.
papers.zh_title: 衡量城市住房价格的充分统计量特征
papers.zh_abstract: 描述城市住房价格的水平与变化，无论价格是用租金还是资产价值来衡量，都是许多实证问题的核心。这项任务因住房存量的异质性、住房与社区的联合消费以及可达性的差异而变得复杂。本文聚焦于城市内部区位，根据经济理论，这与住房价格存在系统性关联。最终结论是，要描述平均住房价格水平和变化的充分统计量，需要将价格从相对同质的市场区域汇总，并按住房数量（如居住单元或内部空间）进行加权。常见的重复销售指数和特征价格指数通常不采用这种加权方式，但可以进行修改以实现这一点。

papers.title: How Artificial Intelligence Shapes Science: Evidence from AlphaFold
papers.authors: Ryan R. Hill, Carolyn Stein
papers.abstract: We study how a frontier AI model affects scientific discovery by examining the release of the AlphaFold2 algorithm and its impact on structural biology and related fields of science. Structural biology is the field of science concerned with understanding the structure and function of proteins. Researchers in this field historically devoted substantial time and resources to experimentally solving three-dimensional protein structures. AlphaFold can predict these structures without running experiments. In July 2021, researchers gained access to hundreds of thousands of these AI-predicted structures virtually overnight. Yet, to date, we find that the rate of experimental structure determination has remained almost unchanged. Instead, researchers appear to use predicted structures to facilitate and complement experimental structure determination. Looking at downstream science that builds on protein structures, we find that basic research on proteins that had no structure information prior to AlphaFold increases by 15 to 40% relative to proteins that already had a structure, shifting the direction of research toward less-studied proteins. However, we find no evidence so far that more applied, early-stage drug development is targeting these proteins, though such activity may emerge in the future.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能如何塑造科学：来自AlphaFold的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究AlphaFold2算法的发布及其对结构生物学及相关科学领域的影响，来考察前沿AI模型如何影响科学发现。结构生物学是致力于理解蛋白质结构与功能的科学领域。该领域的研究人员历史上投入了大量时间和资源，通过实验方法解析三维蛋白质结构。AlphaFold无需进行实验即可预测这些结构。2021年7月，研究人员几乎在一夜之间获得了数十万个由AI预测的结构。然而，迄今为止，我们发现实验性结构测定的速率几乎保持不变。相反，研究人员似乎利用预测结构来促进和补充实验性结构测定。着眼于建立在蛋白质结构基础上的下游科学，我们发现，与在AlphaFold之前已有结构信息的蛋白质相比，针对此前无结构信息的蛋白质的基础研究增加了15%至40%，从而将研究方向转向了研究较少的蛋白质。然而，我们迄今未发现证据表明，更应用性的、早期的药物开发正在针对这些蛋白质，尽管这种活动未来可能会出现。

papers.title: Seeing the Goal, Missing the Truth: Human Accountability for AI Bias
papers.authors: Sean S. Cao, Wei Jiang, Hui Xu
papers.abstract: This research explores how human-defined goals influence the behavior of Large Language Models (LLMs) through purpose-conditioned cognition. Using financial prediction tasks, we show that revealing the downstream use (e.g., predicting stock returns or earnings) of LLM outputs leads the LLM to generate biased sentiment and competition measures, even though these measures are intended to be downstream task–independent. Goal-aware prompting shifts these intermediate measures toward the disclosed downstream objective, producing in-sample overfitting. Specifically, purpose leakage improves performance on data prior to the LLM’s knowledge cutoff, but provides no advantage after the cutoff. This bias is strong enough that regularization of prompt instructions cannot fully address this form of overfitting. We further show that the bias can arise from users’ unintentional conversational context that hints at the purpose. Overall, we document that AI bias due to “seeing the goal” is not an algorithmic flaw, but stems from human accountability in research design.
papers.zh_title: 看见目标，忽视真相：人类对AI偏见应负的责任
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了人类定义的目标如何通过目的条件化认知影响大型语言模型的行为。利用金融预测任务，我们表明，揭示LLM输出的下游用途（例如，预测股票收益或盈利）会导致LLM生成有偏见的情绪和竞争度量指标，尽管这些指标本应独立于下游任务。感知目标的提示将这些中间指标转向所披露的下游目标，产生了样本内过拟合。具体来说，目的泄露提高了在LLM知识截止日期之前数据上的表现，但在截止日期之后没有提供任何优势。这种偏见足够强，以至于对提示指令进行正则化也无法完全解决这种形式的过拟合。我们进一步表明，这种偏见可能源于用户无意中暗示了目的的对话上下文。总体而言，我们记录到，由于“看见目标”导致的AI偏见并非算法缺陷，而是源于研究设计中人类应负的责任。

papers.title: The Microstructure of AI Diffusion: Evidence from Firms, Business Functions, and Worker Tasks
papers.authors: Kathryn Bonney, Cory L. Breaux, Emin Dinlersoz, Lucia S. Foster, John C. Haltiwanger, Aditya A. Pande
papers.abstract: Using novel, nationally representative data from the 2026 AI supplement to the U.S. Census Bureau’s Business Trends and Outlook Survey (BTOS), we characterize AI diffusion across three layers: firm-wide adoption, business-function deployment, and worker-task use. During Nov 2025–Jan 2026, 18% of firms used AI in at least one function (32%, employment-weighted), with adoption expected to reach 22% within six months. Use is concentrated in large firms and knowledge-intensive sectors, reaching 50%–60% (60%–70%, employment-weighted) among very large firms in Information, Professional Services, and Finance. Among adopters, scope remains limited: 57% use AI in three or fewer functions, most often Sales and Marketing (52%), Strategy (45%), and IT (41%). Worker-level use appears in 23% (41%, employment-weighted) of firms, primarily for writing, document analysis, and information search; 65% restrict use to three or fewer tasks. Evidence suggests both top-down and bottom-up diffusion: worker use can occur without firm adoption, and vice versa. Most firms (66%) use AI for task augmentation, while employment reductions are rare (2%). Regression results show a positive relationship between firm performance and AI integration breadth. However, functional deployment and operational investment are associated with employment declines, while worker-task use is not once these factors are controlled for.
papers.zh_title: AI扩散的微观结构：来自企业、业务职能和工人任务的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用来自2026年美国人口普查局商业趋势与展望调查AI补充模块的、具有全国代表性的新颖数据，我们在三个层面描述了AI的扩散特征：企业层面的采用、业务职能层面的部署以及工人任务层面的使用。在2025年11月至2026年1月期间，18%的企业在至少一项职能中使用了AI（按就业加权为32%），预计采用率将在六个月内达到22%。AI的使用集中在大型企业和知识密集型行业，在信息业、专业服务业和金融业的超大型企业中，采用率达到50%-60%（按就业加权为60%-70%）。在采用者中，范围仍然有限：57%的企业在三个或更少的职能中使用AI，最常见的是销售与营销（52%）、战略（45%）和信息技术（41%）。在23%（按就业加权为41%）的企业中出现了工人层面的使用，主要用于写作、文档分析和信息搜索；65%的企业将使用限制在三个或更少的任务上。证据表明存在自上而下和自下而上的扩散：工人使用可能发生在没有企业采用的情况下，反之亦然。大多数企业（66%）将AI用于任务增强，而裁员的情况很少见（2%）。回归结果显示，企业绩效与AI整合广度之间存在正相关关系。然而，一旦控制了这些因素，职能部署和运营投资与就业下降相关，而工人任务使用则不然。

papers.title: Who Marries Whom? The Role of Segregation by Race and Class
papers.authors: Benjamin Goldman, Jamie Gracie, Sonya Porter
papers.abstract: Americans rarely marry outside their race or class group, a pattern with well-documented implications for inequality and intergenerational mobility. Limited exposure—or interactions with members of other groups—may partly explain these low intergroup marriage rates. We instrument for exposure using variation in childhood neighborhoods based on whether other race and class groups had more opposite-sex children of similar age. Exposure increases interclass (high- and low-parent-income) marriage but has no detectable effect on interracial (White and Black) marriage. A spatial marriage market model predicts that residential segregation—one of many forms of exposure—accounts for more than one third of marital sorting by class but less than 5% by race.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, PE；JEL：D31, J12, J15, J62, R23
papers.zh_title: 谁与谁结婚？种族与阶级隔离的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 美国人很少与自身种族或阶级群体之外的人结婚，这种模式对不平等和代际流动性具有充分记录的影响。有限的接触——即与其他群体成员的互动——可能部分解释了这些低水平的群体间通婚率。我们利用童年邻里间的变异，基于其他种族和阶级群体是否有更多年龄相近的异性儿童，来对接触进行工具变量估计。接触增加了跨阶级（高和低父母收入）婚姻，但对跨种族（白人和黑人）婚姻没有可检测到的影响。一个空间婚姻市场模型预测，居住隔离——接触的众多形式之一——解释了超过三分之一的阶级婚姻匹配，但仅解释了不到5%的种族婚姻匹配。

papers.title: Filling the Gaps with MICE: Addressing Missing Data in Real Estate Price Indices
papers.authors: Miriam Steurer, Sabrina S. Spiegel
papers.abstract: Missing data are a common feature of micro-level transaction data used to construct hedonic real estate price indices. Missingness typically occurs in the descriptive characteristics required for quality adjustment rather than in transaction prices. Since these characteristics are central to hedonic quality adjustment, complete-case analysis can skew measured price dynamics through sample-selection and composition effects. This paper proposes multiple imputation as a way to handle missing characteristic values in index construction. The aim is not to recover individual missing values, but to restore incomplete observations and reduce variability in the estimation sample. We employ multiple imputation by chained equations (MICE) as a flexible imputation framework. Since conventional aggregation rules for multiple imputation, Rubin’s rules, do not align with the multiplicative chaining structure of price indices, we introduce an alternative aggregation method based on pooled growth rates. Empirical evidence from two applications, a large dataset of Vienna apartment transactions and a smaller, more heterogeneous Austrian office market, shows that index estimates are relatively robust to missing data in large, homogeneous settings. In contrast, in thinner and more heterogeneous markets, imputation can materially affect index dynamics. In both settings, flexible MICE specifications with rich predictor sets perform better than simpler imputation methods.
papers.zh_title: 用MICE填补空白：解决房地产价格指数中的缺失数据问题
papers.zh_abstract: 缺失数据是用于构建特征房地产价格指数的微观层面交易数据的一个常见特征。缺失通常发生在质量调整所需的描述性特征中，而不是在交易价格中。由于这些特征是特征质量调整的核心，完整案例分析会通过样本选择和构成效应扭曲所衡量的价格动态。本文提出将多重插补作为处理指数构建中缺失特征值的一种方法。其目的不是恢复单个缺失值，而是恢复不完整的观测值并减少估计样本中的变异性。我们采用链式方程多重插补（MICE）作为一个灵活的插补框架。由于传统的多重插补聚合规则，即鲁宾规则，与价格指数的乘法链式结构不一致，我们引入了一种基于汇总增长率的替代聚合方法。来自两个应用的经验证据——一个包含维也纳公寓交易的大型数据集和一个规模较小、异质性更强的奥地利写字楼市场——表明，在大型、同质的环境中，指数估计对缺失数据相对稳健。相比之下，在更薄、异质性更强的市场中，插补会显著影响指数动态。在这两种环境中，具有丰富预测变量集的灵活MICE规范比更简单的插补方法表现更好。

papers.title: Power to the Personnel? The Impacts of Managerial Discretion vs. Worker Democracy in Employee Recognition
papers.authors: Namrata Kala, Madeline McKelway
papers.abstract: Worker agency—workers' influence over organizational decisions—is a commonly-cited determinant of employee engagement, productivity, and organizational culture. We conducted a firm-level RCT in India, randomizing whether employee recognition and associated bonuses were allocated: based on a worker vote (agency treatment), at the discretion of the manager (managerial discretion treatment), or at random and unrelated to performance (control). We find that workplace democracy increases worker attendance, but managerial discretion improves productivity. There are also implications for firm culture and knowledge spillovers, with the manager arm reducing work-related discussions between workers. Winners in the manager arm are positively selected on attendance and productivity, while those in the democracy arm are positively selected on attendance, social interactions, and likelihood of sharing the reward with co-workers in exchange for votes. These results highlight how what is valued in the workplace impacts worker behavior and firm culture, as well as the potential for informal contracts among workers to interact with workplace incentives.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：D22, D23, D70, J50, J54, M52, M54, O10
papers.zh_title: 权力归于员工？员工表彰中管理层自由裁量权与工人民主的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 工人能动性——工人对组织决策的影响力——是员工敬业度、生产力和组织文化的一个常被引用的决定因素。我们在印度进行了一项企业层面的随机对照试验，随机分配员工表彰及相关奖金的分配方式：基于工人投票（能动性处理）、由经理自由裁量（管理层自由裁量处理）、或随机分配且与绩效无关（对照组）。我们发现，工作场所民主提高了工人的出勤率，但管理层自由裁量权提高了生产力。这对公司文化和知识溢出也有影响，管理层组减少了工人之间与工作相关的讨论。管理层组的获胜者在出勤率和生产力方面是正向选择的，而民主组的获胜者在出勤率、社交互动以及为换取选票而与同事分享奖励的可能性方面是正向选择的。这些结果突显了工作场所所重视的东西如何影响工人行为和企业文化，以及工人之间的非正式合同与工作场所激励相互作用的可能性。

papers.title: Till the IRS Do Us Part: (Optimal) Taxation of Households
papers.authors: Hans A. Holter, Dirk Krueger, Serhiy Stepanchuk
papers.abstract: This paper argues that a progressive tax system combined with individual taxation of married couples can generate more revenue than the current household-based U.S. system, especially when the extra revenues do not induce negative labor supply effects through increased government transfers. A progressive system that taxes individuals rather than couples jointly leads to larger labor force participation and higher average human capital, creates more “fiscal space”, Laffer curves shift up and social welfare potentially rises. In our model with one- and two-earner households, human capital and an extensive margin labor supply decision, the peak of the Laffer curve is 18 percentage points higher with an individual-based, progressive tax system than with the current U.S. tax system. The maximum revenue is attained with 100% more progressivity than the current system, and at an average tax rate of 42%. Progressive taxation, when imposed on individuals rather than households, lowers the average tax rate for individuals with modest potential income that are close to the participation margin. At the same time, it creates a positive income effect on the labor supply of these individuals by reducing the net income of their higher earning spouses and limiting their net earnings potential in the case of a high temporary labor productivity. Steady state social welfare is larger with individual taxation. The optimal progressivity is higher than the current U.S. status quo, and results in welfare gains of 0.8% in consumption-equivalent variation. Cohorts born during the transition also experience significant welfare gains from this reform.
papers.zh_title: 直到国税局将我们分开：（最优）家庭税收
papers.zh_abstract: 本文认为，累进税制与已婚夫妇的个人征税相结合，可以比当前基于家庭的美国税制产生更多收入，特别是当额外收入不会通过增加的政府转移支付引发负面的劳动力供给效应时。一个对个人而非夫妇联合征税的累进税制会导致更高的劳动力参与率和更高的平均人力资本，创造更多的“财政空间”，拉弗曲线向上移动，社会福利可能上升。在我们的包含单职工和双职工家庭、人力资本和广泛边际劳动力供给决策的模型中，基于个人的累进税制下的拉弗曲线峰值比当前美国税制高出18个百分点。最大收入是在比当前制度高出100%的累进性下实现的，平均税率为42%。当对个人而非家庭征收累进税时，它降低了处于参与边际附近的潜在收入适中的个人的平均税率。同时，它通过减少这些个人中高收入配偶的净收入，并在高临时劳动生产率的情况下限制其净收入潜力，对这些个人的劳动力供给产生了正向收入效应。稳态社会福利在个人征税下更大。最优累进性高于当前美国的现状，并导致以消费等价变化衡量的福利收益为0.8%。在转型期间出生的群体也从这项改革中获得了显著的福利收益。

papers.title: The State-Contingent Debt Premium: Evidence from French Public Bonds
papers.authors: Kris James Mitchener, Gonçalo A. Pina
papers.abstract: State-contingent debt (SCD) instruments have been proposed as an improvement to sovereign debt markets, but their issuance costs are not well understood. We estimate the SCD premium at issuance and for more than a decade thereafter, employing a quasi-twin bond strategy that uses two very similar French government bonds issued in 1956: one conventional bond and one state-contingent bond with coupons linked to industrial production. At issuance, the expected yield on the SCD bond was 77 basis points higher than its twin. Due to robust growth in the French economy ex-post, the realized SCD premium at issuance was roughly twice as large (146 basis points). However, rising market prices of the state-contingent bond reduced both spreads to zero by 1964. They rose again in May 1968 following an unexpected general strike, which significantly reduced French industrial production; however, by 1970, the SCD premium had fallen to values close to zero.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E65, F4, H63, N14
papers.zh_title: 状态依存债务溢价：来自法国公共债券的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 状态依存债务（SCD）工具已被提议作为主权债务市场的改进，但其发行成本尚不明确。我们采用准孪生债券策略，利用1956年发行的两种非常相似的法国政府债券——一种传统债券和一种息票与工业生产挂钩的状态依存债券——来估计发行时及此后十多年的SCD溢价。在发行时，SCD债券的预期收益率比其孪生债券高出77个基点。由于事后法国经济的强劲增长，发行时实现的SCD溢价大约是其两倍（146个基点）。然而，状态依存债券不断上涨的市场价格到1964年将这两个利差都降至零。在1968年5月一场意外的大罢工（显著降低了法国工业生产）之后，利差再次上升；然而，到1970年，SCD溢价已降至接近零的值。

papers.title: The Value of Reliable Statistics
papers.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Erica L. Groshen, Duncan Hobbs, Michael R. Strain
papers.abstract: On August 1, 2025, President Trump fired the head of the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) and claimed that the agency’s data were “rigged.” In the aftermath, measures of economic policy uncertainty rose sharply, consistent with the idea that reduced trust in official data increases uncertainty for investors, businesses, and households. We use an event-study design to estimate the effect of the firing on policy uncertainty, and then map that increase in uncertainty into implied macroeconomic outcomes. This yields a back-of-the-envelope estimate of the marginal value of public trust in official statistics. Our baseline estimate implies that preserving trust in the integrity and quality of official statistics generates economic benefits of about $25 for every $1 spent on the agency’s budget.
papers.zh_title: 可靠统计数据的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 2025年8月1日，特朗普总统解雇了美国劳工统计局（BLS）局长，并声称该机构的数据被“操纵”。此后，经济政策不确定性指标急剧上升，这与对官方数据信任度降低会增加投资者、企业和家庭不确定性的观点一致。我们使用事件研究设计来估计此次解雇对政策不确定性的影响，然后将这种不确定性的增加映射为隐含的宏观经济结果。这得出了对官方统计中公众信任边际价值的粗略估计。我们的基准估计表明，维护对官方统计完整性和质量的信任所产生的经济效益约为该机构预算每花费1美元对应25美元。

papers.title: Taxes and Financial Distress: Evidence from Establishment-Level Data
papers.authors: Mara Faccio, Stefano Manfredonia
papers.abstract: We use establishment-level data to examine the relation between corporate taxes and financial distress. Using a border discontinuity design, we document that higher corporate income tax rates significantly increase financial distress, particularly for geographically concentrated firms, with sizable spillovers across establishments. We further investigate how taxes affect establishment-level financial distress by exploiting the interest limitation rule introduced by the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act. Using a difference-in-differences design, we find that affected firms experience a decline in financial distress. This occurs because the reduced tax advantage of debt induces firms to deleverage, reducing financial distress through capital structure adjustments.
papers.zh_title: 税收与财务困境：来自机构层面数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用机构层面数据来检验公司税与财务困境之间的关系。利用边界断点设计，我们记录了较高的公司所得税税率会显著增加财务困境，特别是对于地理上集中的公司，并且在各机构之间存在显著的溢出效应。我们进一步利用2017年《减税与就业法案》引入的利息限制规则，研究了税收如何影响机构层面的财务困境。使用双重差分设计，我们发现受影响的公司经历了财务困境的下降。这是因为债务税收优势的减少促使公司去杠杆化，通过资本结构调整减少了财务困境。

papers.title: Technology Adoption and Optimal Policy
papers.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, Francisco J. Buera, Nicholas Trachter
papers.abstract: We study optimal policy in a dynamic general equilibrium model where heterogeneous monopolistic competitive firms pay a fixed cost to adopt a frontier technology that grows exogenously. Using Mean Field Games tools, we show that the optimal policy consists of exactly two time-invariant subsidies: one correcting the static misallocation from market power, and one correcting the dynamic under-incentive to adopt. This holds outside of balanced growth paths, for any initial distribution of technology gaps. We analyze a simplified version of the model that aggregates to a Neoclassical Growth Model with an S-shaped production function whenever complementarities are strong, and fully characterize when the optimal policy uniquely implements the first best. When it does not, two novel results emerge: the efficient allocation prescribes escaping a poverty trap—providing an explicit optimality foundation for a Big Push—and, more surprisingly, escaping an abundance trap, where dismantling adopted technologies is optimal. In both cases, a temporary, costless supplementary policy restores unique implementation.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：D92, O14, O25, O40
papers.zh_title: 技术采纳与最优政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个动态一般均衡模型中的最优政策，在该模型中，异质性垄断竞争企业支付固定成本以采纳外生增长的前沿技术。使用平均场博弈工具，我们表明最优政策恰好由两个时不变的补贴组成：一个纠正来自市场势力的静态错配，另一个纠正动态的采纳激励不足。这在平衡增长路径之外，对于任何初始的技术差距分布都成立。我们分析了该模型的一个简化版本，当互补性很强时，该版本汇总为一个具有S形生产函数的新古典增长模型，并完全刻画了最优政策何时唯一地实现第一最优。当它不能时，会出现两个新颖的结果：有效配置规定要摆脱贫困陷阱——为大推动提供了明确的最优性基础——以及更令人惊讶的是，摆脱丰裕陷阱，在这种情况下，拆除已采纳的技术是最优的。在这两种情况下，一项临时的、无成本的补充政策可以恢复唯一的实施。

papers.title: The Effects of School Phone Bans: National Evidence from Lockable Pouches
papers.authors: Hunt Allcott, E. Jason Baron, Thomas Dee, Angela L. Duckworth, Matthew Gentzkow, Brian Jacob
papers.abstract: Schools across the U.S. have sharply restricted student use of phones during the school day. We evaluate one type of restriction—lockable phone pouches—using nationwide data combining large-scale surveys, GPS pings, standardized test scores, and school administrative records, along with sales records from the largest pouch provider. Using a staggered difference-in-differences design, we find that pouch adoption substantially reduces phone use as measured by GPS pings and teacher reports. In the first year after adoption, disciplinary incidents increase and student subjective well-being falls, consistent with short-term disruption. However, effects on well-being become positive in later years and disciplinary effects fade. For academic achievement, average effects on test scores are consistently close to zero. High schools see modest positive effects, particularly in math, while middle schools see small negative effects. We find little evidence of effects on school attendance, self-reported classroom attention, or perceived online bullying.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I28, I31, L86
papers.zh_title: 学校手机禁令的影响：来自可锁袋的全国性证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国各地的学校已严格限制学生在校期间使用手机。我们评估了一种限制措施——可锁手机袋——使用结合大规模调查、GPS定位、标准化考试成绩和学校行政记录的全国性数据，以及来自最大袋式供应商的销售记录。使用交错双重差分设计，我们发现采用手机袋显著减少了通过GPS定位和教师报告衡量的手机使用。在采用后的第一年，纪律事件增加，学生主观幸福感下降，这与短期干扰一致。然而，对幸福感的影响在后续年份变为正向，纪律效应逐渐消失。在学业成绩方面，对考试成绩的平均影响始终接近于零。高中看到了适度的正向效应，特别是在数学方面，而初中则看到了微小的负向效应。我们几乎没有发现对学校出勤率、自我报告的课堂注意力或感知到的网络欺凌有影响的证据。

papers.title: Wind Turbine Proximity and Health: Longitudinal Evidence from U.S. Households
papers.authors: Niklas Rott, Douglas Almond, Osea Giuntella
papers.abstract: Rapid growth of wind energy plays a key role in global efforts to reduce carbon emissions, yet public concerns persist about its potential health effects, particularly through noise exposure. While some studies and media reports suggest that wind turbines may contribute to sleep disturbances, anxiety, and even suicide, existing evidence remains limited and inconclusive. This study combines geolocated data on turbines from the U.S. Wind Turbine Database with longitudinal survey data on over 120,000 households (2011–2023) and consumer purchasing records to assess whether proximity to wind turbines affects mental and physical health. We examine a wide range of outcomes, including depression, anxiety, sleep disorders, headaches, and use of sleep aids and painkillers. Comparing households before and after nearby turbine installations, we find no detectable adverse health effects from turbine exposure at typical exposure distances. While we cannot rule out small effects, our confidence intervals exclude moderate-to-large impacts, suggesting that fears about substantial health impacts are not borne out in population-level data. Other disamenities such as noise, shadow flicker, and visual intrusion may still affect quality of life even absent measurable health impacts.
papers.zh_title: 风力涡轮机邻近性与健康：来自美国家庭的纵向证据
papers.zh_abstract: 风能的快速增长在全球减少碳排放的努力中发挥着关键作用，然而公众对其潜在健康影响（尤其是通过噪音暴露）的担忧依然存在。虽然一些研究和媒体报道表明，风力涡轮机可能导致睡眠障碍、焦虑甚至自杀，但现有证据仍然有限且尚无定论。本研究将美国风力涡轮机数据库中的地理定位数据与超过12万个家庭（2011-2023年）的纵向调查数据以及消费者购买记录相结合，以评估靠近风力涡轮机是否会影响心理和身体健康。我们考察了广泛的结果，包括抑郁、焦虑、睡眠障碍、头痛以及助眠药和止痛药的使用。通过比较附近涡轮机安装前后的家庭，我们发现，在典型的暴露距离下，涡轮机暴露并未带来可检测的不良健康影响。虽然我们不能排除微小的影响，但我们的置信区间排除了中等到较大的影响，这表明对重大健康影响的担忧并未在人口层面的数据中得到证实。即使没有可测量的健康影响，噪音、阴影闪烁和视觉侵入等其他不舒适因素仍可能影响生活质量。

papers.title: The Success of the Embedded State in England
papers.authors: Leander Heldring, Davis Kedrosky, James A. Robinson, Matthias Weigand
papers.abstract: Many states exhibit high degrees of capacity without the fiscal resources necessary to fund a modern bureaucracy. We argue that they achieve this by exploiting features of the social structure of the societies they govern to motivate individuals to engage in bureaucratic and governance tasks without pay. We develop and illustrate the concept of the “Embedded State” using a unique survey of British urban government from 1835. Since British local authorities had few resources, only two-thirds of positions were paid. We first show that unpaid positions were significantly more productive than paid ones. We then show that unpaid positions conveyed prestige and were ‘stepping stone’ positions, provided different on-the-job incentives, and were taken up by the socio-economic elite. We also show that the successful Embedded State featured patronage and corruption and could not fully motivate unpaid bureaucrats to implement onerous tasks.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：D73, H11, H41, H50, N13, N43, N44
papers.zh_title: 英格兰嵌入式国家的成功
papers.zh_abstract: 许多国家在缺乏资助现代官僚机构所需财政资源的情况下，却展现出高度的国家能力。我们认为，它们通过利用其所治理社会的社会结构特征，激励个人无偿从事官僚和治理任务来实现这一点。我们利用1835年英国城市政府的一项独特调查，发展并阐释了“嵌入式国家”的概念。由于英国地方当局资源匮乏，只有三分之二的职位是有薪的。我们首先表明，无薪职位的生产力显著高于有薪职位。然后我们表明，无薪职位具有声望，是“跳板”职位，提供了不同的在职激励，并且由社会经济精英担任。我们还表明，成功的嵌入式国家存在裙带关系和腐败，并且无法完全激励无薪官僚执行繁重的任务。

papers.title: Labor Market Impacts of ICE Activity in Trump 2.0
papers.authors: Elizabeth Cox, Chloe N. East
papers.abstract: We provide the first causal, national empirical analysis of the labor market impacts of heightened ICE activity during the second Trump administration. We take advantage of the fact that increases in ICE activity have been uneven across geographic areas to classify areas as treated or control, and then implement an event study and difference-in-differences design. Areas that experienced particularly large and sudden increases in the number of arrests also see a decrease in work among likely undocumented immigrants who remain in the U.S., compared to areas with smaller increases in arrests. The number of male U.S.-born workers at work also declines in the face of ICE activity, due to a combination of complementarities in production and reductions in economic activity.
papers.zh_title: 特朗普2.0时期ICE活动对劳动力市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于特朗普第二届政府期间加强移民执法对劳动力市场影响的首次因果性、全国性实证分析。执法力度在全国范围内都有所增加，但我们利用各地区增幅不均这一事实，将地区划分为处理组和对照组，然后实施事件研究和双重差分设计。与逮捕增幅较小的地区相比，逮捕数量增幅特别大的地区，留在美国的疑似无证移民的就业率有所下降。我们没有发现对美国本土出生的工人产生正向溢出效应的证据，并且在移民密集型行业工作的美国本土出生的工人受到了损害。

papers.title: Complementary Climate Policies for Supply and Demand
papers.authors: Geir B. Asheim, Bård Harstad
papers.abstract: The traditional approach to climate policy is to regulate the demand side, for example through an emissions fee. Supply-side regulation has received less attention. The two instruments are perfect substitutes in the first best but we show that they are complements in a second-best setting with free-riding incentives. Demand-side policies alone lower the market price of fossil fuels and raise the gains from trade for a country that defects. For a treaty to be maximally robust, strong, and self-enforcing, it must properly balance supply- and demand-side instruments. The results hold with homogeneous countries and are strengthened by heterogeneity.
papers.zh_title: 针对供给与需求的互补性气候政策
papers.zh_abstract: 气候政策的传统方法是监管需求侧，例如通过排放费。供给侧监管受到的关注较少。这两种工具在一阶最优情况下是完全替代品，但我们表明，在存在搭便车激励的二阶最优情况下，它们是互补品。仅靠需求侧政策会降低化石燃料的市场价格，并提高违约国家的贸易收益。为了使条约具有最大程度的稳健性、强约束力和自我执行性，它必须适当平衡供给侧和需求侧工具。这一结果在同质国家中成立，并且因异质性而得到加强。

papers.title: Monetary Policy According to Households: Perceptions, Reactions and Channels
papers.authors: Francesco Grigoli, Damiano Sandri, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
papers.abstract: This paper studies how households perceive the transmission of monetary policy and how these perceptions affect their decisions. Using a large-scale survey of over 25,000 U.S. households combined with randomized information treatments, we measure how households expect changes in the federal funds rate to affect economic conditions and their own behavior. Households report that higher interest rates lead them to reduce their spending, particularly on durable goods. However, the mechanisms underlying this response differ markedly from those in standard macroeconomic models. Respondents expect monetary tightening to raise borrowing costs and inflation. In turn, consumption function estimates identified using information treatments reveal that households respond to higher expected inflation by reducing consumption. Household inflation expectations also emerge as a central driver of portfolio reallocations following monetary policy changes.
papers.zh_title: 家庭眼中的货币政策：认知、反应与传导渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究家庭如何感知货币政策的传导，以及这些认知如何影响他们的决策。通过对超过25,000个美国家庭的大规模调查，并结合随机信息实验，我们衡量了家庭预期联邦基金利率变化将如何影响经济状况和他们自身的行为。家庭报告称，更高的利率导致他们减少支出，尤其是在耐用品上。然而，这种反应背后的机制与标准宏观经济模型中的机制存在显著差异。受访者预期货币紧缩会提高借贷成本和通货膨胀。反过来，利用信息实验估计的消费函数显示，家庭通过减少消费来应对更高的预期通胀。家庭通胀预期也显现为货币政策变化后投资组合重新配置的核心驱动因素。

papers.title: Industrial Policy with Development Characteristics: Fertilizer Policy in Times of Crisis
papers.authors: Wyatt Brooks, Kevin Donovan
papers.abstract: We study time-consistent optimal policy when undiversified owner-operators face financial frictions and a planner with limited instruments. We apply it to fertilizer subsidies, one of the largest sector-specific policy instruments in the developing world and whose price is becoming increasingly volatile. We collect household-level data from 444 rural Rwandan villages from 2020 - 2024 and exploit the doubling of fertilizer prices after Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. Relative to less fertilizer-intensive villages, more fertilizer-intensive villages experience 30 percent lower fertilizer spending, 21 percent lower harvests, and 11 percent higher output prices. These patterns discipline key model elasticities. The optimal response balances a desire to reallocate production toward less fertilizer-dependent villages, while dampening the consumption loss in more fertilizer-dependent villages. Quantitatively, these forces offset and the subsidy remains at 10 percent before and after the shock.
papers.zh_title: 具有发展特征的产业政策：危机时期的肥料政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当未多元化的自营农户面临金融摩擦且政策制定者工具有限时的时间一致最优政策。我们将其应用于肥料补贴，这是发展中国家最大的特定部门政策工具之一，其价格正变得越来越不稳定。我们收集了2020年至2024年卢旺达444个农村村庄的家庭层面数据，并利用了俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后肥料价格翻倍的情况。与肥料密集度较低的村庄相比，肥料密集度较高的村庄的肥料支出低30%，收成低21%，产出价格高11%。这些模式约束了关键模型的弹性。最优反应平衡了将生产重新分配到对肥料依赖程度较低的村庄的愿望，同时减轻了对肥料依赖程度较高的村庄的消费损失。从数量上看，这些力量相互抵消，补贴在冲击前后仍保持在10%。

papers.title: Sticky Traditions: Origin, Persistence, and Evolution of Cultural Norms
papers.authors: Paola Giuliano
papers.abstract: This chapter reviews the growing literature on the origin, persistence and evolution of cultural norms. I begin by examining the deep historical forces that shape the formation of cultural norms, with particular attention to the role of geography, pre-industrial societal characteristics, political institutions, and historical shocks. I then analyze the mechanisms through which cultural norms persist and evolve, emphasizing the roles of vertical, horizontal, and oblique transmission. Next, I examine the complex interaction between culture and institutions, and discuss the conditions under which cultural norms change. Several conclusions emerge. Cultural norms tend to persist over remarkably long periods, though the speed of change varies significantly across traits. Norms rooted in deep historical values are the most resistant to change, while attitudes related to pro-sociality and redistribution adapt more quickly. Understanding the origins and persistence of cultural norms has important implications for policy: policies that fail to account for local cultural context risk being ineffective or generating unintended consequences, while well-designed interventions can successfully shift cultural norms. Finally, I discuss the growing evidence on cultural mismatches — situations where norms that were adaptive in historical environments become maladaptive in new contexts — and outline directions for future research.
papers.zh_title: 粘性传统：文化规范的起源、持续与演变
papers.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了关于文化规范起源、持续和演变方面日益增长的文献。我首先考察了塑造文化规范形成的深层历史力量，特别关注地理、前工业社会特征、政治制度和历史冲击的作用。然后，我分析了文化规范持续和演变的机制，强调了垂直、水平和斜向传播的作用。接下来，我审视了文化与制度之间复杂的相互作用，并讨论了文化规范发生变化的条件。得出了几个结论。文化规范往往在相当长的时期内持续存在，尽管变化的速度在不同特征之间差异显著。植根于深层历史价值观的规范最难以改变，而与亲社会性和再分配相关的态度则适应得更快。理解文化规范的起源和持续对政策具有重要启示：未能考虑当地文化背景的政策可能无效或产生意想不到的后果，而设计良好的干预措施可以成功改变文化规范。最后，我讨论了关于文化错配（即在历史环境中具有适应性的规范在新环境中变得不适应的情形）日益增多的证据，并概述了未来研究的方向。

papers.title: Rental Prices and the Cost of Living in the United States, 1914–2006
papers.authors: Ronan C. Lyons, Allison Shertzer, Rowena Gray
papers.abstract: The Rent of Primary Residence (RoPR) series constructed by the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) implies that nominal rental prices increased by just 2.6% per year from 1914 to 2006 while overall prices grew by 3.3%. We show that this “falling real rents” puzzle can be explained by the evolving treatment of shelter in the Consumer Price Index (CPI). In this paper we construct a new, methodologically consistent shelter price series using the Historical Housing Prices (HHP) Project rental index. We also construct a revised set of shelter weights going back to 1914 and combine them with the price series to create an alternate CPI that applies the owners’ equivalent rent (OER) concept of shelter consistently across time. The HHP shelter price series increases by a factor of 28.4 (compared with the 10.7 increase in RoPR) and lifts average CPI growth from 3.3% to 3.6% per year. The revised series eliminates the long-run decline in real rents in the CPI and provides a new benchmark for assessing trends in the cost of living and real income in the U.S. over the twentieth century.
papers.zh_title: 美国租金价格与生活成本，1914-2006
papers.zh_abstract: 美国劳工统计局（BLS）构建的主要住所租金（RoPR）序列表明，从1914年到2006年，名义租金价格年均仅增长2.6%，而整体价格年均增长3.3%。我们表明，这种“实际租金下降”之谜可以通过消费者价格指数（CPI）中住房处理方式的演变来解释。在本文中，我们利用历史住房价格（HHP）项目租金指数构建了一个新的、方法上一致的住房价格序列。我们还构建了一套可追溯至1914年的修订版住房权重，并将其与价格序列相结合，创建了一个替代性CPI，该CPI在时间上一致地应用了业主等价租金（OER）的住房概念。HHP住房价格序列增长了28.4倍（而RoPR增长了10.7倍），并将CPI的平均年增长率从3.3%提升至3.6%。修订后的序列消除了CPI中实际租金的长期下降趋势，并为评估20世纪美国生活成本和实际收入的趋势提供了新的基准。

papers.title: Data Centers and Local Economies in the Age of AI: A Shift--Share Approach
papers.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David Argente, Joyce Chow, Diana Van Patten
papers.abstract: Data centers are the physical infrastructure behind cloud computing, artificial intelligence, and enterprise software. The rapid diffusion of artificial intelligence (AI) is intensifying demand for compute, accelerating investment in data centers, and raising concerns about the local economic and environmental footprint of these facilities. Their expansion creates a local policy tradeoff. A data center can bring capital investment, construction activity, and specialized employment, but it can also increase demand for electricity, land, and grid capacity. This paper studies these effects at the U.S. county level. We assemble a facility-level panel of global data centers with precise coordinates, scale metrics, and annualized revenue. We map facilities to U.S. counties and combine them with County Business Patterns, county-level IRS income, county-level house prices, and electricity prices. To address endogenous siting, we instrument for data center growth using two shift-share instruments, which leverage pre-existing proximity to InterTubes long-haul fiber nodes and the 1980 county share of U.S. urban college population as shares, and both Chinese and rest-of-the-world data center revenue growth as shifts. The IV estimates show positive effects on total employment, data-processing employment, construction employment, establishments, house prices, and electricity prices at different horizons after data center growth. We also find positive effects on tax returns, adjusted gross income, and wages, while annual payroll responds less robustly. The results suggest that data centers create measurable local activity, increase house prices, and affect local electricity markets through higher prices.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, CH, DEV, EEE, EFG, IFM, IO, ITI, LS, ME, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D8, O3
papers.zh_title: 人工智能时代的数据中心与地方经济：一种偏移-份额方法
papers.zh_abstract: 数据中心是云计算、人工智能和企业软件背后的物理基础设施。人工智能的快速普及正在加剧对算力的需求，加速数据中心投资，并引发对这些设施当地经济和环境足迹的担忧。它们的扩张造成了地方政策权衡。数据中心可以带来资本投资、建筑活动和专业就业，但也会增加对电力、土地和电网容量的需求。本文在美国县级层面研究了这些影响。我们收集了一个全球数据中心的设施级面板数据，包含精确坐标、规模指标和年化收入。我们将设施映射到美国各县，并将其与县商业模式、县级IRS收入、县级房价和电价相结合。为了解决内生选址问题，我们使用两个偏移-份额工具变量来工具化数据中心增长，这两个工具利用预先存在的与InterTubes长途光纤节点的邻近性和1980年美国城市大学人口的县级份额作为份额，并以中国和世界其他地区的数据中心收入增长作为偏移。IV估计显示，在数据中心增长后的不同时间跨度内，对总就业、数据处理就业、建筑就业、企业数量、房价和电价有正向影响。我们还发现对纳税申报单、调整后总收入（AGI）和工资有正向影响，而年度薪资总额的反应则不那么稳健。结果表明，数据中心创造了可衡量的地方经济活动，提高了房价，并通过更高的价格影响了当地电力市场。

papers.title: Mortality Rates by Race and Ethnicity Among People with Disabilities
papers.authors: Madeline S. Helfer, Becky Staiger, Jessica Van Parys
papers.abstract: This paper uses Medicaid claims data from 2017-2021 to measure racial/ethnic disparities in mid-life mortality among low-income adults with disabilities receiving Supplemental Security Income (SSI). We find that American Indian and Alaska Native and White SSI recipients have the highest age-adjusted mid-life mortality rates (2.9% and 2.6%, respectively), followed by Black and Hispanic recipients (2.3% and 1.9%), and then Asian recipients (1.6%). We also find differences in diagnosed chronic conditions, "despair-related" conditions, substance use disorders, and disabling conditions by race/ethnicity. Controlling for these differences attenuates the White-Hispanic, White-Asian, and AIAN-White mortality gaps; however, differences in clinical diagnoses by race do not affect the White-Black mortality gap. Our results show that within a socioeconomically vulnerable population, Black adults outlive Whites.
papers.zh_title: 残疾人群体的种族与族裔死亡率差异
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用2017-2021年的医疗补助索赔数据，衡量了领取补充保障收入（SSI）的低收入残疾成年人中，中年死亡率的种族/族裔差异。我们发现，美洲印第安人和阿拉斯加原住民以及白人SSI受助者的年龄调整后中年死亡率最高（分别为2.9%和2.6%），其次是黑人和西班牙裔受助者（分别为2.3%和1.9%），然后是亚裔受助者（1.6%）。我们还发现，不同种族/族裔群体在确诊的慢性病、“绝望相关”疾病、物质使用障碍和致残状况方面存在差异。控制这些差异后，白人与西班牙裔、白人与亚裔以及美洲印第安人与阿拉斯加原住民与白人之间的死亡率差距有所缩小；然而，种族间临床诊断的差异并未影响白人与黑人之间的死亡率差距。我们的结果表明，在社会经济弱势群体中，黑人成年人的寿命比白人更长。

papers.title: Algorithmic Credentialism
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Rui Guo
papers.abstract: The paper develops a framework for evaluating credential-coded algorithmic screens under existing civil rights law. AI-powered hiring tools trained on historical data often encode and automate bachelor's degree requirements as a proxy for worker skill, producing what this paper terms algorithmic credentialism. Drawing on labor economics research on workers Skilled Through Alternative Routes (STARs), disability theory's critique of the medical model, and disparate-impact doctrine from Griggs v. Duke Power Co. through the Civil Rights Act of 1991, it argues that such screens misidentify the source of hiring exclusion, locating it in the worker rather than in the design of the selection system. This institutional-design problem is amenable to evaluation under the existing disparate-impact doctrine. Under the paper's proposed framework, a credential-coded screen producing disparate impact triggers a legal obligation to validate the screen as job-related and consistent with business necessity, with skills-based hiring supplying the less-discriminatory alternative. The paper further argues that the efficiency rationale historically offered for degree screens is weakened, not strengthened, by AI. The same computational power that automates credentialism at scale can instead match applicants to jobs on multidimensional skill profiles, making the bachelor's degree a less necessary (and less legally defensible) proxy than it was in the pre-AI labor market.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LE, LS, PE；JEL：J21, J24, J31, J60, J78, K31
papers.zh_title: 算法证书主义
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个框架，用于评估现行民权法下基于证书编码的算法筛选。基于历史数据训练的AI招聘工具，通常将学士学位要求编码并自动化，作为工人技能的代理指标，这产生了本文所称的“算法证书主义”。借鉴关于“通过替代途径获得技能”（STARs）工人的劳动经济学研究、残疾理论对医学模型的批判，以及从Griggs诉杜克电力公司案到1991年《民权法案》的差别影响原则，本文认为此类筛选错误地识别了招聘排斥的根源，将其归咎于工人而非选拔系统的设计。这一制度设计问题适用于现行差别影响原则下的评估。根据本文提出的框架，产生差别影响的证书编码筛选，会触发一项法律义务，即验证该筛选是否与工作相关且符合业务必要性，而基于技能的招聘则提供了歧视性更小的替代方案。本文进一步认为，历史上为学位筛选提供的效率理由，因AI而削弱而非增强。同样能够大规模自动化证书主义的计算能力，反而可以根据多维技能画像将求职者与职位匹配，使得学士学位作为代理指标的必要性（以及法律上的可辩护性）低于前AI劳动力市场。

papers.title: Organization Capital, Large Startups, and the Dearth of IPOs
papers.authors: Rüdiger Fahlenbrach, Leandro Sanz, René M. Stulz
papers.abstract: Many startups in the 2000s have remained private after achieving large valuations, a pattern that funding availability alone cannot explain. We propose that startups relying heavily on organization capital to achieve economies of scale and network effects through digital technologies are more likely to become large private firms than exit earlier via an IPO or acquisition. Using LinkedIn data, we construct a novel measure of organization capital intensity for startups. Exploiting a legal shock that strengthened organization capital protection, we provide causal evidence that organization-capital-intensive startups are more likely to remain private and grow large rather than exit early.
papers.zh_title: 组织资本、大型初创企业与IPO匮乏
papers.zh_abstract: 21世纪的许多初创企业在获得高估值后仍保持私有状态，这一模式仅凭融资可得性无法解释。我们提出，那些严重依赖组织资本，通过数字技术实现规模经济和网络效应的初创企业，更有可能成为大型私有企业，而非通过IPO或收购提前退出。利用领英数据，我们为初创企业构建了一个新颖的组织资本密集度衡量指标。利用一项加强组织资本保护的法律冲击，我们提供了因果证据，表明组织资本密集型初创企业更倾向于保持私有并发展壮大，而非提前退出。

papers.title: The Long-Run Effects of the Affordable Care Act: Evidence from a Partially Pre-Committed Research Design Over the COVID-19 Recession and Recovery
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Anwita Mahajan, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Adjustment frictions can cause the long-run effects of social insurance reforms to differ from their short-run effects. Using pre-committed extensions of event study specifications applied previously for short-run analyses, we test the hypothesis that the Affordable Care Act’s (ACA) impacts on insurance coverage and employment would increase following the substantial churn generated by the COVID-19 pandemic. Contrary to the hypothesis, the ACA’s impacts remained stable through the pandemic. Long-run effects on employment and employer coverage were modest and much smaller than initially projected. Our study illustrates how partially pre-committed designs can yield informative long-run estimates while limiting specification search.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, H75, I13
papers.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》的长期效应：来自COVID-19衰退与复苏期间部分预先承诺研究设计的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 调整摩擦可能导致社会保险改革的长期效应与其短期效应不同。利用先前用于短期分析的事件研究设定的预先承诺扩展，我们检验了这样一个假设：《平价医疗法案》（ACA）对保险覆盖和就业的影响，会因COVID-19疫情带来的大量人员流动而增强。与假设相反，ACA的影响在整个疫情期间保持稳定。对就业和雇主保险的长期影响是适度的，且远小于最初的预测。我们的研究说明了部分预先承诺的设计如何能够在限制规范搜索的同时，产生信息量丰富的长期估计。

papers.title: Crimes Against Campbell-Shiller
papers.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Alex Chinco
papers.abstract: The Campbell and Shiller (1988) log-linear approximation is widely viewed as a model-free accounting identity that always holds: in sample, in expectation, and under arbitrary subjective beliefs. None of these claims is true. The formula is far from automatic even in realized data. Many companies do not pay dividends, making the calculation ill-defined. For dividend payers, the results are not always what they seem. The formula registers buybacks and new issuance as phantom cash-flow shocks. Taking expectations comes with its own complications. Researchers see the forward-looking version of Campbell-Shiller as a dynamic Gordon model, but this interpretation requires investors to consistently think in present-value terms and to know the cap rate with basis-point precision. Both are strong assumptions that do not always hold in the data. Finally, the formula generically fails under arbitrary subjective beliefs. The exceptions represent knife-edge cases where forecast errors obey a precise adding-up condition. Insisting that Campbell-Shiller always holds makes it harder to learn about the true pricing model in the many cases where it does not.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：G12, G14, G35, G40, G41
papers.zh_title: 对坎贝尔-席勒的“犯罪”
papers.zh_abstract: Campbell和Shiller（1988）的对数线性近似被广泛视为一个无模型的会计恒等式，在样本内、期望值下以及任意主观信念下都始终成立。这些说法没有一个是正确的。即使在已实现的数据中，该公式也远非自动成立。许多公司不支付股息，使得计算无法定义。对于支付股息的公司，结果也并非总是表面看起来那样。该公式将股票回购和新股发行登记为虚幻的现金流冲击。引入期望值会带来其自身的复杂性。研究者将坎贝尔-席勒的前瞻性版本视为动态戈登模型，但这种解释要求投资者始终以现值思维进行思考，并且以基点精度知道资本化率。两者都是强有力的假设，在数据中并不总是成立。最后，该公式在任意主观信念下通常失效。例外情况代表的是临界情形，其中预测误差满足一个精确的加总条件。坚持认为坎贝尔-席勒恒等式始终成立，会使得在许多它并不成立的情况下，更难了解真实的定价模型。

papers.title: Deep Research on a Loop: Using AI Agents to Construct Economic Datasets
papers.authors: Santiago Afonso, Sebastian Galiani, Ramiro H. Gálvez, Raul A. Sosa
papers.abstract: Constructing datasets from primary sources is one of the costliest tasks in empirical economics. We propose Deep Research on a Loop (DRIL), a methodology that uses AI agents to assemble datasets from publicly available sources. DRIL applies a fixed research instrument across a mapped unit space (e.g., countries by years), with a two-stage architecture separating design from implementation. The instrument specifies variables and coding rules, an evidence policy governs sources and citations, and data quality mechanisms track gaps and uncertainty explicitly. We exercise DRIL on a 2025 update of the Global Tax Expenditures Database for eight Latin American and Caribbean countries. The run produces 129 sources and 136 evidence records, covering 22 qualitative fields fully and 6 quantitative estimate types with documented gaps, at the cost of a standard LLM subscription comparable to a few hours of research-assistant work. We argue that even partial automation of dataset construction can shift the production function of empirical economics.
papers.zh_title: 循环深度研究：使用AI代理构建经济数据集
papers.zh_abstract: 从原始来源构建数据集是实证经济学中成本最高的任务之一。我们提出了“循环深度研究”（DRIL）方法，该方法使用AI代理从公开来源汇编数据集。DRIL在映射的单位空间（例如，按年份划分的国家）上应用固定的研究工具，采用将设计与实施分离的两阶段架构。该工具规定了变量和编码规则，证据政策管理来源和引用，数据质量机制明确追踪差距和不确定性。我们在2025年更新的八个拉丁美洲和加勒比国家全球税收支出数据库上对DRIL进行了实践。此次运行产生了129个来源和136条证据记录，完全覆盖了22个定性字段，并记录了6种定量估计类型的差距，其成本相当于标准LLM订阅费用，与几小时的研究助理工作相当。我们认为，即使是数据集构建的部分自动化，也能改变实证经济学的生产函数。

papers.title: Anti-Harassment Policy and the Startup Labor Market
papers.authors: Jun Chen, Song Ma, Feng Zhang
papers.abstract: This paper examines how anti-harassment legal reforms that weaken non-disclosure agreements (NDAs) in cases of workplace sexual harassment affect startups' hiring and organizational decisions. Using a staggered difference-in-differences design and LinkedIn data on over 50,000 U.S. venture-capital-backed startups from 2014–2022, we find that NDA reforms, although intended for employee protection, reduce female hiring by about 8%, with effects concentrated among junior women, who are statistically more prone to sexual harassment, and in small or male-dominated startups. The results apply to both the intensive and extensive margins of female hiring. Treated entrepreneurial firms also witness more departures of male managers, promote more women, and receive less VC funding. These results suggest that while NDA-weakening laws increase firms’ perceived legal risk and reduce female hiring, they also trigger internal restructuring that promotes women's advancement into leadership and may, over time, foster more accountable and inclusive organizational cultures.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：G0, J0, K0, M14, M5
papers.zh_title: 反骚扰政策与初创企业劳动力市场
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在工作场所性骚扰案件中削弱保密协议（NDA）的反骚扰法律改革，如何影响初创企业的招聘和组织决策。利用交错双重差分设计以及2014-2022年间超过5万家美国风险投资支持初创企业的领英数据，我们发现，尽管NDA改革旨在保护员工，但它使女性招聘减少了约8%，这种影响集中在初级女性员工（她们在统计上更容易遭受性骚扰）以及小型或男性主导的初创企业中。该结果适用于女性招聘的集约边际和广延边际。受影响的创业企业还观察到更多男性管理者的离职，提拔了更多女性，并且获得的VC资金减少。这些结果表明，虽然削弱NDA的法律增加了企业感知的法律风险并减少了女性招聘，但它们也引发了内部重组，促进了女性晋升至领导岗位，并且随着时间的推移，可能培育出更负责任和更具包容性的组织文化。

papers.title: AlphaGlass: Interpretable Characteristic-Based Portfolio Choice
papers.authors: Sebastian Bell, Ali Kakhbod, Martin Lettau, Abdolreza Nazemi
papers.abstract: We propose AlphaGlass, an inherently interpretable machine-learning framework for constructing portfolios that directly optimize investment objectives. AlphaGlass maps stock characteristics into additive signals with sparse interactions and converts these signals into long-short portfolios through a differentiable rank-and-mask layer. This end-to-end design allows the model to optimize objectives such as the Sharpe ratio or mean-variance utility while keeping portfolio weights interpretable and traceable to specific characteristics and interactions. We show theoretically that in-sample objective maximization consistently estimates the population objective and that the differentiable rank-and-mask layer is a faithful smooth proxy for the corresponding conventional long-short quantile portfolio. In U.S. equities, AlphaGlass delivers strong out-of-sample performance and reveals economically interpretable drivers of long and short positions.
papers.zh_title: AlphaGlass：可解释的基于特征的投资组合选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了AlphaGlass，一个本质上可解释的机器学习框架，用于构建直接优化投资目标的投资组合。AlphaGlass将股票特征映射为具有稀疏交互的加性信号，并通过一个可微分的排序与掩码层将这些信号转化为多空投资组合。这种端到端设计允许模型优化诸如夏普比率或均值-方差效用等目标，同时保持投资组合权重可解释，并可追溯到特定的特征和交互。我们从理论上证明，样本内目标最大化一致地估计了总体目标，并且可微分的排序与掩码层是相应传统多空分位数投资组合的忠实平滑代理。在美国股票市场中，AlphaGlass提供了强劲的样本外表现，并揭示了多头和空头头寸的经济可解释驱动因素。

papers.title: Revealing Life Preferences Through LLMs
papers.authors: Omar Abdel Haq, Amitabh Chandra, Tomáš Jagelka, Erzo F.P. Luttmer, Joshua Schwartzstein
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are trained on a prodigious corpus of human writing and may reveal human preferences over characteristics of life courses, such as income, longevity, and working conditions. We present OpenAI's GPT-5.4 and a broadly representative sample of Americans with pairs of life stories and ask them to choose the life they would prefer for themselves. A person's choice is better predicted by the LLM's choice than by another person’s choice over the same stories, and LLM valuations of several life attributes are similar to those derived from human responses. Our results suggest that LLM responses offer a scalable and cost-effective complement to existing methods for studying human preferences.
papers.zh_title: 通过大语言模型揭示生活偏好
papers.zh_abstract: 大语言模型（LLMs）在大量人类写作语料上进行训练，可能揭示人类对生活历程特征（如收入、寿命和工作条件）的偏好。我们向OpenAI的GPT-5.4和一个具有广泛代表性的美国样本提供成对的生活故事，并要求他们选择自己更偏好的生活。对于同一个人，其选择被LLM的选择预测得比另一个人的选择更准确，并且LLM对几种生活属性的估值与从人类反应中得出的估值相似。我们的结果表明，LLM的反应为研究人类偏好的现有方法提供了一种可扩展且成本效益高的补充。

papers.title: Breaking the Early Bell: Lessons from the First Statewide Mandate on School Start Times
papers.authors: Jialu (Gloria) Dou, Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Jakub Lonsky
papers.abstract: We examine the impact of California's Senate Bill 328 (SB 328), the first statewide mandate requiring later school start times for middle and high schools, on adolescent sleep, mental health, and academic outcomes. Using difference-in-differences and event- study designs across five data sources, we find that SB 328 increased the share of students sleeping at least 8 hours per night by 13%, meeting the CDC-recommended minimum for this age group. Average mental health effects are imprecisely estimated, but boys show significant reductions in sadness, hopelessness, and suicidal ideation, and Hispanic students, who experienced the largest sleep-timing shifts, show parallel reductions in difficulty concentrating; together these patterns are consistent with a dose-response relationship between sleep improvement and mental well-being. Math and English scores in grade 8 improved by approximately 0.08-0.10 standard deviations, with the largest gains among Hispanic and economically disadvantaged students. A within-state analysis using teachers' commute arrival times as a proxy for pre-policy school start times corroborates these findings, and shows academic gains accumulating over 2023-2025 alongside a suggestive decline in high school dropout rates.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS；JEL：I0, I1, I20, J0
papers.zh_title: 打破早铃：首个全州范围上学时间强制令的经验教训
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了加利福尼亚州参议院第328号法案（SB 328）的影响，这是首个要求中学和高中推迟上学时间的全州范围强制令，对青少年睡眠、心理健康和学业成果的影响。使用跨五个数据来源的双重差分和事件研究设计，我们发现SB 328使每晚至少睡8小时的学生比例增加了13%，达到了CDC推荐的该年龄段最低睡眠时长。平均心理健康效应的估计不精确，但男孩在悲伤、绝望和自杀意念方面显示出显著减少，而西班牙裔学生（经历了最大的睡眠时间变化）在注意力集中困难方面也显示出平行减少；这些模式共同表明睡眠改善与心理健康之间存在剂量反应关系。八年级的数学和英语成绩提高了约0.08-0.10个标准差，其中西班牙裔和经济弱势学生的进步最大。一项使用教师通勤到达时间作为政策前上学时间代理变量的州内分析证实了这些发现，并显示学业收益在2023-2025年间持续累积，同时高中辍学率呈下降趋势。

papers.title: What Does A Grade Mean? Informativeness and Strategic Manipulation of Grading Systems
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans, Scott Duke Kominers
papers.abstract: When do university grades permit informative comparisons across courses, and how does transcript adjustment affect student and instructor incentives? A raw grade mixes student performance with course-specific conditions, so grade-only comparisons fail whenever course effects are large enough to reverse ability rankings at grade cutoffs. We show that full transcripts can recover comparable student signals through what we call eigengrades: course-adjusted reports that use common or externally anchored grading standards and enrollment overlap to identify centered student effects. In the scalar additive benchmark, row-mean, affinity-spectral, and graph-Laplacian methods recover the same object. Eigengrades are, therefore, not a separate source of identification; they are a representation of fixed-effect adjustment. The framework also clarifies limits: ordinary letter grades with unanchored course-specific cutoffs do not separate course difficulty from grading standards, and multidimensional transcripts identify a skill-match subspace rather than a unique universal ranking unless the institution specifies a benchmark.
