Finally, exact difficulty adjustment removes the direct report-mediated incentive to choose easier courses and eliminates a competitive enrollment channel behind grade inflation, while leaving other strategic and governance margins intact.
papers.zh_title: 成绩意味着什么？评分系统的信息性和策略性操纵
papers.zh_abstract: 大学成绩何时允许跨课程进行信息性比较，成绩单调整如何影响学生和教师的激励？原始成绩混合了学生表现与课程特定条件，因此当课程效应大到足以在成绩截止点逆转能力排名时，仅基于成绩的比较就会失败。我们表明，完整成绩单可以通过我们称之为特征成绩（eigengrades）的方式恢复可比较的学生信号：即使用共同或外部锚定的评分标准和选课重叠来识别中心化学生效应的课程调整报告。在标量加性基准中，行均值、亲和谱和图拉普拉斯方法恢复相同的对象。因此，特征成绩不是独立的识别来源；它们是固定效应调整的一种表示。该框架也明确了局限性：具有未锚定课程特定截止点的普通字母成绩无法区分课程难度与评分标准，而多维成绩单识别的是技能匹配子空间，而非唯一的通用排名，除非机构指定一个基准。最后，精确的难度调整消除了由直接报告中介的选择更容易课程的激励，并消除了成绩膨胀背后的竞争性选课渠道，同时保留了其他策略和治理方面的余地。

papers.title: Growth is Getting Harder to Find, Not Ideas
papers.authors: Teresa C. Fort, Nathan Goldschlag, Jack Liang, Peter K. Schott, Nikolas Zolas
papers.abstract: Relatively flat US productivity growth versus rising R&D expenditures is often interpreted as evidence that ideas are getting harder to find. We build a new 45-year panel tracking the universe of US firms' patenting to investigate the micro underpinnings of this conclusion, separately examining the relationships between research inputs and ideas (patents) versus ideas and growth. We find that average patents per R&D input are increasing, the elasticity of patents to R&D inputs is flat or rising, and there is not systematic evidence of a secular decline in patenting after controlling for research inputs. We then document a positive, significant, and fairly steady relationship between firms' patent and labor productivity growth rates. Average firm growth after controlling for patent growth, however, declines. Together, these results suggest that firms' innovative efforts play a key role in sustaining growth that has not diminished over the last four decades.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：E0, O36, O40, O41, O47
papers.zh_title: 增长越来越难找到，而非创意
papers.zh_abstract: 相对平稳的美国生产率增长与不断上升的研发支出，通常被解释为创意越来越难找到的证据。我们构建了一个新的45年面板数据，追踪美国公司专利活动的全貌，以研究这一结论的微观基础，分别考察研究投入与创意（专利）之间以及创意与增长之间的关系。我们发现，每单位研发投入的平均专利数正在增加，专利对研发投入的弹性持平或上升，并且在控制研究投入后，没有系统性证据表明专利数量出现长期下降。然后，我们记录了公司专利增长率与劳动生产率增长率之间正向、显著且相当稳定的关系。然而，在控制专利增长后，平均公司增长率下降。综合来看，这些结果表明，公司的创新努力在维持增长方面发挥着关键作用，而这种作用在过去四十年中并未减弱。

papers.title: Youth Mental Health and School Smartphone Bans: Early Evidence
papers.authors: Henry Saffer
papers.abstract: This paper is the first to examine the causal effects of school smartphone bans on the mental health of youth in the US. Time series data show that the mental health of youth has been declining for the past decade. Several researchers argue that easy access to social media and other internet sites provided by smartphones is to blame. To provide causal evidence of the effects of these bans, I rely on synthetic difference-in-difference models and the National Survey of Children’s Health (NSCH) from 2016 to 2024. Currently, there are data for only one state with two post-ban periods and two states with one post-ban period, which makes the results preliminary evidence only. The outcome variables are screentime and measures of psychological wellbeing. Overall, these early results provide no clear evidence that the school ban policy reduced screentime or improved psychological wellbeing. Future studies with additional years of data, when they are available, are needed to increase power and to estimate the longer-term effects of school bans on youth mental health.
papers.zh_title: 青少年心理健康与学校智能手机禁令：初步证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文首次考察了学校智能手机禁令对美国青少年心理健康的因果效应。时间序列数据显示，过去十年青少年心理健康状况持续下降。一些研究人员认为，智能手机提供的社交媒体和其他互联网网站的便捷访问是罪魁祸首。为了提供这些禁令效应的因果证据，我依赖于合成双重差分模型和2016年至2024年的全国儿童健康调查（NSCH）。目前，只有一个州拥有两个禁令后时期的数据，两个州拥有一个禁令后时期的数据，这使得结果仅为初步证据。结果变量是屏幕时间和心理健康指标。总体而言，这些初步结果没有提供明确证据表明学校禁令政策减少了屏幕时间或改善了心理健康。未来需要更多年份的数据（当数据可用时）进行研究，以增加统计效力并估计学校禁令对青少年心理健康的长期影响。

papers.title: The Persistence of Power: How Family Origins Shape Political Representation and Policy
papers.authors: Eric Chyn, Katherine Cohen, Kareem Haggag, Bryan A. Stuart
papers.abstract: In the United States, long hailed as the land of opportunity, is access to political office truly open across society, or do the most privileged children disproportionately rise to enter political life? This question speaks to a longstanding concern that elite families may entrench themselves in positions of power, reproducing a form of hereditary privilege within a democratic system. We study the family backgrounds of U.S. politicians over the late nineteenth and early twentieth centuries and show that children from wealthy and privileged households have been substantially overrepresented in elected office. This imbalance has persisted over time and, at the highest levels of office, varies little across political parties. To test the durability of elite political advantage, we exploit the sudden economic shock caused by the end of slavery. Despite the large and concentrated losses at the top of the wealth distribution, the children of slaveholders continued to enter government at high rates. Finally, we examine whether politicians’ socioeconomic origins shape policy by constructing a new sample of close elections linked to detailed information on U.S. House candidates’ family backgrounds. Comparing otherwise similar districts in which a candidate from a high socioeconomic status family narrowly wins rather than loses, we find that districts represented by higher status candidates are less likely to support pro-tax positions in roll-call voting. Together, the evidence across our analyses shows that family background strongly predicts entry into political office and has measurable consequences for policy choices.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：H10, H70, J45, J62, P16
papers.zh_title: 权力的持久性：家庭出身如何塑造政治代表性和政策
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国这个长期被誉为机遇之地的国家，进入政治职位的途径是否真正向社会各阶层开放，还是最特权的子女不成比例地崛起进入政治生活？这个问题涉及一个长期存在的担忧，即精英家庭可能固守权力职位，在民主制度内复制一种世袭特权形式。我们研究了19世纪末20世纪初美国政治家的家庭背景，并表明来自富裕和特权家庭的子女在民选职位中一直占据显著过高的比例。这种不平衡随着时间的推移变化甚微，并且在最高级别的职位中，不同政党之间差异很小。为了检验政治准入是否取决于家庭资源，我们利用了奴隶制终结造成的突然经济冲击。尽管财富顶层遭受了巨大且集中的损失，但奴隶主的子女继续以高比例进入政府。最后，我们通过构建一个新的与美国家庭背景详细信息相关联的众议院候选人紧密选举样本，检验了政治家的社会经济出身是否塑造政策。比较那些来自高社会经济地位家庭的候选人以微弱优势获胜而非失败的原本相似的选区，我们发现由地位较高候选人代表的选区在唱名投票中支持支持税收立场的可能性较低。综合来看，我们分析中的证据表明，家庭背景强烈预测进入政治职位，并对政策选择产生可衡量的影响。

papers.title: Bachelors Without Bachelor's: Gender Gaps in Education and Declining Marriage Rates
papers.authors: Clara Chambers, Benjamin Goldman, Joseph Winkelmann
papers.abstract: Over the past half-century, U.S. four-year colleges have shifted from enrolling mostly men to enrolling mostly women, while the economic position of non-college men has weakened markedly. We examine how these changes correspond with the evolving structure of marriage markets across cohorts and places. As college men have become increasingly scarce, college women have maintained stable marriage rates by marrying high-earning non-college men. This shift—combined with the broader economic decline of non-college men—has sharply reduced the pool of economically stable partners available to non-college women: the share of non-college men who earn above the national median and are not married to college women has fallen by more than 50%. Cross-area evidence shows that education gaps in marriage are smaller where non-college men face lower rates of joblessness and incarceration. Taken together, the evidence suggests that deteriorating outcomes for men have primarily undermined the marriage prospects of non-college women.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, PE；JEL：D31, I24, J1, J11, J12, J16
papers.zh_title: 没有学士学位的单身汉：教育中的性别差距与下降的结婚率
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去的半个世纪里，美国四年制大学从主要招收男性转变为主要招收女性，而非大学男性的经济地位显著削弱。我们考察了这些变化如何与跨代际和跨地区的婚姻市场结构演变相对应。随着大学男性变得越来越稀缺，大学女性通过嫁给高收入的非大学男性保持了稳定的结婚率。这种转变——加上非大学男性更广泛的经济衰退——急剧减少了非大学女性可获得的经济稳定伴侣的储备：收入高于全国中位数且未与大学女性结婚的非大学男性比例下降了超过50%。跨地区证据表明，在非大学男性失业率和监禁率较低的地区，教育方面的结婚率差距较小。综合来看，证据表明，男性日益恶化的结果主要削弱了非大学女性的婚姻前景。

papers.title: Earnings Management and Price Informativeness
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Wenxi Jiang, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: We investigate the relationship between stock prices and future earnings in China's A-share market. In the cross-section, firms with higher market valuations report higher earnings over the subsequent one to five years, suggesting that stock prices contain information about future fundamentals. In the time series, however, we find evidence of earnings reversal: higher stock prices predict weaker earnings growth three to five years ahead, consistent with short-term earnings management induced by stock-price pressures. We further document such earnings management through non-recurring gains and losses (NRGLs) and use the 2020 delisting rule reform as a natural experiment to examine these mechanisms.
papers.zh_title: 盈余管理与价格信息含量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国A股市场中股票价格与未来盈余之间的关系。在横截面上，市场估值较高的公司在未来一至五年内报告更高的盈余，这表明股票价格包含关于未来基本面的信息。然而，在时间序列上，我们发现了盈余反转的证据：较高的股票价格预测三至五年后较弱的盈余增长，这与股票价格压力导致的短期盈余管理一致。我们进一步通过非经常性损益（NRGLs）记录了这种盈余管理，并利用2020年退市规则改革作为自然实验来检验这些机制。

papers.title: Separations Revisited: Do Layoffs or Quits Drive Lower Separation Rates in High-Quality Firms?
papers.authors: Cauê Dobbin, Daniel Fernandez, Tom Zohar
papers.abstract: A well-known empirical regularity is that high-productivity firms have lower worker separation rates, but it is unclear whether this pattern reflects quits or layoffs. Using matched employer-employee data from Brazil that distinguish the reason for each separation, we show that the productivity-separation gradient is driven primarily by layoffs rather than quits. We then propose and test a mechanism in which downward wage rigidity prevents firms from adjusting wages in response to adverse shocks, causing those shocks to translate into layoffs. High-productivity firms are less exposed because their larger markdowns provide a buffer between productivity and wages. Consistent with this mechanism, we find that firms with higher markdowns have lower layoff rates, and that markets with stronger wage rigidity exhibit both higher layoff rates and a steeper productivity-layoff gradient. These findings suggest that productivity differences across firms shape not only wages, but also workers' exposure to job loss.
papers.zh_title: 离职再审视：高质量企业较低的离职率是由解雇还是辞职驱动的？
papers.zh_abstract: 一个广为人知的经验规律是，高生产率企业的员工离职率较低，但尚不清楚这一模式反映的是辞职还是解雇。利用巴西区分每次离职原因的雇主-雇员匹配数据，我们表明生产率-离职梯度主要由解雇而非辞职驱动。随后，我们提出并检验了一个机制：向下工资刚性阻止企业根据不利冲击调整工资，导致这些冲击转化为解雇。高生产率企业受影响较小，因为它们较大的加价幅度在生产率与工资之间提供了缓冲。与该机制一致，我们发现加价幅度较高的企业解雇率较低，而工资刚性较强的市场既表现出更高的解雇率，也表现出更陡峭的生产率-解雇梯度。这些发现表明，企业间的生产率差异不仅影响工资，也影响工人面临失业的风险。

papers.title: Measuring Water Misallocation in California
papers.authors: Will Rafey
papers.abstract: This paper proposes and applies new methods to value water rights and assess misallocation across competing uses in California, the world’s fourth largest economy. The empirical strategy combines detailed microdata on farms, evapotranspiration, historical water rights, and the hydrological flow network in order to isolate sources of inefficiency within the hydrological network, assess distributional implications of water access under current property rights, and evaluate alternative mechanisms for water reallocation.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：D23, D61, L1, L2, Q1, Q24, Q25
papers.zh_title: 衡量加利福尼亚州的水资源错配
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出并应用新方法来评估水权价值以及衡量全球第四大经济体加利福尼亚州竞争性用途之间的水资源错配。该实证策略结合了关于农场、蒸散发、历史水权以及水文流动网络的详细微观数据，以隔离水文网络内部的低效来源，评估当前产权下水资源获取的分配影响，并评估水资源重新分配的替代机制。

papers.title: The Causal Effects of Expected Depreciations
papers.authors: Martha Elena Delgado Rojas, Juan Herreño, Marc Hofstetter, Mathieu Pedemonte
papers.abstract: We construct a novel measure of one-year-ahead exchange rate forecasts and nowcasts for non-financial firms. We then study a randomized information intervention that provides a subset of firms with a publicly available exchange rate forecast. This information treatment persistently shifts exchange rate expectations and perceptions, with stronger effects for non-exporting firms. We link survey responses with administrative customs data and estimate a positive intertemporal elasticity of import demand to exogenous changes in expected future exchange rates. Our findings highlight the role of intertemporal substitution after anticipated changes in trade costs.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E31, E71, F31, G41
papers.zh_title: 预期贬值的因果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为非金融企业构建了一种新颖的一年期汇率预测和现时预测的衡量指标。随后，我们研究了一项随机信息干预，该干预向一部分企业提供公开可用的汇率预测。这种信息处理持续地改变了汇率预期和认知，对非出口企业的影响更强。我们将调查回复与行政海关数据联系起来，并估计了进口需求对预期未来汇率外生变化的跨期弹性为正。我们的发现强调了在预期贸易成本变化后跨期替代的作用。

papers.title: Authority Figures and the Polarization of Gender Norms
papers.authors: Ali Abboud, Samuel Bazzi, Serena Canaan, Antoine Deeb, Pierre Mouganie
papers.abstract: This paper examines how authority figures in higher education shape gender norms over the long run. We exploit the random assignment of first-year students to faculty advisors at an elite university in the Middle East and combine administrative records with an alumni survey measuring gender attitudes up to 24 years later. Women assigned to female advisors adopt more egalitarian views about politics and work, while men become more conservative. These effects are strongest among religious students and in male-dominated STEM fields, where female authority is especially counter-stereotypical. The effects may persist through reinforcement, as women assigned to female advisors later sort toward female instructors and more gender-themed courses. Our results do not appear to be driven by generic exposure to successful women. Instead, they point to a distinct role for authority in transmitting gender norms: randomized exposure to high-achieving female peers has little effect, while the largest impacts come from senior and high-value-added female advisors. A simple framework combining belief updating and identity-based status threat helps explain these patterns of female empowerment and male backlash. More broadly, our findings reveal a progress paradox whereby gains in female representation in elite authority expand opportunities for women while intensifying backlash among men, thereby deepening gender polarization.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, POL；JEL：I24, J16, J24, P00, Z12, Z13
papers.zh_title: 权威人物与性别规范的两极分化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了高等教育中的权威人物如何长期塑造性别规范。我们利用中东一所精英大学一年级学生随机分配至教师导师的情况，并将行政记录与一项衡量性别态度的校友调查（时间跨度长达24年）相结合。被分配给女性导师的女性学生形成了关于政治和工作的更平等主义观点，而男性则变得更加保守。这些效应在宗教学生和男性主导的STEM领域（女性权威尤其反刻板印象）中最为强烈。这些效应可能通过强化而持续，因为被分配给女性导师的女性学生后来会更多地选择女性教师和更多性别主题的课程。我们的结果似乎并非由普遍接触成功女性所驱动。相反，它们指出了权威在传递性别规范中的独特作用：随机接触高成就女性同龄人几乎没有影响，而最大的影响来自资深和高附加值的女性导师。一个结合信念更新和基于身份的地位威胁的简单框架有助于解释这些女性赋权和男性反弹的模式。更广泛地说，我们的发现揭示了一个进步悖论：精英权威中女性代表性的增加在扩大女性机会的同时，也加剧了男性的反弹，从而加深了性别两极分化。

papers.title: How does Medicare Eligibility affect Choice and Utilization? Evidence from Veterans
papers.authors: Marion Aouad, Liam Rose, Todd Wagner
papers.abstract: We examine how Medicare affects health care utilization for those who age in with a more narrow health insurance network by studying veterans enrolled in the Veterans Health Administration (VA). Given the limited geographic density of VA hospitals, we posit that Medicare expands the insurance network for VA enrollees. Using regression discontinuity methods, we find that veterans' inpatient hospitalization rate increases by approximately 3.3 percent at 65. Further, there are large reallocations across health insurance payers. Individuals increasingly use Medicare for hospitalizations once it becomes available, while VA, commercial, and other federal insurance programs are used less. We also find substantial reallocations among individuals that gain access to hospitals closer to their homes and among those who visit the hospital for more postponeable medical procedures. However, we do not find evidence that the average quality rating of the hospital selected at 65 changes nor do we find evidence that VA hospital wait times affect the move to Medicare; rather, individuals choose hospitals that are relatively closer. Lastly, our results suggest that Medicare may compete with other federal programs to provide health care for select populations, such as veterans.
papers.zh_title: 医疗保险资格如何影响选择与利用？来自退伍军人的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究加入退伍军人健康管理局（VA）的退伍军人，考察了医疗保险如何影响那些拥有更狭窄健康保险网络的人群的医疗保健利用。鉴于VA医院的地理密度有限，我们假设医疗保险扩大了VA参保者的保险网络。使用断点回归方法，我们发现退伍军人的住院率在65岁时增加了约3.3%。此外，不同健康保险支付方之间存在大规模的重新分配。一旦医疗保险可用，个人越来越多地使用它来支付住院费用，而VA、商业和其他联邦保险计划的使用则减少。我们还发现，在能够获得离家更近的医院的人群中，以及因更可推迟的医疗程序而就医的人群中，存在显著的重新分配。然而，我们没有发现证据表明在65岁时所选医院的平均质量评级发生变化，也没有发现VA医院等待时间影响转向医疗保险的证据；相反，个人选择相对更近的医院。最后，我们的结果表明，医疗保险可能与其他联邦计划竞争，为特定人群（如退伍军人）提供医疗保健。

papers.title: Competitive Exposure and Entrepreneurial Experimentation
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: Entrepreneurs learn by experimenting, but experiment choices are often public. A closed beta, private pilot, or public launch not only generates evidence; it also reveals what kind of entrepreneur would choose that action. We develop a dynamic model in which a founder chooses between stealthy and public experiments while potential entrants infer from both actions and outcomes. Public outcomes are modelled as garblings of the founder's private experimental evidence, so public leakage informs outsiders without giving the founder information beyond the private signal already observed. The key state variable is competitive exposure: the public runway before entry becomes attractive. Exposure is depleted by two forces, leakage burn from public outcomes, and action burn from public inference about experiment choice. This distinction implies that competition can distort experiment design without forcing earlier scale: lower-confidence founders choose stealthier tests, while higher-confidence founders spend exposure to obtain faster private learning through more public tests. Scale is accelerated only when exposure reduces the value of waiting more than it reduces the value of scaling. Finally, exogenous funding gates make observable scale more selective and, therefore, more informative to entrants. The analysis shows that entrepreneurial experimentation is not merely private learning under uncertainty; it is public action under competitive inference.
papers.zh_title: 竞争暴露与创业实验
papers.zh_abstract: 企业家通过实验来学习，但实验选择往往是公开的。封闭测试、私人试点或公开发布不仅产生证据；它还揭示了什么样的企业家会选择该行动。我们开发了一个动态模型，其中创始人在隐秘实验和公开实验之间进行选择，而潜在进入者则从行动和结果中进行推断。公开结果被建模为创始人私人实验证据的加噪版本，因此公开泄露告知了外部人士，但并未给创始人提供超出已观察到的私人信号之外的信息。关键状态变量是竞争暴露：即进入变得有吸引力之前的公开跑道。暴露被两种力量消耗：来自公开结果的泄露消耗，以及来自关于实验选择的公开推断的行动消耗。这种区别意味着竞争可以扭曲实验设计而不强制更早的规模化：信心较低的创始人选择更隐秘的测试，而信心较高的创始人则通过更多公开测试消耗暴露以获取更快的私人学习。只有当暴露降低等待价值的幅度大于降低规模化价值的幅度时，规模化才会加速。最后，外生融资门槛使可观察的规模化更具选择性，因此对进入者更具信息量。分析表明，创业实验不仅仅是不确定性下的私人学习；它是在竞争性推断下的公开行动。

papers.title: Labor Market Effects of California’s $20 Fast-Food Minimum Wage
papers.authors: Arindrajit Dube
papers.abstract: California’s AB 1228 raised the minimum wage for large fast-food chains to $20 per hour in April 2024—roughly 77 percent of the state’s median hourly wage, the highest wage floor for fast-food workers in the U.S. Using QCEW data through 2025Q3, I estimate that the policy raised fast-food wages by about 7 percent. A conventional difference-in-differences yields an employment own-wage elasticity (OWE) of −0.19; synthetic difference-in-differences, which reweights controls to match California’s pretreatment trajectory, shrinks the OWE to −0.04. Newly available QWI data through 2024Q4 yield estimates that are on average more positive. Across 32 QCEW and QWI specifications, the OWE ranges from −0.29 to +0.26, bracketing the median OWE of −0.02 I compute across 27 post-2010 state minimum-wage events despite AB 1228’s much larger bite. The QWI also reveals a sharp reduction in the separation rate, with own-wage elasticities of −1.7 to −4.2—several times the restaurant-sector benchmark in Dube et al. (2016) and consistent with a monopsonistic quit-reduction channel. Wage and separation-rate effects concentrate among large employers covered by AB 1228, with limited spillovers. The fall in separations also helps reconcile the somewhat more negative QCEW employment estimates.
papers.zh_title: 加州20美元快餐最低工资的劳动力市场效应
papers.zh_abstract: 加利福尼亚州的AB 1228法案于2024年4月将大型快餐连锁店的最低工资提高到每小时20美元——约占该州中位数小时工资的77%，是美国快餐工人最高的工资下限。使用截至2025年第三季度的QCEW数据，我估计该政策使快餐工资提高了约7%。传统的双重差分法得出的就业自身工资弹性（OWE）为-0.19；合成双重差分法（重新加权控制组以匹配加州处理前轨迹）将OWE缩小至-0.04。新获得的截至2024年第四季度的QWI数据得出的估计平均更为正向。在32个QCEW和QWI规格中，OWE的范围从-0.29到+0.26，尽管AB 1228的冲击力度大得多，但该范围包含了我在27个2010年后的州最低工资事件中计算出的中位数OWE（-0.02）。QWI还揭示了离职率的急剧下降，自身工资弹性在-1.7到-4.2之间——是Dube等人（2016）中餐饮业基准的几倍，并且与垄断性离职减少渠道一致。工资和离职率效应集中在受AB 1228覆盖的大型雇主中，溢出效应有限。离职率的下降也有助于调和略显更负面的QCEW就业估计。

papers.title: Extreme Equilibria: The Benefits of Correlation
papers.authors: Kirill Rudov, Fedor Sandomirskiy, Leeat Yariv
papers.abstract: Correlated equilibria arise naturally when agents communicate or rely on intermediaries such as recommendation systems. We study when a given Nash equilibrium can be improved within the set of correlated equilibria for general objectives. Our key insight is a detail-free criterion: any Nash equilibrium with three or more randomizing agents is generically improvable. We refine this insight to specific classes of games and objectives, including Pareto and utilitarian welfare, and provide constructive methods to obtain improvements. Our findings underscore the ubiquity of improvable Nash equilibria and the crucial role of correlation in enhancing strategic outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 极端均衡：相关性的益处
papers.zh_abstract: 当代理人进行沟通或依赖推荐系统等中介时，相关均衡自然会出现。我们研究对于一般目标，何时可以在相关均衡集合内改进给定的纳什均衡。我们的关键见解是一个无需细节的标准：任何具有三个或更多随机化代理人的纳什均衡在一般情况下都是可改进的。我们将这一见解细化到特定类别的博弈和目标，包括帕累托和功利主义福利，并提供了获得改进的构造性方法。我们的发现强调了可改进纳什均衡的普遍性以及相关性在增强战略结果中的关键作用。

papers.title: Opt In? Opt Out?
papers.authors: Alex Chan, Ayush Gupta, Yetong Xu
papers.abstract: Cadaveric organ shortages leave thousands without life-saving transplants each year. Countries differ in using opt-in (informed consent) or opt-out (presumed consent) systems for donor registration. Using newly assembled cross-country panel data and an event-study design, this paper provides evidence that presumed-consent laws increase organ donation only when strictly enforced and family veto power is limited; weak opt-out regimes show negligible or even negative effects. A theoretical signaling model provides a plausible mechanism when opt-in or opt-out yields more donations, emphasizing the roles of donation propensity, signaling costs, and the family’s ability to overturn defaults. A large laboratory experiment further tests these mechanisms, showing that opt-in generally produces equal or higher donation rates unless signaling is costly and family veto power is minimal. The results underscore that defaults alone rarely increase donations unless paired with strong institutional enforcement.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：C91, C92, D47, D64, H00, I11, I18
papers.zh_title: 选择加入？选择退出？
papers.zh_abstract: 遗体器官短缺每年导致数千人无法获得挽救生命的移植。各国在器官捐献登记中采用选择加入（知情同意）或选择退出（推定同意）制度。本文利用新构建的跨国面板数据和事件研究设计，提供证据表明：推定同意法律仅在严格执法且家庭否决权受限时才能增加器官捐献；宽松的选择退出制度效果微乎其微，甚至产生负面影响。一个理论信号模型解释了选择加入或选择退出何时能带来更多捐献的合理机制，强调了捐献倾向、信号成本以及家庭推翻默认选择的能力。一项大型实验室实验进一步检验了这些机制，结果表明：除非信号成本高昂且家庭否决权极小，否则选择加入通常能产生相等或更高的捐献率。研究结果强调，除非与强有力的制度执行相结合，否则仅靠默认选择很少能增加捐献。

papers.title: The Postpandemic U.S. Immigration Surge: New Facts and Inflationary Implications
papers.authors: Anton Cheremukhin, Sewon Hur, Ronald R. Mau, Karel Mertens, Alexander W. Richter, Xiaoqing Zhou
papers.abstract: The U.S. experienced an extraordinary surge in immigration from 2021 to 2024, which triggered widespread discussions about its macroeconomic impact, particularly on inflation. To determine the impact of the immigration surge, we first document the salient features of these new immigrants: they are primarily low-skilled relative to the existing workforce and more likely to be hand-to-mouth consumers. We then incorporate these features into a heterogeneous agent model with capital-skill complementarity. We find that the supply- and demand-side effects of the immigration surge roughly cancel out, causing a negligible response of inflation.
papers.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：E21, E22, E31, F22, J11, J15
papers.zh_title: 后疫情时代的美国移民潮：新事实与通胀影响
papers.zh_abstract: 美国在2021年至2024年间经历了异常庞大的移民潮，引发了关于其宏观经济影响（尤其是对通胀影响）的广泛讨论。为确定移民潮的影响，我们首先记录了这些新移民的显著特征：相对于现有劳动力，他们主要是低技能者，且更可能是月光族消费者。随后，我们将这些特征纳入一个具有资本-技能互补性的异质性主体模型中。我们发现，移民潮的供给和需求效应大致相互抵消，导致通胀反应微乎其微。

papers.title: On the Negative Consequences of Low-Wage Offshoring for Innovation
papers.authors: Wulong Gu, Alla Lileeva, Daniel Trefler
papers.abstract: Conventional wisdom holds that offshoring intermediates to China stimulates innovation. This is not entirely compelling. On the one hand, (a) offshoring lowers marginal costs and expands sales, thereby increasing the returns to innovation, especially for large firms. On the other hand, (b) offshoring low-quality intermediates reduces the costs of older-generation products, thereby reducing the returns to innovating into newer generations. We examine these two opposing forces over 2002-2011 for 6,024 Canadian firms. Our empirical strategy regresses measures of innovation, such as R&D, on imports of intermediate inputs. To address endogeneity, we construct a model-consistent shift-share instrument whose shocks are the often-dramatic improvements in the quality of HS6 Chinese intermediate inputs. We find that greater offshoring reduced R&D spending over 2002-2011 by 15% as (1) firms engaged in R&D in 2002 reduced their expenditures, and (2) firms not initially engaged in R&D were discouraged from starting up new R&D projects. Our model explains these findings: Rising quality of Chinese intermediates is a positive supply shock (rather than a negative China shock) that raises profits for all offshorers, raises innovation for the largest offshorers (channel a above), and lowers innovation for all other offshorers (channel b). These predictions are confirmed in the data.
papers.zh_title: 低工资离岸外包对创新的负面影响
papers.zh_abstract: 传统观点认为，将中间品离岸外包到中国会刺激创新。但这并非完全令人信服。一方面，(a)离岸外包降低了边际成本并扩大了销售，从而增加了创新的回报，尤其对大型企业而言。另一方面，(b)离岸外包低质量的中间品降低了老一代产品的成本，从而降低了创新进入新一代产品的回报。我们考察了2002-2011年间这些对立力量对6024家加拿大企业的影响。我们的实证策略是将创新指标（如研发支出）对中间品进口进行回归。为解决内生性问题，我们构建了一个与模型一致的转移份额工具变量，其冲击来自中国HS6中间品质量通常显著的提升。我们发现，更多的离岸外包使2002-2011年间的研发支出减少了15%，原因是：(1) 2002年从事研发的企业减少了支出，以及(2) 最初未从事研发的企业被抑制，不再启动新的研发项目。我们的模型解释了这些发现：中国中间品质量的提升是一个正向供给冲击（而非负向中国冲击），它提高了所有离岸外包企业的利润，提高了最大离岸外包企业的创新（上述渠道a），并降低了所有其他离岸外包企业的创新（渠道b）。这些预测在数据中得到了证实。

papers.title: Interest Rate Caps, Competition, and Strategic Borrowing: Evidence from Kenya
papers.authors: Aroon Narayanan, Tavneet Suri, Prashant Bharadwaj
papers.abstract: We study Kenya’s 2016 interest-rate regulation, which capped bank lending rates but left one digital platform, called M-Shwari, exempt on the lending side while imposing a deposit-rate floor across all lenders in the market. Using borrower-level administrative data, survey data, and an RD around the implementation date, we show three main results. First, lending on the exempt platform rose, but with the safest borrowers substituting away toward cheaper capped credit. Second, riskier borrowers increase their savings to build up their credit limits. Third, on the supply side, M-Shwari raises the limits for the safest borrowers in an attempt to retain them. We build and estimate a simple model of screening and credit limit-setting to interpret these reallocations and compute welfare. The observed carve-out for M-Shwari preserves access for high-risk borrowers but yields a slight aggregate welfare decline relative to pre-policy. However, a uniform (across all lenders) interest rate cap counterfactual generates substantially larger welfare losses by entirely eliminating credit for high-risk borrowers.
papers.zh_title: 利率上限、竞争与策略性借贷：来自肯尼亚的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了肯尼亚2016年的利率监管，该监管设定了银行贷款利率上限，但豁免了一个名为M-Shwari的数字平台在贷款端的限制，同时对市场上所有贷款机构设定了存款利率下限。利用借款人层面的行政数据、调查数据以及围绕实施日期的断点回归，我们展示了三个主要结果。首先，被豁免平台上的贷款增加了，但最安全的借款人转向更便宜的受上限约束的信贷。其次，风险较高的借款人增加储蓄以提高其信用额度。第三，在供给方面，M-Shwari提高了最安全借款人的额度以试图留住他们。我们构建并估计了一个简单的筛选和信用额度设定模型来解释这些重新配置并计算福利。观察到的对M-Shwari的豁免保留了高风险借款人的信贷获取，但与政策前相比，总体福利略有下降。然而，一个统一的（适用于所有贷款机构）利率上限反事实情景，通过完全消除高风险借款人的信贷，产生了更大的福利损失。

papers.title: Health Inequalities Among Danish Retirees 2004-2022
papers.authors: Paul Bingley, Nabanita Datta Gupta, Malene Kallestrup-Lamb, Alexander O.K. Marin
papers.abstract: Using Danish SHARE data from 2004–2022, we examine income gradients in health among retirees ages 60–79 across functional, diagnosed, comprehensive, mental, and cognitive domains. Higher-income retirees are healthier across all dimensions, but the evolution of inequality differs across measures. Functional and comprehensive health gaps narrow over time because lower-income retirees improve, whereas mental health gaps remain large and persistent. Diagnosed and cognitive health show smaller, less stable gradients. Overall, health inequality at older ages is substantial but not uniform: physical health disparities compress, while mental health disparities show no sign of convergence.
papers.zh_title: 2004-2022年丹麦退休人员的健康不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 利用2004-2022年的丹麦SHARE数据，我们考察了60-79岁退休人员在功能、诊断、综合、心理和认知健康领域的收入梯度。高收入退休人员在所有维度上都更健康，但不平等的演变因衡量指标而异。功能健康和综合健康的差距随时间缩小，因为低收入退休人员有所改善，而心理健康差距仍然很大且持续存在。诊断健康和认知健康的梯度较小且不稳定。总体而言，老年时期的健康不平等是显著的，但并不统一：身体健康差距在缩小，而心理健康差距没有收敛的迹象。

papers.title: How Should Central Banks Respond to Commodity Price Shocks? Optimal Monetary and Exchange Rate Frameworks for Commodity-Exposed Economies
papers.authors: Thomas Drechsel, Michael McLeay, Silvana Tenreyro, Enrico D. Turri
papers.abstract: We show that the optimal monetary policy and exchange rate framework depend critically on the economy’s commodity exposure. We develop a flexible but tractable model economy with commodity exports and imports, in which international financial conditions may vary with the commodity cycle, and we compute the welfare-optimal policy in the presence of price and wage rigidities. Stabilizing domestic prices is welfare-optimal for commodity exporters, in line with standard open-economy policy prescriptions. But for economies that use commodities as inputs in production, optimal policy largely ‘looks through’ the direct and indirect effects of commodity shocks on domestic prices; this contrasts with some earlier findings and policy practice (which only ‘looks through’ the direct effect). Exchange-rate pegs increase welfare for commodity importers because they stabilize wages and employment, though it is not a robustly optimal policy. In emerging and developing economies, where financial conditions are more tied to the commodity cycle, trade-offs are starker and implementing the optimal policy may be challenging, since it requires enough credibility to keep inflation expectations anchored amidst greater volatility in some nominal variables.
papers.zh_title: 中央银行应如何应对大宗商品价格冲击？大宗商品暴露经济体的最优货币与汇率框架
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，最优货币政策和汇率框架关键取决于经济体的大宗商品暴露程度。我们开发了一个灵活但易于处理的经济模型，包含大宗商品出口和进口，其中国际金融条件可能随大宗商品周期而变化，并在存在价格和工资刚性的情况下计算福利最优政策。对于大宗商品出口国而言，稳定国内价格是福利最优的，这与标准的开放经济政策处方一致。但对于将大宗商品用作生产投入的经济体，最优政策在很大程度上“看穿”了大宗商品冲击对国内价格的直接和间接影响；这与先前的一些发现和政策实践（仅“看穿”直接影响）形成对比。汇率盯住制增加了大宗商品进口国的福利，因为它稳定了工资和就业，尽管这并非一个稳健的最优政策。在新兴和发展中经济体，金融条件与大宗商品周期的联系更为紧密，权衡取舍更为严峻，实施最优政策可能具有挑战性，因为这需要足够的可信度来在部分名义变量波动性加大的情况下锚定通胀预期。

papers.title: Building Opportunity: The Intergenerational Effects of Chilean School Construction
papers.authors: Adrienne Lucas, Patrick McEwan
papers.abstract: In 1965–1966, Chile built and staffed thousands of new primary classrooms in supply-constrained communities. Using a quasi-experimental design and large census samples, we show that childhood exposure to school construction substantially improved the schooling and labor market outcomes of adults and closed a persistent female disadvantage in school attainment. Women’s exposure to the policy had large intergenerational spillovers on their children’s on-time grade progression and completed schooling. The marginal value of public funds is 13, including direct effects on adults and intergenerational spillovers.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I24, I25, I28, J16, O15
papers.zh_title: 创造机会：智利学校建设的代际效应
papers.zh_abstract: 在1965-1966年间，智利在供给受限的社区新建并配备了数千间小学教室。利用准实验设计和大规模人口普查样本，我们表明，童年时期接触学校建设显著改善了成年人的教育和劳动力市场成果，并消除了女性在教育程度上的长期劣势。女性接触该政策对其子女的按时升学率和完成学业产生了巨大的代际溢出效应。公共资金的边际价值为13，这包括了成年人的直接效应和代际溢出效应。

papers.title: Proposed Mergers Where Efficiencies Are Needed Most Might Be the Least Likely to Deliver Them
papers.authors: Robert D. Metcalfe, Alexandre B. Sollaci, Chad Syverson
papers.abstract: Mergers are commonly evaluated by weighing their expected market power effects against any efficiency gains they create. The larger the market power effect of a proposed merger, the larger must be any efficiencies for it to raise social welfare. We show selection into merger proposal distorts the observed relationship between market power and efficiency effects. Even if market power and efficiency gains are independent (or even positively correlated) across all potential mergers, they will generally be negatively related among proposed mergers. This is because parties propose to merge only if the merger’s expected profitability exceeds a threshold, so the underlying components of profitability become substitutes in clearing that hurdle. It does not rely on managerial bias, behavioral frictions, or strategic misrepresentation. We demonstrate this negative correlation is present under very general conditions when the two effects are uncorrelated among all mergers. We also characterize conditions where this still holds even in the presence of positive underlying correlations and firms’ uncertainty about their own merger’s profitability. Policies that might raise the selection hurdle for proposed mergers do not alleviate the negative correlation; indeed, they would exacerbate it. Our analysis has direct implications for interpreting empirical merger retrospectives and for evaluating efficiency defenses in antitrust policy.
papers.zh_title: 最需要效率的拟议合并可能最不可能带来效率
papers.zh_abstract: 合并通常通过权衡其预期的市场势力效应与所产生的效率收益来评估。拟议合并的市场势力效应越大，其提高社会福利所需的效率就必须越大。我们表明，合并提案的选择扭曲了观察到的市场势力与效率效应之间的关系。即使市场势力与效率收益在所有潜在合并中是独立的（甚至正相关），它们在拟议合并中通常也会呈负相关。这是因为各方只有在合并的预期盈利能力超过阈值时才提议合并，因此盈利能力的潜在组成部分在跨越该门槛时成为替代品。这并不依赖于管理偏见、行为摩擦或策略性误报。我们证明，当这两个效应在所有合并中不相关时，这种负相关在非常一般的条件下存在。我们还描述了即使在存在正的基础相关性以及企业对其自身合并盈利能力存在不确定性的情况下，这种负相关仍然成立的条件。可能提高拟议合并选择门槛的政策并不会缓解这种负相关；实际上，它们会加剧这种负相关。我们的分析对解释实证合并回顾以及评估反垄断政策中的效率抗辩具有直接意义。

papers.title: Trust, Financial Literacy, and Financial Behaviors: Shaping Retirement Security
papers.authors: Maya Haran Rosen, Annamaria Lusardi, Olivia S. Mitchell
papers.abstract: We extend the literature on the importance of trust for financial behaviors by examining trust, financial literacy, and financial behavior related to retirement security. Using the Health and Retirement Study, we show that Trust in Financial Institutions aligns with behaviors supportive of retirement security, while Trust in Government Programs does not. We further document racial/ethnic differences: for White respondents, Trust in Financial Institutions relates positively to retirement outcomes, but not for Blacks or Hispanics. Moreover, Trust in Government Programs among minority households is linked to reduced stockholding and lower wealth accumulation. These findings inform efforts to strengthen retirement security.
papers.zh_title: 信任、金融素养与金融行为：塑造退休保障
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过考察与退休保障相关的信任、金融素养和金融行为，拓展了关于信任对金融行为重要性的文献。利用健康与退休研究，我们表明对金融机构的信任与支持退休保障的行为一致，而对政府项目的信任则不然。我们进一步记录了种族/族裔差异：对于白人受访者，对金融机构的信任与退休结果正相关，但对黑人或西班牙裔受访者则不然。此外，少数族裔家庭对政府项目的信任与股票持有减少和财富积累降低相关。这些发现为加强退休保障的努力提供了信息。

papers.title: Lands of Opportunity: Differences in the Geography of Wealth and Income Mobility in the United States
papers.authors: Ariel J. Binder, Max Risch, John L. Voorheis
papers.abstract: We provide new county-level estimates of intergenerational mobility, covering multiple economic concepts: total income, labor income, homeownership, housing wealth, and total wealth. This is possible via small-area estimation techniques and linked survey and administrative data covering millions of U.S. children born between 1978 and 1986. We find that relative mobility in wealth concepts shows less spatial clustering and more spatial variation than relative mobility in income concepts. Many cities and their suburbs exhibit lower relative mobility (i.e. higher intergenerational persistence) in wealth concepts than in income concepts. Next, we show that various local characteristics are associated with some concepts of economic mobility but not with others. For example, we estimate a strong negative association between the local severity of the Great Recession and child income, regardless of parent position in the income distribution. However, the negative association between recession severity and wealth only exists among children from poorer families. We provide a public-use data package to facilitate further research.
papers.zh_title: 机遇之地：美国财富与收入流动性的地理差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了新的县级代际流动性估计，涵盖多个经济概念：总收入、劳动收入、房屋所有权、住房财富和总财富。这通过小区域估计技术以及覆盖数百万1978年至1986年间出生的美国儿童的关联调查和行政数据得以实现。我们发现，财富概念的相对流动性比收入概念的相对流动性表现出更少的空间聚集和更多的空间变异。许多城市及其郊区在财富概念上的相对流动性（即更高的代际持续性）低于收入概念。接下来，我们表明各种地方特征与某些经济流动性概念相关，但与其他概念无关。例如，我们估计大衰退的地方严重程度与儿童收入之间存在强烈的负相关，无论父母在收入分配中的位置如何。然而，衰退严重程度与财富之间的负相关仅存在于来自较贫困家庭的儿童中。我们提供了一个公共使用的数据包以促进进一步研究。

papers.title: California Billionaires: Wealth, Taxes, and Wealth Tax Revenue Estimates
papers.authors: Jasper Boll, Emmanuel Saez, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: This paper documents the wealth of California’s billionaires and the taxes they pay. California billionaires’ wealth exceeds $2 trillion today, the equivalent of 50% of California’s GDP. It has grown 144% from 2023 to 2025, fueled by the AI boom. Over the longer run, the real wealth of California’s billionaire class—the 0.0002% richest households—has been multiplied by 38 from 1982 to 2026, while average real family income in California has about doubled. California billionaires pay about 0.2% of their wealth in California income tax ($3.2 billion/year), representing 2.4% of total California income tax revenue on average over 2023-2025. Using Securities and Exchange Commission data from Alphabet, Meta, Oracle, and Nvidia since 2004, we estimate the trajectory of wealth, income, and taxes paid by the top 4 California billionaires—Page, Brin, Zuckerberg, Ellison (through 2020), and Huang (since 2021)—focusing on their business wealth. This group alone holds nearly $1 trillion in business wealth, about 40% of total California billionaire wealth. For this group, wealth growth (+322% over 2023-2025) and low taxation (0.04% of wealth in annual California income tax) are more pronounced. The proposed one-off California billionaire tax of 5%, payable over 5 years, is both small relative to California billionaires’ wealth gains and large relative to the taxes they currently pay. We estimate that it could raise about $100 billion, with comparatively minor impacts on income tax revenue. Using empirical estimates of mobility responses to wealth taxation, we find that an annual wealth tax on California billionaires could raise substantial additional revenue even after accounting for income tax losses due to mobility.
papers.zh_title: 加州亿万富翁：财富、税收与财富税收入估算
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了加州亿万富翁的财富及其缴纳的税款。如今，加州亿万富翁的财富超过2万亿美元，相当于加州GDP的50%。受人工智能热潮推动，其财富从2023年到2025年增长了144%。从更长期来看，加州亿万富翁阶层——最富有的0.0002%家庭——的实际财富从1982年到2025年增长了30倍，而加州实际平均家庭收入大约翻了一番。加州亿万富翁缴纳的加州所得税约占其财富的0.2%（每年32亿美元），在2023-2025年间平均占加州所得税总收入的2.4%。利用自2004年以来来自Alphabet、Meta、Oracle和Nvidia的美国证券交易委员会数据，我们估算了前四位加州亿万富翁——佩奇、布林、扎克伯格、埃里森（截至2020年）和黄仁勋（自2021年起）——的财富、收入和缴纳税款的轨迹，重点关注其商业财富。仅这一群体就持有近1万亿美元的商业财富，几乎占加州亿万富翁总财富的一半。对于这一群体，财富增长（2023-2025年间增长322%）和低税率（每年缴纳的加州所得税占财富的0.04%）更为显著。拟议的一次性加州亿万富翁税（税率为5%，分五年缴纳）相对于加州亿万富翁的财富增长而言较小，但相对于他们目前缴纳的税款而言则较大。我们估计，该税可能筹集约1000亿美元，对所得税收入的影响相对较小。利用对财富税流动性反应的实证估计，我们发现，即使在考虑因流动性导致的所得税损失后，对加州亿万富翁征收年度财富税仍可筹集大量额外收入。

papers.title: The Limits of Political Representation: Evidence from India
papers.authors: Veda Narasimhan, Jeffrey Weaver
papers.abstract: Political inclusion is widely believed to improve governance, motivating the creation of elected representatives for highly localized constituencies. This paper studies 1.2 million "hyperlocal" representatives across 150,000 local governments in rural India. Exploiting discontinuities that determine the number and identity of these representatives, we assess how expanded representation affects governance outcomes. We find precisely estimated null effects on core functions, including public project management, intermediation in access to benefit programs, alignment of policy with citizen preferences, equity of benefit allocation, and oversight of public finances. These findings highlight the limits of expanding political representation if representative capacity is weak.
papers.zh_title: 政治代表性的局限：来自印度的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 政治包容被广泛认为能够改善治理，这推动了为高度地方化的选区设立民选代表。本文研究了印度农村15万个地方政府中的120万名“超地方”代表。利用决定这些代表人数和身份的不连续性，我们评估了扩大代表性对治理结果的影响。我们发现，在核心职能方面，包括公共项目管理、福利项目获取的中介服务、政策与公民偏好的一致性、福利分配的公平性以及公共财政监督，均存在精确估计的零效应。这些发现凸显了在代表能力薄弱的情况下扩大政治代表性的局限性。

papers.title: Divergence in Climate Change Communication: LLM-Based Evidence from the IPCC and the Press
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Franco Mettola La Giglia, Raul A. Sosa
papers.abstract: Public summaries of IPCC climate assessments lean toward the more severe end of the technical evidence. The pattern appears at two stages: the IPCC’s lead authors and member governments produce the Summary for Policymakers (SPM) from the Technical Summary (TS), and newspapers then cover the SPM. We use LLMs to score about 114,000 matched claim pairs from all six Assessment Reports (1990 to 2023) and ten major US and UK outlets. Both stages systematically shift toward the more severe end of the source while staying inside the IPCC’s accepted scientific ranges. The shift comes mainly from emphasizing higher-impact magnitudes within reported ranges, less from uncertainty compression, and almost none from selecting worst-case emissions scenarios. Left- and right-leaning outlets show similar patterns.
papers.zh_title: 气候变化传播中的分歧：基于大语言模型的IPCC与媒体证据
papers.zh_abstract: IPCC气候评估的公开摘要倾向于技术证据中更严重的一端。这种模式出现在两个阶段：IPCC的主要作者和成员国政府从技术摘要中生成决策者摘要，随后报纸对决策者摘要进行报道。我们使用大语言模型对所有六次评估报告（1990年至2023年）以及美国与英国十家主要媒体的约11.4万对匹配声明进行评分。两个阶段都系统性地向来源中更严重的一端偏移，同时保持在IPCC认可的科学范围内。这种偏移主要源于在报告范围内强调更高影响幅度，较少来自不确定性压缩，几乎不来自选择最坏情景的排放路径。左倾和右倾媒体表现出相似的模式。

papers.title: Valuing Disaster Prevention: Desert Locust Monitoring and Control
papers.authors: Joséphine Gantois, Anouch Missirian, Evelina Linnros, Anna Tompsett, Amir Jina, Gordon C. McCord, Eyal G. Frank
papers.abstract: Monitoring systems for disaster prevention are costly, and measuring benefits is difficult when monitoring effort is endogenous. We provide the first causal estimate of one such system's impact using three decades of desert locust monitoring data. We document conflict-induced interruptions to monitoring in remote breeding areas, reconstruct how infestations spread to populated areas, and show that exposure to locust swarms around birth decreases child height-for-age, increasing stunting risk by over 7 percentage points. Eliminating the locust monitoring system would induce annual losses of US$25 billion, implying a benefit-cost ratio between 160:1 and 680:1 from child nutrition benefits alone.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：I15, O13, Q0, Q5, Q54, Q57
papers.zh_title: 灾害预防的价值评估：沙漠蝗虫监测与控制
papers.zh_abstract: 灾害预防监测系统成本高昂，而当监测努力具有内生性时，衡量其效益十分困难。我们利用三十年的沙漠蝗虫监测数据，首次提供了此类系统影响的因果估计。我们记录了冲突导致的偏远繁殖区监测中断，重建了虫害如何蔓延至人口稠密地区，并表明出生前后暴露于蝗虫群会降低儿童年龄别身高，使发育迟缓风险增加超过7个百分点。取消蝗虫监测系统将导致每年250亿美元的损失，仅从儿童营养效益来看，效益成本比就在160:1至680:1之间。

papers.title: The Psychology of Macroeconomic Expectations
papers.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Florencio Lopez-de-Silanes, Simon G. Schröder, Andrei Shleifer, Maarten van Rooij
papers.abstract: We present a model of “animal spirits” in which context and emotions affect macroeconomic beliefs by shaping which experiences people recall to simulate similar future aggregate states. We test this mechanism by priming Dutch National Bank Survey respondents to recall personal financial or health adversities before eliciting inflation and home price expectations. The treatment causes instability in beliefs and reasoning tied to the measured similarity of the primed experiences to different macro states. This similarity structure also accounts for heterogeneity in beliefs and reasoning based on a range of other personal experiences we measure. The model micro founds several features of macroeconomic beliefs, including narratives, and yields a “confidence multiplier”: spending by some agents cues optimistic context for others, raising their spending.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D84, E03, E31, E71
papers.zh_title: 宏观经济预期的心理学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个“动物精神”模型，其中情境和情绪通过塑造人们回忆哪些经历来模拟相似的未来总体状态，从而影响宏观经济信念。我们通过启动荷兰国家银行调查的受访者回忆个人财务或健康困境，然后引出通胀和房价预期，来检验这一机制。这种处理导致信念和推理的不稳定性，这与被启动经历与不同宏观状态之间测量的相似性相关。这种相似性结构也解释了基于我们测量的其他个人经历在信念和推理上的异质性。该模型为宏观经济信念的若干特征（包括叙事）提供了微观基础，并产生了一个“信心乘数”：部分主体的支出为其他主体提示了乐观情境，从而提高了他们的支出。

papers.title: Sophisticated Borrowing Constraints and Macroeconomic Dynamics
papers.authors: Al-Mahdi Ebsim, Chen Lian, Yueran Ma, Pablo Ottonello, Diego J. Perez
papers.abstract: In traditional macro-finance models, firms' debt contracts impose hard borrowing constraints, which require indiscriminate reductions of borrowing and investment when adverse shocks tighten these limits, giving rise to financial acceleration. We study the macroeconomic implications of "sophisticated borrowing constraints" akin to financial covenants among large U.S. nonfinancial firms, commonly specified based on firms' debt relative to operating earnings. We model these constraints as debt thresholds that trigger a transfer of control rights to creditors when they are violated, in which case creditors influence firms' decisions to maximize their value instead of cutting credit unconditionally to adhere to fixed ratios. At the micro level, our model is quantitatively consistent with empirical patterns of investment and earnings around covenant violations. At the macro level, sophisticated borrowing constraints do not generate financial acceleration, because constraint tightening and violations do not induce creditors to downscale firms indiscriminately.
papers.zh_title: 复杂的借贷约束与宏观经济动态
papers.zh_abstract: 在传统的宏观金融模型中，企业的债务合同施加了硬性借贷约束，当不利冲击收紧这些限制时，要求不加区分地减少借贷和投资，从而产生金融加速器效应。我们研究了类似于美国大型非金融企业财务契约的“复杂借贷约束”的宏观经济含义，这些约束通常基于企业债务相对于营业利润来设定。我们将这些约束建模为债务阈值，当违反时触发控制权向债权人转移，此时债权人影响企业决策以最大化其价值，而不是无条件地削减信贷以遵守固定比率。在微观层面，我们的模型在数量上与违反契约时投资和盈利的经验模式一致。在宏观层面，复杂的借贷约束不会产生金融加速器效应，因为约束收紧和违反不会导致债权人不加区分地缩减企业规模。

papers.title: Old Space, New Space: A Commercial Revolution in Innovation?
papers.authors: Ruben Gaetani, Alexander T. Whalley
papers.abstract: The emergence of firms like SpaceX and Blue Origin has made space a leading example of how private enterprise drives innovation, marking what many see as a sharp break between Old Space and New Space. Yet little systematic evidence documents when the transition to this new phase of space innovation occurred and which firms drove it. We use patent data to provide this measurement and find that the largest surge in space innovation occurred in the 1990s, coinciding with demand-side market creation, and preceding the entry of high-profile startups after 2005. Throughout this period and since, incumbent aerospace firms account for most of the space-related patenting, with entrants contributing a growing but minority share. The same geographic regions that dominated space innovation during the post-Apollo era remain dominant today. These patterns are consistent with directed technical change: incumbents direct R&D toward policy-created markets accessible from existing capabilities, while entrants bring science-based insights into domains requiring new paradigms. Our findings suggest that New Space is more closely connected to Old Space than prevailing narratives imply, and that government's most consequential role in space innovation may lie in constructing appropriable markets. We make patent data on space-related technologies available for future research.
papers.zh_title: 旧太空，新太空：创新的商业革命？
papers.zh_abstract: 像SpaceX和蓝色起源这样的公司的出现，使太空成为私营企业推动创新的主要例子，标志着许多人认为的旧太空与新太空之间的明显断裂。然而，很少有系统性证据记录向这一新阶段太空创新的过渡何时发生，以及哪些公司推动了这一过渡。我们使用专利数据来提供这一衡量，并发现太空创新的最大激增发生在20世纪90年代，与需求侧市场创造相吻合，并早于2005年后备受瞩目的初创企业的进入。在整个这一时期及之后，老牌航空航天公司占据了大部分与太空相关的专利，新进入者贡献了不断增长但仍是少数的份额。在后阿波罗时代主导太空创新的相同地理区域至今仍占主导地位。这些模式与定向技术变革一致：老牌公司将研发导向政策创造且现有能力可及的市场，而新进入者则将基于科学的见解引入需要新范式的领域。我们的发现表明，新太空与旧太空的联系比主流叙事所暗示的更为紧密，并且政府在太空创新中最具影响力的作用可能在于构建可获取的市场。我们为未来研究提供了与太空技术相关的专利数据。

papers.title: Endogenous Task Bundling, Skills and Automation
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: Empirical measures of AI's wage effect typically hold fixed the bundle of activities a worker is paid for at its pre-AI shape. We argue that this assumption hides much of the action. When automation breaks a job apart, firms decide how to recombine the surviving activities; whether they rebundle them into one broad role or split them into specialist roles changes which surviving skills the labour market actually rewards. A skill that played no role in the pre-AI wage can become the dominant component of the post-AI wage, while a skill that anchored the pre-AI wage can disappear from the schedule. We develop an assignment model in which the priced human bundle is endogenous, and we use it to show that a fixed-bundle wage regression can mis-sign the effect of AI exposure. In general, the omitted-redesign bias has no unconditional sign: it is the residual covariance between exposure and role-specific redesign terms. Under explicit sufficient conditions, exposure-correlated unbundling loads specialist comparative-advantage premia onto the exposure coefficient, while exposure-correlated rebundling loads a different, often opposite, omitted term. The sign must therefore be measured from local post-AI partition changes rather than assumed from exposure alone.
papers.zh_title: 内生任务捆绑、技能与自动化
papers.zh_abstract: 关于人工智能工资效应的实证测量通常将工人所获报酬的任务组合固定在其人工智能前的形态。我们认为这一假设掩盖了大部分作用机制。当自动化将一个工作分解时，企业决定如何重新组合幸存的活动；无论它们是将这些活动重新捆绑成一个宽泛的岗位，还是拆分成专业岗位，都会改变劳动力市场实际奖励哪些幸存技能。一个在人工智能前工资中不起作用的技能可能成为人工智能后工资的主导组成部分，而一个在人工智能前工资中起锚定作用的技能可能从工资表中消失。我们开发了一个分配模型，其中定价的人力组合是内生的，并利用该模型表明，固定组合的工资回归可能会错误地指示人工智能暴露的影响。一般而言，遗漏的重新设计偏差没有无条件符号：它是暴露与特定岗位重新设计项之间的残差协方差。在明确的充分条件下，与暴露相关的去捆绑将专业比较优势溢价加载到暴露系数上，而与暴露相关的重新捆绑则加载了一个不同的、通常是相反的遗漏项。因此，必须根据局部的人工智能后岗位划分变化来测量符号，而不是仅根据暴露来假设。

papers.title: Medical Innovation and Racial Health Disparities: Evidence from a Breakthrough Treatment
papers.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Kerwin Kofi Charles, Daniel I. Rees
papers.abstract: Whether medical innovation exacerbates or reduces racial health disparities remains an open question. We study surfactant replacement therapy (SRT), a life-saving intervention for premature infants with respiratory disorders. Before its approval by the FDA in 1989, premature Black infants were much less likely than their White counterparts to die from respiratory-related causes. Within a few years of FDA approval, the Black-White gap in respiratory-related neonatal mortality had essentially disappeared. Using 1980-2000 vital statistics data and non-respiratory-related mortality as a counterfactual outcome, we find that both Blacks and Whites benefited from the introduction of SRT, but White neonates experienced larger and more immediate reductions in mortality. We estimate that, by 1993, SRT had reduced respiratory-related mortality among White neonates by 46 percent, compared to 30 percent for Black neonates. These results are not explained by differences in health care access, as proxied by socioeconomic status or distance to the nearest neonatal intensive care unit. We conclude that racial differences in fetal pulmonary maturation, rather than barriers to access, likely drove the uneven impact of SRT on neonatal mortality.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, PR；JEL：I14, I18, J13, J15
papers.zh_title: 医学创新与种族健康差异：来自突破性治疗方法的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 医学创新是加剧还是缩小种族健康差异仍是一个悬而未决的问题。我们研究了表面活性剂替代疗法，这是一种针对患有呼吸系统疾病的早产儿的救命干预措施。在1989年获得美国食品药品监督管理局批准之前，早产黑人婴儿因呼吸相关原因死亡的可能性远低于白人婴儿。在FDA批准后的几年内，呼吸相关新生儿死亡率的黑白差距基本消失。利用1980-2000年的人口统计数据，并以非呼吸相关死亡率作为反事实结果，我们发现黑人和白人都受益于表面活性剂替代疗法的引入，但白人新生儿经历了更大且更即时的死亡率下降。我们估计，到1993年，表面活性剂替代疗法使白人新生儿的呼吸相关死亡率降低了46%，而黑人新生儿仅降低了30%。这些结果无法用医疗保健可及性的差异来解释，如社会经济地位或到最近新生儿重症监护病房的距离。我们得出结论，胎儿肺成熟的种族差异，而非获取障碍，可能导致了表面活性剂替代疗法对新生儿死亡率的不均衡影响。

papers.title: Estimating the Present Value of R&D Tax Benefits in the United States
papers.authors: Brandon Pecoraro, Nicholas C. Hoffman, Martin Lopez-Daneri, Elena C. Derby, Rachel Moore, Shannon E. Sledz
papers.abstract: Using a panel of confidential corporate tax returns, we provide the first direct estimates of the realized present value of corporate tax benefits from R&D credits and deductions in the United States. Realized tax benefits can deviate from statutory tax benefits because firms in loss status are typically unable to fully utilize credits and deductions to offset current-year taxes and instead must carry these attributes forward. We develop a novel procedure to track the intertemporal firm-level utilization of tax attributes generated by corporate R&D spending, and find that the present value of R&D tax benefits varies substantially with firms’ loss status, age, and size. Old and large firms typically use R&D tax benefits quickly, while young firms – especially those that are small – frequently operate in loss status and use tax attributes more slowly. From 2012–2016, the average firm generated $0.41 in statutory tax benefits per dollar of R&D investment, with a realized present value of $0.36. Young and small firms in a loss position realized only $0.23 per dollar, a 44% decrease relative to the statutory benchmark.
papers.zh_title: 估算美国研发税收优惠的现值
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一组保密的公司纳税申报表面板数据，我们首次直接估算了美国企业因研发税收抵免和扣除而实际获得的税收优惠现值。实际税收优惠可能与法定税收优惠存在偏差，因为处于亏损状态的企业通常无法完全利用抵免和扣除来抵消当年税款，而必须将这些税收属性结转至以后年度。我们开发了一种新颖的方法来追踪企业研发支出所产生的税收属性在时间维度上的企业层面利用情况，并发现研发税收优惠的现值因企业的亏损状态、年龄和规模而存在显著差异。老牌大型企业通常能迅速利用研发税收优惠，而年轻企业——尤其是小型企业——经常处于亏损状态，利用税收属性的速度较慢。从2012年到2016年，平均每投入1美元研发支出，企业产生0.41美元的法定税收优惠，实际现值为0.36美元。处于亏损状态的年轻小型企业每投入1美元仅实现0.23美元的实际优惠，相比法定基准下降了44%。

papers.title: More Paths or More Contrast? A Theory of Experimentation Breadth
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans, Luca Gius
papers.abstract: How should an organisation choose the breadth of its experimentation portfolio? Breadth has two distinct margins—the number of paths kept alive, and the degree of contrast among them—and prior research has largely studied them in isolation. We bring them into a single framework and show that they need not move together. Under a fixed experimentation budget, adding paths creates more chances to find a strong direction, but it also dilutes learning across paths and weakens the strongest feasible contrast. When the task is primarily ranking among already-viable alternatives, broader portfolios become more attractive as the budget rises. When paths share common viability uncertainty, and experimental signals track payoff relatedness, however, additional paths partly repeat the same viability test rather than provide independent information. We identify conditions under which testing exactly two sharply contrasting paths is optimal, dominating both a single deep test and broader portfolios. The framework reconciles competing prescriptions—many parallel shots versus a few sharp comparisons—by clarifying when each applies, and shows why empirical measures of breadth should not treat the number of options and their relatedness as separable margins.
papers.zh_title: 更多路径还是更多对比？关于实验广度的理论
papers.zh_abstract: 一个组织应如何选择其实验组合的广度？广度有两个不同的维度——保持存活的路径数量以及这些路径之间的对比程度——而先前的研究大多将它们孤立地研究。我们将它们纳入一个统一的框架，并表明它们不必同步变动。在固定的实验预算下，增加路径创造了更多找到强有力方向的机会，但也稀释了跨路径的学习，并削弱了可行的最强对比。当任务主要是在已有可行方案中进行排序时，随着预算增加，更广泛的组合变得更具吸引力。然而，当路径共享共同的可行性不确定性，且实验信号追踪收益相关性时，额外的路径部分地重复了相同的可行性测试，而非提供独立信息。我们识别出了一些条件，在这些条件下，测试恰好两条形成鲜明对比的路径是最优的，这优于单一的深度测试和更广泛的组合。该框架通过阐明每种策略的适用条件，调和了相互冲突的建议——即“多路并行”与“少数尖锐对比”——并解释了为什么对广度的实证衡量不应将选项数量及其相关性视为可分离的维度。

papers.title: The Cost of Intermediary Market Power for Distressed Borrowers
papers.authors: Winston Wei Dou, Wei Wang, Wenyu Wang
papers.abstract: Distressed firms need urgent financing to preserve operations and avoid inefficient liquidation, but they borrow in concentrated markets shaped by existing-creditor blocking power and a small group of specialized lenders. We show that these borrowers pay exceptionally high loan spreads even after removing compensation for credit risk, liquidity risk, and non-risk loan-making costs. To quantify and decompose lender market power, we develop and estimate a dynamic game-theoretic model of distressed lending with latent demand heterogeneity, endogenous lender participation, creditor blocking power, and tacit collusion sustained by repeated syndication. Using granular facility-level data on debtor-in-possession (DIP) loans and highly speculative loans, we find that lender market power explains 533 bps of risk-adjusted spreads in the DIP loan market and 300 bps in the highly speculative loan market, including about 140 bps from tacit collusion in each market. Lender market power is therefore a major source of financial distress costs, reducing survival-critical liquidity by 16–20% and thereby worsening asset-value destruction.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LE；JEL：C11, D43, G12, G18, G2, G21, G23, G28, K21, L13, L4
papers.zh_title: 中介市场势力对困境借款人的成本
papers.zh_abstract: 陷入困境的企业需要紧急融资以维持运营并避免低效清算，但它们在由现有债权人阻挠力量和一小群专业贷款机构塑造的集中市场中借款。我们表明，即使在剔除了信用风险、流动性风险和非风险贷款成本的补偿后，这些借款人仍支付异常高的贷款利差。为了量化并分解贷款机构的市场势力，我们开发并估计了一个动态博弈论模型，该模型包含潜在需求异质性、内生贷款机构参与、债权人阻挠力量以及通过重复银团贷款维持的默契合谋。利用关于占有债务人（DIP）贷款和高投机性贷款的细粒度设施层面数据，我们发现，贷款机构的市场势力解释了DIP贷款市场风险调整利差中的533个基点，以及高投机性贷款市场中的300个基点，其中包括每个市场中约140个基点来自默契合谋。因此，贷款机构的市场势力是财务困境成本的一个主要来源，它将关乎生存的关键流动性减少了16-20%，从而加剧了资产价值的破坏。

papers.title: Tatonnement and Price Setting in General Equilibrium
papers.authors: Iván Werning ⓡ Guido Lorenzoni
papers.abstract: A foundational question in General Equilibrium theory—when is an equilibrium stable?—has remained largely unresolved for over 150 years despite important contributions. This paper proposes a resolution.
papers.zh_title: 一般均衡中的试探过程和价格设定
papers.zh_abstract: 一般均衡理论中的一个基础性问题——均衡何时是稳定的？——尽管已有重要贡献，但在超过150年的时间里仍未得到根本解决。本文提出了一种解决方案。

papers.title: Flood Risk, Insurance, and Housing in the United States
papers.authors: Suvy Qin, John L. Voorheis
papers.abstract: Flooding is among the most salient natural hazards facing households in the United States. A large body of evidence has documented a pattern of disproportionate social vulnerability in floodplains. However, little evidence exists on how household-level exposure to flood risk is distributed. We fill this gap by combining parcel-level flood risk with confidential linked survey and administrative data held at the US Census Bureau. Although net migration to Census blocks in floodplains has increased in recent years, there has been essentially no net migration to parcels with flood risk or change in the overall share of households living in floodplains. Income gradients in flood risk are highly non-linear at the household level, with slightly negative income gradients for the bottom 90 percentiles of the income distribution that are dwarfed by disproportionate exposure in the top decile, especially when considering multiple property ownership. This nonlinearity is largely driven by differences in building type and homeownership within narrow income groups. In contrast to the conclusions in the literature using aggregate data, our household-level analysis suggests that households in floodplains are less disadvantaged and increasingly protected from the impacts of flooding, even as a vulnerable subpopulation of low-income, uninsured homeowners remains.
papers.zh_title: 美国的洪水风险、保险与住房
papers.zh_abstract: 洪水是美国家庭面临的最显著的自然灾害之一。大量证据记录了洪泛区中不成比例的社会脆弱性模式。然而，关于家庭层面洪水风险暴露如何分布的证据却很少。我们通过将地块层面的洪水风险与美国人口普查局持有的保密的关联调查和行政数据相结合来填补这一空白。尽管近年来净迁入洪泛区人口普查区块的人数有所增加，但基本上没有净迁入存在洪水风险的地块，且居住在洪泛区的家庭总体比例也没有变化。在家庭层面，洪水风险的收入梯度高度非线性，收入分布底部90个百分位数的收入梯度略微为负，但被收入最高十分位数的过度暴露所掩盖，尤其是在考虑多套房产所有权时。这种非线性主要由狭窄收入群体内建筑类型和房屋所有权的差异驱动。与使用汇总数据的文献结论相反，我们的家庭层面分析表明，洪泛区中的家庭处境不那么不利，并且越来越受到保护免受洪水影响，尽管仍存在一个由低收入、未投保的房主组成的脆弱亚群体。

papers.title: The Geography of Lifecycle Human Capital Accumulation
papers.authors: Ben Sprung-Keyser, Sonya Porter
papers.abstract: We examine how place shapes the production of human capital across the lifecycle. We ask: do those places that most effectively produce human capital in childhood also have local labor markets that do so in adulthood? We consider the following determinants of wages across place: 1) location-specific wage premiums, 2) adult human capital accumulation due to local labor market exposure, and 3) childhood human capital accumulation. We construct estimates of location wage premiums using AKM-style estimates of movers across US commuting zones and validate these estimates using evidence from plausibly exogenous out-migration from New Orleans in response to Hurricane Katrina. Next, we examine differential earnings trajectories among movers to construct estimates of human capital accumulation due to labor market exposure. We validate these estimates using wage changes of multi-time movers. Finally, we estimate the impact of place on childhood human capital production using age variation in moves during childhood. Crucially, our estimates of location wage premiums and adult human capital accumulation allow us to construct estimates of the causal effect of place during childhood that are not confounded by correlated labor market exposure. Using these estimates, we show there is a tradeoff between those places that most effectively produce human capital in childhood and the local labor markets that do so in adulthood. We find that each 1-rank increase in earnings due to adult labor market exposure trades off with a 0.5 rank decrease in earnings due to the local childhood environment. This pattern is closely linked to city size, as adult human capital accumulation generally increases with city size, while childhood human capital accumulation falls. These divergent trajectories are associated with differences in both the physical structure of cities and the nature of social interaction therein.
papers.zh_title: 生命周期人力资本积累的地理分布
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了地方如何在整个生命周期中塑造人力资本的生产。我们提出疑问：那些在童年时期最有效地生产人力资本的地方，是否也拥有在成年期做到这一点的本地劳动力市场？我们考虑了工资在各地之间的以下决定因素：1）特定地点的工资溢价，2）因本地劳动力市场暴露而产生的成年期人力资本积累，以及3）童年期人力资本积累。我们利用美国通勤区之间流动人口的AKM风格估计值构建了地点工资溢价的估计值，并利用卡特里娜飓风后新奥尔良居民看似外生的迁出证据验证了这些估计值。接下来，我们考察了流动人口之间不同的收入轨迹，以构建因劳动力市场暴露而产生的人力资本积累估计值。我们利用多次流动人口的工资变化验证了这些估计值。最后，我们利用童年时期迁移的年龄差异来估计地方对童年期人力资本生产的影响。至关重要的是，我们对地点工资溢价和成年期人力资本积累的估计使我们能够构建童年期地方因果效应的估计值，这些估计值不受相关的劳动力市场暴露的混淆影响。利用这些估计值，我们表明，在那些最有效地生产童年期人力资本的地方与那些在成年期做到这一点的本地劳动力市场之间存在一种权衡。我们发现，因成年期劳动力市场暴露导致的收入每增加1个百分位排名，就会与因本地童年期环境导致的收入减少0.5个百分位排名相权衡。这种模式与城市规模密切相关，因为成年期人力资本积累通常随城市规模增加而增加，而童年期人力资本积累则下降。这些不同的轨迹与城市的物理结构以及其中社会互动的性质差异有关。

papers.title: Fiscal Policy and Transition Risk
papers.authors: Stefano Carattini, Garth Heutel, Givi Melkadze, Inès Mourelon
papers.abstract: We study how climate policy can interact with distortionary fiscal policy and potentially lead to transition risk. Using an environmental dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model that features financial frictions and preexisting labor and capital taxes, we simulate a carbon tax and an abatement subsidy under different scenarios for returning carbon tax revenue or financing the subsidy. We find novel policy implications and important differences between the carbon tax and the subsidy. Under both policies, transition dynamics can differ sharply from long-run outcomes. For the carbon tax, transition dynamics depend on both financial frictions and the choice of revenue recycling. For the abatement subsidy, distortionary financing can generate contractionary transition dynamics, because of financial frictions. Macroprudential policy can mitigate transition risk under the carbon tax but has little effect under the subsidy.
papers.zh_title: 财政政策与转型风险
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了气候政策如何与扭曲性财政政策相互作用，并可能引发转型风险。利用一个包含金融摩擦和预先存在的劳动与资本税的环境动态随机一般均衡模型，我们在不同的碳税收入返还或补贴融资情景下模拟了碳税和减排补贴。我们发现了新颖的政策含义以及碳税与补贴之间的重要差异。在这两种政策下，转型动态可能与长期结果存在显著差异。对于碳税而言，转型动态既取决于金融摩擦，也取决于收入循环利用方式的选择。对于减排补贴而言，由于金融摩擦，扭曲性融资可能产生收缩性的转型动态。宏观审慎政策可以在碳税下缓解转型风险，但在补贴下效果甚微。

papers.title: Intertemporal Arbitrage and Optimal Operation of Pumped Hydro Energy Storage
papers.authors: Isabel Figuerola-Ferretti, Eduardo S. Schwartz
papers.abstract: Hydropower is a renewable and flexible energy source that provides essential storage capacity and enhances grid stability. Among storage technologies, pumped hydro energy storage (PHES) remains the most cost-effective solution for long-duration energy storage and plays a key role in power systems with increasing penetration of variable renewable energy. As electricity prices become more relevant under the energy transition, understanding the optimal operation and valuation of PHES assets is increasingly important from a financial perspective. This paper develops a market-based framework that models a PHES facility as a profit-maximizing asset operating in liberalized electricity markets. Using an optimal control approach calibrated with real life technical and operational parameters of the La Muela pumped storage plant and observed electricity prices from the Spanish wholesale market, the model derives an economically intuitive trigger (switching) price governing optimal pumping and generation decisions while accounting for reservoir water inventory dynamics and electricity price uncertainty. The results show that inventory dynamics and electricity price seasonality are central to PHES valuation and optimal operation.
papers.zh_title: 抽水蓄能的时间套利与最优运营
papers.zh_abstract: 水电是一种可再生且灵活的能源，可提供必要的储能容量并增强电网稳定性。在储能技术中，抽水蓄能（PHES）仍然是长时储能最具成本效益的解决方案，并在可再生能源渗透率日益提高的电力系统中发挥关键作用。随着能源转型下电价变得愈发重要，从金融角度理解PHES资产的最优运营和估值也日益关键。本文构建了一个基于市场的框架，将PHES设施建模为在自由化电力市场中追求利润最大化的资产。通过使用基于La Muela抽水蓄能电站真实技术和运营参数校准的最优控制方法，并结合西班牙批发市场的观测电价，该模型推导出一个经济直觉上合理的触发（切换）价格，该价格在考虑水库水量动态和电价不确定性的同时，支配最优抽水和发电决策。结果表明，水量动态和电价季节性对PHES估值和最优运营至关重要。

papers.title: Credibility and Precommitment in Socialist Constitutionalism
papers.authors: Sebastian Edwards
papers.abstract: In this paper I examine Chile’s 1972 initiative to draft a new constitution under President Salvador Allende. I analyze the political and economic circumstances that gave rise to the project and the institutional mechanisms through which the draft sought to advance a socialist economic and political program centered on state ownership of means of production and central planning. I compare the Chilean proposal with the socialist constitutions of the German Democratic Republic and Czechoslovakia. The draft, which was never submitted to a plebiscite, as Allende envisioned, subsequently disappeared and remained unavailable for nearly two decades. Remarkably, the proposal has attracted very limited scholarly attention.
papers.zh_title: 社会主义宪政中的可信度与预先承诺
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了智利1972年在萨尔瓦多·阿连德总统领导下起草新宪法的倡议。我分析了该项目产生的政治和经济背景，以及该草案试图通过以生产资料公有制和中央计划为核心的社会主义经济和政治计划来推进的制度机制。我将智利的提案与德意志民主共和国和捷克斯洛伐克的社会主义宪法进行了比较。该草案从未像阿连德设想的那样提交全民公决，随后便消失无踪，近二十年无法获取。值得注意的是，该提案吸引的学术关注非常有限。

papers.title: How do Workers Learn? Theory and Evidence on the Roots of Lifecycle Human Capital Accumulation
papers.authors: Xiao Ma, Alejandro Nakab, Daniela Vidart
papers.abstract: How do the sources of worker learning change over the lifecycle, and how does this affect human capital and wages? Using data from Germany and the US, we document that internal learning (from coworkers) decreases with experience, while external learning (on-the-job training) follows an inverted U-shape. We develop a search model featuring multiple learning sources whose returns evolve as workers age and accumulate human capital. Quantitative results indicate that the interaction between sources is key to lifecycle wage dynamics and the effects of remote work, which disrupts internal learning and early-career wage growth, though external learning partially offsets these losses.
papers.zh_title: 工人如何学习？生命周期人力资本积累根源的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 工人学习的来源如何随生命周期变化，这又如何影响人力资本和工资？利用德国和美国的数据，我们记录了内部学习（来自同事）随经验增加而减少，而外部学习（在职培训）则呈倒U型。我们构建了一个包含多种学习来源的搜索模型，这些来源的回报会随着工人年龄增长和人力资本积累而演变。定量结果表明，来源之间的相互作用是生命周期工资动态以及远程工作影响的关键，远程工作会破坏内部学习和早期职业工资增长，尽管外部学习部分抵消了这些损失。

papers.title: The Effects of GLP-1 Use on Mental Health, Self-rated Health, Employment and Marriage
papers.authors: Robert Kaestner, Cuiping Schiman
papers.abstract: In this article, we exploit the recent, rapid diffusion of the use of GLP-1 drugs among individuals with diabetes to measure the effect of the use of these drugs on mental health, self-rated health, employment, and marriage. The documented large weight loss from GLP-1 use may plausibly affect these outcomes and evidence of these broader impacts of GLP-1 use is necessary to evaluate their full value. Estimates are obtained using a longitudinal (within-person) regression approach. Results indicate that GLP-1 use is not meaningfully associated with mental health, self-rated health, employment, and marriage. Overall, our analysis adds new evidence about how GLP-1 use is affecting the lives of individuals with diabetes.
papers.zh_title: GLP-1药物使用对心理健康、自评健康、就业和婚姻的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用GLP-1药物在糖尿病患者中近期快速普及的现象，来衡量使用这些药物对心理健康、自评健康、就业和婚姻的影响。GLP-1使用所导致的显著体重减轻可能会影响这些结果，而评估GLP-1使用的这些更广泛影响的证据对于评估其全部价值是必要的。我们使用纵向（个体内）回归方法获得估计值。结果表明，GLP-1使用与心理健康、自评健康、就业和婚姻没有显著关联。总体而言，我们的分析为GLP-1使用如何影响糖尿病患者的生活增添了新的证据。

papers.title: Global Policy Spillovers: How Environmental Policies Propagate through Product Attributes
papers.authors: Koichiro Ito, James M. Sallee, Caleb Halvorson-Fried, Andrew Smith
papers.abstract: When firms design products for global markets, domestic policies can propagate internationally by inducing changes in product attributes. We call this phenomenon attribute propagation and develop a framework to assess its economic significance. Using difference-in-differences analysis and structural estimation, we find that a fuel-economy subsidy in Japan led to substantial improvements in fuel economy in the United States. The impact is first-order—most CO2 emissions reductions from the Japanese policy arise through its effects in the United States. Our findings suggest that conventional economic analysis may understate the global impacts of many economic policies.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PR；JEL：L0, Q4, Q5, R4
papers.zh_title: 全球政策溢出效应：环境政策如何通过产品属性传播
papers.zh_abstract: 当企业为全球市场设计产品时，政策制定者应如何评估政策影响？标准的经济分析通常侧重于国内结果，隐含地假设政策仅影响其实施的司法管辖区。然而，跨国公司通常会在不同市场间协调产品设计，这导致一国实施的政策可能通过产品属性的变化产生全球溢出效应。我们将这种现象称为“属性传播”，并构建了一个框架来衡量和评估其定量重要性。将该框架应用于一项影响汽车的环境政策，我们发现日本的燃油经济性补贴显著改善了在美国销售的车辆的燃油经济性。随后，我们构建了一个以跨市场成本互补性作为驱动属性传播关键机制的跨国汽车市场模型。利用估计的模型，我们进行了反事实模拟，以量化考虑政策全球溢出效应后的环境效益。我们发现全球溢出效应是一阶重要的——日本政策所导致的二氧化碳减排量大部分是通过其对美国汽车市场的影响实现的。这些发现表明，忽略属性传播的标准经济分析可能会严重低估政策的全部影响。更广泛地说，属性传播为评估全球经济中的环境、安全、反垄断和技术政策提供了新的视角。

papers.title: Making Sense of Labor Market Indicators Amid Data Imperfections
papers.authors: Scott A. Brave, Erin E. Crust, Stefano Eusepi, Bart Hobijn, Ayşegül Şahin
papers.abstract: Interpreting real-time labor market conditions is challenging because commonly used indicators are noisy, revised over time, and often send conflicting signals. In practice, policymakers and market participants describe labor market developments using a shared narrative language centered on labor demand, labor supply, and matching frictions. In this paper, we show that empirical measures of these narrative concepts can be recovered from latent factors that summarize the joint movements of a broad set of high-frequency U.S. labor-market indicators. We use ninety-four labor-market indicators, over the period from 1960 to 2026, and construct measures for labor demand, long-run labor supply, short-run labor supply, and matching efficiency by selecting the factors that satisfy a limited set of restrictions on how underlying forces map into observed data. We find that labor demand and short-run labor supply account for most of the common variation in labor-market indicators. Our results also show that assigning narrow interpretations to individual indicators can lead to misleading conclusions about underlying labor market conditions. Applying the framework to the post-pandemic period reveals that although labor demand recovered briskly after the acute phase of the pandemic, it cannot account for the large rise in vacancies and quits. Instead, movements in short-run labor supply and matching efficiency play a central role. We also show that the “soft-landing” episode from 2023 through 2025 was characterized by a joint decline in labor demand and short-run labor supply, which slowed payroll growth while generating only a moderate increase in the unemployment rate.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C32, C38, E24, E32, E58
papers.zh_title: 在数据不完美中解读劳动力市场指标
papers.zh_abstract: 解读实时劳动力市场状况颇具挑战性，因为常用指标存在噪音、会随时间修正，且常常发出相互矛盾的信号。在实践中，政策制定者和市场参与者使用围绕劳动力需求、劳动力供给和匹配摩擦的共同叙事语言来描述劳动力市场发展。在本文中，我们表明这些叙事概念的经验度量可以从总结美国大量高频劳动力市场指标共同变动的潜在因子中恢复。我们使用1960年至2026年期间的94个劳动力市场指标，通过选择满足一组关于潜在力量如何映射到观测数据的有限限制的因子，构建了劳动力需求、长期劳动力供给、短期劳动力供给和匹配效率的度量。我们发现劳动力需求和短期劳动力供给解释了劳动力市场指标中大部分的共同变动。我们的结果还表明，对单个指标进行狭隘解读可能导致对潜在劳动力市场状况的误导性结论。将该框架应用于疫情后时期，发现尽管劳动力需求在疫情急性期后迅速恢复，但它无法解释职位空缺和离职率的大幅上升。相反，短期劳动力供给和匹配效率的变动起着核心作用。我们还表明，2023年至2025年的“软着陆”阶段的特点是劳动力需求和短期劳动力供给同时下降，这减缓了薪资增长，同时仅导致失业率温和上升。

papers.title: AlphaPortfolio: Goal-Oriented Investment Management Through Deep Reinforcement Learning
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Ke Tang, Jingyuan Wang
papers.abstract: We adapt attention-based neural networks and reinforcement learning to direct portfolio construction, allowing broader portfolio-management objectives (including non-time-additively separable ones) and in a data-driven way, searching over a much richer policy/strategy space than low-dimensional parametric rules or human-specified strategies. As arguably the first non-text-based, “large” GenAI model in Finance, AlphaPortfolio accommodates long- and short-range path dependence in firm and market states (e.g., using Transformer encoder), cross-asset information, flexible (path-dependent) objectives (incl. Sharpe ratio, which is non-additively separable across periods) for end-to-end (rather than step-by-step) optimizations. In U.S. equities, AlphaPortfolio yields superior out-of-sample performance (e.g., Sharpe ratio above two and risk-adjusted alpha over 13% with monthly rebalancing) robust under various market conditions and economic restrictions (e.g., exclusion of small/illiquid stocks) and over time. The gains come from the direct construction, effective sequence modeling, and cross-asset attention network. We further demonstrate AlphaPortfolio's flexibility to incorporate transaction costs, state interactions, and alternative objectives, before developing a polynomial-feature-sensitivity analysis to uncover key drivers of performance, including their rotation and nonlinearity.
papers.zh_title: AlphaPortfolio：通过深度强化学习实现目标导向的投资管理
papers.zh_abstract: 我们采用基于注意力的神经网络和强化学习来指导投资组合构建，允许更广泛的投资组合管理目标（包括非时间可加可分的目标），并以数据驱动的方式，在比低维参数规则或人为指定策略更丰富的策略/策略空间中进行搜索。作为金融领域可以说是第一个非文本基础的“大型”生成式AI模型，AlphaPortfolio能够处理公司和市场状态中的长期和短期路径依赖性（例如，使用Transformer编码器）、跨资产信息以及灵活（路径依赖的）目标（包括夏普比率，它在各期间不可加可分），以实现端到端（而非逐步）优化。在美国股票中，AlphaPortfolio产生了卓越的样本外表现（例如，月度再平衡下夏普比率超过2，风险调整后阿尔法超过13%），在各种市场条件和经济限制（例如，排除小盘股/非流动性股票）下以及随时间推移都表现稳健。收益来自直接构建、有效的序列建模和跨资产注意力网络。我们进一步展示了AlphaPortfolio在纳入交易成本、状态交互和替代目标方面的灵活性，随后开发了一种多项式特征敏感性分析，以揭示绩效的关键驱动因素，包括其轮动和非线性。

papers.title: The Sisyphean Pursuit of Evidence for Poverty Traps
papers.authors: Dean Karlan, Amol Singh Raswan, Christopher R. Udry
papers.abstract: Much of development economics, both micro and macro, posits theories and explores the empirics of poverty traps. A common theory centers around asset-threshold poverty traps in which marginal returns to capital increase sharply over a certain threshold and financial markets are incomplete. This combination leads households above this threshold to prosper while those below continuously fall back, trapped in poverty. Yet in economics, as best as we can tell, far more papers assume such thresholds than empirically demonstrate them. In a key recent exception, Balboni et al. (2022) (hereinafter “BBBGH”) argues that data from Bangladesh identifies clear evidence of such a threshold at slightly above the cost of a cow for recent recipients of a big push transfer program. We apply this analysis to data from seven other similar programs in low-income countries and find no evidence of an asset-threshold poverty trap. We then return to BBBGH and argue that their data do not support the identification of a poverty trap, with the point of disagreement being a log-transformation challenge and a potential geographic confound. In long-term representative rural panel data from Bangladesh and Ghana we find no evidence of divergence away from any particular threshold. While the threshold theory is undoubtedly true for some households, we argue that the pursuit of clear evidence of an asset-threshold poverty trap for a broad population is likely an aspirational goal rendered unachievable by the intersection of a multitude of possible mechanisms as well as heterogeneous agents.
papers.zh_title: 为贫困陷阱寻找证据的西西弗斯式追求
papers.zh_abstract: 发展经济学的大部分研究，无论是微观还是宏观，都提出了贫困陷阱的理论并探索其经验证据。一个常见的理论围绕资产阈值贫困陷阱展开，在该陷阱中，资本的边际回报在超过某个阈值后急剧增加，且金融市场不完善。这种组合导致高于此阈值的家庭繁荣，而低于此阈值的家庭则持续倒退，陷入贫困陷阱。然而，在经济学中，据我们所知，假设存在此类阈值的论文远多于经验证明其存在的论文。在最近一个关键例外中，Balboni等人 (2022)（以下简称“BBBGH”）认为，来自孟加拉国的数据为近期接受大推动转移支付项目的受助者识别出了略高于一头牛成本的明确阈值证据。我们将此分析应用于低收入国家其他七个类似项目的数据，并未发现资产阈值贫困陷阱的证据。然后，我们回到BBBGH，认为他们的数据并不支持贫困陷阱的识别，分歧点在于对数转换挑战和潜在的地理混杂因素。在来自孟加拉国和加纳的长期代表性农村面板数据中，我们没有发现偏离任何特定阈值的分化证据。虽然阈值理论对某些家庭无疑是正确的，但我们认为，为广泛人群寻找资产阈值贫困陷阱的明确证据很可能是一个因多种可能机制与异质性主体的交织而无法实现的理想目标。

papers.title: Distribution Costs
papers.authors: Cian Ruane, Alessandra Peter
papers.abstract: We provide the first direct estimates of distribution expenses incurred by manufacturing plants and quantify their importance for aggregate consumption and measured misallocation. Using a novel measure from the Indian Annual Survey of Industries, we document three facts: distribution expenses amount to over half of labor costs, are over three times larger as a share of sales for plants in the largest decile relative to the smallest, and declined by one third from 2000 to 2010. We develop a model of heterogeneous manufacturing firms that rely on distribution services to sell across space. The improvements in distribution over that time period raised manufacturing consumption by 24.5%. The gains materialize quickly, but unevenly: large firms expand while many small local firms shrink or exit. Distribution costs also matter for measured misallocation: standard TFPR measures generate spurious dispersion and a positive relationship with size. In the ASI, accounting for distribution costs lowers measured TFPR dispersion by 5.1% and the elasticity of TFPR with respect to plant size by 7.0%.
papers.zh_title: 分销成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了制造业工厂所产生分销费用的首次直接估计，并量化了其对总消费和测算资源错配的重要性。利用来自印度年度工业调查的一个新颖指标，我们记录了三个事实：分销费用超过劳动力成本的一半；对于最大十分位数的工厂，其占销售额的比例是最小十分位数工厂的三倍以上；并且从2000年到2010年下降了三分之一。我们建立了一个异质性制造业企业的模型，这些企业依赖分销服务在空间上进行销售。在此期间分销的改善使制造业消费提高了24.5%。这些收益迅速实现，但并不均衡：大型企业扩张，而许多小型本地企业收缩或退出。分销成本对测算的资源错配也很重要：标准的TFPR指标会产生虚假的离散度以及与规模的正相关关系。在ASI中，考虑分销成本后，测算的TFPR离散度降低了5.1%，TFPR相对于工厂规模的弹性降低了7.0%。

papers.title: The Word Is Not Enough: Testing the Effects of Information Treatments on Perceived Corruption in Ukraine
papers.authors: Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Ilona Sologoub, Yuriy Fedyk
papers.abstract: Using a representative sample of more than 7,000 Ukrainians, we study how information treatments affect corruption perceptions and prosocial behavior. We document a large gap between perceived and experienced corruption: while most respondents view corruption as widespread and a major national problem, far fewer report direct exposure.
