papers.zh_abstract: 可穿戴脑电图技术的出现为识别和量化实时、高财务影响环境中的决策神经关联提供了新机遇。我们报告了一项实地研究，使用可穿戴脑电图设备记录专业日内交易者在真实高风险交易中的脑电波活动。利用这些信号，我们构建了已确立的心理生理学参与指数，定义为贝塔波功率除以阿尔法波与西塔波功率之和，并记录了交易执行前后清晰的尖峰-衰减模式。将参与指数动态与交易绩效关联，我们发现更成功的交易在执行前30秒内伴随更大的参与指数尖峰，而基线或背景参与指数水平无预测能力，甚至与绩效负相关。我们进一步证明，较高的参与指数与交易中行为偏差的减弱相关，包括整数启发式和处置效应。

papers.title: Safer Driving for a Price: Evidence on Behavior and Habits in Kenyan Minibuses
papers.authors: David Schönholzer, Gregory Lane, Erin M. Kelley
papers.abstract: Road traffic injuries are the leading cause of death among people aged 5–29. Where traffic laws are weakly enforced, it is unclear whether road safety interventions can change behavior. We run a randomized controlled trial among 203 Kenyan minibuses, testing whether an incentive scheme improves safety overall or merely shifts unsafe driving to unmonitored times. Drivers reduce speeding by 29 percent and harsh braking by 13 percent, improving a safety index by 0.096 standard deviations. Labor-supply and earnings effects are modest, with little displacement across times or places. Improvements fade quickly, suggesting lasting change requires sustained enforcement or stronger incentives.
papers.zh_title: 付费安全驾驶：肯尼亚小巴司机的行为与习惯证据
papers.zh_abstract: 道路交通伤害是5-29岁人群的首要死因。在交通法规执行薄弱的环境中，道路安全干预措施能否改变行为尚不明确。我们对203辆肯尼亚小巴开展随机对照试验，检验激励计划是全面改善安全，还是仅将危险驾驶转移至无监控时段。结果显示，司机超速行为减少29%，急刹车减少13%，安全指数提升0.096个标准差。劳动力供给与收入效应温和，且未发现显著的时间或空间替代效应。但改善效果迅速消退，表明持久改变需要持续执法或更强激励。

papers.title: Wealth Inequality and Safe Asset Demand
papers.authors: Xuning Ding, Zhengyang Jiang
papers.abstract: We study how wealth inequality shapes safe-asset demand in heterogeneous-agent economies. Asset bubbles arise when agents face sufficiently high probabilities of falling into extreme poverty. In such cases, assets insulated from idiosyncratic risk become infinitely large relative to agents' wealth ex-post, which makes them infinitely valuable ex-ante. This mechanism is fundamentally different from classic rational bubbles, generates bubbles even under stationary wealth distributions, and requires no aggregate uncertainty or growth. Using this insight, we revisit the pricing of aggregate assets in standard heterogeneous-agent economies, and show that prior analyses may be incomplete due to overlooked possibility of transversality condition violation.
papers.zh_title: 财富不平等与安全资产需求
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究异质性主体经济中财富不平等如何塑造安全资产需求。当主体面临足够高的极端贫困风险时，资产泡沫便会出现。在此情形下，免受异质性风险冲击的资产事后相对于主体财富变得无限大，从而使其事前价值趋于无穷。这一机制与经典理性泡沫存在本质差异，即便在稳态财富分布下也能产生泡沫，且无需总体不确定性或经济增长。基于此洞见，我们重新审视标准异质性主体经济中总体资产的定价问题，并表明先前分析可能因忽视横截条件违反的可能性而存在不完整性。

papers.title: Immigration, Innovation, and the Geography of Growth
papers.authors: Costas Arkolakis, Sun Kyoung Lee, Michael Peters
papers.abstract: Between 1880 and 1920, more than 20 million immigrants settled in the United States. We study how this migration wave affected innovation and growth. Using a newly constructed dataset linking individual census records to historical immigration records and the universe of US patents, we highlight a new channel through which immigrants contributed to growth: they disproportionately settled in urban innovation hubs. To quantify the aggregate and regional effects of this mass migration episode, we develop a new spatial growth model in which skilled workers have a comparative advantage in innovation and sort endogenously across space. We find that international arrivals after 1880 raised US income per capita by 8.2% by 1940. Removing the subsequent immigration restrictions of the 1920s would have raised income per capita by a further 1.7% by 2000. Immigrants' skill composition and their concentration in urban hubs are key drivers of these effects.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, ITI；JEL：N91, O11, O30, R13
papers.zh_title: 移民、创新与增长的地理格局
papers.zh_abstract: 1880年至1920年间，超过2000万移民定居美国。我们研究此次移民浪潮对创新与增长的影响。通过构建将个人普查记录、历史移民记录与美国全部专利数据相链接的新数据集，我们揭示了移民促进增长的新渠道：他们不成比例地聚集于城市创新中心。为量化此次大规模移民事件的总体与区域效应，我们构建了新的空间增长模型，其中技能工人在创新方面具有比较优势，并在空间上内生分类。研究发现，1880年后的国际移民使1940年美国人均收入提高8.2%。若取消1920年代的后续移民限制，2000年人均收入将进一步增长1.7%。移民的技能构成及其在城市中心的集聚是这些效应的关键驱动因素。

papers.title: Government Funding Costs Under Financial Repression
papers.authors: Roberto Gómez-Cram, Howard Kung, Hanno Lustig, David Zeke
papers.abstract: We study the equilibrium effects of financial repression on government funding costs in an endowment economy with limited asset market participation. We show how a broad set of repression policies operates through a wedge in the Euler equation responsive to government size or by affecting fiscal redistribution between agents. Repression intensity is captured by a policy feedback rule that depends positively on net government spending. When fiscal policy is profligate and monetary policy accommodates, we show that such a repression policy raises bond values, reduces the inflationary cost of unfunded fiscal expansions, and lowers bond risk premia. Repression is not a free lunch for bondholders---they pay a lower inflation tax but also earn lower future real returns. When monetary policy does not accommodate fiscal policy, repression can provide stopgap funding for deficits, allowing the central bank to retain control over inflation while making government debt a hedge for fiscal inflation.
papers.zh_title: 金融抑制下的政府融资成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在有限资产市场参与的禀赋经济中研究金融抑制对政府融资成本的均衡效应。我们展示了广泛的抑制政策如何通过响应政府规模的欧拉方程楔子，或通过影响主体间的财政再分配来发挥作用。抑制强度由正向依赖于净政府支出的政策反馈规则刻画。当财政政策挥霍且货币政策宽松时，此类抑制政策会提升债券价值，降低无资金支持的财政扩张的通胀成本，并压低债券风险溢价。抑制对债券持有人并非免费午餐——他们支付较低的通胀税，但未来实际回报也较低。当货币政策不配合财政政策时，抑制可为赤字提供临时融资，使央行在保持通胀控制的同时，让政府债务成为财政通胀的对冲工具。

papers.title: Pricing and Production Without the Invisible Hand
papers.authors: Joel P. Flynn, George Nikolakoudis, Karthik Sastry
papers.abstract: Modern theories of the business cycle do not allow for the simultaneous rational choice of both prices and quantities, instead assuming that an “invisible hand” determines one of these variables to clear markets. In this paper, we develop a macroeconomic model in which both prices and quantities are chosen optimally by firms and exchange is both voluntary and efficient. As a consequence, individual markets will generically be in Walrasian disequilibrium: either slack (over-supplied) or rationed (under-supplied). The absence of market clearing changes pricing and production in qualitatively important ways: markups are governed by the probability of rationing rather than the elasticity of demand, and higher uncertainty reduces production and increases markups. Marrying the Old and New Keynesian traditions, we study general Walrasian disequilibrium with rational expectations and optimal firm decisions. On a technical level, we characterize cross-market spillovers arising from rationed demand with differentiated goods, overcoming the standard combinatorial problem that arises when studying multi-market disequilibrium. Unlike in New Keynesian economies, monetary shocks propagate by reducing product-market slack, raising aggregate labor productivity and consumption with muted effects on employment, while uncertainty shocks act as stagflationary cost-push shocks.
papers.zh_title: 没有看不见的手的定价与生产
papers.zh_abstract: 现代商业周期理论不允许价格与数量的同时理性选择，而是假设“看不见的手”决定其中一个变量以出清市场。本文构建了企业同时最优选择价格与数量、且交换既自愿又有效的宏观经济模型。因此，单个市场通常处于瓦尔拉斯非均衡状态：要么松弛（供给过剩），要么配给（供给不足）。市场出清的缺失以重要的定性方式改变了定价与生产：加成率由配给概率而非需求弹性决定，更高的不确定性会降低产量并提高加成率。融合旧凯恩斯主义与新凯恩斯主义传统，我们研究具有理性预期与企业最优决策的一般瓦尔拉斯非均衡。在技术层面，我们刻画了差异化商品配给需求产生的跨市场溢出效应，克服了研究多市场非均衡时面临的标准组合问题。与新凯恩斯经济不同，货币冲击通过减少产品市场松弛来传导，提高总体劳动生产率和消费，但对就业影响温和；而不确定性冲击则充当滞胀型成本推动冲击。

papers.title: International Risk-Sharing in a Fragmented World
papers.authors: Javier Bianchi, Sebastian Horn, Giovanni Rosso, César Sosa-Padilla
papers.abstract: This paper studies how geopolitical risk shapes financial fragmentation and international risk-sharing, using bilateral official lending data from 1910 to 2024. We document that when geopolitical risk is high, bilateral lending increasingly follows geopolitical alignment. Because geopolitically aligned countries experience more synchronized shocks, this fragmentation limits the effectiveness of international risk-sharing. To rationalize these patterns, we introduce geopolitical considerations into a limited-commitment model of sovereign borrowing. The model shows that, even with non-discriminatory default, higher geopolitical tensions redirect international lending toward allied countries and weaken risk-sharing.
papers.zh_title: 碎片化世界中的国际风险分担
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用1910年至2024年的双边官方贷款数据，研究地缘政治风险如何塑造金融碎片化与国际风险分担。我们记录到，当地缘政治风险高企时，双边贷款日益遵循地缘政治联盟。由于地缘政治联盟国家面临更同步的冲击，这种碎片化限制了国际风险分担的有效性。为解释这些模式，我们将地缘政治因素引入有限承诺的主权借贷模型。模型表明，即使存在非歧视性违约，更高的地缘政治紧张局势也会将国际贷款引向盟国，并削弱风险分担。

papers.title: Fragmentation of Shareholder Power
papers.authors: Andrey Malenko, Nadya Malenko, Anton Tsoy
papers.abstract: The asset management industry is increasingly shifting toward tailored portfolios, fund proliferation, and decentralization of stewardship—trends partly driven by growing heterogeneity in investor preferences. While these developments better align investment products with investor demands, they also reshape ownership structures, potentially leading to more fragmented ownership and weaker managerial oversight. We develop a framework to evaluate these trade-offs and show that fund proliferation does not necessarily weaken governance: Stronger incentives for asset managers and concentrated portfolios of specialized funds can offset these effects, especially when investor preferences are intense. However, strong investor preferences can also induce asset managers to compete on a new margin—granting investors control by decentralizing stewardship and adopting pass-through voting—without internalizing the associated governance costs.
papers.zh_title: 股东权力的碎片化
papers.zh_abstract: 资产管理行业正日益转向定制化投资组合、基金数量激增以及管理权分散化——这些趋势部分源于投资者偏好的异质性增强。虽然这些发展使投资产品更好地契合投资者需求，但也重塑了所有权结构，可能导致所有权更加分散和管理层监督弱化。我们构建了一个评估这些权衡的框架，并表明基金数量激增并不必然削弱治理：更强的资产管理人激励和专业化基金的集中投资组合可以抵消这些影响，尤其是在投资者偏好强烈的情况下。然而，强烈的投资者偏好也可能促使资产管理人在一个新的维度上展开竞争——通过分散管理权和采用传递投票将控制权让渡给投资者，而无需内化相关的治理成本。

papers.title: GLP-1–Induced Weight Loss and the Female Obesity Penalty
papers.authors: Rebecca Diamond
papers.abstract: GLP-1 medications generate large weight loss and may also alter social and economic outcomes. Using the Understanding America Study, I compare women starting GLP-1s for weight loss with matched women who would like to start a GLP-1 but have not. Single women’s marriage/cohabitation rates rise by 29 percentage points and employment among baseline non-employed women rises 27 percentage points after six or more quarters. Existing partnerships do not dissolve, and already-employed women show no upward job mobility. The pattern suggests that part of the female obesity penalty operates at new-match formation rather than only through health or incumbent productivity.
papers.zh_title: GLP-1诱导的体重减轻与女性肥胖惩罚
papers.zh_abstract: GLP-1药物能产生显著的体重减轻效果，并可能改变社会和经济结果。利用《美国理解研究》数据，我将开始使用GLP-1减肥的女性与匹配的、希望开始使用但尚未使用的女性进行比较。单身女性的结婚/同居率上升了29个百分点，基线未就业女性的就业率在六个季度或更长时间后上升了27个百分点。现有伴侣关系并未解体，而已就业女性未表现出向上职业流动性。这一模式表明，女性肥胖惩罚的一部分作用于新匹配的形成，而非仅通过健康或现有生产力渠道。

papers.title: Openness, Integration, and the International Monetary Order
papers.authors: Tarek Alexander Hassan, Thomas M. Mertens, Jingye Wang, Tony Zhang
papers.abstract: This paper develops a calibrated general-equilibrium model to study how different configurations of trade and financial policy reshape the hierarchy of global currencies—and the U.S. dollar's position at its anchor. Currency safety and anchor status arise endogenously from each economy's 'effective size'—the weight its domestic shocks carry in setting world prices. Tariffs reduce this effective size on the goods side; capital controls do the same on the financial side. A unifying result emerges: The economy that maintains the deepest integration with the global trading network retains the largest safety premium and gains anchor status. We use this framework to evaluate the effects of three policy levers for Europe that affect the effective size of the euro: internal harmonization and enlargement, trade openness, and capital-account openness. The stakes are large: In our model, shifts in currencies' safety can redirect global capital flows and alter sovereign borrowing costs by hundreds of billions of dollars annually.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：F13, F31, F33, F36, F38, F41, G15
papers.zh_title: 开放、一体化与国际货币秩序
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个校准的一般均衡模型，研究贸易和金融政策的不同配置如何重塑全球货币的层级结构——以及美元在其锚定地位中的位置。货币安全性和锚定地位内生地源于每个经济体的“有效规模”——即其国内冲击在设定世界价格时的权重。关税在商品侧降低有效规模；资本管制在金融侧产生相同效果。一个统一的结果出现：与全球贸易网络保持最深度一体化的经济体保留最大的安全性溢价并获得锚定地位。我们利用这一框架评估欧洲影响欧元有效规模的三个政策杠杆的效果：内部协调与扩张、贸易开放度和资本账户开放度。其影响巨大：在我们的模型中，货币安全性的变化可以重新引导全球资本流动，并每年改变数千亿美元的主权借贷成本。

papers.title: The Fragility of Semi-Liquid Private Credit Funds
papers.authors: Chuck Fang, Itay Goldstein, Yao Zeng
papers.abstract: We study fragility in semi-liquid private credit funds, which have expanded rapidly and now manage over $300 billion in assets. These funds perform liquidity transformation by holding far more illiquid loans than traditional loan mutual funds while allowing investors to redeem at NAV through quarterly repurchase offers, typically capped at 5% of shares outstanding. We show that cash buffers and contractual loan repayments are insufficient to fund repeated 5% quarterly redemptions; inflows decline precisely when outflows rise; and net outflows are met with sales of illiquid loans, external borrowing, and delayed payments through repurchases payable. As a result, strategic complementarity arises, because redemptions impose liquidation and leverage costs on the remaining investors. We show that loan liquidation, leverage increase, and NAV inflation play an important role in amplifying the current episodes of run-like redemptions. Overall, our evidence suggests that quarterly gates and redemption caps do not eliminate run-like fragility in semi-liquid private credit funds, raising cautions about expanding retail access to private credit markets.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：G01, G11, G23, G32
papers.zh_title: 半流动私募信贷基金的脆弱性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究半流动私募信贷基金的脆弱性，这类基金迅速扩张，目前管理资产超过3000亿美元。这些基金通过持有比传统贷款共同基金多得多的非流动贷款来进行流动性转换，同时允许投资者通过季度回购要约（通常上限为流通股的5%）按资产净值赎回。我们表明，现金缓冲和合同贷款偿还不足以支持重复的5%季度赎回；资金流入恰在流出增加时下降；净流出通过出售非流动贷款、外部借款以及通过应付回购延迟支付来应对。因此，战略互补性出现，因为赎回对剩余投资者施加了清算和杠杆成本。我们表明，贷款清算、杠杆增加和资产净值膨胀在放大当前类似挤兑的赎回事件中发挥了重要作用。总体而言，我们的证据表明，季度门槛和赎回上限并未消除半流动私募信贷基金中类似挤兑的脆弱性，这引发了对扩大零售投资者进入私募信贷市场的谨慎态度。

papers.title: When Medicaid Pays the Bill: Routine Vision Benefits, Eye Care Use, and Eyeglasses Spending Among Dual-eligible Medicare Enrollees
papers.authors: Michel H. Boudreaux, Brandy Lipton, Melissa McInerney
papers.abstract: Vision problems are prevalent among Medicare beneficiaries, with the majority having treatable conditions including uncorrected refractive error and cataracts. However, traditional Medicare does not cover routine eye exams or eyeglasses, and Medicare Advantage supplemental vision benefits often include low annual limits. We examine the effects of Medicaid routine vision benefits among adults dually eligible for Medicare and Medicaid, a population with high rates of vision impairment, morbidity, and disability. Using 2002-2019 Medicare Current Beneficiary Survey data and a difference-in-differences design, we estimate that Medicaid routine vision benefits increase past-year eye exams, eyeglasses purchases, and Medicaid spending on eyeglasses while reducing out-of-pocket spending. We also find suggestive evidence of spillovers to Medicare Advantage spending on eyeglasses, consistent with Medicaid routine vision coverage inducing additional eyeglasses purchases among Medicare Advantage enrollees with supplemental vision benefits, although estimates are modest.
papers.zh_title: 当医疗补助买单：双重资格医疗保险受益人的常规视力福利、眼科服务使用与眼镜支出
papers.zh_abstract: 视力问题在医疗保险受益人中普遍存在，大多数人患有可治疗的疾病，包括未矫正的屈光不正和白内障。然而，传统医疗保险不覆盖常规眼科检查或眼镜，而医疗保险优势补充视力福利通常包含较低的年度限额。我们研究了医疗补助常规视力福利对同时符合医疗保险和医疗补助资格的成年人的影响，这一人群视力障碍、发病率和残疾率较高。利用2002-2019年医疗保险当前受益人调查数据和双重差分设计，我们估计医疗补助常规视力福利增加了过去一年的眼科检查、眼镜购买和医疗补助眼镜支出，同时减少了自付支出。我们还发现了向医疗保险优势眼镜支出溢出效应的提示性证据，这与医疗补助常规视力覆盖诱导医疗保险优势参保人额外购买眼镜（即使他们有补充视力福利）一致，尽管估计值较为温和。

papers.title: Unilateral-Veto Mechanisms
papers.authors: Quitzé Valenzuela-Stookey, E. Jason Baron, Richard Lombardo
papers.abstract: Unilateral vetoes, in which an agent takes an action that restricts the set of possible outcomes for themselves independent of what other agents do, are a frequently used tool in real-world approaches to multi-dimensional screening. We study how this tool works in a class of task-allocation problems. We characterize obvious strategy-proofness of unilateral-veto mechanisms, yielding structural insights into how veto rights shape incentives: obviously strategy-proof mechanisms consist of diverse menus of narrowly defined rights. We then examine the potential of this simple class of mechanisms as a practical market-design tool and provide empirical evidence of their efficacy in two applications.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PE；JEL：C78, D47, D61, D82, J45
papers.zh_title: 单边否决机制
papers.zh_abstract: 单边否决——即代理人采取一项行动，独立于其他代理人的行为，限制自身可能结果集——是现实世界中多维筛选问题的常用工具。我们研究该工具在一类任务分配问题中的运作方式。我们刻画了单边否决机制的明显策略防伪性，从而得出关于否决权如何塑造激励的结构性见解：明显策略防伪机制由多样化的狭义权利菜单组成。然后，我们考察了这类简单机制作为实用市场设计工具的潜力，并提供了其在两个应用中有效性的实证证据。

papers.title: When GDP Misleads: Inferring Living Standards from the Value of a Statistical Life
papers.authors: Philip Trammell, Charles I. Jones
papers.abstract: Real GDP per person is a widely used proxy for living standards, but it can be a poor welfare measure when new goods or quality improvements matter, when nonmarket goods are significant, and when preferences are nonhomothetic --- all of which are true in practice. We propose an alternative that is robust to these concerns: under weak conditions, the growth rate of the value of a statistical life (VSL), together with standard Euler-equation objects, identifies the growth rate of lifetime utility. The intuition is that people routinely trade off consumption against mortality risk, and their willingness to pay for small risk reductions reveals the value of remaining lifetime utility. Implementing this approach for the United States suggests that lifetime utility may have risen by more than a factor of five since 1940, whereas conventional consumption-based calculations using a stable log/CRRA flow utility imply much smaller gains, on the order of a doubling. This calculation is sensitive to measures of the growth rate of the VSL, the rate of time preference, and the interest rate. For example, if the correct interest rate is 4 percentage points higher than the T-bill rate, then lifetime utility would be measured to have declined by more than half since 1940.
papers.zh_title: 当GDP误导时：从统计生命价值推断生活水平
papers.zh_abstract: 人均实际GDP是广泛使用的生活水平代理指标，但当新产品或质量改进重要、非市场商品显著且偏好非位似时——这些在现实中均成立——它可能成为糟糕的福利度量。我们提出一种对这些担忧具有稳健性的替代方案：在弱条件下，统计生命价值（VSL）的增长率与标准欧拉方程对象共同识别终身效用的增长率。其直觉在于，人们通常用消费来权衡死亡风险，而他们为微小风险降低的支付意愿揭示了剩余终身效用的价值。在美国应用该方法表明，自1940年以来终身效用可能增长了五倍以上，而使用稳定对数/CRRA流动效用的传统消费计算则显示小得多的增长，大约翻倍。该计算对VSL增长率、时间偏好率和利率的度量敏感。例如，若正确利率比国库券利率高4个百分点，则自1940年以来终身效用将被测度为下降超过一半。

papers.title: Dynamic Individuals, Static Neighborhoods: Migration and Earnings Changes in Poor Neighborhoods
papers.authors: Andrew Garin, Ethan Jenkins, Evan E. Mast, Bryan A. Stuart
papers.abstract: This paper studies migration and earnings dynamics in poor neighborhoods using new administrative data linking residential location and earnings. Out-migration rates are higher in poor neighborhoods than elsewhere, and the majority of people who leave a poor neighborhood move to a richer one. Residents of poor neighborhoods also see significant earnings mobility, with average growth rates similar to richer areas. Estimates based on idiosyncratic, firm-specific pay changes show that increases in earnings are linked to migration to better neighborhoods. This results in the earnings of the cohort who lived in a poor neighborhood at baseline growing more than twice as fast as the earnings of these neighborhoods' contemporaneous residents. Overall, our results highlight an underappreciated reason why poor neighborhoods stay poor: initial residents whose earnings grow tend to move away.
papers.zh_title: 动态个体、静态社区：贫困社区的迁移与收入变化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用连接居住地与收入的新行政数据研究贫困社区的迁移与收入动态。贫困社区的迁出率高于其他地区，且离开贫困社区的大多数人迁往更富裕地区。贫困社区居民也经历显著的收入流动性，平均增长率与富裕地区相似。基于特质性、企业特定薪酬变化的估计显示，收入增长与向更好社区的迁移相关。这导致基线时居住在贫困社区的队列收入增长速度是这些社区同期居民收入增长速度的两倍以上。总体而言，我们的结果突出了一个未被充分认识的原因：初始居民收入增长者倾向于搬离，导致贫困社区持续贫困。

papers.title: Health Care Reform and Firm Dynamics: Evidence from Medicare Part D and the Retail Pharmacy Industry
papers.authors: Brandyn F. Churchill, Georgina Cisneros, Kelli R. Marquardt
papers.abstract: Health care reforms are often enacted before implementation, creating uncertainty that can shape firms’ decisions. We examine how Medicare Part D affected the retail pharmacy industry using 2000-2009 establishment-level data, leveraging the fact that Part D disproportionately affected counties with larger elderly populations. Consistent with predictions from a conceptual model in which pre-implementation uncertainty discourages entry and lower post-implementation margins prevent full recovery, we find that Part D was associated with a 5-percent reduction in pharmacies, driven by fewer openings rather than more closures. We also find suggestive evidence that reduced pharmacy access dampened Part D’s mortality benefits.
papers.zh_title: 医疗改革与企业动态：来自Medicare D部分和零售药房行业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗改革常在实施前颁布，由此产生的不确定性可能影响企业决策。我们利用2000-2009年机构层面数据，基于D部分对老年人口比例较大县的影响不成比例这一事实，考察Medicare D部分如何影响零售药房行业。与概念模型预测一致——实施前的不确定性抑制进入，实施后较低的利润率阻止完全恢复——我们发现D部分与药房数量减少5%相关，这由新开业减少而非关闭增加驱动。我们还发现暗示性证据表明，药房可及性降低削弱了D部分的死亡率收益。

papers.title: Leaning Against Inflation Experiences
papers.authors: Stefan Nagel
papers.abstract: A large share of secular variation in real interest rates can be understood as the effect of monetary policy leaning against experience-based long-run inflation expectations. Survey microdata show that adaptive learning from experienced inflation generates highly persistent, slow-moving long-run inflation expectations. When expectations are shaped by experience, central banks cannot anchor them through communication. Instead, when expectations deviate from the inflation target, monetary policy must remain persistently hawkish or dovish to generate realized inflation outcomes that, through agents’ belief updating, gradually pull long-run expectations back toward the target. Consistent with this mechanism, I find a strong positive relationship between experience-based long-run inflation expectations and real interest rates in the U.S., Germany, the U.K., and Japan. Under their subjective expectations, private-sector agents do not anticipate future reversals in inflation and short-term real interest rates. As a result, long-term real interest rates move with experience-based long-run inflation expectations about as much as short-term real interest rates do, consistent with the data. Secular movements in real rates are also accompanied by persistent patterns in interest-rate forecast errors. Overall, the interaction of monetary policy and learning from experience generates a distinct source of secular real-rate variation, beyond movements in the natural rate of interest.
papers.zh_title: 对抗通胀经历
papers.zh_abstract: 实际利率的长期变动中很大一部分可理解为货币政策对抗基于经验的长期通胀预期的效果。调查微观数据显示，从经历通胀中适应性学习产生高度持久、缓慢变动的长期通胀预期。当预期由经历塑造时，央行无法通过沟通锚定预期。相反，当预期偏离通胀目标时，货币政策必须持续鹰派或鸽派，以产生实际通胀结果，通过代理人的信念更新逐步将长期预期拉回目标。与该机制一致，我发现美国、德国、英国和日本基于经验的长期通胀预期与实际利率之间存在强正相关关系。在其主观预期下，私人部门代理人并未预期未来通胀和短期实际利率的反转。因此，长期实际利率与基于经验的长期通胀预期的变动幅度与短期实际利率大致相同，与数据一致。实际利率的长期变动还伴随着利率预测误差的持续模式。总体而言，货币政策与从经历中学习的相互作用产生了实际利率变动的独特长期来源，超越了自然利率的变动。

papers.title: The Incredible Flexibility of Moment Matching
papers.authors: Isaiah Andrews, Bas Sanders
papers.abstract: We ask how far the choice of which moments to match can push estimates in misspecified structural models. The answer is: very far. Under regularity conditions, an adversarial researcher informed about the data distribution can choose moments that render any parameter value the unique solution to the population moment-matching problem. Moreover, in many cases they can do so with little increase in model-implied standard errors relative to maximum likelihood. We illustrate both results in a menu-cost model.
papers.zh_title: 矩匹配的惊人灵活性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探究在错误设定的结构模型中，选择匹配哪些矩能将估计结果推向多远。答案是：非常远。在正则条件下，了解数据分布的对立研究者可以选择矩，使得任何参数值成为总体矩匹配问题的唯一解。此外，在许多情况下，他们可以在模型隐含标准误相对于最大似然法几乎不增加的情况下做到这一点。我们在菜单成本模型中展示了这两个结果。

papers.title: Labor Market Responses to Tariffs: Frictions, Dynamics, and Policy Responses
papers.authors: Rafael Dix-Carneiro, Brian K. Kovak
papers.abstract: This article introduces the evidence and associated modeling frameworks contemporary economists use to understand the effects of trade and trade policy on labor markets, with a particular emphasis on labor-market frictions and adjustment dynamics. The effects of trade shocks differ across industries, regions, and occupations, implying the presence of important adjustment frictions in labor markets, and these effects evolve slowly over time, implying the need for dynamic frameworks rationalizing slow transitions. After reviewing the key insights from this literature, we discuss policies aimed at mitigating costs to workers and ensuring that the gains from trade are shared more equitably.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：F11, F14, F16, F62, F66
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场对关税的反应：摩擦、动态与政策应对
papers.zh_abstract: 本文介绍当代经济学家用于理解贸易和贸易政策对劳动力市场影响的相关证据及建模框架，特别强调劳动力市场摩擦和调整动态。贸易冲击的影响因行业、地区和职业而异，意味着劳动力市场中存在重要的调整摩擦，且这些影响随时间缓慢演变，意味着需要能够合理解释缓慢转型的动态框架。在回顾该文献的关键见解后，我们讨论了旨在减轻工人成本并确保贸易收益更公平分享的政策。

papers.title: Prices Versus Quantities Revisited: What Do Policymakers Need to Know to Set Pigouvian Taxes and Subsidies?
papers.authors: Denise Dipasquale, Edward L. Glaeser, Adam M. Guren, Paul S. Willen
papers.abstract: What information do policymakers need to design Pigouvian taxes or subsidies? Standard logic suggests that it is sufficient to know the size of the externality and unnecessary to know about quantities. Yet this logic is incorrect if interventions have fixed costs, taxes create deadweight losses, or there are distributional concerns. We present a model in which these considerations can make it more valuable for policymakers to learn about equilibrium quantities. We apply the model to congestion pricing, which has high fixed costs, and to a proposed housing subsidy in Boston that features deadweight losses and distributional concerns.
papers.zh_title: 价格与数量再审视：政策制定者设定庇古税与补贴需要了解什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 政策制定者设计庇古税或补贴需要哪些信息？标准逻辑认为，只需知道外部性的大小，无需了解数量。然而，如果干预措施存在固定成本、税收造成无谓损失或存在分配问题，这一逻辑便不成立。我们构建了一个模型，其中这些因素可能使政策制定者了解均衡数量变得更有价值。我们将该模型应用于具有高固定成本的拥堵定价，以及波士顿一项拟议的住房补贴（该补贴涉及无谓损失和分配问题）。

papers.title: Compensation vs. Reinforcement: Experimental Identification of Parental Aversion to Inequality in Offspring
papers.authors: Felipe Barrera-Osorio, Leonardo Bonilla-Mejía, Matias Busso, Sebastian Galiani, Hyunjae Kang, Juan S. Muñoz-Morales, Juan Pantano
papers.abstract: Parents may invest differently across children by compensating the disadvantaged child or by reinforcing the child with higher expected returns. We study this question using a conditional cash transfer experiment that uniquely randomized transfers at the student level, generating exogenous variation in transfer exposure across siblings within the same household. The transfers increased short-run attendance among treated students but generated negative spillovers on untreated siblings: untreated siblings of treated students were 3.7 percentage points less likely to graduate from college, a decline of about 30 percent relative to the control mean. We interpret these effects using a dynamic model of household schooling decisions that identifies parental aversion to inequality in children’s educational outcomes. The estimated model implies limited aversion to inequality in children’s educational outcomes and reproduces held-out treatment effects not used in estimation. A decomposition shows that the negative spillover is primarily driven by substitution in educational investments toward the treated child.
papers.zh_title: 补偿与强化：父母对子女不平等厌恶的实验识别
papers.zh_abstract: 父母可能通过补偿弱势子女或强化预期回报较高的子女来差异化投资。我们利用一项在学生层面随机分配转移支付的现金转移实验，在同一家庭内部兄弟姐妹间产生转移暴露的外生变异。转移支付提高了受助学生的短期出勤率，但对未受助兄弟姐妹产生了负面溢出效应：受助学生的未受助兄弟姐妹大学毕业概率降低3.7个百分点，较对照组均值下降约30%。我们通过一个家庭学校教育决策动态模型解释这些效应，该模型识别了父母对子女教育结果不平等的厌恶程度。估计模型表明，父母对子女教育结果不平等的厌恶有限，并复现了未用于估计的保留样本处理效应。分解分析显示，负面溢出效应主要由教育投资向受助子女的替代驱动。

papers.title: A Practitioner's Guide to Using Large Language Models and Generative AI in Economic History
papers.authors: Andreas Ferrara
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are lowering the entry barriers to working with exciting data sources that used to require strong data science skills, such as handwritten ledgers, text, images, or sound recordings. This guide provides an introduction for researchers who are new to LLMs. It sets out a step-by-step workflow for turning a research idea into working code and data, and describes the four main ways of interacting with an LLM: the chat window, editor-integrated assistants, agentic coding tools, and the API. It then works through the decisions a practitioner meets in sequence, beginning with whether an LLM is the right tool and whether the data are allowed to be sent to one, then how to select models, write prompts, manage context limits, and control costs, and finally how to validate, reproduce, document, and correct LLM-generated measures in regression settings. A review of recent research shows how these tools already extract, link, harmonize, and classify historical data at scale. Four worked examples with replication files illustrate the use of LLMs. They classify emotions in paintings, link census records without names, measure newspaper salience and sentiment around the 1882 Chinese Exclusion Act, and score the emotional delivery of Franklin D. Roosevelt's wartime speeches. The guide also condenses the workflow, the best-practice recommendations, and the preparation of replication packages into summary tables and checklists to aid applied economists.
papers.zh_title: 经济史研究中大语言模型与生成式AI的应用实践指南
papers.zh_abstract: 大语言模型（LLMs）正在降低使用以往需要强大数据科学技能（如手写账簿、文本、图像或录音）的激动人心数据源的准入门槛。本指南为LLMs新手研究者提供入门介绍。它阐述了将研究想法转化为可运行代码和数据的逐步工作流程，并描述了与LLM交互的四种主要方式：聊天窗口、编辑器集成助手、代理式编码工具和API。随后，指南按顺序探讨实践者面临的决策：从LLM是否为合适工具、数据是否允许发送至LLM，到如何选择模型、编写提示词、管理上下文限制和控制成本，最后在回归设定中验证、复现、记录和纠正LLM生成的度量指标。近期研究综述展示了这些工具如何大规模提取、链接、协调和分类历史数据。四个带复现文件的实例说明了LLM的使用：分类绘画中的情感、链接无姓名的人口普查记录、衡量1882年《排华法案》的报纸显著性和情感倾向，以及评分富兰克林·D·罗斯福战时演讲的情感表达。指南还将工作流程、最佳实践建议和复现包准备浓缩为汇总表格和清单，以辅助应用经济学家。

papers.title: How Do State “Auto-IRA” Policies Affect Household Balance Sheets?
papers.authors: Adam Bloomfield, Ngoc Dao, Kyung Min Lee, Sita Slavov
papers.abstract: We examine how state policies requiring firms to facilitate workplace retirement saving affect household balance sheets. Using data from the Survey of Income and Program Participation (SIPP), we compare private-sector workers likely exposed to Oregon’s Automatic-Enrollment Individual Retirement Account (Auto-IRA) policy with similar workers in not-yet-adopting states. We find that the Auto-IRA policy is associated with increases in IRA and employer-sponsored retirement plan ownership and assets. We also find increases in checking or savings account ownership and balances, as well as higher credit card debt. The results suggest that Auto-IRA policies spill over to household liquidity management and borrowing.
papers.zh_title: 州级“自动IRA”政策如何影响家庭资产负债表？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了要求企业促进工作场所退休储蓄的州级政策如何影响家庭资产负债表。利用收入与项目参与调查（SIPP）数据，我们比较了可能受俄勒冈州自动注册个人退休账户（Auto-IRA）政策影响的私营部门工人与尚未采纳该政策的类似州工人。我们发现，Auto-IRA政策与IRA和雇主资助退休计划的拥有率及资产增加相关。我们还发现支票或储蓄账户拥有率及余额增加，以及信用卡债务上升。结果表明，Auto-IRA政策会溢出影响家庭流动性管理和借贷行为。

papers.title: Benefit-Based Taxation can Include Substantial Redistribution
papers.authors: Jo Ellery, Matthew C. Weinzierl
papers.abstract: Contrary to a long-standing concern, we present evidence that classical benefit-based labor income taxation in the tradition of Smith (1776) is consistent with income redistribution through transfers and negative average tax rates both theoretically and---in plausibly-specified simulations---quantitatively at levels which reflect U.S. policy over the past several decades. As redistribution is widespread in practice, our results remove an obstacle to the benefit principle’s plausibility as a prevailing normative foundation of tax policy.
papers.zh_title: 基于福利的税收可以包含实质性再分配
papers.zh_abstract: 与长期以来的担忧相反，我们提供的证据表明，遵循斯密（1776）传统的古典基于福利的劳动收入所得税，在理论上与通过转移支付和负平均税率进行的收入再分配是一致的，并且在合理设定的模拟中，其量化水平也反映了美国过去几十年的政策。由于再分配在实践中广泛存在，我们的结果消除了将福利原则作为税收政策主流规范基础的一个障碍。

papers.title: Beyond Mean Exposure: How Exposure Variance Shapes Air Pollution Mortality Risk
papers.authors: Bissan Ghaddar, Kimberly Singer Babiarz, Hongbin Li, Lingsheng Meng, Lynn Hildemann, Han Hong, Alvise Scarabosio, Meili Wang, Aprajit Mahajan, Peng Yin, Maigeng Zhou, Grant Miller
papers.abstract: Ambient air pollution contributes substantially to premature mortality globally, and the effectiveness of policies addressing it depends critically on the shape of the dose-response relationship, which remains poorly understood. Linking hourly air pollution data with daily vital statistics from 251 Chinese cities over four years, we show this relationship depends not only on the mean, but also on the variance of within-period exposure. At a 7-day mean of 150 μg/m³, predicted mortality varies more across observed hourly PM2.5 distributions than across mean exposure differences of 100 μg/m³. The sign of this variance effect also depends on the mean: at low mean concentrations (a convex region), higher variance is associated with modestly higher mortality. At higher concentrations (a concave region), greater variance is associated with lower mortality – implying constant exposure is more harmful than fluctuating exposure for a given mean. These findings reveal important relationships masked using temporally aggregated air pollution data.
papers.zh_title: 超越均值暴露：暴露方差如何影响空气污染死亡风险
papers.zh_abstract: 环境空气污染在全球范围内显著导致过早死亡，而应对政策的有效性关键取决于剂量-反应关系的形状，这一点目前仍知之甚少。通过将四年间中国251个城市的每小时空气污染数据与每日生命统计数据相链接，我们发现这种关系不仅取决于时段内暴露的均值，还取决于其方差。在7天平均值为150 μg/m³时，预测死亡率在观测到的每小时PM2.5分布之间的差异，大于均值暴露相差100 μg/m³时的差异。这种方差效应的符号也取决于均值：在低平均浓度（凸区域）下，较高的方差与略高的死亡率相关；在较高浓度（凹区域）下，较大的方差与较低的死亡率相关——这意味着对于给定的均值，恒定暴露比波动暴露更有害。这些发现揭示了使用时间聚合的空气污染数据时被掩盖的重要关系。

papers.title: Did Drug Decriminalization Increase Overdoses
papers.authors: David Hall, Benjamin Hansen, Kyutaro Matsuzawa
papers.abstract: We study the effect of drug decriminalization on overdose mortality using Oregon's Measure 110 and Washington's Blake decision. Synthetic-control estimates show that both decriminalization regimes sharply reduced drug arrests and were followed by sustained increases in overdose mortality relative to matched counterfactuals. The estimates imply approximately 1,186 excess deaths in Oregon and 1,895 in Washington from 2021 through 2023. We also revisit the role of fentanyl supply shocks. A fentanyl-share control may partly capture enforcement-driven declines in non-fentanyl NFLIS reports, while alternative fentanyl measures leave positive overdose effects.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE；JEL：I12, I18, K40, K42, K49
papers.zh_title: 毒品非刑事化是否增加了过量用药
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用俄勒冈州的第110号法案和华盛顿州的布莱克判决，研究了毒品非刑事化对过量用药死亡率的影响。合成控制法估计显示，两种非刑事化制度均大幅减少了毒品逮捕，但随后相对于对照组，过量用药死亡率持续上升。

papers.title: Quality, Selection, and Congestion: Equilibrium Hospital Outcomes During Covid-19
papers.authors: Gautam Gowrisankaran, Kelli R. Marquardt, Robert Town
papers.abstract: We examine the importance of hospital quality, patient selection, and congestion in affecting equilibrium health outcomes, using Covid-19 pandemic data. Our main outcome is mortality, controlling for unobserved selection with distance instruments. Intensive care unit strain increased hospital mortality: without congestion, deaths would fall 9.6%. Patients value hospitals with high baseline quality, but their choices did not reflect capacity strain information. Equilibrium counterfactuals show that if patients were informed about capacity strain and believed quality signals were more precise, deaths would drop 3.8%. However, using more precise information but not accounting for congestion would cause Covid-19 deaths to rise 3.8%.
papers.zh_title: 质量、选择与拥堵：新冠疫情期间医院的均衡结果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用新冠疫情数据，考察了医院质量、患者选择和拥堵在影响均衡健康结果中的重要性。我们的主要结果是死亡率，并使用距离工具变量控制未观测到的选择效应。重症监护病房压力增加了医院死亡率：如果没有拥堵，死亡人数将下降9.6%。患者重视基线质量高的医院，但他们的选择并未反映容量压力信息。均衡反事实分析表明，如果患者了解容量压力并认为质量信号更精确，死亡人数将下降3.8%。然而，使用更精确的信息但未考虑拥堵，会导致新冠死亡人数上升3.8%。

papers.title: The Rise of Female Autonomy and the Decline of Fertility: The Role of Mismatch
papers.authors: Claudia Goldin
papers.abstract: The fertility decline is everywhere in the world today and goes back decades for rich countries. Birthrates have been below replacement in the U.S. and Europe since the mid-1970s. Completed cohort fertility in the U.S. was lower for those born in 1955 than for 1975. The reasons for the initial declines involve greater female autonomy and a mismatch between the desires of men and women. Men generally benefit more from maintaining traditions; women often benefit more from eschewing them. When the probability is low that men will abandon traditions, some career women will not have children and others will delay.
papers.zh_title: 女性自主权的崛起与生育率下降：错配的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 如今，生育率下降在世界各地普遍存在，而富裕国家的这一趋势已持续数十年。自20世纪70年代中期以来，美国和欧洲的出生率一直低于更替水平。美国1955年出生人口的已完成队列生育率低于1975年出生人口。最初下降的原因涉及女性自主权的增强以及男女愿望之间的错配。男性通常更多地从维持传统中受益；女性则往往更多地从摒弃传统中受益。当男性放弃传统的可能性较低时，一些职业女性将不会生育孩子，而另一些则会推迟生育。

papers.title: Analyzing Occupational Licensing Across Nations
papers.authors: Jonathan S. Hartley, Morris M. Kleiner
papers.abstract: Relatively little is known about occupational licensing across nations. We assemble harmonized estimates of licensing prevalence for 44 countries using nationally representative surveys, including new surveys for previously unstudied countries. Licensing ranges from roughly 14 percent of workers in Denmark to more than 40 percent in India and South Africa. Licensed workers earn 6 to 19 percent higher wages than comparable unlicensed workers across specifications. Licensing prevalence is negatively associated with GDP per capita and governance quality, and positively associated with informal employment, suggesting occupational licensing is intertwined with labor market efficiency, formalization, and long-run economic development.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J31, J44, J48, J8, K23, O15, O43
papers.zh_title: 跨国职业许可分析
papers.zh_abstract: 关于跨国职业许可的研究相对较少。我们利用具有全国代表性的调查数据，为44个国家编制了统一的职业许可普及率估计值，其中包括针对此前未研究国家的新调查。职业许可普及率从丹麦约14%的劳动者到印度和南非超过40%不等。在不同设定下，持有职业许可的劳动者比类似的无许可劳动者工资高出6%至19%。职业许可普及率与人均GDP和治理质量呈负相关，与非正规就业呈正相关，这表明职业许可与劳动力市场效率、正规化以及长期经济发展密切相关。

papers.title: Is Money Overrated? Misperceived Satisfaction from Income
papers.authors: Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Rafael Macedo Rubião
papers.abstract: People often make important choices in pursuit of higher income, but do they place too much weight on income when deciding what path to take? We propose a simple model of misspecified learning in which individuals overestimate the marginal satisfaction from income—the expected effect of an income increase on overall life satisfaction—and therefore give income too much importance in their decisions. Guided by this model, we designed a pre-registered experiment that elicits beliefs about the marginal satisfaction from income and randomly assigns scientific evidence about it. Respondents substantially overestimate the marginal satisfaction from income both for themselves and for others, but especially for themselves. These biases shrink when respondents are exposed to scientific evidence, and the effects persist one month later. To study whether these beliefs matter for behavior, we measure income-versus-non-income trade-offs using job-choice scenarios tailored to each respondent and a real-world decision the respondent is facing. To elicit the latter, we make a methodological contribution: an AI-led interview method that moves beyond static, predefined survey instruments by combining the flexibility of qualitative interviewing with the discipline of closed-ended survey measurement. We find that biased beliefs are consequential: after learning that income matters less for life satisfaction than they initially thought, respondents place less weight on income in their decisions.
papers.zh_title: 金钱被高估了吗？对收入满意度的错误认知
papers.zh_abstract: 人们常常为了追求更高收入而做出重要选择，但在决定该走哪条路时，他们是否过分看重收入？我们提出了一个关于错误认知学习的简单模型，在该模型中，个体高估了收入的边际满意度——即收入增加对整体生活满意度的预期影响——因此在其决策中赋予了收入过高的权重。在该模型的指导下，我们设计了一项预注册实验，该实验引出了关于收入边际满意度的信念，并随机分配了关于此的科学证据。受访者显著高估了收入对自己和他人的边际满意度，尤其是对自己。当受访者接触到科学证据时，这些偏差会缩小，且效果在一个月后仍然持续。为了研究这些信念是否对行为产生影响，我们使用针对每位受访者量身定制的工作选择情景以及受访者面临的一个现实世界决策，来衡量收入与非收入之间的权衡。为了引出后者，我们做出了一项方法论贡献：一种人工智能引导的访谈方法，该方法结合了定性访谈的灵活性与封闭式调查测量的规范性，超越了静态、预定义的调查工具。我们发现，有偏差的信念会产生重要后果：在了解到收入对生活满意度的影响比他们最初认为的要小之后，受访者在其决策中赋予收入的权重降低了。

papers.title: Competition and Misconduct in Certification Markets with Externalities
papers.authors: Nano Barahona, Juan-Pablo Montero, Pedro Skorin
papers.abstract: Vehicle inspections—commonly known as smog and safety checks—are often delegated to private agents, much like other quality certification markets. When these agents compete, they face incentives to misreport quality—especially when consumers do not internalize the external costs of misreporting. Theory and evidence from Chile’s concentrated vehicle-inspection markets suggest that these incentives are significant: misreporting emerges as soon as competition is introduced. We find that delegating each market to a single agent proves effective in reducing approval rates, without compromising service quality or the ex-ante competition for the market, while delivering substantial and permanent reductions in vehicle emissions.
papers.zh_title: 具有外部性的认证市场中的竞争与不当行为
papers.zh_abstract: 车辆检测——通常称为尾气排放和安全检查——通常委托给私人代理，这与其他质量认证市场类似。当这些代理相互竞争时，他们面临虚报质量的激励——尤其是当消费者不内部化虚报的外部成本时。来自智利集中型车辆检测市场的理论和证据表明，这些激励是显著的：一旦引入竞争，虚报行为就会出现。我们发现，将每个市场委托给单一代理在降低通过率方面是有效的，且不会损害服务质量或市场的事前竞争，同时能带来车辆排放的显著且持久的减少。

papers.title: Quantitative Easing and Government Debt Sustainability
papers.authors: Wenhao Li, Sebastian Merkel
papers.abstract: We show that quantitative easing (QE) worsens government debt sustainability. In our model, the government has a negative primary balance and downward-sloping debt demand that makes interest rates endogenous. The central bank has long-term capital and remits profits to the fiscal authority. QE depletes this capital stock, reducing future remittances and crisis-fighting reserves. Contrary to Sargent and Wallace (1981), where greater monetary accommodation lowers the steady-state debt level, we show that QE increases the steady-state level of debt and shifts the default boundary inward, thus heightening fragility and reducing debt sustainability. Moreover, while QE can keep interest rates low for extended periods, sustaining a QE-backed rate peg requires a growing central-bank footprint and accelerating capital depletion, until financing costs rise sharply. Under certain parameters, large-scale QE makes previously sustainable debt levels unsustainable, leading ultimately to sovereign default.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, PE；JEL：E58, E63, G01, G12, H60
papers.zh_title: 量化宽松与政府债务可持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明量化宽松会恶化政府债务可持续性。在我们的模型中，政府具有负的基本收支余额和向下倾斜的债务需求，这使得利率成为内生变量。中央银行拥有长期资本，并将利润上缴给财政部门。量化宽松消耗了这一资本存量，减少了未来的上缴利润和危机应对储备。与Sargent和Wallace（1981）的观点相反——他们认为更大的货币宽松会降低稳态债务水平——我们证明量化宽松提高了稳态债务水平，并将违约边界向内移动，从而加剧了脆弱性并降低了债务可持续性。此外，虽然量化宽松可以在较长时间内维持低利率，但维持量化宽松支持的利率挂钩需要不断扩大的中央银行足迹和加速的资本消耗，直到融资成本急剧上升。在某些参数下，大规模量化宽松使先前可持续的债务水平变得不可持续，最终导致主权违约。

papers.title: From Minor Ailments to Major Illnesses: A Practical Framework for Valuing Morbidity in Environmental Policy Analysis
papers.authors: Mark Dickie, Matthew J. Neidell
papers.abstract: Environmental decisions often impact health, yet morbidity valuation remains challenging, with current approaches like cost-of-illness (COI) measures and Quality-Adjusted Life Years failing to reflect individuals’ willingness to pay to avoid adverse health states. This paper introduces a novel framework for valuing morbidity across health conditions, deriving willingness-to-pay (WTP) estimates using widely available preference weights and a baseline condition with known WTP. Our analysis reveals WTP estimates significantly exceeding commonly used COI measures, indicating undervaluation of health states in policy evaluations. Sensitivity analyses highlight variations consistent with those for the value of statistical life, underscoring the method's robustness. This framework offers a practical tool for integrating morbidity into analyses of environmental policy.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, PE；JEL：D61, I18, Q51, Q58
papers.zh_title: 从轻微不适到重大疾病：环境政策分析中疾病负担评估的实用框架
papers.zh_abstract: 环境决策常常影响健康，然而疾病负担评估仍然具有挑战性，当前的方法如疾病成本（COI）指标和质量调整生命年未能反映个人为避免不良健康状态而愿意支付的金额。本文引入了一个新颖的框架，用于评估各种健康状况下的疾病负担，利用广泛可得的偏好权重和一个已知支付意愿（WTP）的基准状况来推导WTP估计值。我们的分析显示，WTP估计值显著超过常用的COI指标，表明政策评估中健康状态被低估。敏感性分析揭示了与统计生命价值估计一致的变异，凸显了该方法的稳健性。该框架为将疾病负担纳入环境政策分析提供了一个实用工具。

papers.title: Neighborhood Effects and Missing Markets for Opportunity
papers.authors: Lawrence F. Katz
papers.abstract: Experimental and quasi-experimental studies show that childhood neighborhoods have substantial causal impacts on children’s adult earnings and other long-term socioeconomic outcomes. Several market failures are likely to lead to excessive residential segregation by parental income and to an under-supply of mixed-income neighborhoods. Missing markets for opportunity originate in capital market imperfections for borrowing on children’s future earnings, neighbor spillovers, behavioral biases, and housing search frictions. Customized housing mobility services combined with subsidized housing vouchers can help low-income families move to higher-opportunity areas. Place-based policies that create mixed-income neighborhoods appear to increase long-term outcomes for less-advantaged children.
papers.zh_title: 邻里效应与机会缺失的市场
papers.zh_abstract: 实验性和准实验性研究表明，童年时期的邻里环境对儿童成年后的收入及其他长期社会经济结果具有显著的因果影响。多种市场失灵可能导致按父母收入划分的居住隔离过度，以及混合收入社区的供给不足。机会缺失的市场源于对儿童未来收入借贷的资本市场不完善、邻里溢出效应、行为偏差以及住房搜索摩擦。定制化的住房流动服务与补贴住房券相结合，可以帮助低收入家庭迁往机会更高的地区。创造混合收入社区的场所导向政策似乎能改善弱势儿童的长期结果。

papers.title: Tax Incentives and Venture Capital Risk-Taking: Evidence from the QSBS Program
papers.authors: Murillo Campello, Guilherme Junqueira
papers.abstract: Do tax subsidies prompt investors to take on risk? We address this question by looking at investors' responses to changes to the Qualified Small Business Stock (QSBS) program, which reduces capital gains taxes on startup investing. We do so under a framework in which some startup investors — venture capitalists (VCs) — combine outside funding with incentive-based compensation, while others invest their own funds. Using bunching, triple-differences, and matching designs that exploit industry eligibility, investment vintage, and holding-period requirements, we analyze data from 158 thousand investor–firm pairings over two decades. We identify strategic investment timing, with subsidies prompting bunching at tax-eligible holding-period thresholds. Most notably, when and where tax subsidies apply, VCs shift their project selection toward riskier ventures: they invest more in pre-commercial stage startups, become more likely to provide startups with their initial capital, and invest more in startups with pre-existing debt, while becoming less likely to co-syndicate their investments. Tax-subsidized VC-backed ventures show higher failure rates, but on the flip side, attain higher valuations at exit and are more likely to reach "unicorn status." None of these patterns are observed for comparable non-VC investors in startups exposed to the same tax subsidies. Our tests further show that tax incentives lead to reallocation toward more innovative industries, yielding more impactful patents. Our study is the first to show that tax policy can shift entrepreneurial financing toward riskier, more innovative, and valuable startups.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PE, PR；JEL：G23, G24, H25, O31
papers.zh_title: 税收激励与风险资本风险承担：来自QSBS项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 税收补贴是否会促使投资者承担风险？我们通过考察投资者对合格小型企业股票（QSBS）项目变化的反应来探讨这个问题，该项目降低了初创企业投资的资本利得税。我们在一个框架下进行分析，其中一些初创企业投资者——风险资本家（VC）——将外部资金与基于激励的薪酬相结合，而其他投资者则使用自有资金。利用聚集、三重差分和匹配设计，这些设计利用了行业资格、投资年份和持有期要求，我们分析了二十年间15.8万个投资者-企业配对的数据。我们识别出策略性的投资时机，补贴促使投资者在符合税收条件的持有期阈值处聚集。最值得注意的是，在税收补贴适用时，风险资本家将其项目选择转向风险更高的企业：他们更多地投资于商业化前阶段的初创企业，更可能为初创企业提供初始资本，并更多地投资于已有债务的初创企业，同时减少联合投资。获得税收补贴的风险资本支持的企业失败率更高，但另一方面，它们在退出时获得更高的估值，并且更有可能达到“独角兽地位”。对于面临相同税收补贴的初创企业中的可比非风险资本投资者，这些模式均未观察到。我们的进一步测试表明，税收激励导致资源向更具创新性的行业重新配置，从而产生更有影响力的专利。我们的研究首次表明，税收政策可以将创业融资转向风险更高、更具创新性和更有价值的初创企业。

papers.title: Losses from a Disability: Temporal Variety and Earnings in the Long Run
papers.authors: Daniel S. Hamermesh
papers.abstract: Using diaries covering 25-61-year-olds in the American Time Use Survey 2009-24, this study demonstrates that temporal variety—doing more different things in a day—is income superior. Linking these data to underlying Current Population Surveys, propensity-score models show that people stating that they have a mobility/physical disability in each of two consecutive annual surveys undertake almost 4 percent fewer activities per day than other, demographically identical individuals. They also earn about 50 percent less. Combining the estimated impact of income on temporal variety with the implied reductions in variety incurred by those with the disability yields a monetary equivalent of lost variety exceeding that of lost earnings. Measuring disability status only once yields much smaller estimated shortfalls in temporal variety and earnings. That suggests that one-time self-reports of disabilities, which underlie the bulk of studies on the impacts of disabilities on earnings, also underestimate long-term effects.
papers.zh_title: 残疾造成的损失：时间多样性及长期收入
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究利用2009-2024年美国时间使用调查中25-61岁人群的日记数据，证明时间多样性（一天内从事更多不同活动）具有收入优越性。将这些数据与基础当前人口调查相关联，倾向得分模型显示，在连续两次年度调查中均报告存在行动/身体残疾的个体，每天从事的活动数量比人口统计学特征相同的其他个体少近4%，收入也低约50%。将收入对时间多样性的估计影响与残疾个体所承受的多样性减少相结合，得出多样性损失的货币等价物超过了收入损失。仅测量一次残疾状态所估计的时间多样性和收入缺口要小得多。这表明，一次性自我报告的残疾（大多数关于残疾对收入影响的研究的基础）也低估了长期效应。

papers.title: International Trade in an Uncertain World
papers.authors: Benny Kleinman, Ernest Liu, Stephen J. Redding, David Xu
papers.abstract: We develop a tractable quantitative model of international trade in which agents make bilateral investments in resilience under general equilibrium uncertainty. Under both complete and incomplete financial markets, we show that these bilateral investments solve a portfolio problem of choosing trade partners. Countries' risk profiles become determinants of trade flows, income and welfare, whose first moments are affected by the second moments of productivity and trade costs. Changes in global economic uncertainty have heterogeneous effects across countries, depending on how they affect real hedging opportunities. The opening of trade can raise or reduce income volatility, but is revealed-preferred to autarky.
papers.zh_title: 不确定世界中的国际贸易
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个易于处理的国际贸易定量模型，其中代理人在一般均衡不确定性下进行双边韧性投资。在完全和不完全金融市场下，我们证明这些双边投资解决了选择贸易伙伴的投资组合问题。国家的风险特征成为贸易流量、收入和福利的决定因素，其一阶矩受到生产率和贸易成本二阶矩的影响。全球经济不确定性的变化对不同国家产生异质效应，取决于它们如何影响实际对冲机会。贸易开放可以提高或降低收入波动性，但相对于自给自足而言是显示性偏好的。

papers.title: Is Growth Additive?
papers.authors: Callum J. Jones, David López-Salido, Thomas Philippon
papers.abstract: Growth theory is based on the assumption of exponential total factor productivity (TFP) growth, or that the conditional expectation of the next TFP increment is proportional to the current level of TFP. In the U.S., we find strong evidence that TFP growth is conditionally additive, not exponential. Even starting from low priors, Bayesian estimation selects the additive model over the exponential one. In addition, professional forecasts and international TFP series are consistent with the additive model but not with the exponential one.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, PR；JEL：C10, E17, N0, O11
papers.zh_title: 增长是可加的吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 增长理论基于指数型全要素生产率增长的假设，即下一个全要素生产率增量的条件期望与当前全要素生产率水平成正比。在美国，我们发现强有力的证据表明全要素生产率增长是条件可加的，而非指数型的。即使从较低的先验概率出发，贝叶斯估计也选择可加模型而非指数模型。此外，专业预测和国际全要素生产率序列与可加模型一致，但与指数模型不一致。

papers.title: Congestion Pricing and Emergency Medical Service Response: Evidence from New York City
papers.authors: Yulia Chikish, Gregory J. Colman, Dhaval M. Dave, Brad R. Humphreys, Zachary Santamaria, Zachary Winship
papers.abstract: Large cities worldwide have adopted congestion pricing to reduce urban traffic, with well-documented benefits for travel speeds, accident rates, and air quality. This paper identifies a novel external benefit: faster emergency medical service (EMS) response times. We provide the first evidence on how the congestion pricing program in New York City – the first comprehensive cordon-based congestion pricing system in the U.S. that was implemented on January 5th, 2025 – affects EMS performance. Exploiting the sharp geographic boundary of New York City’s congestion relief zone at 60th Street and a difference-in-discontinuities design, we first document substantial changes in traffic and mobility near the boundary: vehicular traffic declines by roughly 18 to 21 percent, accompanied by increases in pedestrian and bicycle activity. Consistent with these first-stage mechanisms, we find that congestion pricing improves EMS performance, reducing total travel times by 63–70 seconds (approximately 5–6 percent). Effects emerged quickly and show little evidence of displacement to adjacent areas. A concurrent FDNY directive requiring transport to the nearest hospital confounds standard difference-in-differences estimates but not our boundary-based design. These findings suggest that cost-benefit analyses of congestion pricing systematically understate net social benefits by omitting emergency response improvements.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H41, I11, I18, R41
papers.zh_title: 拥堵收费与紧急医疗服务响应：来自纽约市的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 全球大城市已采用拥堵收费来减少城市交通，其在行驶速度、事故率和空气质量方面的益处已有充分记录。本文识别出一种新的外部效益：更快的紧急医疗服务响应时间。我们首次提供了关于纽约市拥堵收费计划——美国首个于2025年1月5日实施的综合性基于区域的拥堵收费系统——如何影响紧急医疗服务绩效的证据。利用纽约市拥堵缓解区在第60街的明显地理边界以及断点回归设计，我们首先记录了边界附近交通和流动性的显著变化：机动车交通量下降约18%至21%，同时行人和自行车活动增加。与这些第一阶段机制一致，我们发现拥堵收费改善了紧急医疗服务绩效，将总出行时间减少了63-70秒（约5-6%）。这些效应迅速显现，且几乎没有证据表明其被转移至邻近区域。一项同时实施的纽约消防局指令要求将患者送往最近的医院，这混淆了标准的双重差分估计，但不影响我们基于边界的识别策略。这些发现表明，拥堵收费的成本效益分析因忽略紧急响应改善而系统性地低估了净社会效益。

papers.title: Causal Inference for Asset Pricing
papers.authors: Valentin Haddad, Zhiguo He, Paul Huebner, Péter Kondor, Erik Loualiche
papers.abstract: Portfolio choice involves substituting across many assets at once, complicating inference about asset demand. An elementary condition often captures this behavior in theory and practice: homogeneous substitution conditional on observables (e.g., factor loadings, maturity, credit ratings). We characterize natural experiments identifying demand elasticity and price impact under this condition. Cross-sectional IV and difference-in-differences identify relative elasticity, own- minus cross-price elasticity for assets sharing observables. But a missing-coefficient problem leaves substitution unidentified: the coefficients on observables mechanically absorb it. Identifying substitution requires time-series regressions on portfolios sorted on observables. We apply the framework to corporate bonds, comparing alternative Fed asset-purchase programs.
papers.zh_title: 资产定价的因果推断
papers.zh_abstract: 投资组合选择涉及同时替代多种资产，这使得对资产需求的推断复杂化。一个基本条件常在理论和实践中捕捉到这种行为：基于可观测变量（如因子载荷、期限、信用评级）的同质替代。我们刻画了在此条件下识别需求弹性和价格冲击的自然实验。横截面工具变量法和双重差分法识别了相对弹性，即共享可观测变量的资产的自有价格弹性减去交叉价格弹性。但一个缺失系数问题使得替代效应无法被识别：可观测变量的系数机械地吸收了替代效应。识别替代效应需要对按可观测变量排序的投资组合进行时间序列回归。我们将该框架应用于公司债券，比较了美联储不同的资产购买计划。

papers.title: Digital Safe Havens: The Economics of Tokenized Treasuries
papers.authors: Chen Lin, Eswar S. Prasad, Daniel Rabetti, Che Zhang
papers.abstract: We study the emerging market for tokenized US Treasuries and yield-bearing dollar instruments on public blockchains. Using a comprehensive dataset that combines on-chain transactions, protocol-level total value locked, pool yields, and monetary policy and stress events, we document three core findings. First, yields can be decomposed into distinct components reflecting issuer fees, lending premia, leverage, basis-trade carry, and collateral pledgability, with the latter generating economically large implicit convenience yields. Second, monetary policy transmission into on-chain dollar markets is highly heterogeneous across product designs, with administratively set rates adjusting slowly and basis-trade-backed instruments displaying economically amplified responses to policy shocks. Third, tokenized Treasuries serve as digital safe havens during episodes of cross-asset stress, attracting large inflows during risk-off events while simultaneously exposing new fragilities arising from the interaction between on-chain composability and off-chain reserve structures, particularly through stablecoin balance sheets. Overall, we provide insights into the distinctive dynamics of pricing, transmission, and fragility of digital Treasuries as decentralized and traditional financial infrastructures increasingly integrate.
papers.zh_title: 数字安全港：代币化国债的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了新兴的代币化美国国债及公共区块链上生息美元工具的市场。利用结合了链上交易、协议层面总锁仓价值、池收益率以及货币政策和压力事件的综合数据集，我们记录了三个核心发现。首先，收益率可分解为不同组成部分，反映发行人费用、贷款溢价、杠杆、基差交易利差和抵押品可质押性，其中后者产生了经济意义上巨大的隐性便利收益。其次，货币政策向链上美元市场的传导在不同产品设计间高度异质，行政设定利率调整缓慢，而基差交易支持的工具有经济意义上放大的政策冲击响应。第三，代币化国债在跨资产压力时期充当数字安全港，在避险事件期间吸引大量资金流入，同时暴露出由链上可组合性与链下储备结构相互作用（尤其是通过稳定币资产负债表）而产生的新脆弱性。总体而言，随着去中心化与传统金融基础设施日益融合，我们为数字国债在定价、传导和脆弱性方面的独特动态提供了洞见。

papers.title: Forecasting with Uncertain Persistence
papers.authors: Joel P. Flynn, Maksim Meinert, Karthik Sastry
papers.abstract: With uncertainty about persistence, we show that forecasts necessarily become more persistent and over-react at long horizons. For these reasons, correctly specified and Bayesian forecasts may under-react at short horizons and over-react at long horizons. These results provide a unified explanation for several asset pricing and forecasting puzzles, including: (i) the excess responsiveness of long-horizon rates to short rates, (ii) the dominance of apparent term premia for long-term rates, (iii) the ex post predictability of bond yields, (iv) the excess volatility of long-horizon forward prices, (v) the excess persistence of long-horizon forecasts, and (vi) the over-reaction of long-horizon forecasts.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E0, E17, G12, G13
papers.zh_title: 具有不确定持续性的预测
papers.zh_abstract: 在存在持续性不确定性的情况下，我们证明预测必然变得更具持续性，并在长期内过度反应。因此，正确设定的和贝叶斯预测可能在短期内反应不足，而在长期内反应过度。这些结果为几个资产定价和预测谜题提供了统一解释，包括：(i) 长期利率对短期利率的过度响应，(ii) 长期利率中显性期限溢价的支配地位，(iii) 债券收益率的后验可预测性，(iv) 长期远期价格的过度波动，(v) 长期预测的过度持续性，以及 (vi) 长期预测的过度反应。

papers.title: Experiential and Social Learning
papers.authors: Agha A. Akram, Gabriella Fleischman, Reshmaan N. Hussam, Akib Khan
papers.abstract: How does a person’s own learning experience affect their ability to learn from others? We conduct a field experiment on chlorination in Pakistan, where randomized “learning-arm” households use a tool to track their children’s diarrhea before and after chlorine distribution. Learning-arm households with learning-arm neighbors chlorinate significantly more one year after the withdrawal of the tool, with children’s health improving by 0.08 SD relative to all other households receiving chlorine. Neither learning households without learning-arm neighbors, nor non-learning households with learning-arm neighbors, exhibit sustained behavior change, results which have significant implications for intervention and evaluation design.
papers.zh_title: 体验式学习与社会学习
papers.zh_abstract: 一个人自身的学习经历如何影响其向他人学习的能力？我们在巴基斯坦开展了一项关于氯化消毒的实地实验，其中随机分配的“学习组”家庭使用一种工具来追踪其子女在氯消毒前后的腹泻情况。在工具撤除一年后，拥有学习组邻居的学习组家庭，其氯化消毒率显著更高，子女健康状况相比所有其他接受氯消毒的家庭改善了0.08个标准差。既没有学习组邻居的学习组家庭，以及有学习组邻居的非学习组家庭，均未表现出持续的行为改变。这一结果对于干预措施设计和评估设计具有重要启示。

papers.title: Racial Disparities in Education During and Following the Pandemic: Evidence in Connecticut through 2025
papers.authors: Eric Brunner, Stephen Ross, Xinrui Wang
papers.abstract: We examine pandemic related racial and ethnic disparities in test scores, absenteeism, and disciplinary incidents for K-12 students in the State of Connecticut through the 2024-25 school year. Notably, most existing pandemic studies only cover absenteeism through 2022-23, and minimal quantitative evidence exists on the post-pandemic incidence of student discipline related behaviors. Consistent with prior studies, we find persistent negative effects of the pandemic on test scores, as well as substantial disparities in test scores along racial and ethnic lines. For middle school, we also find persistent post-pandemic increases in both severe disciplinary incidents overall and racial and ethnic disparities in severe discipline incidents. However, we document substantial recovery in racial and ethnic disparities in attendance rates and chronic absenteeism by 2024-25. For all outcomes, most of the increases in disparities are associated with Black and Latinx students attending schools that had worse pre-pandemic outcomes and higher pre-pandemic shares of students who are either economically disadvantaged or face learning barriers.
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间及之后的种族教育差距：康涅狄格州截至2025年的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了康涅狄格州K-12学生在2024-25学年期间与疫情相关的种族和族裔在考试成绩、缺勤率和纪律事件方面的差异。值得注意的是，大多数现有疫情研究仅涵盖截至2022-23学年的缺勤数据，且定量分析极少。

papers.title: Optimal Flood Insurance in a Second-Best World: Fiscal Spillovers, Reclassification Risk and Moral Hazard
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Adam Solomon
papers.abstract: Intensifying climate change makes protection against natural disaster risk – either through ex ante insurance or ex post aid – a first-order public policy issue. Flood risk protection in the U.S. traditionally featured ex post aid through FEMA and heavily subsidized insurance through the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP). In an effort to correct subsidy-induced overbuilding and under-mitigation in flood-prone areas, the NFIP recently moved to actuarially fair insurance premiums. But this change has two unintended consequences: a fiscal spillover onto FEMA disaster aid as insurance coverage declines in flood-prone areas, and household exposure to uninsurable reclassification risk from uncertain climate projections. We develop a model of optimal flood insurance that incorporates the static and dynamic tradeoffs of subsidizing premiums. We then use a variety of identification strategies and data to estimate the five key parameters needed to implement this model. We find that the fiscal spillover and reclassification risk protection benefits significantly outweigh the moral hazard costs, and that the optimal subsidy to flood insurance is 52%, comparable to the level of subsidization before the recent reform.
papers.zh_title: 次优世界中的最优洪水保险：财政溢出、重分类风险与道德风险
papers.zh_abstract: 日益加剧的气候变化使得抵御自然灾害风险——无论是通过事前保险还是事后援助——成为首要的公共政策问题。美国传统的洪水风险保护包括通过联邦紧急事务管理局（FEMA）提供的事后援助，以及通过国家洪水保险计划（NFIP）提供的高额补贴保险。为了纠正补贴导致的洪涝易发区过度建设和减灾不足问题，NFIP近期转向了精算公平的保险费率。但这一变化带来了两个意外后果：一是随着洪涝易发区保险覆盖率的下降，对FEMA灾害援助产生了财政溢出效应；二是家庭因不确定的气候预测而面临不可保险的重分类风险。我们构建了一个最优洪水保险模型，该模型纳入了补贴保费的静态和动态权衡。然后，我们利用多种识别策略和数据来估计实施该模型所需的五个关键参数。我们发现，财政溢出和重分类风险保护带来的收益显著超过了道德风险成本，洪水保险的最优补贴率为52%，与近期改革前的补贴水平相当。

papers.title: Reassessing the Role of Standardized Tests in University Admissions
papers.authors: Johann D. Gaebler, Calvin Isley, Christopher Avery, Sharad Goel
papers.abstract: There is a long-running debate over using standardized test scores to inform college and graduate admissions decisions, with some arguing that test scores are an important signal of academic strength and others arguing that they are biased and exclusionary. Here we revisit this issue by analyzing a novel dataset of more than 13,000 applications over roughly a decade to a large public policy master’s program in the United States. Consistent with past work, we find that GRE scores substantially improve predictions of first-year grades relative to predictions based on GPA alone. However, when these predictions are used to inform admissions decisions, we find that test scores only modestly improve the expected academic quality of admitted students. The gap shrinks further when we augment the test-aware and test-blind predictive models with more fine-grained information available in student transcripts and other application materials. Specifically, we estimate that incorporating standardized test scores in our setting would result in admitting students who perform, on average, only 0.03 grade points better. We show—both empirically and theoretically—that this pattern stems from a subtle distinction between predictions and decisions. Even with improved predictions, the downstream admissions decisions are often the same; and where there are differences, they often involve selecting between similarly qualified applicants. Our results indicate that standardized test scores may be less important for university admissions than previously suggested.
papers.zh_title: 重新评估标准化考试在大学招生中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 关于是否使用标准化考试成绩来指导大学和研究生招生决策存在长期争论，一些人认为考试成绩是学术实力的重要信号，另一些人则认为它们具有偏见性和排斥性。在此，我们通过分析一个新颖的数据集重新审视这一问题，该数据集包含美国一个大型公共政策硕士项目在大约十年间收到的超过13,000份申请。与以往研究一致，我们发现相对于仅基于GPA的预测，GRE成绩显著改善了对一年级成绩的预测。然而，当这些预测被用于指导招生决策时，我们发现考试成绩仅适度提高了录取学生的预期学术质量。当我们用学生成绩单和其他申请材料中可获得的更精细信息来增强考虑考试和不考虑考试的预测模型时，这一差距进一步缩小。具体而言，我们估计在我们的情境中纳入标准化考试成绩，平均只会导致录取学生的成绩提高0.03分。我们——通过实证和理论——表明，这种模式源于预测与决策之间的微妙区别。即使预测得到改善，下游的招生决策往往相同；而在存在差异的地方，它们通常涉及在资质相似的申请者之间进行选择。我们的结果表明，标准化考试成绩对大学招生的影响可能比之前认为的要小。

papers.title: The Use and Misuse of Average and Marginal Energy Prices: Implications for Climate Policy
papers.authors: Jonathan T. Hawkins-Pierot, Katherine R.H. Wagner
papers.abstract: Many governments and institutions use marginal price signals, such as fuel and carbon taxes, to meet emission reduction targets. However, the responses of firms and individuals to these price signals are often calculated using average prices commonly reported in economic data, rather than marginal prices. This paper first documents that the marginal price of electricity paid by U.S. manufacturing plants is 50% lower than the average price. To do so, we construct a novel dataset of both average and marginal electricity prices, and the wedge between these, using plant-level microdata from the U.S. Census and utility-level electricity rate schedules for over two hundred utilities. Second, we provide guidance on when average prices are an appropriate proxy for marginal prices in price elasticities by identifying economic and geographic characteristics that predict variation in this wedge. Overall, the magnitude of this wedge suggests that the standard use of average energy prices to calculate responses to carbon taxes may underestimate the energy price increases needed to meet emissions targets by 50%.
papers.zh_title: 平均与边际能源价格的使用与误用：对气候政策的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 许多政府和机构使用边际价格信号，如燃料税和碳税，来实现减排目标。然而，企业和个人对这些价格信号的反应，通常是根据经济数据中普遍报告的平均价格而非边际价格来计算的。本文首先记录到，美国制造业工厂支付的平均电价与边际电价之间存在显著差异，边际电价平均比平均电价低50%。为此，我们利用美国人口普查局的工厂级微观数据以及超过两百个公用事业公司的公用事业级电价表，构建了一个包含平均电价、边际电价以及两者之间楔子的新颖数据集。其次，我们通过识别预测该楔子变化的经济和地理特征，为在价格弹性分析中何时平均价格可作为边际价格的合适代理变量提供指导。总体而言，该楔子的规模表明，使用标准平均能源价格来计算对碳税的反应，可能会将实现排放目标所需的能源价格上涨幅度低估50%。

papers.title: Growth, Firm Scale, and the Energy Intensity of Production
papers.authors: Kathryn McDonald, Noémie Pinardon-Touati, Conor Walsh
papers.abstract: We uncover a new mechanism that links growth and a decline in the energy intensity of production, observed globally since 1990. Using microdata from India and a causal research design, we demonstrate that the expenditure share of energy declines steeply with firm scale, due both to physical scaling laws and technology investment. Given that average firm size increases with growth, this scale dependence implies that production endogenously becomes less energy-intensive along the growth path. We develop a model of this mechanism in general equilibrium, and quantify significant reductions in aggregate energy intensity as low-income countries like India grow. We conclude with a discussion of the future path of emissions in India.
papers.zh_title: 增长、企业规模与生产的能源强度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发现了一种新机制，将自1990年以来全球观察到的增长与生产能源强度下降联系起来。利用印度的微观数据和因果研究设计，我们证明了能源的支出份额随企业规模扩大而急剧下降，这既是由于物理规模法则，也是由于技术投资。鉴于平均企业规模随经济增长而增加，这种规模依赖性意味着生产在增长路径上内生地变得不那么能源密集型。我们构建了一个一般均衡下该机制的模型，并量化了当像印度这样的低收入国家增长时，总能源强度的显著降低。最后，我们讨论了印度未来排放的路径。

papers.title: The Labor Market Value of Community College Bachelor’s Degrees: Initial Evidence from a Resume Audit Study in Early Childhood Education
papers.authors: Riley K. Acton, Camila Morales, Julia A. Turner, Lois Miller, Kalena Cortes
papers.abstract: Community colleges are more financially, academically, and geographically accessible than four-year institutions. Yet despite most community college students intending to earn a bachelor’s degree, few successfully transfer and complete one. Community College Baccalaureate (CCB) programs have emerged as an alternative pathway, allowing community colleges to confer bachelor’s degrees directly. However, little is known about how employers value these credentials in the labor market. To address this question, we conduct the first resume audit study of CCB degrees, submitting fictitious applications to real job vacancies while experimentally varying applicants’ educational credentials, degree-granting institutions, and demographic signals. In this pilot study, we focus on the early childhood education (ECE) labor market, a rapidly growing CCB field characterized by labor shortages and increasing educational requirements. We find that employers view CCB degrees similarly to both traditional bachelor’s and associate degrees, with statistically indistinguishable interview-request rates across degree types. A text analysis of employer callback messages reveals little evidence that employers communicate differently with CCB applicants, while a net-price simulation suggests that sticker-price comparisons substantially overstate the affordability advantage of CCB programs. Together, these findings provide new evidence on the labor market value and affordability of CCB degrees and inform an ongoing large-scale audit study across additional fields and labor markets.
papers.zh_title: 社区学院学士学位的劳动力市场价值：来自早期儿童教育简历审计研究的初步证据
papers.zh_abstract: 社区学院在财务、学业和地理可及性方面比四年制院校更具优势。然而，尽管大多数社区学院学生有意获得学士学位，但成功转学并完成学业的人很少。社区学院学士学位项目作为一种替代途径出现，允许社区学院直接授予学士学位。然而，关于雇主在劳动力市场中如何评价这些证书，我们知之甚少。为解答此问题，我们进行了首个关于社区学院学士学位的简历审计研究，向真实职位空缺提交虚构申请，同时实验性地改变申请人的教育背景、学位授予机构和人口统计信号。在这项试点研究中，我们聚焦于早期儿童教育劳动力市场，这是一个快速增长的社区学院学士学位领域，其特点是劳动力短缺和教育要求不断提高。我们发现，雇主对社区学院学士学位的看法与传统学士学位和副学士学位相似，不同学位类型的面试邀请率在统计上无显著差异。对雇主回电信息的文本分析显示，几乎没有证据表明雇主与社区学院学士学位申请者的沟通方式不同，而净价格模拟表明，标价比较显著高估了社区学院学士学位项目的可负担性优势。总之，这些发现为社区学院学士学位的劳动力市场价值和可负担性提供了新证据，并为正在进行的跨更多领域和劳动力市场的大规模审计研究提供了信息。

papers.title: Literature Review and Evidence Aggregation: a Toolkit for Applied Micro
papers.authors: Peter Ganong, Avik Garg, Maximilian Kasy
papers.abstract: Consider an analyst interested in predicting the size of an effect. She has identified a set of prior published studies of similar effects. We provide a toolkit for (i) summarizing the prior literature, (ii) making predictions of effects in new contexts, and (iii) correcting for the bias from selectivity in the prior literature. We illustrate these methods with empirical examples from labor, public, behavioral, environmental, and development economics. Some of the tools are relevant even when only three prior studies are available. We show how it is possible to use covariates to transparently make predictions for a new context by reweighting prior estimates. The mean effect—after correcting for selectivity—is between 12% and 21% of the simple mean in our empirical examples. We conclude with a cookbook for practitioners producing meta-analyses.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, LS, PE；JEL：C11, C53, C54, C87
papers.zh_title: 文献综述与证据聚合：应用微观经济学工具箱
papers.zh_abstract: 假设一位分析者想要预测某个效应的大小。她已经找到了一组关于类似效应的已发表前期研究。我们提供了一个工具箱，用于：(i) 总结前期文献，(ii) 在新情境下进行效应预测，以及 (iii) 纠正前期文献中因选择性而产生的偏差。我们通过来自劳动经济学、公共经济学、行为经济学、环境经济学和发展经济学的实证例子来说明这些方法。即使只有三项前期研究可用，其中一些工具也是相关的。我们展示了如何通过重新加权前期估计值，利用协变量透明地为新情境做出预测。在我们的实证例子中，经过选择性偏差校正后的平均效应，介于简单平均值的12%到21%之间。最后，我们为进行元分析的研究者提供了一份操作指南。

papers.title: Importing Aggregate Demand
papers.authors: Chen Lian, Dmitry Mukhin, Christian K. Wolf
papers.abstract: How exposed are open economies to global demand shocks? In equilibrium, foreign booms can be absorbed either by domestic consumption ("quantities") or by real exchange rate appreciation ("prices"). We show that failures of Ricardian equivalence and global financial market imperfections, two frictions popular in much recent work, have opposite effects on the split: while elevated marginal propensities to consume push towards quantities, financial frictions instead increase price adjustment. As the flexible-price equilibrium generally features a mix of quantity and price responses, policy needs to be contractionary to achieve flexible-price outcomes if the spending effect dominates, and vice-versa if financial frictions are severe. In our quantitative explorations the spending effect tends to win the race, necessitating aggressive domestic policy action.
papers.zh_title: 进口总需求
papers.zh_abstract: 开放经济体对全球需求冲击的暴露程度如何？在均衡状态下，外国繁荣可以通过国内消费（“数量”）或实际汇率升值（“价格”）来吸收。我们表明，李嘉图等价失效和全球金融市场不完善这两种近期许多研究中流行的摩擦，对上述分割具有相反的影响：边际消费倾向升高倾向于数量调整，而金融摩擦则倾向于价格调整。由于灵活价格均衡通常同时包含数量和价格反应，如果支出效应占主导，政策需要采取紧缩措施以实现灵活价格结果；反之，如果金融摩擦严重，则需要采取扩张措施。在我们的量化探索中，支出效应往往胜出，从而需要积极的国内政策行动。

papers.title: Baby Busts and Growth Booms: Demographic Change and the Macroeconomy
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, David Autor, Keelan Beirne, Andrew Scott
papers.abstract: The secular decline in birth rates across the globe over the past seven decades has slowed population growth, raised average ages, and reshaped labor markets and the macroeconomy. Contrary to the widespread expectation that these trends hamper economic growth, we find lower birth rates are associated with higher growth in GDP per working-age adult across countries and higher wage growth across US commuting zones, with no negative impact on aggregate GDP or earnings. These patterns are not explained by educational upgrading, rising female labor force participation, the declining importance of agriculture, or neoclassical-Solow mechanisms. We argue that they reflect the endogenous, labor-saving response of technology to the scarcity of younger workers. Consistent with this interpretation, countries and regions with lower birth rates exhibit more labor-saving patents and growing high-tech activity. There is also higher TFP growth across countries and industries. Exploiting cross-country variation in WWII military and civilian deaths, we find that declines in younger population, rather than population size per se, drive our results.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EFG, IFM, LS, PE；JEL：E24, J11, J31, O33, O40
papers.zh_title: 婴儿潮衰退与增长繁荣：人口变化与宏观经济
papers.zh_abstract: 过去七十年间全球生育率的长期下降减缓了人口增长，提高了平均年龄，并重塑了劳动力市场和宏观经济。与这些趋势会阻碍经济增长的普遍预期相反，我们发现，在跨国层面，较低的生育率与每个劳动年龄人口的GDP增长较高相关；在美国通勤区层面，则与工资增长较高相关，且对总GDP或总收入没有负面影响。这些模式无法用教育水平提升、女性劳动参与率上升、农业重要性下降或新古典索洛机制来解释。我们认为，它们反映了技术对年轻劳动力稀缺的内生、节约劳动力的反应。与这一解释一致，生育率较低的国家和地区展现出更多节约劳动力的专利和日益增长的高科技活动。在跨国和跨行业层面，全要素生产率（TFP）增长也更高。利用二战中军事和平民死亡人数的跨国差异，我们发现，是年轻人口数量的下降，而非人口规模本身，驱动了我们的结果。

papers.title: How Does Monetary and Fiscal Policy Affect the Economy in the Face of Large Shocks?
papers.authors: Greg Kaplan, Ken Miyahara
papers.abstract: We build a model that combines (i) heterogeneous households with incomplete markets, and (ii) state-dependent pricing with strategic complementarities by firms, to analyze the effects of large macroeconomic shocks and policy interventions. Both features significantly influence the transmission of fiscal stimulus and monetary policy—heterogeneous households because of failures of Ricardian equivalence, and state-dependent pricing because of its nonlinear effects on inflation. We use our model to quantify how monetary and fiscal policy shaped macroeconomic dynamics in response to the large shocks of 2020, and how alternative policy choices could have led to different aggregate and distributional outcomes. We find large departures from Ricardian equivalence and strong stepping-on-a-rake effects of interest rate changes. The large unfunded fiscal transfer program helped prevent deflation in 2020 and significantly raised output throughout 2021 and 2022, but led to permanently higher prices. The monetary easing through 2020 and 2021 also contributed to preventing deflation, but had a minimal impact on GDP. The monetary tightening from 2022 lowered the maximum inflation rate, but contributed to persistently above-trend inflation. These policies led to net welfare gains for low-wealth households and net welfare losses for high-wealth households, but those welfare effects are due to incomplete markets for idiosyncratic risk not aggregate stabilization. Alternative commitments to funding fiscal stimulus could have achieved similar short-term effects on inflation and output with a much smaller long-term increase in the price level.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：D3, D4, E3, E5
papers.zh_title: 货币与财政政策如何在大冲击下影响经济？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个结合（i）不完全市场的异质性家庭与（ii）企业状态依存定价及战略互补性的模型，以分析大规模宏观经济冲击和政策干预的影响。这两个特征均显著影响财政刺激与货币政策的传导——异质性家庭因李嘉图等价失效，状态依存定价则因其对通胀的非线性效应。我们利用该模型量化了2020年大冲击下货币与财政政策如何塑造宏观经济动态，以及替代性政策选择可能导致的总体与分配结果差异。研究发现：李嘉图等价严重偏离，利率变动存在强烈的“踩耙子”效应。大规模无资金支持的财政转移计划在2020年帮助防止了通缩，并在2021至2022年显著推高产出，但导致价格永久性上升。2020至2021年的货币宽松同样有助于防止通缩，但对GDP影响甚微。2022年以来的货币紧缩降低了通胀峰值，却导致通胀持续高于趋势水平。这些政策使低财富家庭获得净福利增益，高财富家庭遭受净福利损失——但福利效应源于异质性风险的不完全市场，而非总量稳定。替代性的财政刺激资金承诺本可在实现类似短期通胀与产出效果的同时，大幅降低价格水平的长期上升幅度。

papers.title: Understanding Cross-State Variations in Medicaid Enrollment During and After the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Helena Detering, Anwita Mahajan
papers.abstract: The implementation and unwinding of the FFCRA's continuous coverage requirement generated historically large changes in Medicaid enrollment during the COVID-19 pandemic. Using a combination of descriptive and causal analyses, we examine the substantial cross-state differences in these changes, which remain little understood. We find that policies designed to ease unwinding frictions, as well as federal fiscal assistance to states, have little predictive power, suggesting limited roles for administrative design or liquidity constraints. Political preferences have modest predictive power during the unwinding period. Pandemic-era Medicaid expansions and more generous baseline eligibility thresholds are strongly associated with larger net enrollment gains.
papers.zh_title: 理解新冠疫情期间及之后各州医疗补助注册的差异
papers.zh_abstract: 《家庭第一冠状病毒应对法案》持续覆盖要求的实施与退出，在新冠疫情期间导致了医疗补助注册人数的历史性大幅变化。通过结合描述性和因果分析，我们考察了这些变化中显著的跨州差异，这些差异至今仍鲜为人知。我们发现，旨在减少退出摩擦的政策以及联邦对各州的财政援助，几乎没有预测能力，这表明行政设计或流动性约束的作用有限。在退出期间，政治偏好具有适度的预测能力。疫情时期的医疗补助扩展和更慷慨的基线资格门槛，与更大的净注册增长密切相关。

papers.title: The Pass-through of Tariffs and Exchange Rates
papers.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Aurélien Eyquem
papers.abstract: This paper shows that the currency in which traded goods are invoiced has a first-order implication for the short-run impact of tariffs on the economy. If prices are set in terms of producer’s currency (PCP), a unilateral tariff is contractionary on impact, reducing GDP, and causing a deterioration in the trade balance. By contrast, with prices pre-set in buyers currency (LCP), the same tariff shock is expansionary, and improves the trade balance. The key difference between the two regimes lies in the differential exchange rate pass- through under PCP relative to LCP. In welfare terms however, the situation is reversed.
