A tariff under LCP leads to a fall in short-run welfare, as consumption and investment fall sharply, while the same tariff may be welfare enhancing under PCP. Under dollar currency pricing (DCP), we find results intermediate between the two invoicing regimes. With retaliation, the stark difference in pricing regimes is attenuated.
papers.zh_title: 关税与汇率的传导
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，贸易商品计价货币的选择对关税在短期内的经济影响具有首要意义。如果价格以生产者货币（PCP）设定，单边关税在冲击发生时具有紧缩效应，会降低GDP并导致贸易平衡恶化。相反，如果价格预先以买方货币（LCP）设定，相同的关税冲击则具有扩张效应，并改善贸易平衡。两种机制之间的关键区别在于PCP相对于LCP下汇率传导的差异。然而，从福利角度看，情况则相反。在LCP下，关税导致短期福利下降，因为消费和投资急剧下降；而在PCP下，相同的关税可能提升福利。在美元计价（DCP）下，我们发现结果介于两种计价机制之间。在存在报复的情况下，定价机制之间的显著差异会被削弱。

papers.title: Let’s Chat: Leveraging Chatbot Outreach for Improved Course Performance
papers.authors: Katharine E. Meyer, Lindsay C. Page, Catherine Mata, Eric Smith, Brendan Tyler Walsh, Candice L. Fifield, Michelle Tyson, Amy E. Eremionkhale, Michael Evans, Shelby Frost, Eye Eoun Jung
papers.abstract: This study provides pre-registered, experimental evidence on the use of non-generative artificial intelligence (AI) chatbots to support students in large-enrollment undergraduate courses. We find the chatbot messaging increased students’ final grades and engagement with academic supports, such as tutoring. Treatment effects were generally consistent across student demographics, with the exception of treated women in a Microeconomics course, who earned final grades that were seven percentage points higher than women in the control group. This study provides evidence that integrating AI-enabled outreach and communication to students in their college courses can enhance student engagement, learning, and course performance.
papers.zh_title: 我们来聊聊：利用聊天机器人外联提升课程表现
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究提供了关于在大型本科课程中使用非生成式人工智能聊天机器人支持学生的预注册实验证据。我们发现，聊天机器人消息提高了学生的期末成绩以及对学术支持（如辅导）的参与度。处理效应在不同学生人口统计特征上总体一致，但微观经济学课程中接受处理的女性除外——其期末成绩比对照组女性高出七个百分点。本研究证明，在大学课程中整合人工智能驱动的外联与沟通能够增强学生的参与度、学习效果及课程表现。

papers.title: New Evidence on the Health-Status Gradient from Imperial China
papers.authors: Wolfgang Keller, Carol H. Shiue, Karen Eggleston
papers.abstract: We study the relationship between health and social status in China using genealogical data from the 14th to 19th centuries. The data covers broad segments of the population linking husbands, wives, and sons, allowing us to examine whether status was associated with survival not only for adult men but also across households and generations. In a sample centered on the early 1700s, the typical lifespan of married men is 52, but varies widely. High-status men have a 22 percent higher probability of living past 50 than low-status men, resulting in a lifespan advantage of seven years. High status is also associated with significant survival advantages for wives and children. The lifespan premium of the wife of a high-status man over the wife of a commoner exceeds 10 years, and the chance that the son of a high-status man dies before reaching 10 years is less than half that of a low-status man’s son. Up to the 17th century the lifespan advantage is largely confined to those with top status, while the health-status gradient across all status levels emerges during the 18th century. The findings provide new evidence on health-status inequality in a less-studied setting, and suggest that health-status inequality is usefully analyzed from a family and intergenerational perspective.
papers.zh_title: 来自中华帝国关于健康-地位梯度的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用14至19世纪的家谱数据研究中国健康与社会地位之间的关系。这些数据涵盖了广泛的人口群体，将丈夫、妻子和儿子联系起来，使我们能够考察地位是否不仅与成年男性的生存相关，而且跨家庭和代际也相关。在以18世纪初为中心的样本中，已婚男性的典型寿命为52岁，但差异很大。高地位男性活过50岁的概率比低地位男性高22%，导致寿命优势为7年。高地位还与妻子和子女的显著生存优势相关。高地位男性妻子的寿命比普通男性妻子长超过10年，高地位男性儿子在10岁前死亡的概率不到低地位男性儿子的一半。直到17世纪，寿命优势主要局限于最高地位者，而所有地位层级之间的健康-地位梯度则在18世纪出现。这些发现为在一个较少被研究的背景下提供了关于健康-地位不平等的新证据，并表明从家庭和代际视角分析健康-地位不平等是有益的。

papers.title: Seemingly Anchored Inflation Expectations
papers.authors: Ulrike Malmendier, Stefan Nagel
papers.abstract: Empirical evidence commonly cited as indicating that inflation expectations have become better anchored includes the declining sensitivity of expectations to inflation surprises over time, particularly around the adoption of inflation targeting. These patterns are typically attributed to the influence of explicit or implicit inflation targets on inflation expectations. We show that this evidence is consistent with a model of experience-based learning in which individuals learn solely from their life-time history of realized inflation, without anchoring their expectations to an announced inflation target. In this model, the prolonged experience of low short-run inflation persistence in the pre-COVID decades renders long-run expectations insensitive to inflation surprises, matching the patterns observed in empirical anchoring tests. A unique prediction of the experience-based learning model is also borne out in the data: the decline in surprise sensitivity since the 1980s is strongest among younger individuals. The memory of low inflation persistence experiences further explains why long-run inflation expectations remained stable in the face of the post-COVID inflation surge. At the same time, simulations indicate that the sensitivity of long-run expectations to inflation surprises would rise sharply if individuals were to experience another sustained episode of highly persistent inflation. Overall, long-run inflation expectations may be less firmly anchored than commonly believed.
papers.zh_title: 看似锚定的通胀预期
papers.zh_abstract: 常被引用的实证证据表明通胀预期已更好锚定，包括预期对通胀意外敏感度随时间下降，尤其在通胀目标制采用前后。这些模式通常被归因于显性或隐性通胀目标对预期的影响。我们证明，该证据与基于经验的学习模型一致——在该模型中，个体仅从自身生命历程中的实际通胀历史学习，而不将预期锚定于公布的通胀目标。该模型下，新冠疫情前几十年低短期通胀持续性的长期经历，使长期预期对通胀意外不敏感，与实证锚定检验中观察到的模式吻合。基于经验的学习模型的一个独特预测也在数据中得到验证：自1980年代以来，意外敏感度的下降在年轻个体中最为显著。对低通胀持续性经历的记忆进一步解释了为何长期通胀预期在新冠疫情后通胀飙升中保持稳定。同时，模拟表明，若个体再次经历持续的高通胀时期，长期预期对通胀意外的敏感度将急剧上升。总体而言，长期通胀预期的锚定程度可能不如普遍认为的那么牢固。

papers.title: Supply and Demand with Market Heterogeneity
papers.authors: Ingvil Gaarder, Lancelot Henry de Frahan, Magne Mogstad, Alexander Torgovitsky, Oscar Volpe
papers.abstract: We revisit the classic identification problem of separating supply and demand for a homogeneous good using data from multiple markets. We allow markets to be heterogeneous according to unobservables, a feature that arises if there are unobservable differences in consumer preferences or firm technology. We develop a new identification analysis based on hypothetical market types. We use this analysis to show how nonparametric, economically motivated assumptions carry empirical restrictions for a wide range of target parameters, including elasticities, but also welfare parameters, such as consumer surplus. Then, we develop computationally tractable methods for implementing partially identified linear random coefficients models in which the slopes of supply and demand are heterogeneous. We apply these methods to estimate the welfare impact and incidence of sales taxes in the United States.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 市场异质性下的供给与需求
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了利用多个市场数据分离同质商品供给与需求的经典识别问题。我们允许市场根据不可观测因素存在异质性，这一特征源于消费者偏好或企业技术中不可观测的差异。我们基于假设的市场类型发展了一种新的识别分析方法。利用这一分析，我们展示了非参数、经济动机驱动的假设如何对广泛的目标参数施加经验约束，这些参数不仅包括弹性，还包括福利参数（如消费者剩余）。随后，我们开发了计算上可行的方法，用于实现部分识别的线性随机系数模型，其中供给和需求的斜率是异质的。我们将这些方法应用于估算美国销售税的福利影响和归宿。

papers.title: Women in the Platform Economy: Descriptive Evidence from Drivers in India and Indonesia
papers.authors: Achyuta Adhvaryu, Levina Adiputri, Valentina Brailovskaya, Priyanka Dua, Jenny Susan John, Pratibha Joshi, Terry Muthahhari, Rivandra Royono, Jack Thunde
papers.abstract: We provide descriptive evidence on women's experiences in platform-based driving and delivery work using survey and administrative data from India and Indonesia. Partnering with major two-wheeler platforms, we study representative samples of drivers, oversampling women to examine gender differences (India: 404 women, 2,153 men; Indonesia: 892 women, 2,114 men). Female participation is extremely low -- 0.8% in India and 1.5% in Indonesia -- consistent with barriers related to safety concerns, cultural norms, and limited access to required assets. Among women who do enter, platform work is used differently than by men: women work fewer hours, are more likely to log in during free time, and place greater value on flexibility and supplemental earnings. Women earn less per hour than men -- by 6-8% in India and 8-22% in Indonesia -- differences that align with gendered choices over working times, locations, and service types, likely shaped by safety and domestic constraints. Women also face distinct challenges: higher reported harassment in both countries and, in Indonesia, widespread customer discrimination and higher accident rates. At the same time, a disproportionate share of women were unemployed before joining the platform, and women are more likely than men to report higher current earnings relative to prior work. Together, the evidence highlights how flexibility coexists with persistent gender-specific risks, constraints, and unequal returns in location-based platform work in low- and middle-income country contexts.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 平台经济中的女性：来自印度和印尼司机的描述性证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用印度和印尼的调查与行政数据，提供了关于女性在平台化驾驶和配送工作中经历的描述性证据。通过与主要两轮车平台合作，我们研究了具有代表性的司机样本，并超额抽样女性以考察性别差异（印度：404名女性，2153名男性；印尼：892名女性，2114名男性）。女性参与率极低——印度为0.8%，印尼为1.5%——这与安全担忧、文化规范以及获取所需资产受限等障碍一致。在已进入平台的女性中，她们对平台工作的使用方式与男性不同：女性工作时间更少，更倾向于在空闲时间登录，并且更看重灵活性和补充性收入。女性每小时收入低于男性——印度低6-8%，印尼低8-22%——这些差异与性别化的工作时间、地点和服务类型选择相一致，这些选择很可能受到安全和家庭约束的影响。女性还面临独特的挑战：两国均报告了更高的骚扰率，在印尼还存在普遍的客户歧视和更高的事故率。与此同时，加入平台前失业的女性比例过高，且女性比男性更有可能报告当前收入高于先前工作。综合来看，这些证据凸显了在中低收入国家的基于位置平台工作中，灵活性如何与持续的性别特定风险、约束以及不平等的回报并存。

papers.title: What Do Asset Prices in April 2025 Say About Demand for the Dollar?
papers.authors: Rohan Kekre, Moritz Lenel
papers.abstract: We interpret exchange rate and yield curve responses to the April 2, 2025 U.S. tariff announcement through the lens of an equilibrium model capturing the portfolio balance mechanism. Disciplined by price elasticities from QE announcements, a 3-12% decline in the demand for dollar bonds (relative to annual U.S. GDP) accounts for the dollar depreciation and rise in dollar yields during this episode. News of a gradual rebalancing out of dollar bonds is consistent with immediate price impact since asset prices are forward-looking. Lower dollar bond demand was accompanied by higher risk aversion, which explains the cross-section of responses across currencies.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 2025年4月的资产价格揭示了美元需求的什么信息？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一个捕捉投资组合平衡机制的均衡模型，解读汇率和收益率曲线对2025年4月2日美国关税公告的反应。在量化宽松公告的价格弹性约束下，美元债券需求下降3-12%（相对于美国年度GDP）解释了这一时期美元贬值和美元收益率上升。关于逐步减持美元债券的消息与即时的价格影响一致，因为资产价格具有前瞻性。美元债券需求下降伴随着风险厌恶情绪上升，这解释了不同货币之间反应的横截面差异。

papers.title: Social Insurance with Imperfect Eligibility Screening: Theory and Evidence from Pandemic UI
papers.authors: Adam Isen, Elira Kuka, Bryan A. Stuart
papers.abstract: This paper studies social insurance with imperfect eligibility screening, focusing on Unemployment Insurance (UI) during its expansion in 2020 and 2021. We study the extent of imperfect screening by identifying anomalous payments using administrative tax data and UI policies, finding $214 billion in potentially-improper payments—concentrated in the Pandemic Unemployment Assistance (PUA) program—with approximately half detectable ex-ante through improved federal-state data sharing. There is substantial geographic variation, and a border design shows this is partly due to policy decisions made by states. To assess the implications for optimal policy, we first conduct simulations that replace PUA with means-tested, lump-sum transfers, finding that these transfers would have better insured against income losses at lower administrative cost. Second, we develop a model of opt-in versus automatic transfers that shows the targeting advantage of opt-in programs can reverse when ineligible recipients pass the benefit screen. Calibrated to 2020 UI, the model implies that shifting toward automatic transfers would have increased social welfare.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 具有不完全资格筛查的社会保险：来自疫情失业保险的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了具有不完全资格筛查的社会保险，重点关注2020年和2021年扩张期间的失业保险。我们通过利用行政税务数据和失业保险政策识别异常支付，来考察不完全筛查的程度，发现2140亿美元的潜在不当支付——主要集中在疫情失业援助计划中——其中约一半可通过改进联邦-州数据共享在事前检测到。存在显著的地理差异，边界设计表明这在一定程度上源于各州的政策决策。为评估对最优政策的影响，我们首先进行模拟，用基于经济状况调查的定额转移支付替代疫情失业援助计划，发现这些转移支付能以更低的行政成本更好地对冲收入损失。其次，我们构建了一个关于选择加入与自动转移支付的模型，表明当不合格领取者通过福利筛查时，选择加入计划的目标定位优势可能逆转。以2020年失业保险为校准，该模型表明转向自动转移支付将增加社会福利。

papers.title: Long Term Care and Cognitive Impairment in Spain
papers.authors: Joan Costa-i-Font, Sergi Jimenez-Martin, Juan Oliva, Cristina Vilaplana-Prieto, Analía Viola
papers.abstract: The growing prevalence of cognitive impairment (CI) is one of the main drivers of age-related demand for health and long-term care (LTC). In Spain, CI is estimated to affect 18.5% of Spaniards over 65, and 45.3% in those aged 85 and above. This paper draws on a pooled pre-COVID data from a longitudinal sample of individuals aged 65+ to examine the effect of CI and physical limitations on health and long-term care utilisation, estimates its costs, and financial burden. We report four sets of findings. First, we find that socioeconomic status at older age to be the strongest predictor of CI. Second, while both CI and physical limitations increase health and care adult care use, physical impairment is a stronger predictor of overall care utilisation (73% versus 55% for CI alone) and nursing home residence (2.0% versus 0.9%). Third, informal caregiving constitutes the overwhelming majority of dementia costs, accounting for 69–81% of the total. Finally, we estimate that the replacement cost of informal care would exhaust the full budget of Spain’s LTC system (SAAD).
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 西班牙的长期护理与认知障碍
papers.zh_abstract: 认知障碍患病率的上升是年龄相关健康与长期护理需求的主要驱动因素之一。在西班牙，估计18.5%的65岁以上西班牙人受认知障碍影响，85岁及以上人群中这一比例达45.3%。本文利用疫情前合并的纵向数据样本（65岁以上个体），考察认知障碍和身体限制对健康与长期护理利用的影响，估算其成本及财务负担。我们报告四组发现。第一，老年时期的社会经济地位是认知障碍的最强预测因子。第二，虽然认知障碍和身体限制均增加健康与成人护理使用，但身体障碍是整体护理利用（仅认知障碍为55%，身体障碍为73%）和养老院居住（2.0%对0.9%）的更强预测因子。第三，非正式照护构成痴呆症成本的绝大多数，占总成本的69-81%。最后，我们估算非正式照护的替代成本将耗尽西班牙长期护理系统的全部预算。

papers.title: Mind the KF* Gap: EME Vulnerabilities to Global Shocks
papers.authors: John D. Burger, Francis E. Warnock, Veronica Cacdac Warnock
papers.abstract: Emerging market economies (EMEs) have historically been vulnerable to external shocks. Recently the global economy has experienced several major shocks yet EMEs have been remarkably resilient. Some of this improved performance can be attributed to prudent policies and stronger economic fundamentals, but the existing literature points to an overperformance mystery by some EMEs with weaker fundamentals. We evaluate an alternative measure of vulnerability based on the concept of a natural level of capital flows (KF*). Specifically, we hypothesize that EMEs are more vulnerable when prior to a large global shock capital flows—portfolio inflows, to be specific—exceed KF*. Results indicate that for major global shocks over the past two decades the pre-shock gap between actual portfolio and KF* has substantial predictive power for the post-shock performance of EMEs.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 警惕KF*缺口：新兴市场经济体对全球冲击的脆弱性
papers.zh_abstract: 新兴市场经济体历史上易受外部冲击影响。近期全球经济经历多次重大冲击，但新兴市场经济体表现出显著的韧性。这种改善的部分表现可归因于审慎的政策和更强的经济基本面，但现有文献指出，一些基本面较弱的新兴市场经济体存在表现超预期的谜题。我们基于资本流动自然水平的概念，评估了一种替代性的脆弱性衡量指标。具体而言，我们假设当重大全球冲击发生前，资本流动（特别是证券投资流入）超过KF*时，新兴市场经济体更为脆弱。结果表明，对于过去二十年间的重大全球冲击，冲击前实际证券投资与KF*之间的缺口对新兴市场经济体冲击后的表现具有显著的预测能力。

papers.title: Psychosocial Health and Well-Being After A Mortality Shock
papers.authors: Elizabeth Frankenberg, Cecep Sumantri, Duncan Thomas
papers.abstract: We investigate the short- and long-run impacts of unexpected mortality on psychosocial health in the context of a large-scale high-mortality natural disaster, the 2004 Indian Ocean earthquake and tsunami. The effects of the tsunami-related mortality measured at the community level are contrasted with the effects of individual-specific loss of close kin using population-representative longitudinal survey data from the Study of the Tsunami Aftermath and Recovery. In the short-run, two years post-tsunami, both community and individual-level mortality exposures are significant predictors of elevated depression and post-traumatic stress symtoms. In the longer-run, ten years post-tsunami, individual-level exposures are slightly attenuated but remain significant predictors of both psychosocial health measures; in contrast, community-level mortality predicts post-traumatic stress but not depression symptoms. Mortality is linked to smaller household sizes in the short- and long-run and to less social support in the long-run, although the latter effect differs substantially for males and females. The estimates adjust for other tsunami exposure measures and, in the individual-level analyses, we compare people living in the same community at the time of the tsunami who were exposed to the same community-level mortality rate.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 死亡率冲击后的社会心理健康与福祉
papers.zh_abstract: 我们以2004年印度洋地震和海啸这一大规模高死亡率自然灾害为背景，研究了意外死亡率对社会心理健康的短期和长期影响。利用“海啸后果与恢复研究”中具有人口代表性的纵向调查数据，我们将社区层面测量的海啸相关死亡率的影响与个体层面近亲丧失的影响进行了对比。在短期（海啸后两年），社区和个体层面的死亡率暴露都是抑郁和创伤后应激症状升高的显著预测因子。在长期（海啸后十年），个体层面的暴露效应略有减弱，但仍是对两种社会心理健康指标的显著预测因子；相比之下，社区层面的死亡率能预测创伤后应激症状，但不能预测抑郁症状。死亡率与短期和长期的家庭规模缩小有关，并与长期的社会支持减少有关，尽管后一种效应在男性和女性之间存在显著差异。我们的估计对其他海啸暴露指标进行了调整，并且在个体层面分析中，我们比较了海啸发生时居住在同一社区、面临相同社区死亡率的人群。

papers.title: Should We Tax Trade? A Pigouvian Perspective
papers.authors: Arnaud Costinot, Iván Werning
papers.abstract: We develop a simple and intuitive Pigouvian perspective on optimal trade policy. Our approach unifies a wide range of rationales for taxing trade, from the classical optimal tariff argument to contemporary debates about global carbon emissions and geopolitics. We also clarify when trade policy intervention is warranted and when alternative domestic instruments should be used instead.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 我们应该对贸易征税吗？一个庇古视角
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个简单直观的关于最优贸易政策的庇古视角。我们的方法统一了从经典的最优关税论点到当代关于全球碳排放和地缘政治的争论等一系列对贸易征税的理由。我们还阐明了何时需要贸易政策干预，以及何时应改用其他国内工具。

papers.title: Multi-Project Collaborations
papers.authors: Charles Angelucci, Roi Orzach
papers.abstract: We analyze collaborative experimentation across multiple independent domains. Each domain contains infinitely many potential projects with asymmetric benefits. In each period and in each domain, two players can idle, jointly explore a new project, or jointly exploit a known one, with voluntary transfers. For intermediate discount factors, treating domains as independent during experimentation is suboptimal. The optimal experimentation policy exhibits common features of collaborative experimentation: lengthy exploration, temporary project exploitation, recall of past projects, and inefficient initial or terminal idling within certain domains. We connect these findings to research on buyer-supplier dynamics and persistent productivity differences.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 多项目合作
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了跨多个独立领域的合作性实验。每个领域包含无限多个具有不对称收益的潜在项目。在每个时期和每个领域，两个参与者可以选择闲置、共同探索一个新项目，或共同利用一个已知项目，并允许自愿转移支付。对于中等贴现因子，在实验过程中将各领域视为独立是次优的。最优实验政策展现出合作性实验的共同特征：漫长的探索、暂时的项目利用、对过去项目的召回，以及在某些领域内低效的初始或最终闲置。我们将这些发现与关于买方-供应商动态和持续生产率差异的研究联系起来。

papers.title: From Stocks to Flows: Debt Service and Fiscal Sustainability
papers.authors: Barry Eichengreen, Maxime Menuet, Gregory Donnat
papers.abstract: We revisit fiscal sustainability through the lens of the government’s budget constraint. What constrains fiscal policy is not the stock of outstanding liabilities per se, but the fiscal cost of servicing debt. Using two centuries of U.S. fiscal data (1800–2023) and a long-run panel of advanced economies, we show that primary surpluses are systematically more closely associated with debt-service burdens, while debt ratios lose explanatory power when debt service is taken into account. Fiscal responses intensify when financing conditions deteriorate, specifically when the interest-growth differential is positive. We rationalize these findings using a simple flow-based framework in which debt stabilization depends on the responsiveness of fiscal surpluses to financing pressures. The results suggest that fiscal sustainability depends less on debt thresholds than on financing regimes and governments’ ability to absorb debt-service burdens.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 从存量到流量：债务服务与财政可持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过政府预算约束的视角重新审视财政可持续性。约束财政政策的并非未偿债务存量本身，而是偿还债务的财政成本。利用美国两个世纪的财政数据（1800-2023年）和一个发达经济体的长期面板数据，我们表明，基本盈余与债务服务负担的系统性关联更为紧密，而当考虑债务服务时，债务比率会失去解释力。当融资条件恶化时，特别是当利率-增长率差为正时，财政反应会加剧。我们用一个简单的基于流量的框架来合理化这些发现，在该框架中，债务稳定取决于财政盈余对融资压力的反应程度。结果表明，财政可持续性更多地取决于融资体制和政府吸收债务服务负担的能力，而非债务阈值。

papers.title: Banking on a Corporate Rebrand
papers.authors: Kris James Mitchener, Matthew S. Jaremski, Kilian Rieder
papers.abstract: Firms often rebrand to counter negative shocks, but can it work? Using a historical natural experiment, we analyze a large sample of companies from the same industry (banking) that shared very similar names, but overwhelmingly decided to change them in response to a common, negative news shock. U.S. entry into World War I in 1917 created a sudden anti-German backlash against anything that invoked an association with the now enemy. The shock itself was thus orthogonal to bank fundamentals and pre-existing trends, but pushed banks to reconsider their brands. After 1917, the few German-named banks that kept their tainted names saw significant declines in assets, deposits, and market share relative to other banks. However, German-named banks that rebranded mitigated much of the negative shock. Specifically, German-named banks that adopted a new non-ethnic brand name avoided between 75% and 85% of the anti-German effect, and those that adopted a new patriotic brand name were able to neutralize it completely. Overall, we find that “crisis rebranding” paid off in our historical setting regardless of the chosen brand, with patriotic rebranding proving the most effective at offsetting the exogenous shock.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 押注于企业品牌重塑
papers.zh_abstract: 企业经常通过品牌重塑来应对负面冲击，但这有效吗？利用一个历史自然实验，我们分析了一个来自同一行业（银行业）的大样本公司，这些公司共享非常相似的名称，但绝大多数决定在面临一个共同的负面新闻冲击时更改名称。1917年美国加入第一次世界大战，引发了对任何与当前敌人有关联的事物的突然反德情绪。该冲击本身与银行基本面及已有趋势正交，但促使银行重新考虑其品牌。1917年后，少数保留受污名名称的德文名称银行，其资产、存款和市场份额相对于其他银行显著下降。然而，进行品牌重塑的德文名称银行缓解了大部分负面冲击。具体来说，采用新的非族裔品牌名称的德文名称银行避免了75%至85%的反德效应，而采用新的爱国品牌名称的银行则完全抵消了该效应。总体而言，我们发现，在我们的历史背景下，“危机品牌重塑”无论选择何种品牌都取得了回报，其中爱国品牌重塑在抵消外生冲击方面最为有效。

papers.title: Job Ads as Signals: Evidence from a Priced Amenity and Worker Beliefs
papers.authors: Pawel Adrjan, Mária Balgova, Simon Jäger, Jonas Jessen, Jason Sockin
papers.abstract: Discrete choice experiments are widely used to estimate workers’ willingness to pay (WTP) for job amenities under the assumption that varying an attribute does not change workers’ beliefs about other job attributes. We test this assumption by embedding an amenity with a known market price—a popular monthly public transport pass—in a largescale discrete choice experiment with German workers. Many workers, including public transport users, overvalue the ticket by more than 100%, despite WTP for other attributes aligning with the literature. A complementary belief-elicitation experiment shows that advertising an amenity, such as the pass but also common amenities like work from home, causally shifts beliefs about unlisted attributes of the job. Posted wages similarly signal unlisted attributes so that wage variation, the money metric for WTP calculation, is itself contaminated by belief spillovers—such as higher pay signaling heightened stress. These spillovers imply that discrete choice estimates capture perceived bundles rather than isolated attributes, and distort current estimates of non-wage compensation and monopsony power.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 招聘广告作为信号：来自定价福利与工人信念的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 离散选择实验被广泛用于估计工人对工作福利的支付意愿（WTP），其假设是改变某一属性不会改变工人对其他工作属性的信念。我们通过将一个具有已知市场价格的福利——一种流行的月度公共交通通票——嵌入到一项针对德国工人的大规模离散选择实验中，来检验这一假设。许多工人，包括公共交通使用者，对该通票的估值高出实际价值100%以上，尽管对其他属性的WTP与文献一致。一项补充性的信念诱导实验表明，宣传一项福利，如通票，也包括常见的福利如居家办公，会因果性地改变对工作未列明属性的信念。公布的工资同样传递了未列明属性的信号，因此作为WTP计算货币度量的工资变化本身也受到信念溢出效应的影响——例如，高薪可能意味着压力增大。这些溢出效应意味着离散选择估计捕捉到的是感知到的福利组合而非孤立的属性，并扭曲了当前对非工资补偿和买方垄断势力的估计。

papers.title: Long-Run Intergenerational Effects of Social Security
papers.authors: Daniel K. Fetter, Lee M. Lockwood, Paul Mohnen
papers.abstract: Both historically and today, support of aging parents has largely taken the form of in-kind transfers that require physical proximity, such as housing and caregiving. If Social Security substitutes for such support, it can relax constraints on where recipients' children live and work. We investigate the long-run intergenerational effects of the early Social Security program, exploiting within-occupation, cross-industry differences in coverage and a new dataset linking parents to their children's later-life outcomes. We find that sons whose parents had greater predicted coverage moved farther from their childhood homes, earned more, and lived in better neighborhoods late in life. We find no such effects for daughters, who tended to provide forms of support less easily replaced by Social Security. The gains considerably exceeded the associated Social Security benefits for the average family, with migration to better-matched labor markets a likely key driver. We propose that the early program enabled families to realize gains from migration that were back-loaded, uncertain, and difficult to contract on.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 社会保障的长期代际效应
papers.zh_abstract: 历史上及当今，对年迈父母的赡养主要采取需要物理邻近的实物转移形式，如住房和照料。如果社会保障替代了此类支持，则可能放松对受助者子女居住和就业地点的约束。我们利用早期社会保障计划在职业内部、行业之间的覆盖差异，以及将父母与其子女晚年结果联系起来的新数据集，研究了该计划的长期代际效应。我们发现，父母预期保障覆盖率更高的儿子，其成年后离家更远、收入更高，且晚年居住在更好的社区。对于女儿，我们未发现此类效应，因为她们往往提供更不易被社会保障替代的支持形式。这些收益远超普通家庭所获得的相关社会保障福利，而迁移至更匹配的劳动力市场很可能是关键驱动因素。我们认为，早期计划使家庭能够实现迁移带来的收益，这些收益具有滞后性、不确定性且难以通过契约实现。

papers.title: Zoning: Externalities or Misallocation?
papers.authors: Yu-Hsin Ho, Chang-Tai Hsieh, Wen-Tai Hsu, Yu-Jhih Luo
papers.abstract: We study how residential-commercial zoning affects the allocation of urban space. Using property-level data from Taipei and 34 U.S. metropolitan areas, we infer neighborhood-level zoning wedges from the allocation of residents, workers, and floor space. We find substantially greater dispersion in these wedges in U.S. cities than in Taipei, where mixed-use development is pervasive. The inferred wedges increase neighborhood specialization and reduce welfare. We then evaluate whether zoning is aligned with the neighborhood characteristics that would justify intervention. Although zoning is systematically related to comparative advantage, comparative advantage explains only a small fraction of the variation in zoning. The dominant effect of zoning in American cities is therefore not to promote efficient land use, but to increase the segregation of residential and commercial activity across neighborhoods.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 分区制：外部性还是错配？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究住宅-商业分区制如何影响城市空间的配置。利用台北及美国34个大都市区的物业层面数据，我们从居民、工人和楼面面积的配置中推断出邻里层面的分区楔子。我们发现，美国城市的这些楔子离散程度远高于混合用途开发普遍存在的台北。推断出的楔子增加了邻里专业化并降低了福利。随后，我们评估分区制是否与可能证明干预合理的邻里特征相一致。尽管分区制与比较优势系统相关，但比较优势仅能解释分区制变异的很小一部分。因此，美国城市分区制的主导效应并非促进土地高效利用，而是加剧住宅与商业活动在邻里间的隔离。

papers.title: Competition and Anomalies Redux: Evidence from U.S. Auto Dealers
papers.authors: David B. Huffman, Lamar Pierce, Alex Rees-Jones, Germán J. Reyes
papers.abstract: We examine a choice between bonus contracts offered to dealers of a U.S. auto manufacturer. In our data, dealers select the non-profit-maximizing option in 20 percent of observations, costing the mistaken dealers $18,453 per year on average. We examine how the propensity to make this mistake varies with competition, identified both cross-sectionally and within dealers over time. Both analyses show that greater competition substantially lowers the rate of mistakes. However, even in the most competitive markets, consequential mistakes persist. Our results suggest that competition disciplines mainly through within-dealer changes in behavior rather than entry and exit.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 竞争与异象再探：来自美国汽车经销商的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了美国一家汽车制造商向其经销商提供的奖金合同之间的选择。在我们的数据中，经销商在20%的观测中选择非利润最大化选项，平均每年给错误选择的经销商造成18,453美元的损失。我们研究了这种错误倾向如何随竞争程度变化，通过横截面分析以及经销商内部随时间的变化来识别竞争。两种分析均表明，更强的竞争显著降低了错误率。然而，即使在竞争最激烈的市场中，重大错误依然存在。我们的结果表明，竞争主要通过经销商内部行为变化而非进入与退出发挥约束作用。

papers.title: Financial Sanctions and the Global Payments Network
papers.authors: Gregor Matvos, Brent Neiman
papers.abstract: Financial sanctions are widely viewed as a powerful tool of economic statecraft, yet direct evidence on their effects remains limited. We study how sanctions affect access to global payment networks using data on correspondent banking relationships, which link banks across countries and currencies to enable cross-border transactions. We first show that the dollar and euro networks offer the broadest global connectivity, supported by a small number of key hubs in the U.S. and Europe. Sanctions that restrict access to these hubs are therefore potentially powerful. We then show how financial sanctions imposed during 2021-2025 – a period of rapid growth in sanctions – reduced targeted banks' access to major-currency networks by severing correspondent relationships. Sanctioned institutions often retained access but only through longer, indirect, and more fragile chains of intermediaries. Finally, in countries where sanctions expanded sharply, non-sanctioned banks also lost connectivity to Western networks, likely reflecting de-risking. These banks reoriented toward alternatives, particularly the Chinese yuan. Outside these heavily sanctioned economies, shifts away from the dollar and toward the yuan remain minimal on average.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 金融制裁与全球支付网络
papers.zh_abstract: 金融制裁被广泛视为经济治国方略的有力工具，但关于其效果的直接证据仍然有限。我们利用代理行关系数据研究制裁如何影响对全球支付网络的接入，这些关系连接不同国家和货币的银行，以实现跨境交易。我们首先表明，美元和欧元网络提供最广泛的全球连通性，这得益于美国和欧洲少数关键枢纽的支持。因此，限制接入这些枢纽的制裁可能具有强大效力。随后，我们展示了2021-2025年间（制裁快速增长的时期）实施的金融制裁如何通过切断代理行关系，减少了目标银行对主要货币网络的接入。受制裁机构通常仍能保留接入，但只能通过更长、间接且更脆弱的中间链条。最后，在制裁急剧扩大的国家，未受制裁的银行也失去了与西方网络的连接，这很可能反映了去风险化行为。这些银行转向替代方案，尤其是人民币。在这些受严重制裁的经济体之外，从美元向人民币的转移总体上仍微乎其微。

papers.title: Economic Well-Being of Latino Households in the U.S.: a Scoping Review of Research on Poverty, the Safety Net, and Family Supports
papers.authors: Matthew Maury, Agustina Laurito, Lisa A. Gennetian, Kevin Kamto Sonke
papers.abstract: This scoping review curates empirical research on economic well-being among Latino households in peer reviewed journals from 1990 to 2025, following PRISMA guidelines and a preregistered search strategy. The search yielded more than 5,000 studies revealing a greater than five-fold increase since the early 2000s. The majority of studies examined Medicaid and health insurance and approximately half examined government benefit programs, particularly with respect to eligibility criteria and benefit receipt. Few studies examined the employment outcomes of Latinos in the context of government benefit availability and even fewer focus on Latinos and income support. A deeper content review revealed that studies examining Hispanics are typically through comparative analyses with other racial and ethnic groups. These studies find higher poverty and material hardship, and lower receipt of government benefits, among Latino families relative to non-Latino White households. Fewer studies consider heterogeneity within Hispanic populations. Research on economic well-being among Latino households, as distinct from more general investigations regarding immigrants, expanded in tandem with growth in the Latino population and shifts in social policy. Key policy-relevant open topics of research that affect Latinos include those related to tax credits, benefit generosity, employment, and considerations of mixed-citizen status households.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 美国拉丁裔家庭的经济福祉：关于贫困、安全网与家庭支持研究的范围综述
papers.zh_abstract: 本范围综述遵循PRISMA指南和预注册搜索策略，梳理了1990年至2025年间同行评审期刊中关于拉丁裔家庭经济福祉的实证研究。搜索共获得超过5,000项研究，显示自2000年代初以来研究数量增长了五倍以上。大多数研究考察了医疗补助和健康保险，约一半研究关注政府福利项目，特别是资格标准和福利领取情况。少数研究探讨了拉丁裔在政府福利可及性背景下的就业结果，更少研究聚焦于拉丁裔与收入支持。深入内容审查显示，对西班牙裔的研究通常通过与其他种族和族裔群体的比较分析进行。这些研究发现，与非拉丁裔白人家庭相比，拉丁裔家庭面临更高的贫困率和物质困难，且政府福利领取率较低。考虑西班牙裔群体内部异质性的研究较少。拉丁裔家庭经济福祉研究（区别于对移民的更一般性调查）随着拉丁裔人口增长和社会政策变化而扩展。影响拉丁裔的关键政策相关开放研究主题包括税收抵免、福利慷慨度、就业以及混合公民身份家庭考量。

papers.title: AI Premium
papers.authors: Nicola Borri, Aleh Tsyvinski, Yukun Liu
papers.abstract: Using 380 trillion tokens of realized AI consumption across more than four hundred large language models from the licensed proprietary OpenRouter dataset covering approximately 2 percent of current global monthly AI token consumption, we analyze how AI affects firms, markets, and workers. Leveraging the unprecedented size, scope and granularity of this data, we construct the AI Factor from growth in tokens, dollars, and users, estimate firm-level AI Betas from stock return comovement, and characterize the AI Premium. First, we build a high-frequency AI factor and decompose it into salient components. Second, we show that firms whose returns covary more positively with the AI factor—high AI beta firms—earn higher subsequent returns, and the AI premium is large and heterogeneous. A value-weighted longshort strategy earns 64.1 basis points per week, and the premium is large for loadings on the intensive, frontier-oriented margin of AI consumption—closed-source models, paying and seasoned users, and long prompts—but not on casual or open-weight use. Third, the premium reaches beyond technology firms into consumer-facing and capital-heavy parts of the economy, but is absent in emerging markets, including China. Fourth, the AI exposure is more positive in nonroutine interactive work and more negative in analytical, scientific, and operations-control skills—an occupation one standard deviation higher in interaction-and-communication content has 0.36-standard-deviation higher market-implied AI exposure. Additionally, we provide early evidence of the rise of the agentic economy.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 人工智能溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 利用来自授权专有OpenRouter数据集的超过400个大语言模型的380万亿个实际AI消费代币（覆盖当前全球月度AI代币消费约2%），我们分析AI如何影响企业、市场和劳动者。借助这一前所未有的规模、范围和粒度数据，我们从代币、美元和用户的增长中构建AI因子，通过股票收益联动估计企业层面的AI贝塔，并刻画AI溢价。首先，我们构建高频AI因子并将其分解为显著成分。其次，我们表明，其收益与AI因子正协方差更强的企业（高AI贝塔企业）获得更高的后续收益，且AI溢价巨大且异质。价值加权多空策略每周收益64.1个基点，溢价对于集约型、前沿导向的AI消费边际（闭源模型、付费和资深用户、长提示词）的载荷较大，但对随意或开源权重使用则不然。第三，该溢价超越科技企业，延伸至面向消费者和资本密集型经济部门，但在包括中国在内的新兴市场中缺失。第四，AI暴露在非常规互动性工作中更为正向，在分析性、科学性和运营控制技能中更为负向——互动与沟通内容高一个标准差职业的市场隐含AI暴露高0.36个标准差。此外，我们提供了智能体经济兴起的初步证据。

papers.title: Bundling Trades In Over-The-Counter Markets
papers.authors: Jason Allen, Milena Wittwer
papers.abstract: In the canonical view of over-the-counter markets, dealers intermediate single-asset trades one at a time. We study a complementary role: when investors trade several assets at once, dealers absorb the joint position into inventory, insuring against execution risk. Using data on the near-universe of Canadian fixed-income trades, we find that bundled transactions account for 20 percent of investor volume. We develop a simple model of why, when, where, and at what prices investors bundle, and use it to explain three patterns. Switches—a purchase paired with a sale—transact at a discount, while uni-directional bundles—all buys or sells—transact at a premium, because a switch’s legs hedge within the dealer’s book while a uni-directional bundle’s compound. Bundling rises with volatility, when insurance against execution risk is most valuable, and the two types sort asymmetrically across bilateral and electronic venues. Together, these patterns reveal a dimension of intermediation the single-asset view overlooks, and one likely to grow in importance.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 场外市场中的交易捆绑
papers.zh_abstract: 在场外市场的经典观点中，做市商一次只中介单一资产交易。我们研究了一个互补角色：当投资者同时交易多种资产时，做市商将联合头寸吸收到库存中，以对冲执行风险。利用加拿大固定收益交易的近乎全量数据，我们发现捆绑交易占投资者交易量的20%。我们构建了一个简单模型来解释投资者为何、何时、何地以及以何种价格进行捆绑交易，并以此解释三种模式。配对交易（买入与卖出配对）以折价成交，而单向捆绑（全部买入或全部卖出）以溢价成交，因为配对交易的各腿在做市商账簿内对冲，而单向捆绑则形成复合风险。当波动性上升时，捆绑交易增加，此时对冲执行风险的价值最高，且两种类型在双边和电子交易平台间呈现不对称分布。这些模式共同揭示了单一资产视角所忽视的中介维度，且这一维度的重要性可能日益增长。

papers.title: Ports, Technology and Inter-City Trade: The Economics and Geopolitics of Evolving Maritime Transport Networks
papers.authors: Réka Juhász, Dávid Krisztián Nagy, Claudia Steinwender, Woan Foong Wong
papers.abstract: Maritime transport remains the backbone of global trade, yet the port and shipping network that carries it has been transformed by containerization and related technological advances. Drawing on newly available granular data---digitized historical shipping records, georeferenced ship movements, and shipment-level routing information---we present five stylized facts on the structure and evolution of the maritime network. Global shipping activity is highly concentrated among a changing lineup of dominant top ports even as lower-ranked ports disperse, while state-owned Chinese port terminal operators increasingly account for these global volumes, boosting overall port operations while delivering efficiency gains mostly to Chinese vessels. We use these facts to organize a synthesis of a fast-growing literature: containerization reshaped which port cities could expand, reinforced hub-and-spoke concentration that yields large but localized welfare gains, embedded ports in multimodal networks that amplify the returns to infrastructure, and generated market power, congestion, and environmental costs. Together, this evidence shows how evolving maritime technologies simultaneously deepen global integration and heighten the economic and geopolitical importance of critical nodes in the transport network---and of who controls them.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 港口、技术与城市间贸易：演变中的海运网络的经济与地缘政治
papers.zh_abstract: 海运仍是全球贸易的支柱，但承载贸易的港口和航运网络已被集装箱化及相关技术进步所改变。利用新获得的细粒度数据（数字化历史航运记录、地理参考船舶轨迹和货运层面路径信息），我们提出了关于海运网络结构和演变的五个典型事实。全球航运活动高度集中于不断变化的顶级港口行列，而排名较低的港口则趋于分散；同时，国有中国港口码头运营商日益占据这些全球运量，提升了整体港口运营效率，但效率收益主要惠及中国船舶。我们利用这些事实来组织对快速增长文献的综合分析：集装箱化重塑了哪些港口城市能够扩张，强化了枢纽辐射式集中（带来巨大但局部化的福利收益），将港口嵌入多式联运网络（放大基础设施回报），并产生了市场势力、拥堵和环境成本。这些证据共同表明，不断演变的海运技术如何同时深化全球一体化，并提升运输网络中关键节点（以及谁控制它们）的经济和地缘政治重要性。

papers.title: The International RBC Model Finally Works!
papers.authors: Sushant Acharya, Edouard Challe, Louphou Coulibaly
papers.abstract: We show that incorporating uninsurable countercyclical income risk into a standard international RBC model can qualitatively and quantitatively account for the quantity puzzles in open-economy macro, namely (i) the Backus-Smith puzzle, (ii) the Backus-Kehoe-Kydland puzzle and (iii) the weak correlation between the trade balance and the exchange rate. We also show that our model can simultaneously account for the Fama puzzle and the evidence that high interest rate countries have stronger currencies—which representative-agents models that rely only on financial or demand shocks cannot jointly account for. Crucially, our model resolves all these puzzles while relying solely on productivity shocks, and thus generates the observed domestic and cross-country macroeconomic comovement.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 国际RBC模型终于奏效了！
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明，将不可保险的反周期收入风险纳入标准国际RBC模型，能够定性和定量地解释开放经济宏观中的数量之谜，即（i）Backus-Smith之谜，（ii）Backus-Kehoe-Kydland之谜，以及（iii）贸易余额与汇率之间的弱相关性。我们还表明，我们的模型能同时解释Fama之谜以及高利率国家拥有更强货币的证据——而仅依赖金融或需求冲击的代表性主体模型无法共同解释这些现象。关键在于，我们的模型仅依靠生产率冲击就解决了所有这些谜题，从而生成了观察到的国内和跨国宏观经济联动。

papers.title: Intergovernmental Grants to School Districts and Educational Outcomes During the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Philip G. Hoxie, Stan Veuger
papers.abstract: The federal government appropriated $189.5 billion in pandemic aid to school districts through the Elementary and Secondary School Emergency Relief (ESSER) fund. We evaluate their impact on schools with district poverty shares near 5%, where a threshold-driven increase in funds enables us to implement a difference-in-discontinuities design. Federal funds were passed on to residents through reductions in local revenue collections, including property taxes, and did not result in increased per-pupil expenditures by school districts. We find no evidence that additional funds mitigated the declines in test scores. We provide suggestive evidence that political engagement, especially from parents, increased in districts that qualified for additional funds. This combination of engagement and reduced taxation may explain the greater enrollment and faster reopening we observe in such districts.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情大流行期间对学区的政府间拨款与教育成果
papers.zh_abstract: 联邦政府通过中小学紧急救济基金向学区拨款1895亿美元。我们评估了这些拨款对学区贫困份额接近5%的学校的影响，其中基于阈值的资金增加使我们能够实施断点回归差分设计。联邦资金通过减少地方税收收入（包括财产税）转嫁给居民，并未导致学区生均支出增加。我们没有发现额外资金缓解考试成绩下降的证据。我们提供暗示性证据表明，在获得额外资金的学区中，政治参与（尤其是家长参与）有所增加。这种参与与减税的结合可能解释了我们在这些学区观察到的更高入学率和更快重新开放。

papers.title: The Uneven Impact of Industrial Zones on Formal Job Creation in Vietnam
papers.authors: Brian McCaig, Margaret S. McMillan, Marina Mavungu Ngoma, Anh T. Pham
papers.abstract: Industrial zones are a widely used industrial policy tool, yet their effects vary enormously. Matching the timing and location of zone establishment to firm-level data in Vietnam, we estimate that a new zone raises formal employment by 2,000 workers within seven years. This average masks extreme skewness: a handful of zones generate the gains while the rest produce almost none. Zones near major trade hubs account for most of the effect, driven by export-oriented foreign manufacturers. Accounting for spillovers, domestic firms face agglomeration shadows nearby but gain farther out, while foreign manufacturers operate as enclaves, generating few local linkages.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 工业区对越南正规就业创造的不均衡影响
papers.zh_abstract: 工业区是一种广泛使用的产业政策工具，但其效果差异巨大。将越南工业区设立的时间和地点与企业层面数据匹配，我们估计一个新工业区在七年内使正规就业增加2000人。这一平均值掩盖了极端偏态分布：少数工业区产生了收益，而其余工业区几乎没有效果。靠近主要贸易枢纽的工业区贡献了大部分效应，这由出口导向型外国制造商驱动。考虑溢出效应后，国内企业在附近面临集聚阴影，但在更远处获益，而外国制造商作为飞地运营，几乎没有产生本地关联。

papers.title: Organizational Incentives and the Returns to Technology Adoption
papers.authors: Achyuta Adhvaryu, Smit Gade, Piyush Gandhi, Teresa Molina, Anant Nyshadham
papers.abstract: Misaligned incentives within organizations may explain why firms fail to adopt or fully benefit from productive technologies. We conducted a randomized controlled trial in Indian garment factories in which units received an anonymous worker-management communication technology, this technology paired with incentives for HR managers to communicate effectively with workers, or neither (control). We find that the technology alone had no impacts relative to control. But pairing the technology with HR incentives increased productivity by 5%, reduced absenteeism by 13%, and raised worker earnings by 3%. Impacts were driven by greater HR responsiveness and increased worker reporting of production-related issues.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 组织激励与技术采纳的回报
papers.zh_abstract: 组织内部的激励错位可能解释企业为何未能采纳或充分受益于高效技术。我们在印度服装工厂进行了一项随机对照试验，其中单位分别获得：匿名工人-管理层沟通技术、该技术配合针对人力资源经理的激励措施（以促进与工人有效沟通），或两者均无（对照组）。我们发现，与对照组相比，仅技术本身没有影响。但技术配合人力资源激励措施使生产率提高5%，缺勤率降低13%，工人收入增加3%。影响由人力资源响应性增强和工人报告生产相关问题增加所驱动。

papers.title: Risk Design: AI and Prediction Beyond Screening in Insurance Markets
papers.authors: Alex Chan
papers.abstract: I study insurance markets in which scalable prediction, like AI, designs residual risk rather than merely classifies fixed risk. A complete-contracting benchmark shows that if prevention is observable, contractible, competitively supplied, and fully priced, it does not matter whether consumers, insurers, or vendors supply it. Adverse selection breaks such irrelevance. When high-risk consumers are more "AI-treatable," efficient prevention makes low-risk contracts attractive to them. A contract intended for low-risk consumers faces a risk-design trilemma: separate, prevent efficiently, or avoid cross-subsidy, but not all three. The result extends Rothschild-Stiglitz from distorted coverage to distorted risk-control technology and offers market design insights of AI in insurance markets.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 风险设计：保险市场中超越筛选的人工智能与预测
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究可扩展预测（如人工智能）如何设计残余风险，而不仅仅是分类固定风险的保险市场。一个完全契约基准表明，如果预防行为可观测、可契约、竞争性供给且完全定价，那么由消费者、保险公司还是供应商提供预防并不重要。逆向选择打破了这种无关性。当高风险消费者更具“人工智能可治疗性”时，有效预防使低风险契约对他们具有吸引力。针对低风险消费者的契约面临风险设计三难困境：分离、有效预防或避免交叉补贴，但三者不可兼得。该结果将Rothschild-Stiglitz从扭曲的保险覆盖范围扩展到扭曲的风险控制技术，并为人工智能在保险市场中的市场设计提供了洞见。

papers.title: Unruly by Design: Fee Volatility and Strategic Attacks in Bitcoin Mining
papers.authors: Fabian Schär, Dario Thürkauf, David Yermack
papers.abstract: We develop a model of aberrant behavior by Bitcoin miners and test it with a new 2017-2025 dataset. Miners’ rewards, comprised partly of user fees, exhibit variability across blocks of transactions. When large reward disparities exist between adjacent blocks, miners have incentives to attempt alternative versions of prior blocks and claim other miners’ rewards for themselves. Regression analysis shows that fee differentials are associated with these attacks and longer waiting times between blocks. These patterns imply potential destabilization of the Bitcoin blockchain as future mining rewards become more volatile due to gradual withdrawal of fixed block subsidies.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 设计上的不守规矩：比特币挖矿中的费用波动与策略性攻击
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个比特币矿工异常行为模型，并使用2017-2025年的新数据集进行检验。矿工的部分奖励来自用户费用，在不同交易区块间存在差异。当相邻区块间奖励差异较大时，矿工有动机尝试先前区块的替代版本，并夺取其他矿工的奖励。回归分析表明，费用差异与这些攻击以及区块间更长的等待时间相关。这些模式意味着，随着固定区块补贴的逐步退出，未来挖矿奖励波动性增加，可能导致比特币区块链的潜在不稳定。

papers.title: Cognitive versus Physical Impairment and the Use and Cost of Long-Term Care in Japan
papers.authors: Rong Fu, Sizhe Liu, Toshiaki Iizuka, Haruko Noguchi
papers.abstract: Japan has the world’s oldest population and a universal Long-Term Care Insurance (LTCI) system, yet how care use and costs differ between cognitive and physical impairment remains underexamined. Using the nationally representative Comprehensive Survey of Living Conditions (2016 and 2019 waves; 324,466 adults aged 65 and older), we compare the utilization, intensity, and cost of long-term care across three groups: those with a dementia diagnosis (defined as regularly receiving medical treatment for dementia), those with physical (ADL) limitations but no dementia, and those with neither. A dementia diagnosis is associated with dramatically higher care use—75.3% receive some care, versus 5.3% of the unimpaired reference group. In models adjusting for demographic and socioeconomic characteristics, dementia raises the probability of receiving formal care by 55 percentage points and informal care by 52 percentage points—roughly double the effects of ADL limitations—and, conditional on use, is associated with about 113 additional hours of formal care per month (some 60% more than physical limitations alone). We estimate formal-care costs at 1.07–4.03% of GDP (depending on the valuation method) and co-residing informal-care costs at 0.79% of GDP. Per-capita formal-care costs are substantially higher for those with dementia (about 3.5 versus 2.0 million JPY annually under the self-reported approach), whereas informal-care costs are nearly uniform across impairment types—underscoring the intensive, and largely invisible, contribution of family caregivers. With the dementia and mild-cognitive-impairment population projected to reach roughly 12 million by 2040, these findings point to mounting fiscal and family-care pressures from cognitive impairment in Japan.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 认知障碍与身体障碍对日本长期护理使用及成本的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 日本拥有全球最老龄化的人口和全民长期护理保险制度，但认知障碍与身体障碍在护理使用和成本上的差异尚未得到充分研究。利用具有全国代表性的《综合生活状况调查》（2016年和2019年数据；324,466名65岁及以上成年人），我们比较了三类人群的长期护理使用、强度及成本：确诊痴呆症者（定义为定期接受痴呆症医疗）、有身体活动受限但无痴呆症者，以及两者皆无者。痴呆症诊断与显著更高的护理使用率相关——75.3%的人接受某种护理，而无障碍参照组仅为5.3%。在调整人口和社会经济特征的模型中，痴呆症使接受正式护理的概率提高55个百分点，非正式护理提高52个百分点——约为身体活动受限影响的两倍——并且在接受护理的条件下，每月额外增加约113小时的正式护理（比单纯身体限制多约60%）。我们估计正式护理成本占GDP的1.07%-4.03%（取决于估值方法），同住非正式护理成本占GDP的0.79%。人均正式护理成本在痴呆症患者中显著更高（自报法下每年约350万日元对200万日元），而非正式护理成本在各障碍类型间几乎一致——凸显了家庭照护者的高强度且基本无形的贡献。随着痴呆症和轻度认知障碍人口预计到2040年达到约1200万，这些发现表明日本认知障碍带来的财政和家庭照护压力日益加剧。

papers.title: Choice Between Public and Private Healthcare Systems: Evidence from Veterans
papers.authors: Marika Cabral, David C. Chan Jr, Seth Neller
papers.abstract: This paper examines the choice between public and private healthcare systems among elderly veterans, who are dually eligible to obtain care through the publicly operated Veterans Health Administration (VA) and through private providers financed by Medicare. We analyze health system choice among veterans who move across areas with differing rates of VA utilization to quantify the relative importance of individual-specific factors (e.g., preferences, income, health) and place-specific factors (e.g., local access, quality, and convenience). Our estimates indicate that 50–60% of geographic variation in VA use is attributable to demand-side individual factors, with the remainder explained by place-based factors. We also document important heterogeneity across types of care, with place-based factors playing a larger role for inpatient and emergency care than for outpatient and primary care. Additional analysis suggests that the supply-side features emphasized in recent legislation—distance to VA facilities and wait times—explain only a small share of estimated place effects. These findings highlight the importance of individual factors in health system choice and have implications for policies aimed at reducing geographic disparities in VA utilization.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 公共与私人医疗体系的选择：来自退伍军人的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了老年退伍军人在公共与私人医疗体系之间的选择，这些退伍军人有资格通过公营的退伍军人健康管理局和由医疗保险资助的私人提供者获得护理。我们分析了在不同退伍军人健康管理局利用率地区迁移的退伍军人的医疗体系选择，以量化个体特定因素（如偏好、收入、健康）和地方特定因素（如当地可及性、质量和便利性）的相对重要性。估计表明，退伍军人健康管理局使用的地理差异中50-60%可归因于需求侧的个体因素，其余由地方因素解释。我们还记录了不同护理类型的重要异质性，地方因素对住院和急诊护理的作用大于对门诊和初级护理的作用。进一步分析表明，近期立法强调的供给侧特征——与退伍军人健康管理局设施的距离和等待时间——仅解释了估计的地方效应的一小部分。这些发现凸显了个体因素在医疗体系选择中的重要性，并对旨在减少退伍军人健康管理局使用地理差异的政策具有启示意义。

papers.title: Do Monetary Policy Rates Reach Borrowers? Evidence from Household and Firm Loans in 96 Countries
papers.authors: Santosh Anagol, Shing-Yi Wang
papers.abstract: We harmonize survey data on interest rates paid by approximately 15,000 small and medium enterprises across 125 firm surveys and 285,000 households across 83 household surveys spanning developing and rich countries to study the relationship between monetary policy rates and borrowing costs faced by SMEs and households. Using within-country variation in policy rates over time, we find that pass-through to firm and household borrowing rates is stronger in richer countries than in poorer ones.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 货币政策利率能否传导至借款人？来自96个国家家庭和企业贷款的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们协调了来自125项企业调查中约15,000家中小企业以及83项家庭调查中285,000个家庭的利率支付调查数据，涵盖发展中国家和发达国家，以研究货币政策利率与中小企业及家庭借贷成本之间的关系。利用政策利率随时间在国家内部的变化，我们发现政策利率向企业和家庭借贷利率的传导在较富裕国家比在较贫穷国家更强。

papers.title: Measuring the Value of Disability Insurance from Take-Up Decisions
papers.authors: Andreas Haller, Stefan Staubli
papers.abstract: The central trade-off for designing Disability Insurance (DI) is between providing insurance to those in need while maintaining incentives to work. This paper develops a novel revealed-preference approach to identify the insurance value of DI benefits. We show that comparing the DI take-up response to a change in benefits versus a change in wages identifies the insurance value. Implementing our framework in Canada, we estimate that increasing DI benefits by $1 creates an additional disincentive cost of $0.60 but creates an insurance value of $2.20. Thus, our approach suggests that DI benefits are not overly generous in the Canadian context.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 从参保决策衡量伤残保险的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 设计伤残保险（DI）的核心权衡在于为有需要者提供保障的同时维持工作激励。本文提出一种新颖的显示性偏好方法，用以识别DI福利的保险价值。我们证明，比较DI参保对福利变化与工资变化的反应，即可识别保险价值。在加拿大实施该框架后，我们估计DI福利每增加1美元，会产生0.60美元的额外抑制成本，但创造2.20美元的保险价值。因此，我们的方法表明，在加拿大背景下，DI福利并非过度慷慨。

papers.title: How Might Fiscal Policy Respond to the Rise of Artificial Intelligence?
papers.authors: Karen Dynan, Douglas Elmendorf, Louise Sheiner
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence will probably generate major changes in the US economy, although the nature, timing, and magnitude of those changes are highly uncertain. We analyze a set of long-term scenarios involving different combinations of faster productivity growth, greater income inequality, job displacement, and a higher capital share of income. For each scenario, we assess the implications for federal debt and potential policy responses related to faster economic growth, the distribution of income, support for workers who are laid off, and taxation and ownership of capital. Given the uncertainty surrounding AI’s economic effects, policies that are robust to different scenarios would be especially valuable.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 财政政策如何应对人工智能的崛起？
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能可能会给美国经济带来重大变化，尽管这些变化的性质、时间和规模高度不确定。我们分析了一组长期情景，涉及生产率增长加快、收入不平等加剧、岗位替代以及资本收入份额提高的不同组合。针对每种情景，我们评估了其对联邦债务的影响，以及可能采取的政策应对措施，包括加快经济增长、调节收入分配、支持失业工人、以及资本税收与所有权安排。鉴于人工智能经济影响的不确定性，能够适应不同情景的稳健政策将尤为宝贵。

papers.title: The Role of Information Frictions in Study Habit Choice and Academic Performance
papers.authors: Agustina Affonso, Esteban M. Aucejo, Stephanie El Khoury, Tomás Larroucau
papers.abstract: We study whether information frictions about the relative effectiveness of study methods distort students’ effort allocation. Standard models treat effort as a single input whose level, rather than composition, determines outcomes. We instead model effort as an allocation across methods with heterogeneous effectiveness. Combining panel surveys, administrative records, digital activity logs, and a randomized information intervention with over 2,000 undergraduates, we test whether imperfect information leads to effort misallocation and quantify consequences for performance. At baseline, students hold divergent beliefs, and many devote time to passive strategies such as rereading, despite evidence that active retrieval is more effective; these choices predict lower performance and larger self-assessment errors. We randomize treated students into general-feedback and personalized-feedback arms, benchmarking habits against peers in the latter. General feedback has little effect. Personalized feedback widens the perceived effectiveness gap between active and passive methods by 42 percent, shifts time toward effective practices, and raises exam scores by 0.05–0.08 standard deviations. A dynamic model with learning-by-doing and convex allocation costs shows that, for students with the weakest baseline beliefs, personalized feedback is equivalent to a 16.5 percent reduction in adoption costs. These results identify information frictions about multidimensional effort as a determinant of academic performance.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 信息摩擦在学习习惯选择与学业表现中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究关于学习方法相对有效性的信息摩擦是否会扭曲学生的努力分配。标准模型将努力视为单一投入，其水平而非构成决定结果。我们则将努力建模为在不同有效性方法间的分配。结合面板调查、行政记录、数字活动日志以及对2000多名本科生进行的信息随机干预，我们检验不完全信息是否导致努力错配，并量化其对学业表现的影响。基线时，学生持有不同信念，许多人将时间投入被动策略（如重读），尽管证据表明主动检索更有效；这些选择预测了更低的学业表现和更大的自我评估误差。我们将受试学生随机分为一般反馈组和个性化反馈组，后者以同龄人为基准进行习惯比较。一般反馈效果甚微。个性化反馈将主动与被动方法之间的感知有效性差距扩大了42%，将时间转向有效实践，并使考试成绩提高0.05–0.08个标准差。一个包含干中学和凸性分配成本的动态模型表明，对于基线信念最弱的学生，个性化反馈相当于采用成本降低16.5%。这些结果将关于多维努力的信息摩擦识别为学业表现的决定因素。

papers.title: Forecasting the Covid Surge in Inflation
papers.authors: Mark W. Watson
papers.abstract: The persistent surge in U.S. inflation that began in 2021 caught forecasters and policymakers by surprise. The 2021 inflation shocks were viewed as transitory, not persistent, leading to large forecast errors in late 2021 and 2022. This paper asks whether time series models – using only data on current and past inflation, but incorporating stochastic volatility and exhibiting time-varying persistence – performed better. Univariate models, using real-time data, did not. Multivariate models, incorporating sectoral inflation measures, did.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 预测新冠疫情引发的通胀飙升
papers.zh_abstract: 2021年开始的美国通胀持续飙升，令预测者和政策制定者措手不及。2021年的通胀冲击被视为暂时性而非持续性，导致2021年末和2022年出现较大预测误差。本文探讨时间序列模型——仅使用当前和过去通胀数据，但纳入随机波动性并呈现时变持续性——是否表现更佳。使用实时数据的单变量模型并未改善。纳入部门通胀指标的多变量模型则表现更好。

papers.title: Degrees of Mobility: Shifting Low-Income Students to Higher Quality Colleges
papers.authors: Elizabeth Burland, Nora Delaney, Susan Dynarski, Katherine B. Leu, CJ Libassi, Katherine Michelmore, Stephanie Owen, Mary A. Quiroga, Elizabeth Salinas
papers.abstract: Earnings inequality among college graduates has grown, and returns to a bachelor's degree (BA) vary substantially across colleges. We experimentally evaluate a program that shifted high-achieving, low-income students into higher-quality colleges. Students randomly offered a guarantee of four years of tuition and fees at the University of Michigan were 21 percentage points more likely to enroll at a UM campus. The offer shifted students across colleges rather than into college: most compliers would otherwise have attended less-selective four-year colleges. HAIL increased four-year BA completion by 4 percentage points, but had no effect on attainment after six years. It substantially increased degree quality: students offered the scholarship were 12 percentage points more likely to earn a bachelor's degree from a highly or most selective college. IV estimates indicate that students induced to attend a University of Michigan campus were 56 percentage points more likely to earn such a degree. The increase in college quality predicts earnings gains of 18 to 25 percent. Faster degree completion adds about another 1 percent to the present discounted value of lifetime earnings.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 流动性的程度：将低收入学生转向更高质量大学
papers.zh_abstract: 大学毕业生之间的收入不平等加剧，且学士学位（BA）的回报在不同大学间差异显著。我们通过实验评估了一项将高成就低收入学生转向更高质量大学的项目。随机获得密歇根大学四年学费和杂费保障的学生，其入学密歇根大学校区的概率高出21个百分点。该资助促使学生在大学间转移而非进入大学：大多数受助者原本会进入选择性较低的四年制大学。HAIL项目使四年制BA完成率提高4个百分点，但对六年后的学业成就无影响。它显著提高了学位质量：获得奖学金的学生从高度或最具选择性大学获得学士学位的概率高出12个百分点。IV估计表明，被诱导进入密歇根大学校区的学生获得此类学位的概率高出56个百分点。大学质量的提升预测收入增长18%至25%。更快的学位完成时间使终身收入的现值额外增加约1%。

papers.title: The Labor Market Effects of Expanding Overtime Coverage
papers.authors: Simon Quach
papers.abstract: This paper examines the labor market effects of overtime coverage in the United States, where salaried workers are covered for overtime if their base pay falls below a legislated salary threshold. Using an event-study design with administrative payroll data and state-level threshold changes from 2014-2021, I find evidence against conventional models of overtime. Contrary to the historical intent of policymakers, firms do not increase employment by substituting more workers for fewer hours. However, contrary to compensating differential models, firms also do not offset the costs of overtime by lowering workers' base pays. Instead, employers raised salaries above the threshold to keep workers exempt from overtime, indicating that monitoring and adjusting workers' hours is costly for firms. Taken together, these results suggest that expanding overtime coverage increases workers' earnings without negatively impacting employment.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 扩大加班覆盖范围的劳动力市场效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察美国加班覆盖范围的劳动力市场效应。在美国，如果受薪工人的基本工资低于法定工资门槛，则其加班时间受覆盖。利用2014-2021年行政工资数据及州级门槛变化的事件研究设计，我发现了与传统加班模型相悖的证据。与政策制定者的历史意图相反，企业并未通过以更多工人替代更少工时来增加就业。然而，与补偿性差异模型相反，企业也未通过降低工人基本工资来抵消加班成本。相反，雇主将工资提高到门槛以上以保持工人豁免加班，这表明监控和调整工人工时对企业而言成本高昂。综合来看，这些结果表明，扩大加班覆盖范围在不负面影响就业的情况下提高了工人收入。

papers.title: The Effect of School Disruptions on Parental Labor Supply: Evidence from Canadian Panel Data
papers.authors: Dean R. Lillard, Joseph J. Sabia, Zihao Sheng, Casey Warman
papers.abstract: This study explores the effects of COVID-19 school closures on labor market outcomes of Canadian parents of school-aged children. Using newly collected data on grade-level-specific school closures across 141 Canadian cities along with individual-level panel data from the Labour Force Survey, difference-in-differences estimates provide robust evidence that restrictions on in-person schooling reduced employment among partnered mothers of school-aged children by approximately 2 percentage points. For fathers, labor supply adjustments are much weaker and concentrated on single fathers. Finally, auxiliary analyses using administrative tax records provide suggestive evidence that school closures increased public benefit receipt among single parents.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 学校停课对父母劳动供给的影响：来自加拿大面板数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了COVID-19学校停课对加拿大学龄儿童父母劳动力市场结果的影响。利用新收集的涵盖141个加拿大城市的年级层面学校停课数据，结合劳动力调查中的个体层面面板数据，双重差分估计提供了稳健证据：限制线下教学使有学龄儿童的已婚母亲的就业率下降约2个百分点。对于父亲而言，劳动供给调整幅度较弱且集中于单亲父亲。最后，使用行政税务记录的辅助分析提供了暗示性证据，表明学校停课增加了单亲父母的公共福利领取。

papers.title: Assessing the Benefits of Optimized Agentic AI Systems for Asset Pricing
papers.authors: Ralph S. J. Koijen, Bradford Levy
papers.abstract: Evaluating optimized AI systems for asset pricing is fundamentally difficult for two reasons. First, models are trained on all data, implying that any backtest or analysis using historical data suffers from look-ahead bias. In addition, markets are reflexive — as investors adopt AI, prices adjust — which may erode the very patterns the AI system was trained to exploit. We introduce a real-time, out-of-sample benchmark designed to sidestep both problems. The benchmark measures how well AI systems can explain contemporaneous stock returns around earnings announcements using only information available at announcement time, including the text of the announcement itself. Applying this benchmark to a range of agentic AI systems — which extract structured signals from earnings call transcripts and optimize over those signals — we find that the best-optimized systems more than double the explained variation in returns relative to standard benchmarks (R2 increasing from 8% to close to 20%). We show that AI-based optimization can deliver efficiency gains relative to traditional machine learning methods while also improving interpretability as our approach produces human-readable economic mechanisms that explain price movements. These learned rules can be compared to the drivers of realized returns in existing asset pricing models to identify missing sources of variation in a data-driven, self-evolving way that integrates empirical learning with economic structure. We release an SDK for researchers to improve on our results. Saturating this benchmark would represent fundamental progress in understanding how capital markets process firm-level information.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 评估优化型智能体AI系统在资产定价中的收益
papers.zh_abstract: 评估用于资产定价的优化型AI系统存在根本性困难，原因有二。首先，模型基于所有数据训练，这意味着任何使用历史数据的回测或分析都存在前瞻性偏差。此外，市场具有反身性——随着投资者采用AI，价格会调整——这可能侵蚀AI系统训练所利用的模式。我们引入了一个实时、样本外的基准，旨在规避这两个问题。该基准衡量AI系统仅使用公告时可获得的信息（包括公告文本本身）来解释盈余公告前后同期股票收益的能力。将该基准应用于一系列智能体AI系统（这些系统从财报电话会议记录中提取结构化信号并优化这些信号），我们发现最优系统解释的收益变异相比标准基准翻倍以上（R²从8%提升至接近20%）。我们证明，基于AI的优化相比传统机器学习方法能带来效率提升，同时提高可解释性，因为我们的方法能生成解释价格变动的人类可读经济机制。这些学习到的规则可与现有资产定价模型中已实现收益的驱动因素进行比较，从而以数据驱动、自我演进的方式识别缺失的变异来源，将经验学习与经济结构相结合。我们发布了一个SDK供研究人员改进我们的结果。饱和这一基准将代表理解资本市场如何处理公司层面信息的根本性进展。

papers.title: Retrieval Failures and Consumption Smoothing: A Field Experiment on Seasonal Poverty
papers.authors: Ned Augenblick, B. Kelsey Jack, Supreet Kaur, Felix Masiye, Nicholas Swanson
papers.abstract: Individuals may fail to recall and use information they already know when making decisions. We empirically investigate whether such “retrieval failures” distort consumption smoothing behavior among Zambian farmers, who derive their income from one annual harvest and then spend it down over the course of the year. We document that individuals underestimate upcoming spending by 50%, creating scope for under-saving. In order to improve recall, we randomize an intervention that prompts individuals to think through their future expenses associatively in categories—without providing any external information or guidance. Treated individuals increase “remembered” expenses by 36-60%; as predicted by the memory literature, effects are concentrated among small, irregular, and stochastic items. Immediate spending drops and, six weeks after the intervention, treated households hold 15% higher savings. They subsequently enter the hungry season—the final months of the year when consumption typically declines sharply—with one additional month of savings, leading to a flatter spending profile over the year. Households use the increased savings to self-finance additional farm investment, resulting in a 9% increase in the next year’s crop revenue. We replicate the intervention’s impact on beliefs among low-income Americans, suggesting that retrieval failures generalize across settings and populations.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 检索失败与消费平滑：关于季节性贫困的实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 个体在决策时可能无法回忆和使用已知信息。我们通过实证研究这种“检索失败”是否扭曲了赞比亚农民的消费平滑行为——这些农民的收入来自每年一次收获，并在全年逐步消耗。我们记录到，个体低估未来支出达50%，这为储蓄不足创造了空间。为改善回忆，我们随机实施了一项干预措施，促使个体按类别联想性地思考未来支出——不提供任何外部信息或指导。受干预个体的“回忆”支出增加了36-60%；正如记忆文献所预测，效应集中于小额、非定期和随机项目。即时支出下降，干预六周后，受干预家庭持有高出15%的储蓄。随后他们进入饥饿季节（一年中最后几个月，消费通常急剧下降），此时多出一个月的储蓄，导致全年支出曲线更平坦。家庭利用增加的储蓄自我融资进行额外农业投资，使次年作物收入增加9%。我们在低收入美国人中复制了该干预对信念的影响，表明检索失败在不同环境和人群中具有普遍性。

papers.title: Let’s Chat: Leveraging Chatbot Outreach for Improved Course Performance
papers.authors: Katharine E. Meyer, Lindsay C. Page, Catherine Mata, Eric Smith, Brendan Tyler Walsh, Candice L. Fifield, Michelle Tyson, Amy E. Eremionkhale, Michael Evans, Shelby Frost, Eye Eoun Jung
papers.abstract: This study provides pre-registered, experimental evidence on the use of non-generative artificial intelligence (AI) chatbots to support students in large-enrollment undergraduate courses. We find the chatbot messaging increased students’ final grades and engagement with academic supports, such as tutoring. Treatment effects were generally consistent across student demographics, with the exception of treated women in a Microeconomics course, who earned final grades that were seven percentage points higher than women in the control group. This study provides evidence that integrating AI-enabled outreach and communication to students in their college courses can enhance student engagement, learning, and course performance.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 我们来聊聊：利用聊天机器人外联提升课程表现
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究提供了关于在大型本科课程中使用非生成式人工智能聊天机器人支持学生的预注册实验证据。我们发现，聊天机器人消息提高了学生的期末成绩以及对学术支持（如辅导）的参与度。处理效应在不同学生人口统计特征上总体一致，但微观经济学课程中接受处理的女性除外——其期末成绩比对照组女性高出七个百分点。本研究证明，在大学课程中整合人工智能驱动的外联与沟通能够增强学生的参与度、学习效果及课程表现。

papers.title: How Do State “Auto-IRA” Policies Affect Household Balance Sheets?
papers.authors: Adam Bloomfield, Ngoc Dao, Kyung Min Lee, Sita Slavov
papers.abstract: We examine how state policies requiring firms to facilitate workplace retirement saving affect household balance sheets. Using data from the Survey of Income and Program Participation (SIPP), we compare private-sector workers likely exposed to Oregon’s Automatic-Enrollment Individual Retirement Account (Auto-IRA) policy with similar workers in not-yet-adopting states. We find that the Auto-IRA policy is associated with increases in IRA and employer-sponsored retirement plan ownership and assets. We also find increases in checking or savings account ownership and balances, as well as higher credit card debt. The results suggest that Auto-IRA policies spill over to household liquidity management and borrowing.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 州级“自动IRA”政策如何影响家庭资产负债表？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了要求企业促进工作场所退休储蓄的州级政策如何影响家庭资产负债表。利用收入与项目参与调查（SIPP）数据，我们比较了可能受俄勒冈州自动注册个人退休账户（Auto-IRA）政策影响的私营部门工人与尚未采纳该政策的类似州工人。我们发现，Auto-IRA政策与IRA和雇主资助退休计划的拥有率及资产增加相关。我们还发现支票或储蓄账户拥有率及余额增加，以及信用卡债务上升。结果表明，Auto-IRA政策会溢出影响家庭流动性管理和借贷行为。

papers.title: Economic Models of Identity Formation and Cultural Transmission
papers.authors: Alberto Bisin, Thierry Verdier
papers.abstract: In this paper we survey recent advances in the economic theory of identity formation. We restrict our analysis to models which conceptualize identity formation as embedded into an inter-generational cultural transmission process, and therefore have implications for the dynamics of social identity. Through the lens of a general framework linking identity formation to cultural evolution, we discuss issues related to the dynamics of oppositional, racial, or minority attitudes, cultural polarization, identity switching, and openness to alternative identities. An application of the set-up to multidimensional identities constructed from combinations of characteristics, provides conditions under which societies converge (or not) toward narrow identities centered on salient markers such as religion, ethnicity, or race. We conclude by outlining promising avenues for future research.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 身份形成与文化传递的经济模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文综述了身份形成经济理论的最新进展。我们将分析限定在将身份形成概念化为嵌入代际文化传递过程的模型，因此这些模型对社会认同的动态具有启示意义。通过一个将身份形成与文化演化联系起来的通用框架，我们讨论了与对立态度、种族或少数群体态度、文化极化、身份转换以及对替代身份开放性相关的动态问题。将该框架应用于由特征组合构建的多维身份，揭示了社会是（或不是）趋向于以宗教、族裔或种族等显著标志为中心的狭隘身份的条件。最后，我们概述了未来研究的有前景方向。

papers.title: Global Financial Transparency and Offshore Wealth Accumulation
papers.authors: Annette Alstadsæter, Niels Johannesen, Ségal Le Guern Herry, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: This paper uses administrative data to analyze wealth flows from Norway to offshore tax havens before and after a major improvement of global financial transparency: automatic exchange of bank account information between tax authorities. We present three results suggesting that the policy is a significant deterrent of offshore tax evasion: First, taxpayers who become wealthy are much less likely to shift wealth to offshore banks. Second, when wealth does flow to offshore banks, it is much less likely to reduce domestic tax payments. Third, there is no increase in the use of complex ownership structures for offshore wealth flows.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 全球金融透明度与离岸财富积累
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用行政数据分析全球金融透明度重大改进（即税务机关之间自动交换银行账户信息）前后从挪威流向离岸避税天堂的财富流。我们提出三个结果，表明该政策对离岸逃税具有显著威慑作用：第一，变得富有的纳税人将财富转移至离岸银行的可能性大大降低。第二，当财富确实流向离岸银行时，其减少国内纳税的可能性也大大降低。第三，离岸财富流中复杂所有权结构的使用并未增加。

papers.title: Bank Runs With and Without Bank Failure
papers.authors: Sergio A. Correia, Stephan Luck, Emil Verner
papers.abstract: We study the causes and consequences of bank runs. By applying large language models to historical newspapers, we create a comprehensive database of bank runs in U.S. history with information on 3,984 runs on individual banks from 1863 to 1934. Our novel data allow us to establish that runs are considerably more likely in weak banks but also occur in strong banks, especially in response to negative news about the real economy or the broader banking system. However, runs typically only result in failure for banks with poor fundamentals. Strong banks survive runs through various mechanisms, including signaling strength, interbank cooperation, and temporary suspension. At the local level, runs on banks with poor fundamentals translate into substantially larger declines in deposits, lending, and manufacturing activity than runs on strong banks. Our findings imply that poor fundamentals are central to explaining both when runs occur and when they have severe economic effects, tempering the view that small shocks can generate discontinuous jumps to bad equilibria through self-fulfilling run dynamics.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 银行挤兑：银行倒闭与否
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究银行挤兑的原因和后果。通过将大语言模型应用于历史报纸，我们创建了一个涵盖美国历史上银行挤兑的综合数据库，包含1863年至1934年间3984次针对单个银行的挤兑信息。我们的新数据使我们能够确定，挤兑在弱银行中发生的可能性要大得多，但也会发生在强银行中，尤其是在有关实体经济或更广泛银行体系的负面消息出现时。然而，挤兑通常只会导致基本面较差的银行倒闭。强银行通过各种机制（包括信号传递实力、银行间合作和临时暂停）在挤兑中幸存。在地方层面，对基本面较差银行的挤兑导致的存款、贷款和制造业活动下降幅度远大于对强银行的挤兑。我们的研究结果表明，基本面较差是解释挤兑何时发生以及何时产生严重经济影响的核心因素，这削弱了关于小冲击可通过自我实现的挤兑动态导致向坏均衡的非连续跳跃的观点。

papers.title: Who Wants to Break Up Big Firms? Harm, Fairness, and the Demand for Antitrust
papers.authors: Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Jeffrey Yusof
papers.abstract: The rise of superstar firms has made dominant companies central to modern economic life, and antitrust enforcement is one of the main policy tools for regulating their market power. Public opinion can shape the political and regulatory environment in which antitrust enforcement takes place, yet there is little direct evidence on what drives these preferences. We conduct a pre-registered information-provision experiment with 4,000 American households. Respondents were told about one of five real antitrust cases and randomly assigned to information treatments designed to study four potential drivers of support for antitrust enforcement: perceived market share, perceived consumer harm, perceived unfair competition, and perceived negative image. All four treatments moved the beliefs they were designed to affect, but their effects on demand for antitrust differed sharply. Information about consumer harm had the most systematic effects: it increased plaintiff support and support for break-up and conduct remedies, with effects remaining visible one month later, and also spilled over to broader support for antitrust policies. By contrast, and contrary to expert forecasts, information about market share had no meaningful effect on demand for antitrust enforcement. The findings suggest that the public thinks like economists in one key respect: they do not care about market share per se, but respond instead to consumer harm. One factor outside the core economic framework, perceived unfair competition, also matters, though its effects are more limited in scope. We discuss implications for policymakers and regulators.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 谁想拆分大企业？损害、公平与反垄断需求
papers.zh_abstract: 超级明星企业的崛起使主导公司成为现代经济生活的核心，反垄断执法是监管其市场势力的主要政策工具之一。公众舆论可以塑造反垄断执法所处的政治和监管环境，然而，关于是什么驱动了这些偏好的直接证据却很少。我们对4000个美国家庭进行了一项预先注册的信息提供实验。受访者被告知五个真实反垄断案例之一，并被随机分配到旨在研究支持反垄断执法的四个潜在驱动因素的信息处理组：感知市场份额、感知消费者损害、感知不公平竞争和感知负面形象。所有四种处理都改变了它们旨在影响的信念，但它们对反垄断需求的影响差异显著。关于消费者损害的信息具有最系统的影响：它增加了对原告的支持以及对拆分和行为补救措施的支持，这些影响在一个月后仍然可见，并且还溢出到对更广泛反垄断政策的支持。相比之下，与专家预测相反，关于市场份额的信息对反垄断执法需求没有有意义的影响。研究结果表明，公众在一个关键方面像经济学家一样思考：他们不关心市场份额本身，而是对消费者损害做出反应。核心经济框架之外的一个因素——感知不公平竞争——也很重要，尽管其影响范围更为有限。我们讨论了对政策制定者和监管者的启示。

papers.title: Physician Learning and Forgetting: Evidence from the US Military
papers.authors: Trevor Fitzgerald, Atul Gupta, Stephen D. Schwab
papers.abstract: Physicians in the U.S. military health care system are quasi-randomly assigned to combat deployments, leading to gaps of varying durations in their clinical practice. We leverage this unique setting to provide novel causal evidence on skill depreciation (forgetting) and learning-by-doing among physicians. We find robust evidence that readmission rates increase by 48% in the first two months after a surgeon returns from a deployment. However, surgeons return to baseline performance within 6 months of resuming practice. In contrast, obstetricians maintain elevated cesarean section rates for up to 9 months, implying a deeper change in clinical judgment. Finally, we interpret these patterns through the lens of a learning model and estimate learning-by-doing rates for surgeons and obstetricians. A doubling of recent procedure volume reduces readmission and C-section rates by 17% and 11% for surgeons and obstetricians, respectively.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 医生的学习与遗忘：来自美国军方的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国军事医疗系统中的医生被准随机分配到战斗部署任务，导致其临床实践出现不同时长的间断。我们利用这一独特环境，提供了关于医生技能折旧（遗忘）和干中学的新因果证据。我们发现强有力的证据表明，外科医生从部署返回后的头两个月内，再入院率增加了48%。然而，外科医生在恢复实践后的6个月内恢复到基线表现。相比之下，产科医生维持升高的剖宫产率长达9个月，这表明临床判断发生了更深层次的变化。最后，我们通过一个学习模型的视角解释这些模式，并估计了外科医生和产科医生的干中学率。近期手术量翻倍分别使外科医生和产科医生的再入院率和剖宫产率降低17%和11%。

papers.title: Human Capital in Venture Capital: Evidence From 100,000 Venture Capitalists
papers.authors: Blake Jackson, Ilya A. Strebulaev
papers.abstract: We study human capital in venture capital (VC) using a new dataset covering over 100,000 professionals affiliated with U.S. VC firms. Investment success is extremely concentrated: fewer than 40% of VCs with any investments are ever credited with a successful investment, and 90% of investment profits are generated by 5% of VCs. Differences in education, prior work experience, and demographics predict career progression and investment outcomes, consistent with persistent investor-specific skills. Quasi-experimental variation from marginal inclusions on the Forbes Midas List shows that achieving superstar status increases access to highly-valued startups, complementing other human capital and contributing to concentration.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 风险投资中的人力资本：来自10万名风险投资家的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个涵盖超过10万名隶属于美国风险投资公司专业人士的新数据集，研究风险投资中的人力资本。投资成功高度集中：在任何投资的风险投资家中，不到40%曾被记录有成功投资，90%的投资利润由5%的风险投资家创造。教育背景、先前工作经验和人口统计特征的差异预测了职业发展和投资结果，这与持续的投资者特定技能一致。来自福布斯Midas榜单边缘入选者的准实验变化表明，获得超级明星地位增加了接触高估值初创企业的机会，这补充了其他人力资本并促进了集中度。

papers.title: Volatility Disagreement in the Options Market
papers.authors: Turan G. Bali, Bryan T. Kelly, Mathis Mörke
papers.abstract: We construct a novel stock-level measure of volatility disagreement as the cross-sectional dispersion of realized variance forecasts built from heterogeneous information sets and machine learning models. Sorting single-name delta-hedged straddles on this measure yields a long-short return of −5.14% per month, robust to known option return predictors and not subsumed by disagreement about first moments or the variance risk premium. A one-standard-deviation increase in volatility disagreement is associated with a 30% rise in option position opening. The cross-sectional patterns of our disagreement measure align with recent theoretical advances of beliefs and pricing of variance claims. Evidence on attention, ownership, and arbitrage costs is more consistent with mispricing than risk compensation.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 期权市场中的波动率分歧
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一种新颖的股票层面波动率分歧度量，即基于异质信息集和机器学习模型所构建的已实现方差预测的横截面离散度。根据该度量对单名股票德尔塔对冲跨式期权进行排序，可产生每月-5.14%的多空收益，该结果对已知的期权收益预测因子具有稳健性，且不能被关于一阶矩或方差风险溢价的分歧所解释。波动率分歧增加一个标准差，与期权头寸开仓量上升30%相关。我们分歧度量的横截面模式与近期关于方差索取权信念和定价的理论进展相一致。关于注意力、所有权和套利成本的证据更支持错误定价而非风险补偿。

papers.title: Spreading Out Across Expanding Idea Space
papers.authors: Ina Ganguli, Jeffrey Lin, Vitaly Meursault, Nicholas F. Reynolds
papers.abstract: Over nearly two centuries, US inventions have become increasingly dissimilar: not just fewer head-to-head collisions between inventors, but growing distance between neighboring inventions. We document this secular decline in similarity using validated neural language models applied to the full text of claims in over 11 million US patents (1836–2023), corroborated by a 98% decline in patent interference rates, a measure of independent simultaneous invention. Measuring this correctly requires validation, since different representations of the same patent text can yield opposite conclusions about whether inventions are converging or spreading out. Our validation framework, the first systematic comparison for patent text, selects among these representations. We develop a spatial competition model in which inventors choose locations in idea space. The model explains spreading out and connects it to several independently documented patterns — rising R&D investment per inventor, increasing patent values, weakening knowledge spillovers, and declining research productivity. The mechanism is spatial; as inventors spread out to capture new territory, inventions become more valuable but also more costly for others to absorb.
