In doing so, the model turns spillover intensity, innovation step size, and research productivity from fixed primitives into outcomes of inventor positioning. A calibrated decomposition attributes roughly 40% of the long-run decline in US research productivity to these spatial forces, alongside traditional explanations such as fishing out and the burden of knowledge. Where inventors stand relative to each other in idea space matters as much for growth as how many of them there are.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 在扩张的思想空间中扩散分布
papers.zh_abstract: 在近两个世纪的时间里，美国发明之间的相似度持续下降：不仅发明者之间的正面碰撞减少，而且相邻发明之间的距离也在扩大。我们利用经过验证的神经语言模型，对超过1100万件美国专利（1836–2023年）的权利要求全文进行分析，记录了这种相似度的长期下降趋势，并通过专利冲突率（一种独立同时发明的度量指标）下降98%加以佐证。正确测量这一现象需要验证，因为同一专利文本的不同表征可能得出关于发明是趋同还是扩散的相反结论。我们的验证框架是首个针对专利文本的系统性比较，用于在这些表征中进行选择。我们开发了一个空间竞争模型，其中发明者在思想空间中选择位置。该模型解释了扩散现象，并将其与若干独立记录的模式联系起来——每位发明者研发投资上升、专利价值增加、知识溢出减弱以及研究生产率下降。其机制是空间性的；随着发明者扩散以占领新领域，发明变得更有价值，但他人吸收的成本也更高。在此过程中，该模型将溢出强度、创新步长和研究生产率从固定的原始参数转变为发明者定位的结果。一项校准分解表明，美国研究生产率的长期下降中约有40%可归因于这些空间力量，同时还有传统解释如“捕捞殆尽”和知识负担。在思想空间中，发明者之间的相对位置对增长的重要性不亚于发明者的数量。

papers.title: Optimal Currency Strategies Under Deviations From Interest Parity
papers.authors: Luis M. Viceira, Sally Shen
papers.abstract: This paper examines optimal currency demands for global equity and bond investors in a large cross-section of developed and emerging markets over the 1975-2023 period. It extends the framework of Campbell et al. (2010) by incorporating both optimal portfolio-risk minimizing currency exposures, accounting for empirically measured hedging costs arising from deviations of Covered Interest Parity (CIP), and optimal expected-return-driven currency demands based on non-zero expected excess currency returns arising from empirically measured deviations of Uncovered Interest Parity (UIP). The analysis shows that the main conclusions of their portfolio risk-minimizing framework hold for this larger and longer panel of countries and that they are robust to deviations from CIP. Specifically, it is optimal for portfolio risk-minimizing equity investors to hold exposures to the U.S. dollar and the euro while avoiding exposure to all other currencies, whereas bond investors should hedge all currency exposures. In contrast, observed deviations from UIP are sufficiently large and persistent among currencies with high average relative interest currencies, especially Emerging Markets currencies, to generate expected return-driven currency demands that offset, and in some cases reverse, portfolio-risk minimizing demands, even for investors with low risk tolerance. The average excess returns on those currencies are large enough to compensate investors for their substantial return volatility and strong positive covariance with equity returns.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 利率平价偏离下的最优货币策略
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了1975–2023年期间全球股票和债券投资者在发达市场和新兴市场大横截面中的最优货币需求。它扩展了Campbell等人（2010）的框架，纳入了最优投资组合风险最小化的货币敞口（考虑了由抵补利率平价（CIP）偏离产生的经验测量对冲成本），以及基于非零预期超额货币收益（由非抵补利率平价（UIP）偏离的经验测量产生）的最优预期收益驱动型货币需求。分析表明，其投资组合风险最小化框架的主要结论对于这个更大、时间更长的国家面板仍然成立，并且对CIP偏离具有稳健性。具体而言，对于投资组合风险最小化的股票投资者而言，最优策略是持有美元和欧元的敞口，同时避免所有其他货币的敞口；而债券投资者则应对冲所有货币敞口。相比之下，在具有高平均相对利率的货币（尤其是新兴市场货币）中，观察到的UIP偏离足够大且持续，足以产生预期收益驱动型货币需求，这些需求抵消甚至在某些情况下逆转了投资组合风险最小化的需求，即使对于风险容忍度较低的投资者也是如此。这些货币的平均超额收益足够大，足以补偿投资者其显著的收益波动性以及与股票收益的强正协方差。

papers.title: Exorbitant Privilege of the Periodic Table? Geoeconomics, Endogenous Centrality and Strategic Minerals for the Green Transition
papers.authors: Josh Kirk, Evgenia Passari, Hélène Rey
papers.abstract: Trade networks underpinning the energy transition are endogenous economic objects, and their structure is a source of market power. Using bilateral trade data for thirteen electrification metals over 1995–2023, we show that trade in these materials has reorganised into a hub-and-spoke system centred on China, in sharp contrast to the diffuse, multilateral structure of fossil fuels. This centrality did not follow from resource endowments: China holds few of the underlying reserves. It was built through processing investment, industrial policy, and commodity-targeted development finance—an equilibrium outcome rather than a geographical accident. We formalise this in a stylised model in which a country chooses how central to become, and show that centrality maps into pricing power: the world price response to a strategic supply cut is stronger when the network is more concentrated and downstream demand and fringe supply are more inelastic. Constructing text-based, commodity-specific supply shocks and estimating local projections, we find that supply contractions in critical metals raise US and EU consumer prices by roughly twice as much as comparable fossil-fuel shocks, and more persistently. Centrality is therefore not merely descriptive: it creates leverage over global prices. The green transition reduces strategic dependence on hydrocarbon exporters but reconstitutes it around mineral supply chains.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 元素周期表的过度特权？地缘经济学、内生中心性与绿色转型的战略矿产
papers.zh_abstract: 支撑能源转型的贸易网络是内生的经济对象，其结构是市场势力的来源。利用1995–2023年间十三种电气化金属的双边贸易数据，我们表明这些材料的贸易已重组为一个以中国为中心的轴辐式体系，这与化石燃料分散的多边结构形成鲜明对比。这种中心性并非源于资源禀赋：中国持有的相关储量很少。它是通过加工投资、产业政策和针对特定商品的发展融资建立起来的——这是一种均衡结果，而非地理上的偶然。我们在一个简约模型中对此进行了形式化，在该模型中，一个国家选择其中心化程度，并表明中心性映射为定价权：当网络更加集中，且下游需求和边缘供给更加缺乏弹性时，世界价格对战略性供给削减的反应更强。通过构建基于文本的、特定商品供给冲击并估计局部投影，我们发现关键金属的供给收缩使美国和欧盟的消费者价格上升幅度大约是可比化石燃料冲击的两倍，且更具持续性。因此，中心性不仅仅是描述性的：它创造了影响全球价格的杠杆。绿色转型减少了对碳氢化合物出口国的战略依赖，但将其重新构建在矿产供应链周围。

papers.title: Supply Chain Risk, Trade and Economic Fragility
papers.authors: Juanma Castro-Vincenzi, Adry Gracio, Gaurav Khanna, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
papers.abstract: We study how equilibrium patterns of production, trade, and input sourcing in complex supply chains are shaped by aggregate risk. We develop a quantitative multi-country model with multi-sourcing across stages. We show that sourcing shares equal an input’s expected output elasticity — its expected marginal contribution to output across states of the world. Risk has a positional effect on sourcing and welfare, operating through offsetting cross-stage complementarity and within-stage substitutability; which one dominates is a quantitative question. An increase in a country’s own risk always lowers its welfare; risk elsewhere has ambiguous, sometimes positive, effects through relative prices. We also show analytically that risk attenuates comparative advantage, as countries shift sourcing away from their most productive suppliers. Quantifying the model for 50 countries and 3 production stages, we show that supply-chain complexity lowers volatility for the riskiest countries, and rising Chinese-origin risk reallocates production and lowers welfare unevenly across the chain.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 供应链风险、贸易与经济脆弱性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了复杂供应链中生产、贸易和投入采购的均衡模式如何受到总体风险的影响。我们开发了一个包含跨阶段多源采购的定量多国模型。我们证明，采购份额等于一项投入的预期产出弹性——即其在世界各状态下对产出的预期边际贡献。风险对采购和福利具有位置效应，通过跨阶段互补性和阶段内替代性的抵消作用来运作；哪一效应占主导是一个定量问题。一国自身风险的增加总是降低其福利；其他地区的风险通过相对价格产生模糊的、有时是正向的影响。我们还分析表明，风险会削弱比较优势，因为国家会将其采购从生产率最高的供应商转移开。通过对50个国家和3个生产阶段的模型进行量化，我们表明供应链复杂性降低了风险最高国家的波动性，而不断上升的中国来源风险会重新分配生产，并在整个供应链中不均等地降低福利。

papers.title: Human Enhancement Technologies: A Survey Experiment on Private Demand and Governance Preferences.
papers.authors: Giovanni Immordino, Mario Macis, Immacolata Marino, Fabrizio Panebianco
papers.abstract: When a new technology promises large private benefits but may impose social costs that markets do not price, demand need not reveal how citizens want it governed. We examine this using a nationally representative U.S. survey experiment (N=5,556) on human enhancement technologies (HET). The experiment randomizes benefit domain, mechanism, heritability, purpose, and risk across vignettes; for each respondent’s assigned vignette, we elicit stated adoption, preferred regulation, and ethical and societal concerns. Overall, about 53% would adopt. Framing the technology as enhancing rather than restorative lowers adoption by about five percentage points, as much as a severe side-effect profile. About 28% would not adopt at any benefit. This refusal is driven overwhelmingly by the enhancing framing rather than by risk, consistent with a non-compensatory constraint for a substantial subgroup. Most who would adopt still favor strict regulation, and most who would never adopt do not wish to forbid others from doing so. Productivity enhancement generates the most ethical concern of any attribute but attracts the least regulation, and respondents favor subsidizing rather than taxing its adoption, consistent with a concern about access rather than safety. Private demand is therefore an unreliable guide to the governance citizens want, and the divergence we document provides a basis for regulators seeking to align the direction of technical change with societal values and priorities.

papers.zh_title: 人类增强技术：关于私人需求与治理偏好的调查实验
papers.zh_abstract: 当一项新技术承诺巨大的私人收益，但可能带来市场无法定价的社会成本时，需求并不一定能揭示公民希望如何对其进行治理。我们通过一项具有全国代表性的美国调查实验（N=5,556）来研究这一问题，该实验聚焦于人类增强技术（HET）。实验在情境描述中随机化收益领域、机制、可遗传性、目的和风险；针对每位受访者分配的情境，我们获取其声称的采纳意愿、偏好的监管方式以及伦理和社会关切。总体而言，约53%的人会采纳。将技术描述为增强型而非恢复型会使采纳率下降约5个百分点，其影响与严重的副作用特征相当。约28%的人在任何收益水平下都不会采纳。这种拒绝主要是由增强型框架而非风险驱动的，这与一个相当大子群体的非补偿性约束一致。大多数愿意采纳的人仍然支持严格监管，而大多数永远不会采纳的人并不希望禁止他人这样做。在所有属性中，生产力增强引发的伦理关切最多，但吸引的监管最少，且受访者倾向于补贴而非征税以促进其采纳，这与对可及性而非安全性的关切一致。因此，私人需求并非公民期望治理方式的可靠指南，我们记录的这种分歧为寻求使技术变革方向与社会价值观和优先事项相一致的监管者提供了基础。

papers.title: The Price of Political Ties: Reputational Risk and the Strategic Divestment of Corporate PACs
papers.authors: Eric A. Baldwin, Takuma Iwasaki, John J. Donohue, Charlie Grabois
papers.abstract: Political contributions generate access and influence for firms, but their public visibility exposes firms to reputational risk. We study how firms adjust their political spending when the reputational cost of political ties rises sharply. To identify this response, we exploit fatal school shootings and mass shootings as exogenous shocks to the salience of gun violence in the United States. We implement a staggered difference-in-differences design on a panel of corporate PAC contributions to U.S. House candidates, 2000–2024. We find that corporate PACs divest selectively and temporarily following gun violence shocks. Contributions to Republican candidates fall by 70.3% after fatal school shootings in competitive districts and return to baseline within nine months, with no substitution toward Democratic candidates. A parallel penalty of 60.9% emerges for Republicans in safe Democratic districts but is absent in safe Republican districts. Mass shootings generate similar perturbations in corporate contributions. These patterns indicate that firms withdraw only where the reputational risk of continued association is high or its strategic value is low. The observed divestment appears across industries and is stronger for firms with greater consumer exposure. Our findings reveal that firms treat political ties as time-varying liabilities, temporarily withdrawing visible financial support when issue salience spikes and resuming once public attention fades, leaving firms’ long-run political investment intact. Since public pressure is limited and dissipates quickly, and corporate divestment is transient rather than durably reallocated, the underlying financial incentives facing policymakers remain unchanged in the long run, sustaining the policy status quo.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 政治关联的代价：声誉风险与企业政治行动委员会的战略性撤资
papers.zh_abstract: 政治献金为企业带来准入和影响力，但其公开性也使企业面临声誉风险。我们研究当政治关联的声誉成本急剧上升时，企业如何调整其政治支出。为识别这一反应，我们利用美国校园枪击案和大规模枪击案作为枪支暴力凸显度的外生冲击。我们在2000–2024年企业政治行动委员会（PAC）对美国众议院候选人捐款的面板数据上实施交错双重差分设计。我们发现，在枪支暴力冲击后，企业PAC会选择性且暂时性地撤资。在竞争性选区，致命校园枪击案后对共和党候选人的捐款下降70.3%，并在九个月内恢复至基线水平，且未出现向民主党候选人的替代性转移。在民主党安全选区，共和党候选人面临60.9%的平行惩罚，但在共和党安全选区则不存在。大规模枪击案在企业捐款中产生类似的扰动。这些模式表明，企业仅在持续关联的声誉风险较高或战略价值较低时撤资。观察到的撤资现象跨行业存在，且在消费者曝光度更高的企业中更为显著。我们的发现揭示，企业将政治关联视为随时间变化的负债，在议题凸显度飙升时暂时撤回显性财务支持，待公众注意力消退后恢复，从而保持企业的长期政治投资不变。由于公众压力有限且迅速消散，企业撤资是暂时性的而非持久性重新配置，因此政策制定者面临的潜在财务激励在长期内保持不变，从而维持了政策现状。

papers.title: Immigrants' Legal Status and Firms: Evidence from the 2007 EU Enlargement
papers.authors: Vittoria Dicandia, Silvia Vannutelli
papers.abstract: We study how firms and workers adjust when previously restricted migrants gain full and portable work rights in a labor market with substantial informality. We exploit the 2007 EU accession of Bulgaria and Romania, which granted unrestricted work rights to Italy's largest migrant group. Using matched employer–employee administrative data and an IV-DID design, we find that firms suddenly and persistently shift employment composition toward EU07 workers, compressing the native employment share without reducing native hiring or increasing separations. We don't detect any significant change in wages for either natives or EU07 workers. For migrants, this null effect reflects offsetting compositional shifts as newly observed and incumbent EU07 workers enter the formal workforce with different wage trajectories. Consistent with a shift in bargaining power toward workers, EU07 migrants experienced significant gains in job mobility and job security. Overall, the evidence suggests that removing legal restrictions reshaped firms’ personnel choices and altered migrants’ employment relationships, improving their outside options, bargaining position, and access to more secure jobs.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 移民的法律身份与企业：来自2007年欧盟扩员的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究当此前受限的移民在存在大量非正规就业的劳动力市场中获得完全且可携带的工作权利时，企业和工人如何调整。我们利用2007年保加利亚和罗马尼亚加入欧盟的事件，该事件赋予了意大利最大移民群体不受限制的工作权利。使用匹配的雇主–雇员行政数据和工具变量双重差分设计，我们发现企业突然且持续地将就业构成转向欧盟07工人，压缩了本土工人的就业份额，但并未减少本土工人的招聘或增加离职。我们未检测到本土工人或欧盟07工人的工资发生任何显著变化。对移民而言，这一零效应反映了抵消性的构成变化，即新被观测到的和在岗的欧盟07工人以不同的工资轨迹进入正规劳动力队伍。与工人议价能力向工人方转移相一致，欧盟07移民在工作流动性和工作保障方面获得了显著改善。总体而言，证据表明，取消法律限制重塑了企业的人事选择，改变了移民的雇佣关系，改善了他们的外部选择、议价地位以及获得更稳定工作的机会。

papers.title: No-Poach Agreements
papers.authors: Axel Gottfries, Gregor Jarosch
papers.abstract: We study no-poach cartels using a wage-posting model that puts worker poaching at the center of labor market competition. Even when just two out of ten employers in a local labor market collude, wages fall by almost 5% market-wide. The reason is that no-poach agreements suppress competition along the job ladder, with spillovers to non-colluding firms. We then compare no-poach agreements to two other forms of anti-competitive conduct in the labor market: noncompete agreements and wage fixing. No-poach agreements have by far the largest negative wage effects.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 互不挖角协议
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个将员工挖角置于劳动力市场竞争核心的工资报价模型来研究互不挖角卡特尔。即使当地劳动力市场中十家雇主中只有两家合谋，市场范围内的工资也会下降近5%。原因是互不挖角协议抑制了职业阶梯上的竞争，并产生向非合谋企业的溢出效应。然后，我们将互不挖角协议与劳动力市场中另外两种反竞争行为进行比较：竞业限制协议和固定工资协议。互不挖角协议对工资的负面效应迄今为止最大。

papers.title: Retreating from Science: The Long-Run Effects of the 1970s U.S. Military Disinvestment from University Research
papers.authors: Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat, Hansen Zhang
papers.abstract: Between 1945 and 1970, the U.S. Department of Defense was one of the country's largest funders of university research, and the most important in the physical sciences and engineering. Political pressures subsequently led to this funding declining nearly two-thirds by the mid-1970s and never fully recovering. We show that these cuts were felt across the U.S. research system, with ensuing declines in university scientists, PhD production, and research output. Early career scientists who were DoD-funded in 1970 were more likely than peers to leave universities, with many moving to industry. Though some became more likely to patent, in the aggregate, this appears to have reduced science-linked innovation in related technologies and compressed U.S. leadership in formerly DoD-driven fields. These effects extend to outcomes more closely related to military objectives: fewer PhDs entered the defense industrial base, and an initial increase in science-linked defense patenting in the most exposed technology areas gave way to a long-run decline.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 从科学领域撤退：1970年代美国军事部门对大学研究撤资的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 1945年至1970年间，美国国防部是美国大学研究的最大资助方之一，并且在物理科学和工程领域最为重要。随后的政治压力导致这一资助到1970年代中期下降了近三分之二，且从未完全恢复。我们表明，这些削减波及了整个美国研究体系，导致大学科学家数量、博士培养和研究产出下降。1970年受国防部资助的早期职业科学家比同龄人更有可能离开大学，许多人转向工业界。尽管其中一些人更有可能获得专利，但从总体上看，这似乎减少了相关技术中与科学关联的创新，并压缩了美国在原先由国防部驱动的领域中的领导地位。这些影响延伸至与军事目标更密切相关的结果：进入国防工业基础的博士数量减少，且在最初受冲击最大的技术领域，与科学关联的国防专利数量在短暂增加后转为长期下降。

papers.title: Training AI for When Humans Will Use It
papers.authors: Kevin A. Bryan, Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: AI predicts; humans use its predictions to make decisions. These predictions are combined with human verification and analysis, queries to other statistical models, and so on. The economic value of an AI, therefore, depends on how it interacts with the surrounding decision environment. We describe the value of AI as part of this "composite experiment" where AI makes a coarse prediction of the state of the world, show what this means for optimal model training via a geometric argument, explain why optimal training can be discontinuous in economic variables, and study how heterogeneous users or monopoly model trainers affect these results. In particular, maximizing the unconditional accuracy of AI predictions is generally suboptimal.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 为人类使用场景训练人工智能
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能进行预测；人类利用其预测做出决策。这些预测与人类验证和分析、对其他统计模型的查询等相结合。因此，人工智能的经济价值取决于它如何与周围的决策环境互动。我们将人工智能的价值描述为这个“复合实验”的一部分，其中人工智能对世界状态做出粗略预测，通过几何论证展示这对最优模型训练的意义，解释为何最优训练在经济变量中可能是不连续的，并研究异质性用户或垄断模型训练者如何影响这些结果。特别是，最大化人工智能预测的无条件准确性通常不是最优的。

papers.title: Diagnostic Thresholds, Written Consent Requirements, and the Utilization of Scarce Organs
papers.authors: Hannah Bae, Jeffrey Clemens
papers.abstract: This paper explores how diagnostic thresholds and a written consent requirement affect decision making between patients and transplant surgeons regarding the use of deceased donor kidneys. Combining administrative data on the universe of organ donors and transplant recipients in the United States, we show that age-based discontinuities within the Expanded Criteria Donor system (ECD), which was in place from late 2002 to late 2014, led to 4.0 and 5.4 percentage point differences in the rates at which otherwise indistinguishable kidneys were discarded. A discontinuity within the subsequent presentation of the Kidney Donor Profile Index (KDPI) led to a 2.6 percentage point difference. We present evidence that diagnostic thresholds have nuanced effects on decision making and information acquisition; procurement biopsy rates, for example, rose substantially at the ECD system’s age-based discontinuities. We further show that written consent requirements triggered within the ECD and KDPI labeling systems substantially reduced the number of potential recipients to whom kidneys were offered prior to being discarded. This channel can explain the majority of the increased rate at which “High-KDPI” kidneys are discarded under the current system.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 诊断阈值、书面同意要求与稀缺器官的利用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨诊断阈值和书面同意要求如何影响患者与移植外科医生关于使用 deceased donor kidneys 的决策。结合美国所有器官捐献者和移植受者的行政数据，我们表明，在2002年底至2014年底实施的扩展标准供体（ECD）系统中，基于年龄的不连续性导致原本无法区分的肾脏被丢弃的比率出现4.0和5.4个百分点的差异。随后在肾脏供体概况指数（KDPI）呈现中的不连续性导致了2.6个百分点的差异。我们提供的证据表明，诊断阈值对决策和信息获取具有细微影响；例如，在ECD系统的年龄不连续性处，采购活检率大幅上升。我们进一步表明，在ECD和KDPI标签系统中触发的书面同意要求，显著减少了肾脏在被丢弃前被提供给潜在受体的数量。这一渠道可以解释在当前系统下“高KDPI”肾脏被丢弃比率上升的大部分原因。

papers.title: Ambiguity vs. Risk in Investment Decisions: A Continuous Decomposition
papers.authors: Geoffrey Heal, Marcella Lucchetta
papers.abstract: This paper provides a novel framework for assessing the effect of ambiguity on asset values within the Klibanoff-Marinacci-Mukerji (KMM) smooth ambiguity framework. By shifting the analysis into a continuous space of prior probabilities, we establish that ambiguity leads to an adjustment of beliefs (“ambiguity-adjusted probabilities” or “distorted probabilities”) characterized by First-Order Stochastic Dominance (FSD). Leveraging this property, we introduce a systematic economic decomposition of asset valuation separating the baseline risky valuation from the structural cost of uncertainty. Our continuous framework shows that increased ambiguity aversion depresses optimal asset demand.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 投资决策中的模糊性 vs. 风险：一种连续分解
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在Klibanoff-Marinacci-Mukerji (KMM) 平滑模糊性框架内，提供了一种评估模糊性对资产价值影响的新框架。通过将分析转移到先验概率的连续空间，我们确立了模糊性会导致信念调整（“模糊性调整概率”或“扭曲概率”），其特征为一级随机占优 (FSD)。利用这一性质，我们引入了一种系统的资产估值经济分解，将基准风险估值与不确定性的结构性成本分离开来。我们的连续框架表明，模糊性厌恶程度的提高会抑制最优资产需求。

papers.title: Structural Estimation with Unstructured Data
papers.authors: Sara Casella, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Stephen Hansen, Ryohei Oishi, Minchul Shin
papers.abstract: Standard macroeconomic data do not cleanly separate the systematic and nonsystematic components of monetary policy. We show that incorporating unstructured text data into the structural estimation of a DSGE model can sharpen this distinction. We augment a standard state-space model with a non-core measurement block that links structural shocks to time series derived from FOMC transcripts, using a spike-and-slab prior to let the data select which series are informative. In a medium-scale New Keynesian model for the U.S., incorporating text improves predictive performance and materially alters structural inference: the new model estimates a lower response of the policy rate to inflation, higher price stickiness and lower price indexation, implying a flatter and less backward-looking price Phillips curve.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 基于非结构化数据的结构估计
papers.zh_abstract: 标准的宏观经济数据无法清晰分离货币政策的系统性和非系统性成分。我们证明，将非结构化文本数据纳入DSGE模型的结构估计可以强化这种区分。我们用一个非核心测量模块来增强标准的状态空间模型，该模块将结构性冲击与源自FOMC会议记录的时间序列联系起来，并使用spike-and-slab先验让数据选择哪些序列具有信息量。在一个针对美国的中等规模新凯恩斯模型中，纳入文本数据提高了预测性能，并实质性地改变了结构性推断：新模型估计的政策利率对通胀的响应更低，价格粘性更高，价格指数化程度更低，这意味着一条更平坦且更少后顾性的价格菲利普斯曲线。

papers.title: Learning and the Efficiency of Expert Referrals
papers.authors: Ian McCarthy, Seth Richards-Shubik
papers.abstract: Buyers of complex goods and services often rely on the advice of expert intermediaries who are themselves imperfectly informed about the quality of the available options. How well do these intermediaries learn about that quality and act on it? We study this question in the setting of referrals from primary care physicians (PCPs) to specialists, using data on 4.5 million joint replacement surgeries for Medicare beneficiaries. We first document substantial heterogeneity in specialist quality and costs within geographic markets, and we present design-based evidence showing that PCPs adjust their referrals specifically based on the outcomes of their own patients. We then employ a structural learning model of PCP referral choices to quantify the losses from informational frictions and to simulate possible reallocations with improved information. Beyond learning, the model also accounts for limitations on possible reallocations due to habit persistence and capacity constraints. We find that about one-quarter of patients would be referred to a different specialist in the absence of informational frictions, with small but meaningful improvements in patient outcomes.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 学习与专家转诊的效率
papers.zh_abstract: 复杂商品和服务的购买者通常依赖专家中介的建议，而这些中介自身对可用选项的质量了解并不完全。这些中介在多大程度上能够学习并据此采取行动？我们利用医疗保险受益人的450万例关节置换手术数据，在初级保健医生 (PCP) 向专科医生转诊的背景下研究了这一问题。我们首先记录了地理市场内专科医生质量和成本的显著异质性，并提供了基于设计的证据，表明PCP会根据其自身患者的治疗结果来调整转诊。然后，我们采用PCP转诊选择的结构性学习模型来量化信息摩擦造成的损失，并模拟在信息改善情况下可能的资源重新配置。除了学习因素外，该模型还考虑了因习惯持续性和产能限制而对可能重新配置施加的限制。我们发现，在没有信息摩擦的情况下，大约四分之一的患者会被转诊给不同的专科医生，患者治疗结果会有微小但有意义的改善。

papers.title: Critical Peak Rewards: Evidence from a Nationwide Demand Response Program
papers.authors: Louise Bernard, Robert D. Metcalfe, Andrew Schein
papers.abstract: Demand flexibility at scale is likely to be an important part of the future energy system. This study evaluated the world’s first nationwide domestic and commercial demand flexibility program. We analyzed the policy using a natural field experiment, with a sample of 2.7 million, assigning 119,999 customers to a control group and the rest to receive randomized encouragement to sign up to the demand flexibility program. The program paid consumers to reduce their demand below a predicted baseline at peak demand across 16 events (i.e., when the system was stressed) during the Winter of 2023–24. Customers who opted into events reduced demand during events by 23.1% among compliers, at an average cost for the system operator of £2,325 per MWh. The adoption of solar panels and batteries, heat pumps, and EVs all increased demand response.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 关键峰值奖励：来自全国性需求响应项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 大规模的需求灵活性很可能是未来能源系统的重要组成部分。本研究评估了世界上首个全国性家庭和商业需求灵活性项目。我们通过一个自然现场实验分析了该政策，样本量为270万，将119,999名客户分配到对照组，其余客户则接受随机鼓励以注册该需求灵活性项目。该项目在2023-24年冬季的16个事件（即系统承压时）中，向消费者支付费用，使其需求低于预测的峰值需求基线。在依从者中，选择参与事件的客户在事件期间将需求降低了23.1%，系统运营商的平均成本为每兆瓦时2,325英镑。太阳能电池板、电池、热泵和电动汽车的采用均增加了需求响应。

papers.title: Policy Thresholds as Growth Barriers: Theory and Evidence from a Payroll Tax Notch
papers.authors: Sami Jysmä, Youssef Benzarti, Jarkko Harju
papers.abstract: Discrete policy thresholds are pervasive in tax and regulatory systems and can substantially distort behavior. We show that notches acting as barriers to mobility within a distribution generate distortions extending far beyond the threshold. The same mechanism biases conventional difference-in-differences estimators, and we propose a new methodology to recover causal effects. Applying the method to the abolition of a size-based payroll tax notch, we find that the notch reduced the number of firms above the threshold by 18 percent and lowered treated firms’ employment, capital stock, and value added by 10 percent, whereas conventional difference-in-differences estimates imply negligible effects.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 作为增长障碍的政策阈值：来自工资税断点的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 离散的政策阈值在税收和监管体系中普遍存在，并可能显著扭曲行为。我们证明，作为分布内流动性障碍的断点所产生的扭曲效应远远超出阈值本身。相同的机制会使传统的双重差分估计量产生偏误，我们提出了一种新的方法来恢复因果效应。将该方法应用于废除基于规模的工资税断点，我们发现该断点使阈值以上的企业数量减少了18%，并使受处理企业的就业、资本存量和增加值降低了10%，而传统的双重差分估计则意味着影响可以忽略不计。

papers.title: Sharpening Economic Interpretation with HARS
papers.authors: Dawis Kim, Tao Zha
papers.abstract: We develop a unified framework that combines shock volatility with sign and narrative restrictions and provides the theoretical foundation for the computationally efficient sampler HARS. HARS preserves the heteroskedastic likelihood and can be combined with any posterior simulator for the heteroskedastic model. In monetary policy, oil market, and fiscal policy models, the same restrictions deliver substantively different economics once shock heteroskedasticity is accounted for. Homoskedastic SVARs put uncertainty in the wrong place, pushing shock-scale variation into impulse-response uncertainty. Heteroskedasticity sharpens dynamic responses, alters economic conclusions, and restores 90% credible intervals as a practical standard for economic inference.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 利用HARS强化经济解释
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个统一框架，将冲击波动性与符号约束和叙事约束相结合，并为计算高效的采样器HARS提供了理论基础。HARS保留了异方差似然函数，并且可以与任何用于异方差模型的后验模拟器结合使用。在货币政策、石油市场和财政政策模型中，一旦考虑了冲击的异方差性，相同的约束条件会得出实质上不同的经济学结论。同方差SVAR将不确定性置于错误的位置，将冲击规模的变化推入脉冲响应不确定性中。异方差性强化了动态响应，改变了经济结论，并将90%的置信区间恢复为经济推断的实用标准。

papers.title: Life After Divorce: Effects of Joint Custody on Parents and Children
papers.authors: Stella Canessa, Gordon B. Dahl, Anna Hasselqvist, Costas Meghir, Susan Niknami, Mårten Palme, Helmut Rainer, Olof Rosenqvist, Pengpeng Xiao
papers.abstract: Divorce reshapes family life, yet little is known about one of its most consequential features: the allocation of child custody. We study the impact of joint versus sole custody on both parents and children using rich administrative data from Sweden linked to over 25 years of newly-collected court custody rulings. To address selection concerns, we exploit random assignment of custody disputes to judges who differ sharply in their propensity to grant joint custody. For fathers, joint custody substantially raises earnings and improves mental health, consistent with sustained paternal involvement enhancing labor market attachment and psychological well-being. In contrast, there are no measurable labor market or mental health effects for mothers. Turning to children, joint custody increases standardized test scores and school quality without affecting mental health outcomes. Joint custody increases fathers’ chances of remarriage, keeps separated parents in closer geographic proximity, and has no effect on intimate partner violence allegations against either partner. These findings inform longstanding debates over the role of child custody in shaping post-divorce family life.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 离婚后的生活：共同监护权对父母和子女的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 离婚重塑了家庭生活，然而对其最具影响力的特征之一——子女监护权的分配——却知之甚少。我们利用瑞典超过25年新收集的法院监护权裁决行政数据，研究了共同监护权与单独监护权对父母和子女双方的影响。为解决选择性问题，我们利用了监护权争议案件随机分配给在授予共同监护权倾向上存在显著差异的法官这一机制。对于父亲而言，共同监护权显著提高了其收入并改善了心理健康，这与持续的父亲参与增强了劳动力市场依附和心理幸福感相一致。相比之下，对母亲而言，没有可衡量的劳动力市场或心理健康影响。转向子女方面，共同监护权提高了标准化考试成绩和学校质量，但不影响心理健康结果。共同监护权增加了父亲再婚的机会，使分居父母在地理上保持更近的距离，并且对任何一方的亲密伴侣暴力指控没有影响。这些发现为关于监护权在塑造离婚后家庭生活中作用的长期争论提供了信息。

papers.title: Inference with AI-Generated Covariates
papers.authors: Junting Duan, Markus Pelger
papers.abstract: Empirical researchers increasingly use large language models (LLMs) to extract structured features, such as sentiment scores, classifications, and expectations, from unstructured data and treat these generated features as observed covariates in downstream estimation. This practice can invalidate inference when systematic, input-dependent errors in generated features, such as hallucination and look-ahead bias, distort the downstream moment conditions. Even after correction, generated features remain noisy proxies whose error profiles differ across models and prompts. We introduce AI-Powered Inference (AI-PI), a method-of-moments framework for valid and efficient inference that combines three components: a moment-specific bias correction based on a small human-labeled calibration set; adaptive weights that optimally combine multiple model-prompt pairs; and an optimal calibration-set design that concentrates costly human labels where the generated features are least reliable. We establish consistency and asymptotic normality of the AI-PI estimator, allowing for data-adaptive labeling designs, cross-fitted LLM-pipeline tuning, and overidentified GMM. Simulations confirm substantial gains over naive LLM regressions and over debiasing without optimal weighting or labeling design. In an application to news-based sentiment and stock returns, AI-PI produces stable conclusions where naive analyses vary substantially across LLM and prompt choices, with a confidence interval roughly half as long as using the human-labeled data alone.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 基于AI生成协变量的推断
papers.zh_abstract: 实证研究者越来越多地使用大型语言模型（LLMs）从非结构化数据中提取结构化特征，如情感得分、分类和预期，并将这些生成的特征视为下游估计中的观测协变量。当生成特征中系统性的、依赖于输入的误差（如幻觉和前瞻性偏差）扭曲了下游矩条件时，这种做法可能使推断无效。即使在修正之后，生成的特征仍然是带有噪声的代理变量，其误差特征因模型和提示词而异。我们引入了AI驱动推断（AI-PI），这是一个用于有效和高效推断的矩方法框架，它结合了三个组成部分：基于小型人工标注校准集的特定矩偏差修正；最优组合多个模型-提示词对的自适应权重；以及最优校准集设计，将昂贵的人工标注集中在生成特征最不可靠的地方。我们建立了AI-PI估计量的一致性和渐近正态性，允许数据自适应标注设计、交叉拟合的LLM管道调优以及过度识别的GMM。模拟证实，与朴素的LLM回归以及未使用最优加权或标注设计的去偏方法相比，该方法有显著改进。在一个基于新闻的情感与股票回报的应用中，当朴素分析因LLM和提示词选择而存在显著差异时，AI-PI产生了稳定的结论，其置信区间长度约为仅使用人工标注数据的一半。

papers.title: Estimating Trends In Mental Distress Using Survey Data
papers.authors: Christopher J. Ruhm
papers.abstract: One way of examining how mental health has changed over time is to use information available in large national surveys. While these survey-based measures are valuable in principle, and have been widely employed in prior research, a number of challenges may limit their practical usefulness or require considerable care in their application. This study uses data on U.S. 18-64 year olds from five major household surveys over the period 1999-2019 to investigate three specific questions. First, do different measures or the same indicator from different data sets consistently show how mental distress has changed over time? Second, how does the performance of single-item measures compare to those of psychometrically validated screeners based on multiple questions? Third, what are the benefits or potential costs of using different functional forms of these measures? The answers to these questions are as follows: 1) the estimated trends vary, often dramatically, across measures and, for the same indicator, across data sets and, as a result, some proxies provide a misleading understanding of how mental health has changed over time; 2) the single-item measures do as well or better than those based on multiple questions; 3) no single functional form demonstrates clear superiority over the others. After demonstrating these points, lessons are elucidated for researchers attempting to use survey data to examine trends in mental health.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 利用调查数据估计心理困扰趋势
papers.zh_abstract: 考察心理健康随时间变化的一种方法是利用大型全国性调查中的可用信息。虽然这些基于调查的指标原则上很有价值，并已在先前研究中被广泛使用，但若干挑战可能限制其实用性，或需要在其应用中格外谨慎。本研究利用1999-2019年期间来自五项主要家庭调查的美国18-64岁人群数据，探讨三个具体问题。第一，来自不同数据集的、不同的衡量指标或同一指标是否一致地显示了心理困扰随时间的变化？第二，单项指标的表现与基于多个问题的、经过心理测量学验证的筛查工具相比如何？第三，使用这些指标的不同函数形式有哪些益处或潜在成本？对这些问题的回答如下：1）估计的趋势在不同指标之间，以及对于同一指标在不同数据集之间，往往存在显著差异，有时甚至差异巨大，因此，一些代理变量会提供关于心理健康随时间如何变化的误导性理解；2）单项指标的表现与基于多个问题的指标相当或更好；3）没有单一的函数形式显示出明显优于其他形式。在论证了这些要点之后，本文为试图利用调查数据研究心理健康趋势的研究者阐明了经验教训。

papers.title: Firm Exit and Financial Frictions
papers.authors: Gideon Bornstein, Laura Castillo-Martinez
papers.abstract: Governments often intervene to prevent firm closures during crises, fearing that financially constrained but viable firms may fail. We develop a firm dynamics model with incomplete financial markets and show how financial frictions generate excessive firm exit. A key statistic governing this dynamic inefficiency is the marginal propensity to exit with debt. Using confidential U.S. Census data, we estimate the relationship between debt and exit and use it to discipline the model. The calibrated model implies that eliminating financial frictions reduces firm exit from 9.3% to 5.0% and generates welfare gains of 3.6% in consumption-equivalent terms. We show that the welfare costs of financial frictions rise sharply during financial crises but change little during standard productivity recessions. Finally, we compare government-guaranteed loans and grants, quantifying the trade-off between fiscal cost and effectiveness in preventing excessive exit.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 企业退出与金融摩擦
papers.zh_abstract: 政府经常在危机期间干预以防止企业倒闭，担心那些受到金融约束但有生存能力的企业可能会失败。我们构建了一个具有不完全金融市场的企业动态模型，并展示了金融摩擦如何导致过度的企业退出。决定这种动态无效率的一个关键统计量是债务的边际退出倾向。利用保密的美国人口普查数据，我们估计了债务与退出之间的关系，并用其来约束模型。校准后的模型表明，消除金融摩擦将使企业退出率从9.3%降至5.0%，并产生相当于消费等价3.6%的福利收益。我们表明，金融摩擦的福利成本在金融危机期间急剧上升，但在标准的生产率衰退期间变化不大。最后，我们比较了政府担保贷款和赠款，量化了在防止过度退出方面财政成本与有效性之间的权衡。

papers.title: Better Together? The Impact of Cash Transfers and Couples' Financial Planning on Household Dynamics and Economic Outcomes
papers.authors: Sarika Gupta, Jessica Leight, Daniel W. Maggio, Simone G. Schaner
papers.abstract: Households' most consequential economic decisions are usually made jointly, yet behavioral interventions are typically targeted to individuals and optimized to overcome intra-personal constraints. We use a randomized controlled trial to study whether behavioral interventions targeted to couples can overcome interpersonal constraints related to intra-household decision-making. In rural Liberia, we layer a facilitated joint financial planning exercise atop a large unconditional cash transfer, assessing effects relative to cash only and a pure control. Relative to cash only, adding planning increases the amount of the transfer spent on productive investment and consequently improves economic outcomes by 0.16 standard deviation units. However, for households with the highest ex-ante conflict risk, these gains come at the cost of additional intimate partner violence.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 携手共进？现金转移与夫妻财务规划对家庭动态和经济结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭最具后果的经济决策通常是共同做出的，然而行为干预通常针对个人，并优化以克服个人内部的约束。我们使用一项随机对照试验来研究针对夫妻的行为干预能否克服与家庭内部决策相关的人际约束。在利比里亚农村地区，我们在一次大规模无条件现金转移之上叠加了一项有引导的联合财务规划练习，评估其相对于仅现金转移和纯对照组的效果。与仅现金转移相比，增加规划提高了用于生产性投资的转移金额比例，从而使经济结果改善了0.16个标准差单位。然而，对于事前冲突风险最高的家庭，这些收益是以增加亲密伴侣暴力为代价的。

papers.title: In Sickness and in Health: Retirement Responses to Spousal Health Shocks
papers.authors: Hyeran Chung, Haena Lee, Sita Slavov
papers.abstract: Health shocks are a major driver of retirement. However, the existing literature on this topic tends not to consider the marital context in which retirements occur. Using the 1992-2022 Health and Retirement Study and staggered difference-in-differences methods, we investigate how spousal health shocks impact retirement transitions. We also investigate whether these effects differ by gender and health insurance status. We consider multiple definitions of health shocks, including self-reported health declines, additional diagnoses, hospitalizations, increases in out-of-pocket medical spending, and functional deterioration. Our results suggest that the probability of retirement increases by 1.2 to 1.3 percentage points (12 to 13 percent) after a spouse’s new health condition diagnosis or hospitalization. These retirements tend to occur earlier than anticipated. They also tend to be concentrated among women and respondents with employment-based health plans that include retiree coverage for their spouse.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 疾病与健康：对配偶健康冲击的退休反应
papers.zh_abstract: 健康冲击是退休的主要驱动因素之一。然而，关于这一主题的现有文献往往不考虑退休发生的婚姻背景。利用1992-2022年健康与退休研究以及交错双重差分方法，我们调查了配偶健康冲击如何影响退休转变。我们还研究了这些影响是否因性别和健康保险状况而异。我们考虑了健康冲击的多种定义，包括自评健康下降、新增诊断、住院、自付医疗支出增加以及功能恶化。我们的结果表明，在配偶新诊断出健康状况或住院后，退休概率增加了1.2至1.3个百分点（12%至13%）。这些退休往往比预期更早发生。它们也往往集中在女性和那些拥有包含配偶退休人员保险的就业型健康计划的受访者中。

papers.title: Oligopsony and Collective Bargaining
papers.authors: Tirza J. Angerhofer, Allan Collard-Wexler, Matthew C. Weinberg
papers.abstract: Employers facing limited labor market competition may suppress wages below socially optimal levels. Unions can counteract wage suppression through collective bargaining, though they may also push wages above the socially optimal level and lead to job rationing. We estimate a structural model of labor supply, labor demand, and Nash-in-Nash bargaining over wages between local teacher unions and school districts in Pennsylvania’s K-12 public school system from 2013 to 2019. We compare negotiated equilibrium wages and employment to oligopsony wage posting and social planner scenarios. On average, oligopsony reduces wages 7 percent below the social optimum, while collective bargaining raises wages 8 percent above it. Averages mask substantial district-level heterogeneity driven by bargaining power variation. Twenty-eight percent of school districts have salaries lower when public schools are unionized than when they are not due to cross-district externalities, where high salaries at one school cause hiring reductions that increase labor supply elsewhere.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 寡头买方垄断与集体谈判
papers.zh_abstract: 面临有限劳动力市场竞争的雇主可能将工资压低至社会最优水平以下。工会可以通过集体谈判抵消工资压制，但也可能将工资推高至社会最优水平以上并导致工作配给。我们估计了一个包含劳动力供给、劳动力需求以及地方教师工会与宾夕法尼亚州K-12公立学校系统（2013年至2019年）之间工资纳什谈判的结构模型。我们将谈判均衡工资和就业与寡头买方垄断工资设定及社会规划者情景进行比较。平均而言，寡头买方垄断使工资低于社会最优水平7%，而集体谈判使工资高于社会最优水平8%。平均值掩盖了由谈判能力差异驱动的显著学区层面异质性。28%的学区在公立学校工会化时的工资低于非工会化情况，这是由于跨学区外部性——一个学校的高工资导致招聘减少，从而增加了其他地方的劳动力供给。

papers.title: The Labor Market Impacts of GLP-1s
papers.authors: N. Meltem Daysal, Camille JH. Fredrickson, Ida L. Kristiansen, Mircea Trandafir, Jonathan Zhang
papers.abstract: We estimate the causal impacts of GLP-1 treatment on labor market outcomes using linked Danish administrative data and a matched stacked difference-in-differences design. We compare patients who initiate GLP-1 treatment during the first two years of Semaglutide availability to observably similar patients who initiate four years later. We find that GLP-1 treatment reduces long-term sickness leave by 17.3%. We estimate total fiscal benefits of GLP-1 initiation of approximately 1.3–1.5% of annual labor income per employed individual. We do not detect statistically significant or economically meaningful impacts on income, labor force participation, or employment over four years.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: GLP-1类药物对劳动力市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用关联的丹麦行政数据和匹配堆叠双重差分设计，估计了GLP-1治疗对劳动力市场结果的因果影响。我们比较了在司美格鲁肽上市头两年内开始GLP-1治疗的患者与四年后开始治疗的观察上相似的患者。我们发现GLP-1治疗使长期病假减少17.3%。我们估计GLP-1启动的总财政收益约为每位就业者年劳动收入的1.3%至1.5%。在四年内，我们没有检测到对收入、劳动力参与率或就业具有统计显著或经济意义的影响。

papers.title: Monopsony and Backloaded Compensation: Theory and Evidence from Public Accountants
papers.authors: Michael Rubens, Bernardo S. Silveira
papers.abstract: In monopsony models, wage markdowns induce deadweight loss and are therefore inefficient. Yet markdowns also arise in models with backloaded efficiency pay, where they are designed to induce effort among early-career workers and are thus efficient. To reconcile—and empirically distinguish—these two mechanisms, we build a dynamic model incorporating labor market power and endogenous effort. Estimating a team production model on novel data on U.S. public accounting firms, we find evidence of both: markdowns for junior workers and markups for senior ones reflect incentive-providing backloading, while monopsony power induces a ‘lifetime’ wage markdown of 15%.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 买方垄断与延迟补偿：来自公共会计师的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在买方垄断模型中，工资折价导致无谓损失，因此是低效的。然而，在延迟效率工资模型中也会出现折价，这些折价旨在激励早期职业员工付出努力，因此是高效的。为了调和并实证区分这两种机制，我们构建了一个包含劳动力市场势力和内生努力的动态模型。利用美国公共会计师事务所的新数据估计团队生产模型，我们发现了两种机制的证据：初级员工的折价和高级员工的溢价反映了提供激励的延迟补偿，而买方垄断势力则导致“终身”工资折价15%。

papers.title: A Large-Scale Evaluation of Merger Simulations
papers.authors: Vivek Bhattacharya, Gastón Illanes, Avner A. Kreps, José D. Salas, David Stillerman
papers.abstract: Prospective merger simulations are a commonly used tool in industrial organization and antitrust, but evidence about their accuracy and predictive ability is limited. We study 101 mergers in consumer packaged goods and compare the realizations of price changes with predictions from merger simulations. In our sample of consummated mergers, predicted price changes from merger simulations are typically larger than realized ones. Despite the overprediction, we find that full merger simulations are more effective than both structural presumptions and approximations of the merger effect at identifying mergers with large price changes.
papers.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API
papers.zh_title: 并购模拟的大规模评估
papers.zh_abstract: 前瞻性并购模拟是产业组织和反垄断中常用的工具，但关于其准确性和预测能力的证据有限。我们研究了消费品领域的101起并购，并将价格变化的实际结果与并购模拟的预测进行比较。在我们已完成的并购样本中，并购模拟预测的价格变化通常大于实际变化。尽管存在过度预测，我们发现完整的并购模拟在识别价格变化较大的并购方面，比结构性推定和并购效应的近似值更有效。

papers.title: Estimating the Economic Effects of Federally Funded R&D
papers.authors: Sheila Campbell, Jaeger Nelson, Eli A. Schrag, Heidi L. Williams, Caleb K. Wroblewski
papers.abstract: In recent years, there has been Congressional interest in changing various policies related to research and development (R&D). Recent legislation has included provisions that would modify federal funding for R&D investments and tax provisions affecting the after-tax price of R&D. The Congressional Budget Office (CBO) has developed analytical frameworks for estimating how changes in R&D investments affect the economy and the federal budget. This paper describes the agency’s current analytical framework for modeling the economic effects of changes in federal funding for R&D, focusing on two distinct approaches that CBO has developed: an R&D capital stock approach and an R&D components approach.

papers.zh_title: 估算联邦资助研发的经济效应
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，国会一直有兴趣改变与研发相关的各项政策。最近的立法包括修改联邦研发投资资助的条款以及影响研发税后价格的税收条款。国会预算办公室（CBO）开发了分析框架，用于估算研发投资变化如何影响经济和联邦预算。本文描述了该机构当前用于模拟联邦研发资助变化经济效应的分析框架，重点介绍了CBO开发的两种不同方法：研发资本存量方法和研发组成部分方法。

papers.title: Walking with Feet Tied to the Past: Childhood Exposure to the 1918 Influenza Pandemic and Later-Life Male Mortality
papers.authors: Hamid Noghanibehambari, Jason Fletcher
papers.abstract: Many previous studies have used cross-cohort comparisons and a focus on in utero exposure to document the lingering effects of the 1918 influenza pandemic on survivors’ outcomes later in life. A subset has examined impacts on old-age health and mortality, finding mixed results. This paper contributes to the literature by extending the analysis to evaluate early-life and childhood exposure to the pandemic on old-age longevity along with a set of candidate mechanisms. We employ Social Security Administration death records linked to the full-count 1940 census and employ event-study and difference-in-difference regressions to compare longevity of cohorts with different age-at-exposure who were born in cities with high versus low exposure based on 1918 influenza-related mortality. Our treatment-on-treated calculations suggest that cohorts with age-at-exposure of 3-8 and 9-11 experience 6.4 and 11.2 months reductions in old age longevity; importantly, we note that these cohorts are often used as “controls” in the broader literature. While our main analysis focuses on males due to data constraints, supplementary results suggest smaller and less precise effects for females. An analysis of census data suggests reductions in health, education and socioeconomic scores as potential mechanisms.

papers.zh_title: 带着过去的束缚前行：童年期暴露于1918年流感大流行与晚年男性死亡率
papers.zh_abstract: 许多先前的研究利用跨队列比较并聚焦于子宫内暴露，记录了1918年流感大流行对幸存者晚年结果的持续影响。其中一部分研究考察了对老年健康和死亡率的影响，结果不一。本文通过将分析扩展到评估早期生活和童年期暴露于大流行对老年寿命的影响以及一组候选机制，为文献做出贡献。我们利用与社会保障管理局死亡记录相关联的全量1940年人口普查数据，并采用事件研究和双重差分回归，比较了不同暴露年龄队列的寿命，这些队列基于1918年流感相关死亡率出生在高暴露与低暴露城市。我们的处理组平均处理效应计算表明，暴露年龄为3-8岁和9-11岁的队列，其老年寿命分别减少6.4个月和11.2个月；重要的是，我们注意到这些队列在更广泛的文献中常被用作“对照组”。虽然由于数据限制，我们的主要分析聚焦于男性，但补充结果表明对女性的影响较小且不精确。对人口普查数据的分析表明，健康、教育和社会经济得分的下降是潜在的机制。

papers.title: The U.S. Mortality Crisis as a Preston Curve Reversal
papers.authors: Ritikaa Khanna, Rourke O'Brien, Andrew C. Stokes, Atheendar Venkataramani, Elizabeth Wrigley-Field
papers.abstract: U.S. life expectancy stagnated and declined in the 2010s despite continued growth in real per capita income. We use Preston curves to characterize this pattern as a change in the relationship between income and longevity. Using state-level data from 1980 to 2019 and county-level data from 2000 to 2019, we estimate population-weighted Preston curves relating life expectancy to logged real per capita income. From 1980 to 2010, U.S. states followed the classic Preston curve pattern: rising income was accompanied by rising life expectancy. Counties followed the same pattern from 2000 to 2010. From 2010 to 2019, however, states and counties continued to become richer while life expectancy stagnated or declined. The curves shifted right without shifting up and became steeper, indicating decoupling and divergence: increases in aggregate resources over time no longer produced broad longevity gains, and, in any given year, inequality in life expectancy by income grew. These patterns are robust to alternative temporal anchors around the Great Recession and to substituting education for income. They also appear across sex and racial groups. County-level decompositions are broadly consistent with arguments that longevity has fallen due to widely shared exposures to social deterioration, which may account for the Preston curve reversal. Collectively, we show that the recent U.S. mortality crisis reveals a weakening—and growing inequality—in the conversion of aggregate resources into longevity gains. We conclude that the recent U.S. mortality crisis could be understood not only as a story about particular causes of death, but also as a weakening of institutional and social translation.

papers.zh_title: 美国死亡率危机作为普雷斯顿曲线逆转
papers.zh_abstract: 2010年代，尽管实际人均收入持续增长，美国预期寿命却停滞甚至下降。我们利用普雷斯顿曲线将这一模式描述为收入与寿命之间关系的变化。基于1980年至2019年的州级数据和2000年至2019年的县级数据，我们估计了人口加权的普雷斯顿曲线，该曲线将预期寿命与对数实际人均收入联系起来。从1980年到2010年，美国各州遵循经典的普雷斯顿曲线模式：收入上升伴随预期寿命上升。各县在2000年至2010年也遵循相同模式。然而，从2010年到2019年，各州和各县继续变得更加富裕，而预期寿命却停滞或下降。曲线向右平移而未向上移动，并且变得更加陡峭，这表明脱钩和分化：随着时间的推移，总资源的增加不再带来广泛的寿命增益，并且在任何给定年份，按收入划分的预期寿命不平等加剧。这些模式在围绕大衰退的替代时间锚点以及用教育替代收入时依然稳健。它们也出现在不同性别和种族群体中。县级分解结果与以下论点基本一致：寿命下降是由于广泛共享的社会恶化暴露所致，这可能解释了普雷斯顿曲线的逆转。总体而言，我们表明，近期美国死亡率危机揭示了将总资源转化为寿命增益的能力正在减弱——且不平等日益加剧。我们得出结论，近期美国死亡率危机不仅可被理解为特定死因的故事，也可被理解为制度和社会转化能力的弱化。

papers.title: Severe Cognitive Impairments and Long-term Care in Germany
papers.authors: Elsa Perdrix, Axel H. Börsch-Supan, Johannes Geyer, Peter Haan, Sami Louahlia
papers.abstract: Germany experiences an increase in LTC recipients, due to population ageing but also to reforms which made LTC benefits easier accessible for individuals with cognitive impairments. Previous studies documented the cost of long-term care, and how it evolved. However, less is known about the specific case of elderly people suffering from cognitive impairment. Thus, we measure the economic costs of cognitive impairment, which include extensive medical, nursing care and at-home long-term care. We use the SHARE, the Survey on Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe, Wave 9. We observe 4% of elderly people living at home with severe cognitive impairment (SCI) (Langa et al. (2017) definition). These individuals are 30% more likely to receive any care, and obtain on average 6 more hours of formal care and 6 more hours of informal care per week. The main driver is not the cognitive impairment per-se but the limitation in activities of daily living (ADLs) which SCI leads to. Thus, once controlling for ADLs, SCI does not explain any additional probability to use care. However, because people with SCI are more likely to have ADLs, the annual cost of their care is estimated to 10,000 euros per year per individual on average.

papers.zh_title: 德国严重认知障碍与长期护理
papers.zh_abstract: 德国长期护理（LTC）受益人数增加，这既源于人口老龄化，也源于使认知障碍者更易获得LTC福利的改革。以往研究记录了长期护理的成本及其演变。然而，关于患有认知障碍的老年人的具体情况知之甚少。因此，我们衡量了认知障碍的经济成本，包括广泛的医疗、护理和居家长期护理。我们使用欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查（SHARE）第9波数据。我们观察到4%的居家老年人患有严重认知障碍（SCI）（Langa等人（2017）定义）。这些个体接受任何护理的可能性高出30%，平均每周多获得6小时正式护理和6小时非正式护理。主要驱动因素并非认知障碍本身，而是SCI导致的活动日常活动（ADL）限制。因此，在控制ADL后，SCI不再解释任何额外的护理使用概率。然而，由于SCI患者更有可能存在ADL限制，其护理年成本平均估计为每人每年10,000欧元。

papers.title: Cognitive Aging and Long-Term Care in Italy
papers.authors: Agar Brugiavini, Ludovico Carrino, Gloria Moroni, Rinaldo Naci, Giacomo Pasini
papers.abstract: This chapter examines the incidence and economic burden of cognitive impairment among older individuals in Italy within the long-term care (LTC) system. Using SHARE Wave 9 data (2022), cognitive impairment is measured through standardized memory and numeracy tests, classifying 8.6% of individuals aged 65+ as cognitively impaired. Cognitive decline rises sharply with age and is strongly associated with higher care needs, particularly intensive formal care. While both physically and cognitively impaired individuals rely heavily on informal care, cognitively impaired individuals receive substantially more hours of care. Total LTC costs amount to $35.3 billion (1.66% of GDP), with cognitively impaired individuals accounting for the largest share of expenditures. Informal care represents a greater financial burden than formal care across all groups. The findings highlight significant unmet care needs and underscore the urgent necessity of policy reforms and healthy ageing strategies to ensure LTC sustainability.

papers.zh_title: 意大利的认知老化与长期护理
papers.zh_abstract: 本章考察了意大利长期护理系统中老年人认知障碍的发生率及其经济负担。利用SHARE第9波数据（2022年），通过标准化记忆和计算能力测试衡量认知障碍，将65岁及以上人口的8.6%归类为认知障碍者。认知衰退随年龄急剧上升，并与更高的护理需求（尤其是密集的正式护理）密切相关。虽然身体障碍者和认知障碍者都严重依赖非正式护理，但认知障碍者获得的护理时数显著更多。长期护理总成本达353亿美元（占GDP的1.66%），其中认知障碍者占支出最大份额。在所有群体中，非正式护理的经济负担均大于正式护理。研究结果揭示了大量未满足的护理需求，并强调了政策改革和健康老龄化战略的紧迫性，以确保长期护理的可持续性。
